      <title>Lemon.io: Senior Full-stack Symfony Developer</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country>🇦🇩 Andorra, 🇦🇱 Albania, 🇦🇷 Argentina, 🇦🇹 Austria, 🇦🇺 Australia, 🇧🇦 Bosnia and Herzegovina, 🇧🇪 Belgium, 🇧🇴 Bolivia (Plurinational State of), 🇧🇷 Brazil, 🇧🇿 Belize, 🇨🇦 Canada, 🇨🇭 Switzerland, 🇨🇱 Chile, 🇨🇴 Colombia, 🇨🇷 Costa Rica, 🇨🇾 Cyprus, 🇨🇿 Czechia, 🇩🇪 Germany, 🇩🇰 Denmark, 🇩🇴 Dominican Republic, 🇪🇨 Ecuador, 🇪🇪 Estonia, 🇪🇸 Spain, 🇫🇮 Finland, 🇫🇷 France, 🇬🇧 United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland, 🇬🇷 Greece, 🇬🇹 Guatemala, 🇭🇳 Honduras, 🇭🇷 Croatia, 🇭🇹 Haiti, 🇮🇩 Indonesia, 🇮🇪 Ireland, 🇮🇹 Italy, 🇯🇲 Jamaica, 🇯🇵 Japan, 🇰🇷 Korea (Republic of), 🇱🇹 Lithuania, 🇱🇺 Luxembourg, 🇱🇻 Latvia, 🇲🇦 Morocco, 🇲🇩 Moldova (Republic of), 🇲🇪 Montenegro, 🇲🇰 North Macedonia, 🇲🇹 Malta, 🇲🇽 Mexico, 🇳🇱 Netherlands, 🇳🇴 Norway, 🇳🇿 New Zealand, 🇵🇦 Panama, 🇵🇪 Peru, 🇵🇬 Papua New Guinea, 🇵🇭 Philippines, 🇵🇱 Poland, 🇵🇷 Puerto Rico, 🇵🇹 Portugal, 🇵🇾 Paraguay, 🇷🇴 Romania, 🇸🇪 Sweden, 🇸🇬 Singapore, 🇸🇮 Slovenia, 🇸🇰 Slovakia, 🇸🇻 El Salvador, 🇺🇦 Ukraine, 🇺🇸 United States of America, and 🇺🇾 Uruguay</country>
      <state>Delaware</state>
      <skills>AngularJS, JavaScript, React, Vue.js, Engineer, Senior, Developer, Full Stack Dev, Full Time, English, Symfony, TypeScript, and Vue.js./Angular</skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0076/3337/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> New York, NY
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://lemon.io">https://lemon.io</a>
</p>

<p>Are you a talented Senior Developer looking for a remote job that lets you show your skills and get decent compensation? Look no further than <a href="https://lemon.io/for-developers/?utm_source=weworkremotely&amp;utm_medium=job_ad&amp;utm_campaign=supply_en_symfony_may_2026_job_ad">Lemon.io</a> — the marketplace that connects you with hand-picked startups in the US and Europe.</p>
<p><strong>What we offer:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>The rate depends on your seniority level, skills and experience. We've already paid out over $11M to our engineers.</li>
<li>No more hunting for clients or negotiating rates — let us handle the business side of things so you can focus on what you do best.</li>
<li>We'll manually find the best project for you according to your skills and preferences.</li>
<li>Choose a schedule that works best for you. It’s possible to communicate async or minimally overlap within team working hours.</li>
<li>We respect your seniority so you can expect no micromanagement or screen trackers.</li>
<li>Communicate directly with the clients. Most of them have technical backgrounds. Sounds good, yeah?</li>
<li>We will support you from the time you submit the application throughout all cooperation stages.</li>
<li>Most of our projects involve working in a fast-paced startup environment. We hope you like it as much as we do.</li>
<li>Through our community, we will connect you with the best developers from more than 71 countries.</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>Requirements:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>4+ years of software development experience</li>
<li>3+ years of experience with Symfony and 2+ years with Vue.js</li>
</ul>
<p>OR</p>
<ul>
<li>3+ years of experience with Symfony and 2+ years with Angular</li>
</ul>
<p>OR</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>3+ years of experience with Symfony, 2+ years with Next.js, and 3+ years with JavaScript and TypeScript</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Strong technical skills: as a Senior Developer, you are expected to be able to create projects from scratch and have a deep understanding of application architecture.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Clear and effective communication in English — advanced ability to discuss business tasks, justify decisions, and communicate issues. Good self-presentation is also essential for upcoming client calls.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Strong self-organizational skills — ability to work full-time remotely with no supervision.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Reliability — we want to trust you and expect that you won’t let us and the client down.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Adaptability and Flexibility — the ability to onboard the project promptly after accepting it and start delivering results quickly.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p>Sounds good for you? Apply now and join the <a href="https://lemon.io/for-developers/?utm_source=weworkremotely&amp;utm_medium=job_ad&amp;utm_campaign=supply_en_symfony_may_2026_job_ad">Lemon.io</a> community!</p>
<p><strong>NOT YOUR TECH STACK?</strong></p>
<p>We have different projects for Senior Full-Stack Developers, so if you have 4+ years of commercial experience in software development and you are fluent with AI Agent Architecture, React &amp; Ruby, PHP &amp; Angular, PHP &amp; Vue, Vue &amp; Node.js, React &amp; .NET, Android &amp; iOS, Angular &amp; .NET, Angular &amp; Node.js, Vue &amp; .NET, Python &amp; Vue, DevOps with Azure DevOps, MLOps, React &amp; Java, Data Science, Blockchain (Web3/Solidity/Solana), Symfony &amp; React, Data Analysis, React &amp; PHP, Data Engineering, AI Engineering, Data Annotation, React &amp; Node, React &amp; Golang, React &amp; Python, Svelte &amp; Python, Svelte &amp; Node, Svelte &amp; TypeScript, Rust, Shopify &amp; JavaScript, Vue &amp; Nuxt, PHP &amp; Laravel, .NET &amp; C#, Unreal Engine &amp; C++, Python &amp; LLM, Unity, Machine Learning Engineering, we would be happy to communicate and provide you with a project that matches your experience. Just apply, and we will share more details with you.</p>
<p>We do not provide visa assistance, and our cooperation model does not include the benefits typically offered with direct hire.</p>
<p>P.S. <strong>We work with developers from 71+ countries in different regions:</strong> Europe, LATAM, the U.S (if you are an owner of W-9 ben form), Canada, Asia (Japan, Singapore, South Korea, Philippines, Indonesia), Oceania (Australia, New Zealand, Papua New Guinea), and the the UK. However, we have some exceptions.</p>
<p><strong>At the moment, we don’t have a legal basis to accept applicants from the following countries:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>European: Hungary, Iceland, Liechtenstein, Kosovo, Belarus, Russia, and Serbia.</li>
<li>Latin America: Cuba and Nicaragua</li>
<li>Most Asian countries and Africa.</li>
</ul>
<p>We expand and shorten the list of exemptions regularly.</p>
<p>We do not provide visa assistance, and our cooperation model does not include the benefits typically offered with direct hire.</p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/lemon-io-senior-full-stack-symfony-developer">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/lemon-io-senior-full-stack-symfony-developer</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <media:content url="https://wwr-pro.s3.amazonaws.com/logos/0170/8761/logo.gif" type="image/png"/>
      <title>Clipp.com: Full-Stack Growth Engineer</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country>🇺🇸 United States of America</country>
      <state>Florida</state>
      <skills>AWS, Docker, JavaScript, Python, Ruby on Rails, and SQL</skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0170/8761/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> St. Petersburg, FL
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.clipp.com/">https://www.clipp.com/</a>
</p>

<p>High-autonomy. Fast-growing startup. You ask the right questions before you start, then ship fast — clarifying scope with non-technical stakeholders and having something live by the end of the week. This is a role for builders and operators who know that 10 minutes of good questions beats a week of building the wrong thing.</p>
<h2 class="section-h2">What you'll&nbsp;own end‑to‑end</h2>
<ul class="styled-list">
<li>Ship onboarding automations, lifecycle triggers, and customer task queues — not one-off scripts, real systems</li>
<li>Analytics pipelines and dashboards non-technical stakeholders can self-serve from day one</li>
<li>A/B test infrastructure the team can run without engineering tickets</li>
<li>Take a brief cold, ask sharp clarifying questions to align on scope, then own it from start to ship</li>
</ul>
<div>
<h2 class="section-h2">The Builder <em>or </em>The Operator</h2>
<p>You might be one, or both. Either will thrive here. What matters: startup experience, genuine product sense, and the ability to translate a vague ask into a working system.</p>
</div>
<div>
<div class="section-eyebrow">What we're looking for</div>
<ul class="styled-list">
<li>3–6 years full-stack engineering, startup background strongly preferred</li>
<li>You ask sharp clarifying questions before starting — you'd rather spend 10 minutes aligning on scope than a week building the wrong thing</li>
<li>You can translate vague business problems into working technical systems</li>
<li>Genuine product sense — you care whether what you built moved the metric</li>
<li>Experience in PLG, growth, activation, or onboarding engineering is a plus</li>
<li>High autonomy — but you proactively surface blockers and check assumptions early rather than going dark and resurfacing with the wrong thing</li>
</ul>
<p>Application instructions here: <a href="https://grow.clipp.com/">https://grow.clipp.com/</a></p>
</div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/clipp-com-full-stack-growth-engineer">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/clipp-com-full-stack-growth-engineer</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>WALTER: Senior Fullstack Engineer (Ruby+React)</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state>California</state>
      <skills>React and Ruby on Rails</skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://gowalter.co">http://gowalter.co</a>
</p>

<div class="styles--2Kv6p">
<div lang="en">
<div>

<h2>Description</h2>
<div>
<p>Our client is a full-service digital product agency. They build businesses at the intersection of content and commerce, and since 2020, we've been focused on the creator economy and online education space.</p>
<p>We're a distributed team based in Canada. For this project specifically, a good part of the client team is based in Europe, so we're looking for candidates in EST or compatible timezones (anywhere from Eastern North America through Western/Central Europe) with strong overlap to a EST/CET working day.</p>
<p>This is a temporary contract role. Anticipated start date is as soon as possible.</p>
<p><strong>About the project</strong></p>
<p>You'll be joining a major build for one of our clients, a leading platform in the creator economy. They're rolling out a native Community feature that gives their users' most engaged audiences a place to gather, talk, and come back between sends, unlocking a premium upsell and stronger retention for the platform.</p>
<p>The project is mid-development by the time you start, with a beta window and a release event planned for later this year. You'll be embedded into a small, focused team and shipping production code from day one.</p>
<p><strong>About the role</strong></p>
<p>We're looking for a senior full-stack engineer comfortable working primarily in Ruby on Rails and React, who can drop into an existing codebase, ramp up quickly, and start delivering meaningful tickets within the first few weeks. You'll work alongside our existing engineering leads on this engagement, share planning and working sessions with the broader client team, and contribute directly to features being shipped to end users.</p>
<p>The stack is Ruby on Rails with Postgres and Redis Docker for local dev), a React frontend, with real-time and feed infrastructure powered by Stream.io. We use GitHub for code management and Linear for ticketing.</p>
<p>This role is hands-on. There's no Rare Days PM on this engagement (the client owns PM, so we're looking for someone who is self-directed, communicates clearly, and can operate effectively inside a client's processes and rituals.</p>
<p><strong>Responsibilities</strong></p>
<p>- Build and ship full-stack features across the Rails service layer and the React frontend on the client's community platform</p>
<p>- Pick up tickets from the Linear board, scope your own work, and deliver production-quality code with strong test coverage</p>
<p>- Participate in the client's sprint rituals, demos, and touchpoints, speaking confidently about technical decisions, trade-offs, and delivery status</p>
<p>- Collaborate closely with the existing engineers on the project (your primary pair during ramp-up) and with the client's internal engineers and PM</p>
<p>- Help drive the team toward upcoming beta and release milestones, flagging risks early and proposing solutions, not just problems</p>
<p>- Contribute to architecture and integration discussions where relevant (e.g. real-time infrastructure, feed/messaging via Stream, performance and scaling questions)</p>
<p>- Write code reviews that raise the bar without slowing the team down</p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
</div>


<h2>Requirements</h2>
<div>
<p><strong>What we're looking for</strong></p>
<p>- 7+ years of full-stack engineering experience, with substantial production work in Ruby on Rails and React</p>
<p>- Comfortable in a Rails monolith of meaningful size. You can navigate an unfamiliar codebase, find the patterns, and make changes that match the existing conventions rather than fighting them</p>
<p>- Strong with Postgres (writing efficient queries, understanding indexing, reasoning about migrations on a live database) and familiar with Redis in a caching or background-job context</p>
<p>- Experience working with React in a production app (component patterns, state management, integrating with a Rails backend)</p>
<p>- You've worked on apps where real-time features, multi-tenancy, or scale are real concerns, and you have opinions about the trade-offs (familiarity with ActionCable/AnyCable, Stream.io, Pusher, or similar is a plus)</p>
<p>- You can communicate effectively with both technical and non-technical audiences, and you're comfortable presenting your work directly to a client team</p>
<p>- You're self-directed: you can pick up a ticket, ask the right clarifying questions, and ship it without needing constant check-ins</p>
<p>- You're motivated by feedback and care about the craft. You'd rather raise a concern early than ship something you're not proud of</p>
<p>- Available to work in an EST or compatible timezone Eastern North America through Western/Central Europe), with strong overlap to a EST/CET working day for sprint rituals, pairing, and client touchpoints</p>
<p>- Comfortable working as a contractor</p>
<p><strong>Nice to have</strong></p>
<p>- Prior experience on creator-economy, publishing, or community products</p>
<p>- Background working as an embedded contractor inside a client's engineering team</p>
<p>- Familiarity with deploying Rails applications at scale Heroku, AWS, or similar)</p>
<p>- Experience integrating with third-party real-time / feed / chat services</p>
<p><strong>Engagement details</strong></p>
<p>Type: Temporary contract, full-time allocation</p>
<p>Location: Remote, EST or compatible timezone Eastern North America through Western/Central Europe)</p>
</div>

<div class="styles--2z_5t">
<div class="styles--35QFH">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="styles--I78yk">&nbsp;</div>


<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/walter-senior-fullstack-engineer-ruby-react">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/walter-senior-fullstack-engineer-ruby-react</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>WALTER: Full-Stack Engineering Lead</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state>California</state>
      <skills>Large Language Models (LLMs) and Agentic AI</skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://gowalter.co">http://gowalter.co</a>
</p>

<div class="styles--2Kv6p">
<div lang="en">
<div>

<h2>Description</h2>
<div>
<p>Our client is a multi-disciplinary digital product agency obsessed with helping creators build lasting legacies. Since 2020, they've built products at the sweet spot where content meets commerce, empowering established creators and content-led businesses to transform their passion into sustainable success.</p>
<p><strong>About the Role</strong></p>
<p>We are hiring an Engineering Lead with deep backend expertise and strong fluency across modern web stacks. This role is ideal for someone who thrives on technical challenges, loves building scalable systems, and enjoys collaborating with product, design, and client teams. You'll work both independently and with small teams, depending on the project, write production code, and play a key role in steering technical direction.</p>
<p><strong>Core Responsibilities</strong></p>
<p><strong>Technical Leadership &amp; Development</strong></p>
<p>-Design and build AI-powered tools and automations that streamline internal business processes (HR, Finance, etc.), working directly with stakeholders to identify opportunities</p>
<p>-Evaluate where LLM orchestration, chat interfaces, or multimodal AI genuinely adds value versus where standard software engineering is the right answer</p>
<p>-Design async processing pipelines, batch workflows, and decoupled service architectures suited to internal tooling at scale</p>
<p>-Oversee day-to-day engineering work, keeping the team unblocked and aligned on priorities</p>
<p>-Architect scalable backend systems using languages and frameworks such as Pythonand Java. Experience with Kotlin is a plus.</p>
<p>-Contribute to frontend work using React and TypeScript as needed</p>
<p>-Drive decision-making around performance, scalability, and system design</p>
<p>-Write clean, maintainable code and ensure engineering best practices are followed</p>
<p>-Lead technical documentation, sprint planning, and ongoing delivery</p>
<p><strong>Collaboration &amp; Client Engagement</strong></p>
<p>-Partner with product managers and designers to define and scope solutions</p>
<p>-Lead client-facing conversations around technical strategy and progress</p>
<p>-Present work during demos, milestone check-ins, and roadmap reviews</p>
<p>-Balance business needs with technical feasibility in collaborative planning sessions</p>
<p><strong>Team Mentorship &amp; Culture</strong></p>
<p>-Provide regular feedback and guidance to engineers</p>
<p>-Contribute to hiring, onboarding, and leveling processes</p>
<p>-Help foster a strong, inclusive engineering culture rooted in transparency and accountability</p>
<p>-Identify opportunities to improve our tools, processes, and technical standards</p>
</div>


<h2>Requirements</h2>
<div>
<p>-7+ years of professional engineering experience</p>
<p>-English proficiency</p>
<p>-Familiarity with AI/LLM integration patterns: orchestration frameworks, MCP, output quality management, and prompt engineering</p>
<p>-You can take a vague brief, ask the right clarifying questions, form a plan, and deliver a working system without heavy supervision</p>
<p>-You've built real systems end-to-end before and can point to specific examples. Past experience with internal tools or automation platforms is a strong plus.</p>
<p>-Experience with access control design (RBAC, zero trust principles), data sensitivity considerations, and API gateway patterns</p>
<p>-Experience with Python and Java, including system architecture and performance optimization, is required. Kotlin experience is a plus.</p>
<p>-Strong knowledge of React, NextJS, and TypeScript</p>
<p>-Backend experience with APIs, databases (SQL/NoSQL), cloud services (AWS, GCP), and distributed systems</p>
<p>-Experience with service-oriented architecture, API gateway patterns, and inter-service communication (GraphQL, gRPC, or similar)</p>
<p>-You can communicate effectively with both technical and non-technical audiences and are comfortable leading presentations and deep-dive technical discussions</p>
<p>-You understand how to compromise on business trade-offs and technical decisions</p>
<p>-You can design and communicate robust, scalable technical solutions that our internal and client teams understand and want to work on</p>
<p>-You're comfortable dealing with uncertainty and are capable of disambiguating complex scope and domains to your team</p>
<p>-You care about people and are motivated to help your team members achieve success on projects.</p>
<p><strong>Bonus Skills</strong></p>
<p>-Experience with LLM orchestration, agent frameworks, or building AI-augmented internal tools</p>
<p>-Opinions (even contrarian ones) on the current AI tooling landscape</p>
<p>-Experience building creator platforms, media tools, or community-driven products</p>
<p>-Interest in developer experience, automation, or DevOps tooling</p>
</div>


<h2>Benefits</h2>
<div>
<p>-Flexible working hours and a remote-friendly culture</p>
<p>-Flexible time-off allowance for vacation, sick days, and personal time as needed.</p>
</div>

<div class="styles--2z_5t">
<div class="styles--35QFH">&nbsp;</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="styles--I78yk">&nbsp;</div>


<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/walter-full-stack-engineering-lead">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/walter-full-stack-engineering-lead</a></p>
</description>

      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5077/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> 
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.jprog.com">https://www.jprog.com</a>
</p>

<p><strong>Job Title: Software Developer</strong></p><p><strong>Location:</strong> 100% Remote (Continental U.S. Only. Requires U.S. Central Time core hours.)</p><p><strong>Job Type:</strong> Full-time</p><p><strong>About Us:<br></strong>jProg develops innovative software solutions in the HIV public health space, with a deep commitment to improving health outcomes through technology.</p><p>Our flagship platform, CAREWare, is a secure, three-tier web application used by hundreds of State, City/County health departments and major ambulatory HIV clinics. CAREWare includes:</p><ul><li><p>A custom HTTP service written in Go</p></li><li><p>A large business tier written in VB.NET</p></li><li><p>A Microsoft SQL Server data tier</p></li><li><p>A sophisticated JavaScript/AJAX presentation layer</p></li></ul><p>The business tier contains over one million lines of code supporting features such as federal reporting, custom reporting engines, FHIR integrations, clinical coding, user/provider management, and security controls.</p><p>We are seeking a talented and dedicated software developer to join our team. Our ideal candidate is someone who excels in a dynamic, collaborative environment, and is ready to contribute to projects impacting significant health initiatives with strong skills in the following areas:</p><p><strong>Key Responsibilities:</strong></p><ul><li><p>Develop and maintain high-quality software applications.</p></li><li><p>Collaborate effectively with team members and clients to understand project requirements and deliver robust solutions.</p></li><li><p>Successfully take direction and execute tasks within an Agile environment.</p></li><li><p>Communicate progress, challenges, and solutions clearly both within the team and with clients.</p></li><li><p>Provide exceptional customer service and support when needed.</p></li><li><p>Participate in code reviews and contribute to continuous improvement practices.</p></li></ul><p><strong>Required Qualifications:</strong></p><ul><li><p>Ability to successfully clear a comprehensive criminal background check (required by client contracts).</p></li><li><p>Minimum of <strong>3–5 years of professional software development experience</strong> in a production environment.</p></li><li><p>Demonstrated ability to <strong>design, build, and maintain scalable applications</strong> with limited supervision.</p></li><li><p>Strong communication skills with both technical and non-technical stakeholders.</p></li><li><p>Experience working in Agile environments and contributing effectively within a team.</p></li><li><p>Proven problem-solving ability, including diagnosing issues, proposing solutions, and executing with sound professional judgment.</p></li><li><p>Ability to take direction while also working independently and being receptive to feedback.</p></li><li><p>Experience working remotely and managing time effectively to meet deadlines and project requirements.</p></li><li><p>Demonstrated ability to collaborate effectively with individuals from diverse backgrounds.</p></li></ul><p><strong>Preferred Qualifications:</strong></p><ul><li><p>Experience with Ryan White or Healthy Start grant programs.</p></li><li><p>Proven track record in projects that involve public health initiatives.</p></li><li><p>Understanding of and experience in implementing healthcare data management systems.</p></li><li><p>Demonstrated success and experience in data imports/interfaces, especially with HL7 and FHIR.</p></li><li><p>Proven expertise in documenting and addressing findings from software security assessments.</p></li><li><p>Proven ability to tailor software user interfaces to align seamlessly with business process requirements.</p></li><li><p>Experience in translating reporting requirements into software calculations and output.</p></li><li><p>Experience managing AWS EC2 instances, server management, and secure file transfer applications</p></li><li><p>Demonstrated passion for software development through continuous learning, technical communities, personal projects, mentoring, open-source contributions, hackathons, or other initiative-driven activities outside core job duties.</p></li></ul><p><strong>Technical Skills:</strong></p><h4>JavaScript / Front-End</h4><ul><li><p>Browser debugging and troubleshooting</p></li><li><p>CSS implementation</p></li><li><p>Secure encoding/decoding controls</p></li><li><p>Development of summarize/list/search/edit patterns using AJAX business-tier APIs</p></li></ul><h4>Go</h4><ul><li><p>Maintain HTTP service dependencies/libraries</p></li><li><p>OAuth2 library integration and maintenance</p></li><li><p>Business-tier AJAX interface support</p></li><li><p>HTML emitter/report support</p></li><li><p>Secure upload/download handling</p></li></ul><h4>VB.NET/C#</h4><ul><li><p>Maintain and extend large business-tier API functionality</p></li><li><p>Refactor legacy code for performance and consistency</p></li><li><p>Research and resolve bug/helpdesk/CMS issues</p></li><li><p>Follow coding standards and checklists</p></li></ul><h4>SQL Server</h4><ul><li><p>Hands-on experience with SQL Server in production environments.</p></li><li><p>Ability to maintain and manage large relational schemas, including database structures and maintenance routines.</p></li><li><p>Skilled in analyzing and resolving slow queries, optimizing performance, and addressing data inconsistencies.</p></li></ul><h4><strong>General Engineering:</strong></h4><ul><li><p>Experience managing GitHub repositories, including Gitflow branching strategy and familiarity with tools like GitKraken.</p></li><li><p>Experience with CI/CD processes, including build, test, and deployment automation.</p></li><li><p>Proficiency in build script creation and maintenance.</p></li><li><p>Experience with regression testing to ensure software stability and quality.</p></li><li><p>Familiarity with OWASP and NIST-aligned security best practices.</p></li><li><p>Experience using project management and collaboration tools such as Jira, HappyFox, and Slack.</p></li></ul><p><strong>Work Environment:</strong></p><ul><li><p>This is a remote position; candidates must be able to work effectively from their home office. The home office must have an environment appropriate for potential on-camera meetings and have a reliable, fast internet connection.</p></li><li><p>You must be on duty each workday during our core hours of 11:00 a.m. to 3:00 p.m. U.S. Central Time, unless approved leave is granted.&nbsp;</p></li><li><p>You must also be generally available between 7:00 a.m. and 6:00 p.m. US Central Time to accommodate business needs, with occasional early, late, or weekend shifts as needed.</p></li><li><p>This position requires your full professional focus during working hours. To ensure there is no conflict of interest or interference with your duties, any outside employment requires prior disclosure and jProg’s written approval (to the extent permitted by applicable state law).</p></li></ul><p><strong>Benefits:</strong></p><ul><li><p>Competitive salary and performance-based bonuses.</p></li><li><p>Company laptop provided.</p></li><li><p>Health insurance.</p></li><li><p>Paid time off and flexible working hours.</p></li><li><p>Retirement matching</p></li></ul><p><strong>How to Apply:</strong></p><h3><strong>Application Instructions – Single File Required</strong></h3><p><strong>IMPORTANT:</strong> Polymer accepts <strong>only one uploaded file</strong> per application.</p><p>To be considered, you must upload <strong>one single file</strong> that includes <strong>all items listed below</strong>.<br>Applications that are missing <strong>any item</strong> or are submitted as <strong>multiple files</strong> will <strong>not be reviewed</strong>.</p><h4><strong>File format</strong></h4><ul><li><p><strong>PDF strongly preferred</strong></p></li><li><p>If using another format, ensure all links are clickable and clearly labeled</p></li></ul><hr><h3><strong>Your single file must contain, in this order:</strong></h3><h4><strong>1. Resume</strong></h4><ul><li><p>Include your full resume</p></li><li><p>PDF preferred</p></li></ul><h4><strong>2. Work samples</strong></h4><ul><li><p>May be links or descriptions</p></li><li><p>Examples include documentation, diagrams, write‑ups, or other relevant materials</p></li></ul><h4><strong>3. Code &amp; portfolio information (required)</strong></h4><p>Provide <strong>at least one</strong> of the following:</p><ul><li><p>GitHub profile</p></li><li><p>Code samples</p></li><li><p>Portfolio link(s)</p></li></ul><p>If code is private or proprietary, <strong>do not upload source code</strong>.<br>Instead, briefly describe:</p><ul><li><p>Your role</p></li><li><p>The system’s size and complexity</p></li><li><p>Technologies used</p></li></ul><hr><h3><strong>Important role clarification</strong></h3><p>This role involves <strong>maintaining and enhancing large, long‑lived production systems</strong>.<br>Candidates seeking <strong>greenfield‑only (new‑build) work</strong> or <strong>short‑term project engagements</strong> should <strong>not apply</strong>.</p><p><strong>jProg is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.</strong></p><p><br></p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/jeff-murray-s-programming-shop-inc-experienced-software-developer">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/jeff-murray-s-programming-shop-inc-experienced-software-developer</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Xsolla: Full Stack Developer</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Montreal / Kuala Lumpur / Serbia / Baku / Remote
</p>

<div class="content"><div class="section-wrapper page-full-width"><div class="section page-centered"><div><b>THE OPPORTUNITY:</b></div><div><br></div><div>Xsolla’s product for Creators provides a <a class="postings-link" href="https://x.la/xpn">full cohesive creative suite</a> to support their entire content creation journey, with monetisation/engagement tools as well as a central hub of opportunities to make money promoting publishers’ games. For publishers, we provide <a class="postings-link" href="https://xsolla.com/partner-network">advanced data reporting and campaign management tools</a>, to enable businesses to take a data-driven approach in promoting their latest games through content creators.</div><div><br></div><div>As a Full Stack Developer, you will work across our entire technology stack, from our React applications for creators and publishers, to the backend Node.js microservices that work to ingest data and provide our REST/gRPC APIs. You will tackle problems such as optimising queries against our large, complex database of creator data, and ensuring our systems scale to meet the demands of game launches from major publishers.</div><div><br></div><div>Our people are driven by curiosity, continual learning, good vibes, and strong opinions. We constantly reevaluate our past decisions to determine a better path forward. We’re proud to not only build truly amazing products but to build a company and culture we can be proud of. We are grateful for the rare opportunity to solve exceptionally hard problems with people we love and respect.</div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>RESPONSIBILITIES</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>Execute full SDLC for solutions targeting business and consumer customers.</li><li>Work effectively in cross-functional teams to bring features and APIs to production.</li><li>Demonstrate strong leadership presence to inspire team members.</li><li>Comfortable with distributed systems and large datasets.</li><li>Prioritize automation for streamlined processes.</li><li>Passionate about building high-quality, innovative, and performant software.</li><li>Ensure compliance with observability best practices and technical design standards.</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>REQUIREMENTS</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>5+ years experience in web application development</li><li>Professional experience with Node.js, React, MongoDB, and TypeScript</li><li>Experience with performance and optimization problems and a demonstrated ability to both diagnose and prevent these problems</li><li>A love for automated testing</li><li>Experience designing and operating distributed microservices in containerized environments</li><li>Proficient working experience with modern auth constructs such as JWT, Claims, OAuth 2.0</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>We get really excited about people that can meet one or more of the following:</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>Experience debugging specialized deep problems (e.g. browser incompatibilities, billing systems, memory leaks)</li><li>A passion for user experience design</li><li>Production storage or performance experience with time-series data</li><li>A love for object-oriented programming</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Bonus Round (Not required, but if it’s relevant let us know!)</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>Experience with our current product management tools: Jira, Figma, G Suite, and Slack.</li><li>You love gaming and/or live streaming and are well versed in the language and needs of the community.</li><li>Measure what matters. You know how to write and measure OKRs (Objectives and Key Results)</li><li>Creator culture. You’ve worked on other products in or related to content creation.</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><b>Benefits:</b></div><div>We are passionate about fostering a supportive environment for our team, so we prioritize the physical, mental, and emotional well-being of our employees and their families through a comprehensive Benefits Program. This includes 100% company-paid medical, dental, and vision plans, unlimited Flexible Time Off, and a personalized career roadmap for each employee. By investing in professional development through training and educational opportunities, we ensure that our team thrives both personally and professionally. Together, we’re not just building a business; we’re cultivating a community that values creativity, collaboration, and the transformative power of play.</div><div><br></div><div><b>About Xsolla:</b></div><div>Xsolla is a global video game commerce company with a robust and powerful set of tools and services designed specifically for the video game industry. Since its founding in 2005, Xsolla has helped thousands of game developers and publishers of all sizes fund, market, launch and monetize their games globally and across multiple platforms. As an innovative leader in in-game commerce, Xsolla’s mission is to solve the inherent complexities of global distribution, marketing, and monetization to help our partners reach more geographies, generate more revenue and create relationships with gamers worldwide. Xsolla is headquartered and incorporated in Los Angeles, California, with offices in Berlin, Seoul, and cities worldwide. Xsolla supports major gaming titles like Valve, Twitch, Roblox, Ubisoft, Epic Games, Take-Two, KRAFTON, Nexters, NetEase, Playstudios, Playrix, miHoYo, and more.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>For additional information and to learn more, please visit <a class="postings-link" href="http://xsolla.com">xsolla.com</a></div><div><br></div><div><b>Equal Employment Opportunity Statement:</b></div><div>Xsolla is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We do not discriminate based on race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, disability, sexual orientation, gender identity, or any other characteristic protected by law. We consider qualified applicants with criminal histories in accordance with the Fair Chance Act.</div><div><br></div><div><b>Criminal History Consideration:</b></div><div>For the Full Stack Developer position, we will conduct a background check that may include:</div><div>- Criminal history check</div><div>- Employment verification</div><div>- Education verification</div><div>The background check is relevant to this position due to responsibilities such as accessing confidential company data and ensuring compliance with regulatory requirements.</div><div><br></div><div><i>By submitting your application, you consent to Xsolla processing your data for career-related inquiries and potential employment opportunities. We process your data in accordance with the <a class="postings-link" href="https://xsolla.com/candidate-privacy-notice">Xsolla Privacy Notice for Job Applicants</a>. Please direct any inquiries regarding your data privacy to <a class="__cf_email__" href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection">[email&nbsp;protected]</a>.</i></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div class="text-small italic text-gray-700">We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.</div></div></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/xsolla-full-stack-developer">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/xsolla-full-stack-developer</a></p>
</description>

      <title>M3usa: Senior Full Stack Developer</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> São Paulo, State of São Paulo, Brazil
</p>

<div><div><p class="googlejobs-paragraph--empty"></p><h2 class="title">Company Description</h2></div><div class="wysiwyg"><p><strong>About the Business Division:</strong></p><p>This role sits within Doctors.net.uk, a subsidiary of M3 Inc. Doctors.net.uk is the UK's largest professional network of doctors; a closed community used by over 50,000 doctors daily and with a total membership of over 245,000. Products range from a trusted email communications platform to robust news and educational web pages along with our world-class sponsored pharmaceutical content and doctors’ own user-generated content. Our mission is to continually improve these offerings as well as identifying new ways to support our community of doctors throughout their careers.</p><ul></ul></div><div><p class="googlejobs-paragraph--empty"></p><h2 class="title">Job Description</h2></div><div class="wysiwyg"><ul><li>Plan, lead and actively contribute to the development of web/mobile applications in an agile environment</li><li>Take ownership of understanding of the whole system and take responsibility for teaching this to others</li><li>Alongside other senior members of the team, contribute to the strategy and architectural decisions that support the growth of the services we offer to our members and clients</li><li>Provide technical support and mentoring to junior team members</li><li>Find ways to improve system robustness, resilience, and stability</li></ul></div><div><p class="googlejobs-paragraph--empty"></p><h2 class="title">Qualifications</h2></div><div class="wysiwyg"><ul><li>Experience&nbsp;in full stack JavaScript&nbsp;.NET stack development utilizing either Node.JS or .NET Core and Web API</li><li>Commercial experience working with web applications in a containerized environment, in particular Docker</li><li>Commercial experience working with content management (CMS) systems.</li><li>Demonstratable experience architecting web based solutions and introducing new technologies and tooling into existing systems and processes</li><li>Experience designing and developing applications utilising databases such as Postgres, MongoDB, MSSQL</li><li>Experience with front-end web development technologies such as ReactJS, VueJS, AngularJS, MVC</li><li>Experience supporting and mentoring junior developers with technical queries and best practice</li><li>Excellent communication skills</li><li>Self-motivated and delivery focused</li><li>Good understanding of Agile process</li></ul><p><strong>Desirable</strong></p><ul><li>Experience utilizing/configuring/maintaining microservice container orchestrations platforms such as Mesos/Marathon, Kubernetes</li><li>Experience working with ReactJS component libraries</li><li>Experience building out CI/CD frameworks and build pipelines</li><li>Experience of mobile app development frameworks</li><li>Experience of serverless services such as AWS Lambda or Jamstack</li><li>Experience working with PHP (WordPress)</li><li>Experience of using services provided by AWS/Azure</li></ul></div><div><p class="googlejobs-paragraph--empty"></p><h2 class="title">Additional Information</h2></div><div class="wysiwyg"><p><strong><em>About M3 EU:</em></strong></p><p>M3 EU is at the forefront of healthcare innovation, offering digital solutions across healthcare, life sciences, pharmaceuticals, and more. Since our inception in 2000, we’ve seen remarkable growth, fuelled by our mission to utilize the internet for a healthier world and more efficient healthcare systems.</p><p>Our success is anchored in our trusted digital platforms that engage physician communities globally, facilitating impactful medical education, precise job placement, and insightful market research. M3 EU prides itself on a dynamic and innovative work environment where every team member contributes to global health advancements.</p><p>Joining M3 EU means being part of a dedicated team striving to make a significant difference in healthcare. We provide a unique opportunity for you to be at the cutting edge of healthcare innovation, shaping the future in a meaningful career. Embrace the chance to drive change with M3 EU.</p><p>#LI-JG1<br><br>#LI-Remote</p></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/m3usa-senior-full-stack-developer">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/m3usa-senior-full-stack-developer</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Airalo: Staff Data Analyst, Product</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Spain / United Kingdom
</p>

<div class="content"><div class="section-wrapper page-full-width"><div class="section page-centered"><div><b>About Airalo</b></div><div>Alo! Airalo is the world’s first eSIM store that helps people connect in over 200+ countries and regions across the globe. We are building the next digital service that revolutionizes the telecom industry. We are a travel-tech company and an equal-opportunity environment that values and executes diversity, inclusion, and equity. Our team is spread across 50+ countries and six continents. What glues us together is our commitment to changing the way you connect<span>. </span></div><div>Check out more information about Airalo in our Public Handbook: <a href="https://airalo-public.notion.site/airalo-public-handbook">https://airalo-public.notion.site/airalo-public-handbook</a></div><div><br></div><div><b>About you</b></div><div>We hope that you care deeply about the quality of your work, the intrinsic worth of tasks, and the success of your team. You are self-disciplined and do not require micromanagement in terms of your skillset and work ethic. You do your best to flourish as an individual every day while working hard to foster a collaborative team environment. You believe in the importance of being — and staying — authentic, honest, positive, and kind. You are a good interlocutor with clear and concise communication. You are able to manage multiple projects, have an analytical mind, pay keen attention to detail, and love to get your hands dirty. You are cognizant, tolerant, and welcoming of vulnerabilities and cultural differences.</div><div><br></div><div><b>About the Role</b></div><div><b>Position</b>: Full-time / Employee</div><div><b>Location:</b>&nbsp;Remote-first </div><div><b>Benefits:</b>&nbsp;Health Insurance, work-from-anywhere stipend, annual wellness &amp; learning credits, annual all-expenses-paid company retreat in a gorgeous destination &amp; other benefits</div><div><br></div><div>We're looking for a Staff Data Analyst, Product to own product analytics at Airalo. You'll be the go-to person for understanding how our 20M+ users across 190+ countries interact with our product-what drives activation, engagement, retention, and ultimately revenue. This is a high-impact IC role with significant scope: you'll partner directly with product teams and leadership&nbsp; to shape product strategy through data.</div><div><br></div><div>You'll report to the Director of Data and partner closely with analytics engineering, product managers, and cross-functional stakeholders. Success looks like product decisions backed by rigorous analysis, experimentation that compounds learning, and metrics the business trusts and uses. Beyond delivering insights that influence the roadmap, you'll help shape how product analytics operates at Airalo-our model is evolving, and you'll have real input into how we scale coverage and structure the team.</div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>What you’ll do:</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>Partner with Product teams to define success metrics, design experiments, and evaluate feature impact</li><li>Partner with fractional squad analysts where they exist; serve as the primary analytics partner for squads without dedicated coverage and help evolve our organisational model for product analytics</li><li>Be hands-on with analysis, dashboards, and metric development while building the foundations for a scalable product analytics practice</li><li>Define, own, and govern product metrics and KPIs in alignment with our company-wide unified KPI framework-ensuring consistency, clarity, and trust in how we measure product performance in alignment with business goals</li><li>Build and maintain core product health dashboards in partnership with analytics engineering as we’re transitioning to self-service via Lightdash and maturing our analytics platform</li><li>Conduct deep-dive analyses on user behavior, funnel performance, and cohort trends to surface opportunities and diagnose issues</li><li>Design and analyze A/B tests and experiments, establishing best practices for experimentation rigor</li><li>Translate complex analytical findings into clear recommendations for technical and non-technical stakeholders, including executive leadership</li><li>Partner with data and product teams, to define data requirements and ensure product event tracking meets analytical needs</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Must-haves:</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>7+ years in product analytics, data science, or quantitative analytics roles, with demonstrated impact at staff/principal level</li><li>Deep experience with product analytics in a B2C or marketplace environment-you understand funnels, retention curves, and user lifecycle intimately</li><li>Track record of defining and owning metrics frameworks-you've established KPIs, driven cross-functional alignment, and maintained metric integrity as products and teams scaled</li><li>Strong SQL skills and proficiency in Python or R for statistical analysis and modeling</li><li>Proven track record designing and analyzing experiments, with solid understanding of statistical methods and common pitfalls</li><li>Experience with product analytics tools (Amplitude, Mixpanel, or similar) and modern BI platforms</li><li>Ability to translate ambiguous business questions into structured analytical approaches</li><li>Excellent communication skills-you can tell a compelling story with data and influence product decisions at the leadership level</li><li>Strong business intuition and user empathy; you think beyond the data to understand the "why"</li><li>Comfortable operating with autonomy in a fast-moving environment where not everything is well-defined-you bring structure without waiting for permission</li><li>You've been the person who brought rigor to a team that didn't have it-introduced frameworks, challenged assumptions, and shifted how product teams think about data</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Good to Have:</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>Experience in marketplace, telecom, travel or subscription/usage-based businesses</li><li>Experience building experimentation programs or platforms from scratch-culture, tooling, and processes</li><li>Previous work at a scale-up during hypergrowth, where you've seen what breaks and what scales</li><li>You've been the person who brought rigor to a team that didn't have it-introduced frameworks, challenged assumptions, and shifted how product teams think about data</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div>By applying, you acknowledge and agree that, in case of successful application, Airalo may request to run background checks as a condition for entering into an agreement with you. Rest assured that these checks will only occur upon your prior consent and at the end of the selection process, and will be strictly limited to what is allowed under the laws that are applicable to you. All data that you share or that we collect in connection with such checks will be processed in accordance with our Privacy Policy,&nbsp;available here: <a href="https://www.airalo.com/more-info/privacy-policy?srsltid=AfmBOooBT0rXAj1FaNelZ3VfN0wvhwzvAoxdtHnOKSVETpiSjiXVuycy">https://www.airalo.com/more-info/privacy-policy?srsltid=AfmBOooBT0rXAj1FaNelZ3VfN0wvhwzvAoxdtHnOKSVETpiSjiXVuycy</a></div><div><br></div><div>We sincerely thank all applicants in advance for submitting their interest in this opportunity. Airalo is an equal-opportunity employer and values diversity, equity &amp; inclusion. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status. We are committed to providing reasonable accommodations upon request for individuals with disabilities throughout our job interview process.</div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div class="text-small italic text-gray-700">We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.</div></div></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/airalo-staff-data-analyst-product">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/airalo-staff-data-analyst-product</a></p>
</description>

      <title>Dropbox: Staff Fullstack Product Software Engineer, Dash</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote - Canada: Select locations
</p>

<div class=""><br><h2>Role Description</h2><br><p>At Dropbox, we believe the future is built on great ideas. And great ideas don’t just come from the top; they come from everywhere. &nbsp;Our mission is to design an enlightened way of working.&nbsp;</p><br><p>Our Engineering team is working to simplify the way people work together. They’re building a family of products that handle over a billion files a day for people around the world. With our broad mission and massive scale, there are countless opportunities to make an impact. This is just the beginning of how Dropbox will use AI/ML to enhance knowledge work in today’s work environment. We’re excited to bring a new generation of personalized AI-powered experiences in Dropbox to improve our customers' working lives and a more focused, efficient, and productive workday.</p><br><p><span class="author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qotvovz84zz73zyggbyy7z79zz70zz84zz69zz67zz75zz80z9v8z83zz89zz67zyz73zz88zz76z6f">Y</span>ou will play a crucial role in designing, developing, and maintaining AI-powered software applications. You will work closely with cross-engineering teams, product managers, data scientists, and ML engineers, to build robust and scalable solutions to drive user engagement and business growth. You will have the opportunity to grow a product <span class="author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qotvovz84zz73zyggbyy7z79zz70zz84zz69zz67zz75zz80z9v8z83zz89zz67zyz73zz88zz76z6f">at the beginning of it’s S-curve</span> and to define the next generation of AI products at Dropbox.</p><br><p><span class="author-d-iz88z86z86za0dz67zz78zz78zz74zz68zjz80zz71z9iz90z95lz89zy6z71zz79zz84zz68zyz69zupz72zz79zcz69zz76zkz79zp1z66ztz67zxz71zz89zz86zz71z">Our Engineering Career Framework is </span><span class="attrlink url author-d-iz88z86z86za0dz67zz78zz78zz74zz68zjz80zz71z9iz90z95lz89zy6z71zz79zz84zz68zyz69zupz72zz79zcz69zz76zkz79zp1z66ztz67zxz71zz89zz86zz71z"><a class="attrlink" href="https://dropbox.github.io/dbx-career-framework/">viewable by anyone outside the company</a></span><span class="author-d-iz88z86z86za0dz67zz78zz78zz74zz68zjz80zz71z9iz90z95lz89zy6z71zz79zz84zz68zyz69zupz72zz79zcz69zz76zkz79zp1z66ztz67zxz71zz89zz86zz71z"> and describes what’s expected for our engineers at each of our career levels. Check out our blog post on this topic and more </span><span class="attrlink url author-d-iz88z86z86za0dz67zz78zz78zz74zz68zjz80zz71z9iz90z95lz89zy6z71zz79zz84zz68zyz69zupz72zz79zcz69zz76zkz79zp1z66ztz67zxz71zz89zz86zz71z"><a class="attrlink" href="https://dropbox.tech/culture/sharing-our-engineering-career-framework-with-the-world">here</a></span><span class="author-d-iz88z86z86za0dz67zz78zz78zz74zz68zjz80zz71z9iz90z95lz89zy6z71zz79zz84zz68zyz69zupz72zz79zcz69zz76zkz79zp1z66ztz67zxz71zz89zz86zz71z">.</span></p><br><h2>Responsibilities</h2><br><ul><br><li>Collaborate with product managers and other engineering teams to understand business requirements and translate them into technical specifications for AI-powered software applications.</li><br><li><span class="author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qotvovz84zz73zyggbyy7z79zz70zz84zz69zz67zz75zz80z9v8z83zz89zz67zyz73zz88zz76z6f">Define and d</span>eliver t<span class="author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qotvovz84zz73zyggbyy7z79zz70zz84zz69zz67zz75zz80z9v8z83zz89zz67zyz73zz88zz76z6f">he multi-team growth strategy</span> <span class="author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qotvovz84zz73zyggbyy7z79zz70zz84zz69zz67zz75zz80z9v8z83zz89zz67zyz73zz88zz76z6f">with measurable outcomes </span>through ownership of product capabilities <span class="author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qotvovz84zz73zyggbyy7z79zz70zz84zz69zz67zz75zz80z9v8z83zz89zz67zyz73zz88zz76z6f">and</span> technical systems</li><br><li>Lead the design and delivery of software solutions across specific product areas or multi-component systems</li><br><li><span class="author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qotvovz84zz73zyggbyy7z79zz70zz84zz69zz67zz75zz80z9v8z83zz89zz67zyz73zz88zz76z6f">Establish engineering best practices, improve system reliability, and drive down technical debt</span></li><br><li>Collaborate with cross-functional teams to balance technical requirements with business goals</li><br><li><span class="author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qotvovz84zz73zyggbyy7z79zz70zz84zz69zz67zz75zz80z9v8z83zz89zz67zyz73zz88zz76z6f">Lead by example through high quality code, thoughtful reviews, and hands on mentorship</span>, fostering a collaborative and growth-oriented culture.</li><br><li><span class="author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qotvovz84zz73zyggbyy7z79zz70zz84zz69zz67zz75zz80z9v8z83zz89zz67zyz73zz88zz76z6f">Mentor senior engineers; model high-signal design reviews and effective cross-team influence.</span></li><br><li>Conduct experiments and A/B tests to validate hypotheses and <span class="author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qotvovz84zz73zyggbyy7z79zz70zz84zz69zz67zz75zz80z9v8z83zz89zz67zyz73zz88zz76z6f">guide</span> product decisions. &nbsp;</li><br><li><span class="author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qotvovz84zz73zyggbyy7z79zz70zz84zz69zz67zz75zz80z9v8z83zz89zz67zyz73zz88zz76z6f">Participate in and uplevel on-call rotations to maintain service reliability</span></li><br></ul><br><p><span class="thread-348589118974529206372994 attrcomment attrcommentfirst thread-348589118974529206372994-first author-d-iz88z86z86za0dz67zz78zz78zz74zz68zjz80zz71z9iz90z95lz89zy6z71zz79zz84zz68zyz69zupz72zz79zcz69zz76zkz79zp1z66ztz67zxz71zz89zz86zz71z"><span class="author-d-iz88z86z86za0dz67zz78zz78zz74zz68zjz80zz71z9iz90z9z84zyz72zz70zz71zz72zhwl8r6xz85zr3z69z6z86zz78zz76zcfvdsgm4t">Many teams at Dropbox run Services with on-call rotations, which entails being available for calls during both core and non-core business hours. If a team has an on-call rotation, all engineers on the team are expected to participate in the rotation as part of their employment. Applicants are encouraged to ask for more details of the rotations to which the applicant is applying.</span></span></p><br><h2>Requirements</h2><br><ul><br><li><span class="author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qotvovz84zz73zyggbyy7z79zz70zz84zz69zz67zz75zz80z9v8z83zz89zz67zyz73zz88zz76z6f">12</span>+ years of relevant experience&nbsp;</li><br><li>BS/BA degree or higher in Computer Science or related technical field, or equivalent technical experience</li><br><li>Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to translate user requirements into practical solutions.</li><br><li><span class="author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qowz82zfwz66zwhdz68zz78zz74zl2vz70z03z66zz80zrz77zt56z90zz81zz74zz69zpz80zkf">Ability to work across the stack on projects and able to build a minimum working product quickly</span></li><br><li><span class="author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qotvovz84zz73zyggbyy7z79zz70zz84zz69zz67zz75zz80z9v8z83zz89zz67zyz73zz88zz76z6f">Experience working on large scale user facing applications</span></li><br><li>Excellent communication skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams and present technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders.</li><br></ul><br><h2>Preferred Qualifications</h2><br><ul><br><li>Prior experience on a product growth team</li><br><li>Excited about building 0→1. Comfortable with ambiguity and pivoting directions</li><br><li><span class="author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qotvovz84zz73zyggbyy7z79zz70zz84zz69zz67zz75zz80z9v8z83zz89zz67zyz73zz88zz76z6f">Experience at building user-facing applications on web and/or desktop using front-end technologies such as JavaScript, TypeScript, React, HTML5, CSS3</span></li><br><li><span class="author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qotvovz84zz73zyggbyy7z79zz70zz84zz69zz67zz75zz80z9v8z83zz89zz67zyz73zz88zz76z6f">Strong proficiency in backend development technologies such as Golang and Python.</span></li><br><li><span class="author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qotvovz84zz73zyggbyy7z79zz70zz84zz69zz67zz75zz80z9v8z83zz89zz67zyz73zz88zz76z6f">Experience building large distributed systems at scale.&nbsp;</span></li><br></ul><br><h2><span class="author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qowz81zqz90zkz74zz76zeez80zz68zz89zz88zvqz86zuxlz73zexxz80zz73z6d6z72zz79zsz77z">Compensation</span></h2><br><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="title">Canada Pay Range</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$204,900</span><span class="divider">—</span><span>$277,200 CAD</span></div></div></div><br></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/dropbox-staff-fullstack-product-software-engineer-dash">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/dropbox-staff-fullstack-product-software-engineer-dash</a></p>

    <item>
      <title>Stripe: Product Manager, Commerce Systems</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> SF, SEA, NYC, US - Remote
</p>

<h2><strong>Who we are</strong></h2><br><h3><strong>About Stripe</strong></h3><br><p>Stripe is a financial infrastructure platform for businesses. Millions of companies—from the world’s largest enterprises to the most ambitious startups—use Stripe to accept payments, grow their revenue, and accelerate new business opportunities. Our mission is to increase the GDP of the internet, and we have a staggering amount of work ahead. That means you have an unprecedented opportunity to put the global economy within everyone’s reach while doing the most important work of your career.&nbsp;</p><br><h3><strong>About the team</strong></h3><br><p>The <strong>Commerce Systems</strong> team is at the literal nexus of Stripe’s expansion to a full-fledged Financial Services infrastructure platform. We own the internal revenue engine that enables every product team at Stripe to monetize their offerings, manage fees, and create complex commercial constructs. You will join a high-leverage 110-person organization, partnering with <strong>10–20 engineers</strong> to harmonize disparate systems—from billing to financial data warehouses—into a single, elegant interaction surface.</p><br><h2><strong>What you’ll do</strong></h2><br><p>As the PM for Commerce Systems, you will be the architect of the 'engine room' of Stripe’s revenue. You will be responsible for building the unified control planes that harmonize Stripe’s internal billing, seller systems, and financial data warehouses into a single, high-leverage interaction surface. In this role, your mission is to eliminate integration friction for internal product teams, allowing them to ship faster, while ensuring our merchants receive the world-class fee transparency and reconciliation tools they need to run their businesses.</p><br><h3><strong>Responsibilities</strong></h3><br><ul><br><li><strong>Harmonize Infrastructure:</strong> Build the "control planes" that unify seller systems, user billing, and financial data warehouses to reduce integration friction for product teams.</li><br><li><strong>Architect for Velocity:</strong> Drastically reduce the time-to-market for new Stripe products by streamlining monetization workflows and core underlying capabilities.</li><br><li><strong>Drive Strategy:</strong> Articulate the product vision for our revenue platform, developing annual and quarterly plans that align with Stripe’s rapid expansion into AI and new financial services.</li><br><li><strong>Navigate Complexity:</strong> Act as a leader and change agent, thriving in "chaos" to turn operational noise into a clear engineering roadmap.</li><br><li><strong>Cross-Functional Leadership:</strong> Partner with engineering leaders to design ingestion, enrichment, and serving interfaces while acting as a thought partner for GTM, Finance, and Legal.</li><br></ul><br><h2><strong>Who you are</strong></h2><br><p>We’re looking for someone who meets the minimum requirements to be considered for the role.</p><br><h3><strong>Minimum requirements</strong></h3><br><ul><br><li><strong>7+ years of experience</strong> as a Product Manager in technology companies.</li><br><li><strong>Backend Foundation:</strong> Deep experience with large-scale backend systems and an API-first mindset.</li><br><li><strong>Platform Expertise:</strong> Proven track record building platform infrastructure that serves the needs of multiple disparate stakeholders.</li><br><li><strong>Communication:</strong> Ability to synthesize complex technical discussions and write succinctly for senior leadership. The ability to work cross functionally and speak multiple ‘languages’: you’re equally credible as a thought partner for Go-to-Market, Engineering, Finance or Legal leaders.</li><br><li><strong>Operational Resilience:</strong> Comfort dealing with many moving pieces and evolving legacy systems into their next generation.</li><br><li>Most importantly, we’re looking for great product managers who deeply understand their users, turn that into great plans, and make those plans happen. Even if you don’t have all the experience above we’d encourage you to apply if this role excites you</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>Preferred Qualifications</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Experience in Fintech or at a Hyperscaler Cloud Infra provider (e.g., AWS, GCP, Azure).</li><br><li>Experience managing technical software products from infancy to scale.</li><br><li>A background in designing and building multi-product platforms or complex billing systems.</li><br></ul>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/stripe-product-manager-commerce-systems">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/stripe-product-manager-commerce-systems</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Temporal Technologies: Senior Staff Product Marketing Manager, AI</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> United States - Remote Opportunity
</p>

<div class="job__description body"><div><h3><strong>About Us</strong></h3><br><div>Temporal is an open source programming model that can simplify code, make applications more reliable, and help developers focus on the important things like delivering features faster. We are on a mission to be the reliable foundation of every developer’s toolbox, and are building the team that will make that happen.</div><br><div>&nbsp;</div><br><div>Our values guide us —they are present in how we show up, make decisions, and work together to make an impact. We’re curious, driven, collaborative, genuine and humble.</div><br><div>&nbsp;</div><br><div>Temporal is growing and we are looking for those who share our values, challenge 'standard' thinking, and want to influence our future. If you have a passion for improving the developer experience, building world-class open-source software and communities, and want to be a part of our amazing team, we'd love to hear from you!</div></div><div><div><br><h3>Summary</h3><br><p>Temporal is becoming the foundational infrastructure for AI-powered products. As AI-native companies and research labs move from experimentation to production, they face new reliability, orchestration, and scale challenges that Temporal is uniquely positioned to solve.</p><br><p>We are hiring a Sr Staff Product Marketing Manager to lead product marketing for Temporal’s AI initiatives. This role will define how Temporal is positioned for AI-native companies, AI labs, and AI-driven use cases within traditional SaaS and enterprise organizations. You will own the narrative for why Temporal matters in the era of AI and translate complex, technical capabilities into clear, compelling value for developers, platform teams, and business stakeholders.</p><br><p>This is a “full stack” product marketing role with broad ownership and high impact. You will work closely with product, engineering, sales, and marketing leadership to shape strategy and drive adoption across fast-growing AI segments and use cases.</p><br><p>This role reports to the Director of Product Marketing.&nbsp;</p><br><strong>What You’ll Do</strong><br><ul><br><li>Define and own positioning and messaging for Temporal’s AI use cases across AI-native startups, AI labs, and enterprise customers adopting AI</li><br><li>Develop clear value propositions for how Temporal supports AI workflows, agents, LLM orchestration, human-in-the-loop systems, and long-running AI processes</li><br><li>Lead competitive intelligence related to AI infrastructure, orchestration, workflow engines, and adjacent platforms</li><br><li>Partner with product and engineering to influence roadmap decisions based on market and customer insights</li><br><li>Plan and execute product launches, announcements, and GTM strategies related to AI capabilities and use cases</li><br><li>Create high-quality external content including web pages, blogs, solution briefs, case studies, decks, and sales enablement materials</li><br><li>Enable sales and solutions teams with messaging, pitch narratives, and objection handling for AI-driven deals</li><br><li>Work with demand gen, developer relations, and comms to ensure consistent AI positioning across channels</li><br><li>Serve as a subject-matter expert internally on AI market trends, customer needs, and buyer personas</li><br><li>Measure and iterate on messaging and GTM effectiveness based on customer feedback and market response</li><br></ul><br><strong>Who You Are</strong><br><p>We value folks who bring both strong experience and a POV, as well as a growth mindset to learn new skills and take on new projects. The skills and perspectives below are some of the things we’ll be looking for that will help you get off to a strong start.</p><br><ul><br><li>Senior, strategic product marketer with experience owning end-to-end PMM for complex, technical products</li><br><li>Deep familiarity with AI, ML, or data platforms, especially in developer-facing or infrastructure contexts</li><br><li>Comfortable marketing to highly technical audiences including developers, platform teams, and architects</li><br><li>Able to translate technical concepts into crisp, differentiated messaging without oversimplifying</li><br><li>Strong storyteller who can create narratives that resonate with both technical and business stakeholders</li><br><li>Proven track record of influencing product direction and GTM strategy at a senior level</li><br><li>Highly collaborative, with experience working closely with product, engineering, and sales leadership</li><br><li>Self-directed and comfortable operating in ambiguous, fast-moving environments</li><br><li>Detail-oriented in execution but able to think at the system and market level</li><br><li>Excited by the opportunity to define a category and shape how AI-powered systems are built in production</li><br></ul><br></div><br><div><strong>Compensation</strong></div><br><div><br><ul><br><li>The estimated pay range for this role is $190,000 - $240,000</li><br><li>This role is eligible to participate in Temporal's equity plan</li><br></ul><br></div></div><div><div><em>Compensation ranges reflect salary and commission compensation (when applicable) across several geographic markets. Employment offers carefully consider multiple factors, including prior experience, knowledge, expertise, skillset, market location, and job level assessed during the interview process.</em></div><br><div>&nbsp;</div><br><div><em>Employee benefits and perks below are for full-time employees, part-time or temporary positions are excluded.&nbsp;</em></div><br><div>&nbsp;</div><br><div><br><div><strong>U.S. Benefits&nbsp;</strong></div><br><div><br><ul><br><li>Unlimited PTO, 12 Holidays + 2 Floating Holidays</li><br><li>100% Premiums Coverage for Medical, Dental, and Vision</li><br><li>AD&amp;D, LT &amp; ST Disability, and Life Insurance (Standard &amp; Supplemental Available)</li><br><li>Empower 401K Plan</li><br><li>Additional Perks for Learning &amp; Development, Lifestyle Spending, In-Home Office Setup, Professional Memberships, WFH Meals, Internet Stipend and more!</li><br></ul><br></div><br></div><br><div><br><div><strong>International Benefits</strong></div><br><div><br><p>Paid Time Off (PTO) and Benefits outside the United States vary by country, and are issued in partnership with <a class="postings-link" href="http://remote.com/">Remote.com</a>.&nbsp; Additionally, Temporal offers perks to all international employees for learning &amp; career development, a lifestyle spending account, in-home office setup (in addition to company-issued hardware), professional memberships, work-from-home meals, and access to the Calm app for mental wellness.</p><br><p><strong>Travel</strong></p><br><p>Temporal is a globally distributed, collaborative team that values opportunities for in-person connection. Occasional travel may be required for company events, team offsites, and other meaningful moments that bring us together.</p><br></div><br></div><br><div><strong>Additional Perks&nbsp;</strong></div><br><div><br><ul><br><li>$3,600 / Year Work from Home Meals&nbsp;</li><br><li>$1,800 / Year Professional Enrichment (Career Development &amp; Professional Memberships)</li><br><li>$1,200 / Year Lifestyle Spending Account</li><br><li>$1,000 / Year In-Home Office Setup (In addition to Temporal issued equipment - laptop, monitor, keyboard, mouse, trackpad, and extension power cable at no cost to you)</li><br><li>$74 / Month Reimbursement for Internet</li><br><li>Calm App Subscription for Mental Health &amp; Wellness</li><br></ul><br></div><br><div><em>Temporal Technologies is an Equal Opportunity Employer. Temporal Technologies does not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, age, non-disqualifying physical or mental disability, national origin, veteran status, or any other basis covered by appropriate law. All employment is decided on the basis of qualifications, merit, and business need. We embrace and celebrate differences and diversity.</em></div><br><div>&nbsp;</div><br><div><em>Temporal is committed to providing access, equal opportunity, and reasonable accommodation for individuals with disabilities in employment, its services, programs, and activities. If you need to request a reasonable accommodation, please let your Recruiter know so we can assist.</em></div><br><div>&nbsp;</div><br><div><em>We are not working with external recruitment agencies, thanks.</em></div></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/temporal-technologies-senior-staff-product-marketing-manager-ai">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/temporal-technologies-senior-staff-product-marketing-manager-ai</a></p>
</description>
