    <item>
      <title>Gitlab: Staff Product Security Architect</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote, EMEA
</p>

<div class="job__description body"><div><p>GitLab is an open-core software company that develops the most comprehensive <a href="https://about.gitlab.com/solutions/devops-platform">AI-powered DevSecOps Platform</a>, used by more than 100,000 organizations. Our <a href="https://about.gitlab.com/company/mission">mission</a> is to enable everyone to contribute to and co-create the software that powers our world. When everyone can contribute, consumers become contributors, significantly accelerating human progress. Our platform unites teams and organizations, breaking down barriers and redefining what's possible in software development. Thanks to products like <a href="https://about.gitlab.com/gitlab-duo/">Duo Enterprise</a> and <a href="https://about.gitlab.com/blog/gitlab-duo-agent-platform-what-is-next-for-intelligent-devsecops/">Duo Agent Platform</a>, customers get AI benefits at every stage of the SDLC.&nbsp;</p><br><p>The same principles built into our products are reflected in how our team works: we embrace AI as a core productivity multiplier, with all team members expected to incorporate AI into their daily workflows to drive efficiency, innovation, and impact. GitLab is where careers accelerate, innovation flourishes, and every voice is valued. Our high-performance culture is driven by our <a href="https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/values/">values</a> and continuous knowledge exchange, enabling our team members to reach their full potential while collaborating with industry leaders to solve complex problems. <a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OuZIb5zszQI">Co-create the future with us</a> as we build technology that transforms how the world develops software.</p></div><div><h4><strong>An overview of this role</strong></h4><br><p>We are seeking a Staff Product Security Architect to join our <a href="https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/security/product-security/security-platforms-architecture/">Security Platforms &amp; Architecture Team</a> and serve as our strategic security partner for GitLab’s Core DevOps organization. In this role, you’ll work directly with technical leadership across our <a href="https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/product/categories/#plan-stage">Plan</a>, <a href="https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/product/categories/#create-stage">Create</a>, <a href="https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/product/categories/#verify-stage">Verify</a>, and <a href="https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/product/categories/#package-stage">Package</a> stages to anticipate security challenges, drive risk reduction, and enable secure-by-default development of our CI/CD platform.&nbsp;</p><br><p>You'll be the primary security architect for Core DevOps, developing deep expertise in pipeline security, source code management, and DevOps toolchain risks. You'll maintain tight alignment with Core DevOps tech leads to understand their roadmap, identify emerging security needs early, and coordinate comprehensive security coverage across our Application Security team. This is a high-visibility role with significant influence across one of GitLab's most critical product areas.</p><br><p><strong>What you’ll do</strong>&nbsp;&nbsp;</p><br><ul><br><li>Serve as the dedicated security architect and strategic partner for Core DevOps functional leadership, developing deep understanding of their priorities, challenges, and roadmap</li><br><li>Lead security architecture and design work for strategic Core DevOps initiatives, providing clear direction and proactive guidance to cross-functional teams</li><br><li>Identify, assess, and drive reduction of systemic security risks in the <a href="https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/security/product-security/security-platforms-architecture/risk-register">Product Security Risk Register</a> related to CI/CD pipelines, source code management, and DevOps workflows</li><br><li>Anticipate security challenges in upcoming Core DevOps initiatives and propose architectural solutions before they reach critical implementation phases</li><br><li>Coordinate with Application Security engineers to ensure comprehensive security review coverage, providing context and priority guidance for Core DevOps work</li><br><li>Conduct security architecture reviews for large strategic projects across Plan, Create, Verify, and Package stages</li><br><li>Develop and communicate security standards and patterns specific to CI/CD security, enabling teams to make sound security decisions independently</li><br><li>Collaborate with <a href="https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/security/product-security/security-platforms-architecture/security-research/">Security Research team</a> members conducting proactive security exploration in the Core DevOps domain</li><br><li>Cultivate strong relationships with Core DevOps technical leadership to maintain visibility into major initiatives and drive security outcomes</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>What you’ll bring&nbsp;</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Deep expertise in CI/CD pipeline security, including runner isolation, secrets management, artifact security, and supply chain attack prevention</li><br><li>Strong understanding of source code management security, including merge request workflows, code review security, branch protection, and access control patterns</li><br><li>Proven experience securing DevOps toolchains and identifying systemic risks in continuous integration and delivery systems</li><br><li>Demonstrated ability to build trusted relationships with engineering leadership and influence technical direction through expertise and collaboration</li><br><li>Track record of proactive security architecture work - identifying risks before they become incidents and designing preventive solutions</li><br><li>Strong background in application security with expertise in authentication/authorization, injection attacks, privilege escalation, and multi-tenant isolation</li><br><li>Experience translating complex security concepts into clear, actionable recommendations for technical audiences</li><br><li>Ability to operate strategically while remaining technically hands-on when needed</li><br><li>Nice to have: Experience with container registry and package management security; cryptographic systems and key management (SLSA framework); GraphQL security; AI-augmented development workflows; government security requirements (FedRAMP, NIST 800-171); security standards and frameworks (ISO 27001, SOC 2, PCI-DSS); and quantifying risk with security metrics or Key Risk Indicators</li><br></ul><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p><strong>About the team</strong></p><br><p>Security Architects are a part of our <a href="https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/security/product-security/security-platforms-architecture/">Security Platforms and Architecture</a> team, who address complex security challenges facing GitLab and its customers to enable GitLab to be the most secure software factory platform on the market. Composed of <a href="https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/security/product-security/security-platforms-architecture/security-architecture/">Security Architecture</a>, <a href="https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/security/product-security/security-platforms-architecture/security-research/">Security Research</a>, and Application Security, we focus on systemic product security risks and work cross-functionally to mitigate them while maintaining Engineering’s development velocity.</p><br><p>In FY27, we're implementing a new organizational model where each architect is dedicated to a specific functional area of GitLab's product, enabling deeper context, stronger relationships, and more proactive security guidance. As the Core DevOps architect, you'll be part of a team that includes architects focused on AI and the Sec Section, creating opportunities for collaboration on cross-cutting security challenges while maintaining specialized expertise in your domain.</p></div><div class="job__pay-ranges"><div class="pay-range"><div class="description"><div class="body"><span><p><em>The base salary range for this role’s listed level is currently for residents of the&nbsp;United States only. This range is intended to reflect the role's base salary rate in locations throughout the US.&nbsp;Grade level and salary ranges are determined through interviews and a review of education, experience, knowledge, skills, abilities of the applicant, equity with other team members, alignment with market data,&nbsp;and geographic location.&nbsp;The base salary range does not include any bonuses, equity, or benefits. See more information on our <a class="waffle-rich-text-link" href="https://about.gitlab.com/handbook/total-rewards/benefits/general-and-entity-benefits/">benefits</a><span> and </span><a class="waffle-rich-text-link" href="https://about.gitlab.com/handbook/stock-options/">equity</a>. Sales roles are also eligible for incentive pay targeted at up to 100% of the offered base salary.</em></p></span></div></div><p class="body body--medium">United States Salary Range</p><p class="body">$140,000 - $260,000 USD</p></div></div><div><h4><strong>How GitLab will support you</strong></h4><br><ul><br><li><a href="https://about.gitlab.com/handbook/total-rewards/benefits/general-and-entity-benefits/">Benefits to support your health, finances, and well-being</a></li><br><li><a href="https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/people-group/paid-time-off/">Flexible Paid Time Off</a>&nbsp;</li><br><li><a href="https://about.gitlab.com/company/culture/inclusion/erg-guide/#:~:text=Definition%20of%20the%20TMRG%20%2D%20Team%20Member%20Resource%20Groups,-TMRGs%20are%20voluntary&amp;text=The%20purpose%20for%20this%20type,developing%20the%20sense%20of%20belonging.">Team Member Resource Groups</a></li><br><li><a href="https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/total-rewards/stock-options/">Equity Compensation &amp; Employee Stock Purchase Plan</a></li><br><li><a href="https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/people-group/learning-and-development/growth-and-development/">Growth and Development Fund</a></li><br><li><a href="https://about.gitlab.com/handbook/total-rewards/benefits/general-and-entity-benefits/#parental-leave">Parental leave</a>&nbsp;</li><br><li><a href="https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/finance/expenses/#equipment">Home office</a> support</li><br></ul><br><p>Please note that we welcome interest from candidates with varying levels of experience; many successful candidates do not meet every single requirement. Additionally, studies have shown that people from <a href="https://about.gitlab.com/company/culture/inclusion/#examples-of-select-underrepresented-groups">underrepresented groups</a> are less likely to apply to a job unless they meet every single qualification. If you're excited about this role, please apply and allow our recruiters to assess your application.</p><br><p><strong>Country Hiring Guidelines: </strong>GitLab hires new team members in countries around the world. All of our roles are remote, however some roles may carry specific location-based eligibility requirements. Our Talent Acquisition team can help answer any questions about location after starting the recruiting process.&nbsp;&nbsp;</p><br><p><strong>Privacy Policy: </strong>Please review our <a href="https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/hiring/candidate-faq/recruitment-privacy-policy/">Recruitment Privacy Policy.</a> Your privacy is important to us.</p><br><p>GitLab is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. GitLab’s policies and practices relating to recruitment, employment, career development and advancement, promotion, and retirement are based solely on merit, regardless of race, color, religion, ancestry, sex (including pregnancy, lactation, sexual orientation, gender identity, or gender expression), national origin, age, citizenship, marital status, mental or physical disability, genetic information (including family medical history), discharge status from the military, protected veteran status (which includes disabled veterans, recently separated veterans, active duty wartime or campaign badge veterans, and Armed Forces service medal veterans), or any other basis protected by law. GitLab will not tolerate discrimination or harassment based on any of these characteristics. See also&nbsp;<a href="https://about.gitlab.com/handbook/people-policies/inc-usa/#equal-employment-opportunity-policy">GitLab’s EEO Policy</a>&nbsp;and&nbsp;<a href="https://about.gitlab.com/handbook/labor-and-employment-notices/#eeoc-us-equal-employment-opportunity-commission-notices">EEO is the Law</a>. If you have a disability or special need that requires&nbsp;<a href="https://about.gitlab.com/handbook/people-policies/inc-usa/#reasonable-accommodation">accommodation</a>, please let us know during the&nbsp;<a href="https://about.gitlab.com/handbook/hiring/interviewing/#adjustments-to-our-interview-process">recruiting process</a>.</p></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/gitlab-staff-product-security-architect">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/gitlab-staff-product-security-architect</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Prop Firm Match Global  Fzco: Head of Graphic Design</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Czechia
</p>

<p><strong>About Prop Firm Match Global FZCO</strong></p><p>Prop Firm Match Global FZCO is the leading platform for discovering, comparing, and selecting proprietary trading firms. We help traders make confident, informed decisions by offering side-by-side comparisons, verified reviews, and data-backed insights from the top prop firms worldwide. Our mission is to bring transparency, access, and clarity to the prop trading space.<br></p><p><strong>Role mission</strong></p><p>The Head of Graphic Design ensures that Prop Firm Match’s visual identity is strong, consistent, and conversion-driven across all platforms and communications, translating business goals into clear, high-impact visual execution.</p><p>This role owns the end-to-end visual direction of the brand from marketing assets and campaigns to product visuals and brand systems ensuring that every visual touchpoint strengthens trust, clarity, and market presence. The Head of Graphic Design acts as the bridge between Marketing, Product, Growth, and Leadership, building a design function that combines creativity, speed, and strategic impact.<br></p><p><strong>Performance Objectives<br></strong><br>The Head of Graphic Design ensures that Prop Firm Match’s visual identity is strong, consistent, and conversion-driven across all platforms and communications, translating business goals into clear, high-impact visual execution.</p><p>This role owns the end-to-end visual direction of the brand — from marketing assets and campaigns to product visuals and brand systems — ensuring that every visual touchpoint strengthens trust, clarity, and market presence. The Head of Graphic Design acts as the bridge between Marketing, Product, Growth, and Leadership, building a design function that combines creativity, speed, and strategic impact.</p> <p><strong>Key Performance Objectives</strong></p><p>1. Build a strong, consistent, and conversion-driven visual brand (first 90 days → ongoing)</p><p>Ensure all visual communication reflects a clear, trusted, and high-quality brand presence.</p><p>Key outcomes:</p><p>▸ Audit current brand visuals across product, marketing, and social channels</p><p>▸ Identify inconsistencies and areas impacting trust or clarity</p><p>▸ Refine and implement unified visual direction across all platforms</p><p>▸ Align visual communication with growth and business objectives</p><p></p><p>Success looks like:</p><p>A recognizable, professional, and high-trust brand presence across all channels.</p><p></p><p>2. Establish scalable design systems and creative workflows (first 3–4 months, ongoing)</p><p>Create efficiency and consistency in graphic production and brand execution.</p><p>Key outcomes:</p><p>▸ Build and maintain a centralized brand and visual guideline system</p><p>▸ Standardize templates for marketing, social media, presentations, and campaigns</p><p>▸ Improve collaboration workflows with Marketing, Product, and Growth teams</p><p>▸ Ensure fast and high-quality delivery of visual assets</p><p>Success looks like:</p><p>Faster production cycles, consistent visuals, and clear brand standards across teams.</p><p></p><p>3. Support growth and marketing through high-impact visual execution (ongoing)</p><p>Ensure design actively supports acquisition, engagement, and brand credibility.</p><p>Key outcomes:</p><p>▸ Develop visuals for campaigns, partnerships, and product launches</p><p>▸ Improve visual performance across social, web, and promotional materials</p><p>▸ Support experimentation and creative testing with Growth team</p><p>▸ Elevate storytelling and visual clarity in all external communication</p><p>Success looks like:</p><p>Design that directly supports engagement, brand credibility, and growth.</p><p></p><p>4. Build and lead a high-performing graphic design function (ongoing)</p><p>Create a creative culture that balances speed, quality, and business impact.</p><p>Key outcomes:</p><p>▸ Hire, mentor, and manage graphic designers or freelancers as needed</p><p>▸ Establish clear design ownership and delivery timelines</p><p>▸ Act as strategic visual partner to Marketing and Leadership</p><p>▸ Continuously elevate creative standards and output quality</p><p>Success looks like:</p><p>A reliable, fast, and high-quality design function supporting all teams.<br><br><strong>Required qualifications:<br><br></strong>1. 7+ years of experience in graphic design, including senior or lead role experience</p><p>2. Strong portfolio demonstrating brand, marketing, and digital design impact</p><p>3. Experience building and maintaining brand identity systems and visual guidelines</p><p>4. Strong practical understanding of how to use AI in visual creation, branding, and creative production workflows, with a proactive approach to leveraging AI to improve speed, quality, and creative impact.</p><p>5. Proven ability to design for digital platforms: web, social media, and campaigns</p><p>6. Strong understanding of visual storytelling, branding, and conversion-focused design</p><p>7. Experience working with marketing, product, and growth teams in fast-paced environments</p><p>8. Ability to manage multiple projects and deliver high-quality assets quickly</p><p>9. Experience leading or mentoring designers and managing creative workflows</p><p>10. Advanced proficiency in Figma, Adobe Creative Suite, and modern design tools</p><p>11. High ownership, strong communication skills, and ability to work effectively in remote, async teams</p><p></p><p><strong>Hiring stages:</strong><br>We keep our process simple, transparent, and respectful of your time. Here’s what to expect:</p><p>1. Application &amp; portfolio screening: Review CV and portfolio to assess brand quality, visual consistency, digital design skills, and relevance to tech/fintech or product-driven environments.</p><p>2. Portfolio deep-dive (async) : Selected candidates submit a short video walkthrough of 2–3 key projects covering:</p><p>brand or campaign objective, creative direction and design decisions, tools and AI usage measurable impact (engagement, performance, clarity).</p><p>3. Discovery interview with the HR team: Conversation focused on career path, ownership mindset, communication style, and alignment with remote, fast-paced culture.</p><p>4. Professional interview with design team representative: Structured discussion focused on creative thinking, brand consistency, speed of execution, collaboration with marketing/product, and handling feedback.</p><p>5. Practical design task (short and role-relevant): A focused task reflecting real PFM needs (social campaign visuals, brand system improvement, or marketing asset set).</p><p>Evaluates: visual quality, speed, AI usage, and creative thinking.</p><p>6. Leadership interview: Conversation with CEO/Head of Product/Leadership on strategic thinking, brand vision, ownership, and ability to scale design function.</p><p>7. Offer stage: Informal alignment discussion followed by formal written offer.</p><p></p><p><strong>Before applying, please take into account that:</strong></p><p>▸&nbsp; If you don’t meet every single qualification but believe you can excel in the role based on what it requires -&nbsp; we encourage you to apply.</p><p>▸&nbsp; We are an equal opportunity employer and welcome applicants from all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives.</p><p>▸&nbsp; Even if it’s not listed as a formal requirement, we truly value candidates who have clear familiarity with the prop trading industry and us, our mission and what we do.</p> <p><strong>Why Join Prop Firm Match Global FZCO?</strong></p><p>▸&nbsp; Contribute to a growing platform shaping the future of proprietary trading</p><p>▸&nbsp; Work within a flat, collaborative team where your input is valued</p><p>▸&nbsp; Competitive compensation, including base pay and benefits</p><p>▸&nbsp; 100% medical, dental, and vision coverage (U.S. only), including gender-affirming care</p><p>▸&nbsp; Flexible PTO including sick time, holidays, refresh days, and sabbatical leave after five years</p><p>▸&nbsp; Work remotely with the flexibility you need to maintain balance and focus.</p><p>▸&nbsp; A professional, transparent, and healthy work environment that values both results and people.</p><p></p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/prop-firm-match-global-fzco-head-of-graphic-design">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/prop-firm-match-global-fzco-head-of-graphic-design</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Openx: Intern - Marketing Design</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> US - Remote
</p>

<div class="content"><div class="section-wrapper page-full-width"><div class="section page-centered"><div><b><span>Company at a Glance</span></b></div><div><span>OpenX is focused on unleashing the full economic potential of digital media companies. We do this by making digital advertising markets and technologies that are designed to deliver optimal value to publishers and advertisers on every ad served across all screens.</span></div><div><br></div><div><span>At OpenX, we have built a team that is uniquely experienced in designing and operating high-scale ad marketplaces, and we are constantly on the lookout for thoughtful, creative executors who are as fascinated as we are about finding new ways to apply a blend of market design, technical innovation, operational excellence, and empathetic partner service to the frontiers of digital advertising.</span></div><div><br></div><div><b>Internship Opportunity at OpenX – Learn, Innovate, and Grow in Digital Advertising</b></div><div><br></div><div><span>Are you eager to gain hands-on experience in a fast-paced, innovative industry? At OpenX, we offer a unique opportunity for interns to dive into the world of digital advertising, learning from experts who are shaping the future of programmatic marketplaces.</span></div><div><br></div><div><span>As an intern at OpenX, you'll have the chance to explore cutting-edge ad technologies, contribute to impactful projects, and develop skills that will set you apart in the industry. Whether you're interested in market design, technical innovation, or operational excellence, this internship is designed to provide real-world experience and mentorship in a collaborative environment.</span></div><div><br></div><div><span><b>Join us for a summer internship and be part of a team that is redefining digital media monetization—one ad at a time!</b></span></div><div><br></div><div>OpenX is seeking a highly engaged and detail-oriented design intern to join our design team on a variety of projects related to brand identity across print, digital and interactive experiences. This is a great opportunity to accelerate your professional development, getting hands-on design experience working on high-impact marketing collateral. You will report to the Lead Designer and collaborate with the Creative Director.</div><div><br></div><div>What You’ll Do</div><div>Create and maintain graphic design content for branded communications and marketing collateral.</div><div>Supporting the production and coordination of design audits.</div><div>Conducting background research for branding projects.</div><div>Assist in photo editing for the website &amp; other print materials.</div><div>File management and archiving for clarity and organization.&nbsp;</div><div>Other tasks upon request.</div><div><br></div><div>Qualifications</div><div>Working towards a bachelor’s degree in graphic design or equivalent portfolio of work</div><div>An understanding of how to apply basic design principles to creative work</div><div>Demonstrated creative ability across a range of static, dynamic and interactive media</div><div>Strong technical abilities in Adobe Creative Suite, including InDesign, Illustrator and Photoshop</div><div>High proficiency in Google Slides and Google Docs</div><div>Experience in Figma a plus</div><div>Strong organizational skills and an ability to set priorities and manage time</div><div>Strong verbal and written communication skills with the ability to clearly articulate ideas</div><div><br></div><div>This is a 20 hours/week internship position lasting from January to April 2026 with a base pay of $25/hour.</div><div><br></div><div>Please ensure that you submit your online portfolio along with your application and clarify your availability in your application.</div><div><br></div><div>OpenX Values</div><div>We Are One: We are one team of strong, diverse individuals unified by a clear vision and mission.</div><div>Our Customers Define Us: We know our business flourishes or dies because of our customers.</div><div>OpenX Is Mine: We are all owners of OpenX. We stake our reputations on the excellence of our work.</div><div>We Evolve Fast: We take risks and admit failure openly, and at the same time recognize and repeat success aggressively.</div><div><br></div><div>OpenX is committed to equal employment opportunities.</div><div>It is a fundamental principle at OpenX not to discriminate against employees or applicants for employment on any legally-recognized basis including, but not limited to: age, race, creed, color, religion, national origin, sexual orientation, sex, disability, predisposing genetic characteristics, genetic information, military or veteran status, marital status, gender identity/transgender status, pregnancy, childbirth or related medical condition, and other protected characteristic as established by law.</div><div><br></div><div>OpenX Applicant Privacy Policy</div><div>Applicants can review our Applicant Privacy Policy at any time by visiting the following link: <a href="https://www.openx.com/privacy-center/applicant-privacy-policy/">https://www.openx.com/privacy-center/applicant-privacy-policy/</a>.</div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div>$21.25 - $25 an hour</div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><span>Pursuant to any state, local ordinance, or local hiring regulations, we will consider for employment any qualified applicant, including those with arrest and conviction records, in a manner consistent with the applicable regulation.&nbsp;</span></div><div><br></div><div><span>OpenX is committed to fair and equitable compensation practices. For all applicants, the base salary range is noted above, per hour. A candidate’s salary is determined by various factors including, but not limited to, relevant work experience, skills, and certifications. &nbsp;</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span>OpenX VALUES</span></b></div><div><span>Our five company values form a solid bedrock serving to define us as a group and guide the company. Our values remind us that how we do things often matters as much as what we do.</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span>WE ARE ONE</span></b></div><div><span>We are one team. There are no exceptions. We are a group of strong and diverse individuals unified by a shared mission. We embrace challenges and win together as a team. We respect and care about our colleagues and cultivate an inclusive culture</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span>WE ARE CUSTOMER CENTRIC</span></b></div><div><span>We innovate on behalf of our customers. We understand, respect, and listen carefully to our customers. We build great products to solve our customers’ problems. We manage our customers’ expectations clearly and honestly. We are a trusted partner to all of our customers - we act with integrity at all times. We care.</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span>OPENX IS OURS</span></b></div><div><span>We are all owners of OpenX</span></div><div><span>We all have a voice to improve OpenX</span></div><div><span>We stake our personal and professional reputations on the excellence of our work</span></div><div><span>We are not interested in just "doing our jobs"; we take ownership to drive results</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span>WE ARE AN OPEN BOOK</span></b></div><div><span>We understand and respect what each of us does.&nbsp;We are eager to teach and share what we know with others, both internally and externally. We are eager to learn from others and we ask questions internally and externally.&nbsp;</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span>WE EVOLVE FAST</span></b></div><div><span>We take responsible risks and own and learn from our mistakes. We recognize and repeat success.&nbsp;We actively seek out and provide constructive feedback. We adapt quickly and embrace change. We tackle growth and learning with real urgency. We are endlessly curious. </span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span>OpenX TRAITS</span></b></div><div><span>Our three traits capture what makes a great team member at OpenX.</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span>HUMBLE</span></b></div><div><span>Ideal team players are humble and demonstrate integrity. They put the team's success above their own, share credit generously, and value collective achievements. They are self-assured, open to coaching, and committed to continuous learning.</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span>DRIVEN</span></b></div><div><span>Ideal team players are results-driven and motivated. They are curious, always seeking more to do, learn, and take on. As proactive problem-solvers, they take initiative without needing external motivation. They continuously think about the next steps and opportunities for improvement.</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span>SMART</span></b></div><div><span>Ideal team players are smart and possess the intellectual acumen to understand the complexities of our organization and industry. They are interpersonally intelligent, good communicators, and exemplify sound judgment in their interactions across the company to foster a collaborative environment.</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span>OpenX is committed to equal employment opportunities. </span></b></div><div><span>It is a fundamental principle at OpenX not to discriminate against employees or applicants for employment on any legally-recognized basis including, but not limited to: age, race, creed, color, religion, national origin, sexual orientation, sex, disability, predisposing genetic characteristics, genetic information, military or veteran status, marital status, gender identity/transgender status, pregnancy, childbirth or related medical condition, and other protected characteristic as established by law.</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span>OpenX Applicant Privacy Policy</span></b></div><div><span>Applicants can review our Applicant Privacy Policy at any time by visiting the following link:&nbsp;</span><a class="postings-link" href="https://www.openx.com/privacy-center/applicant-privacy-policy/"><span>https://www.openx.com/privacy-center/applicant-privacy-policy/</span></a><span>.</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span>Effective Date: November 21, 2024</span></b></div></div></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/openx-intern-marketing-design">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/openx-intern-marketing-design</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Rackspace: Azure DevOps Engineer II/III</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> India - Bangalore
</p>

<div class="content"><div class="section-wrapper page-full-width"><div class="section page-centered"><div><b>Summary</b></div><div>Requires specialized depth and/or breadth of expertise in own job discipline or field. • Leads others to solve complex problems. • Works independently, with guidance in only the most complex situations. • May provide functional leadership to teams or projects.&nbsp;Encourages others to listen attentively and engage with the speaker by asking appropriate open[1]ended questions; reflects on and reiterates key points and clarifies messages to help others reach agreement. • Monitors non-verbal reactions of others to identify and respond to areas of interest or concern. • Ensures all viewpoints have been heard and discussed before reaching conclusions, offering guidance or asserting own views. • Influences and coaches others across the business unit/function to work independently and identify areas for improvement in work processes. • Encourages and motivates people to achieve high standards of excellence by consistently raising the bar and coaching others to achieve results. • Sets challenging and realistic goals for others; proactively considers the business unit/function’s goals to prevent conflicts of interests and communicates goals to teams. • Provides guidance and expertise to analyze data and patterns and assess the root cause of complex, non-routine problems. • Collaborates with others across disciplines to brainstorm and execute solutions to the most complex, uncommon problems. • Guides the execution of solutions for complex, non-routine issues; redirects solution implementation if desired results were not originally met. • Creatively develops tools, visual aids and other original content to support the understanding/education of complex and technical information (e.g., legal, operational risk, and regulatory data). • Guides others on the best practices and approaches for creating clear, concise and organized communication materials to convey technical concepts in a user-friendly way. • Challenges others to bring fresh and creative perspective to differentiating technical communications and ensuring comprehension and ease-of-use for various audiences. • Exceeds customers’ expectations by listening for unexpressed needs; connects customer needs to relevant service offerings and new technology. • Leads others in resolving technical issues in a timely manner; follows up with customers to ensure satisfaction. • Partners with the business to integrate new technologies into business solutions; creates and communicates a vision of the technology requirements for the future state of the business. • Prioritizes workload and ensures that deadlines are successfully met; delegates or seeks additional staff when necessary. • Identifies short- and long-term barriers to completing project plans and takes corrective action to meet deliverable objectives. • Manages multifaceted projects or assignments, such as projects that have several separate components, with minimal error and without missing important deliverables.</div><div>&nbsp;</div><div><b>Knowledge</b></div><div>DevOps&nbsp;Skill Baseline Coding</div><div>• Scripting/ Programing language/ Configuration Management/ Container (1 or more at 100 level)</div><div>• Continuous Integration / Continuous Deployment</div><div>• VCS (Git Based VSC)</div><div>• family with commit, branch, merge, review process</div><div>• understand pre/post hook</div><div>• design/implement branching strategy (e.g., git flow, GitHub flow)</div><div>• design/implement group development collaboration process (access control, code review/approval, integration with other CI tools)</div><div>• Artifact Repository</div><div>• familiar with one of the popular antifactory management tools</div><div>• CI/CD tools</div><div>• implement CI services (VCS, antifactory repo, build, release)</div><div>• Design/implement CI/CD pipeline</div><div>• Operating System familiar with Linux or Windows OS</div><div>• Cloud Skill Baseline</div><div>• Automation</div><div>• IaC</div><div>• use cloud IaC language to implement cloud resources or operation process</div><div>• use orchestration tools to organize IaC code and inject configurations</div><div>• CI/CD</div><div>• Implement CI services (VSC, Artifacts repo, build service pipeline service)</div><div>• implement CI/CD pipeline to build/deploy infrastructure or application</div><div>• design/implement best practice CI/CD</div><div>• Landing Zone (Multi Account Framework)</div><div>• Identity Access Management (IAM)</div><div>• Security ‘</div><div>• Networking Compute (VM, Container platform, Function)</div><div>• Virtual Machine workload</div><div>• Implement serverless solution for operational purpose</div><div>• Data storage, Database</div><div>• configuration management</div><div>• Secret Management</div><div>• Monitoring and Logging</div><div>• Message Queues</div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div class="text-small italic text-gray-700">We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.</div></div></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/rackspace-azure-devops-engineer-ii-iii">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/rackspace-azure-devops-engineer-ii-iii</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>6sense: VP, Product Marketing</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> United States, Remote
</p>

<div class="job__description body"><div><p><strong><span>Our Mission:</span></strong><span>&nbsp;</span></p><br><p><span>6sense is on a mission to revolutionize how B2B organizations create revenue by predicting customers most likely to buy and recommending the best course of action to engage anonymous buying teams. 6sense Revenue AI is the only sales and marketing platform to unlock the ability to create, manage and convert high-quality pipeline to revenue.</span><span>&nbsp;</span></p><br><p><strong><span>Our People:</span></strong><span>&nbsp;</span></p><br><p><span>People are the heart and soul of 6sense. We serve with passion and purpose. We live by our Being 6sense values of Accountability, Growth Mindset, Integrity, Fun and One Team. Every 6sensor plays a part in deﬁning the future of our industry-leading technology.&nbsp; 6sense is a place where difference-makers roll up their sleeves, take risks, act with integrity, and measure success by the value we create for our customers.</span><span>&nbsp;</span></p><br><p><span>We want 6sense to be the best chapter of your career.</span><span>&nbsp;</span></p></div><div><p><strong>Vice President, Product Marketing</strong></p><br><p>The Vice President of Product Marketing is responsible for driving differentiated, inspiring, and crisp product positioning, messaging, value propositions, and content that articulate the strength of the 6sense brand and platform. This executive ensures that 6sense’s innovation and category‑defining capabilities are clearly understood across customers, prospects, analysts, and influencers, and leads the strategy and execution of all product launches.</p><br><p><strong>Key Responsibilities</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Lead end-to-end ownership of product marketing, setting the strategic vision and defining how the team drives platform and solution positioning, messaging clarity, and market momentum.</li><br><li>Develop thought leadership and category-defining narratives that advance 6sense’s role at the center of the RevTech/Revenue AI category.</li><br><li>Own and evolve platform positioning, core messaging, and differentiated value propositions based on customer insights, competitive intelligence, and market trends.</li><br><li>Craft tailored narratives that communicate compelling value to Marketing, Sales, Customer Success, and Revenue Operations personas.</li><br><li>Define and run the product launch strategy, ensuring readiness, alignment, and successful adoption.</li><br><li>Oversee development of compelling buyer-facing content, including messaging frameworks, solution guides, demos, videos, and interactive content.</li><br><li>Define organizational strategy, hiring plans, goals, KPIs, and budget for the product marketing team.</li><br><li>Lead a team and foster a culture of innovation, collaboration, and customer-centricity.</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>Qualifications</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>15+ years of product marketing leadership experience in high-growth B2B SaaS; RevTech/MarTech preferred.</li><br><li>Proven success leading and scaling large (20+) product marketing teams.</li><br><li>Demonstrated ability to build differentiated positioning, messaging, and thought leadership programs.</li><br><li>Strong cross-functional collaboration skills and executive-level communication presence.</li><br><li>High-energy, adaptable leader with a passion for innovation, customer-centricity, and delivering superior experiences.</li><br></ul><br><p>Base Salary Range: $240,138.75 - $305,203.50. The base salary range represents the anticipated low and high end of the base salary range for this position. Actual salaries may vary and may be above or below the range based on various factors, including but not limited to work location and experience. The base salary is one component of 6sense’s total compensation package for this position. Other compensation may include a bonus program or commission plan, and stock options if approved by 6sense’s board. In addition, 6sense provides a variety of benefits, including generous health insurance coverage, life, and disability insurance, a 401K employer matching program, paid holidays, self-care days, and paid time off (PTO). <span>#Li-remote</span></p><br><p><span><span><span><span>Notice of Collection and Use of Personal Information for California Residents: </span><a href="https://6sense.com/california-recruitment-privacy-notice/">California Recruitment Privacy Notice and Policy</a></span></span></span></p></div><div><p><strong><span>Our Benefits:</span></strong><span>&nbsp;</span></p><br><p><span>Full-time employees can take advantage of health coverage, paid parental leave, generous paid time-off and holidays, quarterly self-care days off, and stock options. We’ll make sure you have the equipment and support you need to work and connect with your teams, at home or in one of our oﬃces.&nbsp;</span></p><br><p><span>We have a growth mindset culture that is represented in all that we do, from onboarding through to numerous learning and development initiatives including access to our LinkedIn Learning platform. Employee well-being is also top of mind for us. We host quarterly wellness education sessions to encourage self care and personal growth. From wellness days to ERG-hosted events, we celebrate and energize all 6sense employees and their backgrounds.</span><span>&nbsp;</span></p><br><p><strong><span>Equal Opportunity Employer:</span></strong><span>&nbsp;</span></p><br><p><span>6sense is an Equal Employment Opportunity and Affirmative Action Employers. Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender perception or identity, national origin, age, marital status, protected veteran status, or disability status. If you require reasonable accommodation in completing this application, interviewing, completing any pre-employment testing, or otherwise participating in the employee selection process, please direct your inquiries to </span><span><a href="mailto:jobs@6sense.com">jobs@6sense.com</a><a href="mailto:jobs@6sense.com">.</a></span><span>&nbsp;</span></p><br><p><em><span><span class="TextRun SCXW160271132 BCX0" lang="EN-US"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW160271132 BCX0">We are aware of recruiting impersonation&nbsp;</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW160271132 BCX0">attempts</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW160271132 BCX0"> that are not affiliated with 6sense in any way. </span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW160271132 BCX0">A</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW160271132 BCX0">ll email communications from </span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW160271132 BCX0">6sense</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW160271132 BCX0"> will originate from </span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW160271132 BCX0">the @6sense.com domain</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW160271132 BCX0">. </span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW160271132 BCX0">We will </span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW160271132 BCX0">not initially contact you via text message and will </span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW160271132 BCX0">never request payments</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW160271132 BCX0">. </span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW160271132 BCX0">If you are uncertain whether you have been contacted by an official 6sense employee, reach out to </span></span><a class="Hyperlink SCXW160271132 BCX0" href="mailto:jobs@indeed.com"><span class="FieldRange SCXW160271132 BCX0"><span class="TextRun Underlined SCXW160271132 BCX0" lang="EN-US"><span class="NormalTextRun CommentStart SCXW160271132 BCX0">jobs@</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW160271132 BCX0">6sense.com</span></span></span></a><span class="EOP SCXW160271132 BCX0">&nbsp;</span></span></em></p></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/6sense-vp-product-marketing">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/6sense-vp-product-marketing</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Stp.One: Senior Product Manager (m/f/d)</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote, Germany, Karlsruhe, DE, Nordwalde, DE, Wetter (Ruhr), DE, Lauf a. d. Pegnitz, DE
</p>

<div class="description-wrapper description-wrapper-shown" lang="en"><br><br><h5 class="detail-block-title">Short description</h5><br><div class="detail-block-description"><br><strong>Are you an experienced Product Manager looking to lead high-impact initiatives that blend AI, cloud technology, and real-world problem solving in a mission-critical domain?</strong><br>At stp.one, we empower our product teams to tackle complex customer and business challenges in ways that delight users and align with company goals.&nbsp;<strong>We’re now hiring a Senior Product Manager to join our insolvency domain.</strong><br><br><strong>Our mission</strong><br>Supporting insolvency administrators and their teams with innovative, cloud-connected services that use AI to streamline workflows and reduce manual effort. We aim to offer creditors a seamless platform for submitting and tracking claims, while enabling smooth communication with debtors. Our platform brings these capabilities together to boost efficiency, transparency, and collaboration throughout the insolvency process.<br><br><strong>Ready to drive real change in legal tech?<br></strong>Apply now and become part of our journey to simplify legal work.<strong><br></strong><br></div><br><br><br><h5 class="detail-block-title">Your mission</h5><br><div class="detail-block-description"><br>                            As a Senior Product Manager, you’ll ensure our solutions are valuable and viable by understanding business constraints (e.g. marketing, sales, legal, privacy) and deeply knowing our users, customers, and product usage data. Staying on top of industry trends and competitors is also key.<br>While each team member owns specific risks, we value product managers who drive innovation through collaboration. You’ll work closely with your team to identify and deliver impactful solutions. Our teams are trusted to choose the best approaches and are accountable for outcomes. Shipping matters - but delivering results, even across functions, is what truly counts.<br><br><strong>Your tasks include:</strong><ul><li><strong>Product Vision</strong>: Shape and communicate a clear product vision that aligns with business goals</li><li><strong>Customer Understanding</strong>: Lead user research and data analysis to ensure we solve the right problems</li><li><strong>Team Collaboration</strong>: Empower and guide cross-functional teams to deliver impactful solutions</li><li><strong>Roadmap Ownership</strong>: Define and prioritize the product roadmap and backlog with a focus on value and impact</li><li><strong>Execution Excellence</strong>: Drive high-quality delivery in close partnership with engineering and design</li><li><strong>Outcome Focus</strong>: Set and track success metrics, using insights to continuously improve</li><li><strong>Stakeholder Engagement</strong>: Align with internal teams and communicate clearly with leadership</li><li><strong>Continuous Improvement</strong>: Evolve product practices and stay ahead of industry trends</li></ul><br></div><br><br><br><h5 class="detail-block-title">Your profile</h5><br><div class="detail-block-description"><br><ul><li><strong>Extensive experience in Product Management:&nbsp;</strong>In-depth knowledge of the product lifecycle and product development, ideally in a <strong>B2B SaaS company</strong> or a <strong>technology-oriented industry</strong></li><li><strong>Expertise in agile methods:&nbsp;</strong>Proficiency with agile methodologies such as Scrum or Kanban</li><li>Expertise in applying <strong>prioritization techniques</strong> (e.g., MoSCoW, RICE)</li><li><strong>Excellent English &amp; German skills</strong>, both written and spoken</li><li>Proven experience in clear and effective communication with various stakeholders</li><li>Advanced knowledge in conducting market and competitive analysis</li><li>Ability to create and deliver compelling presentations, especially using PowerPoint</li></ul><br></div><br><br><br><h5 class="detail-block-title">Your team</h5><br><div class="detail-block-description"><br>                            You’ll be part of a dynamic Product Management team with <strong>18 passionate professionals.&nbsp;</strong><br>We work in durable, cross-functional teams made up of a product manager, designer, and engineers. Together, we build solutions that&nbsp;<ul><li>are valuable (customers want them),&nbsp;</li><li>viable (they fit business needs),</li><li>usable (intuitive for users),</li><li>and feasible (technically achievable).</li></ul>Our product managers are empowered to make decisions, collaborate closely with their teams, and drive meaningful impact for both our users and the business.<br>                        </div><br><br><br><h5 class="detail-block-title">Application process</h5><br><div class="detail-block-description"><br><ul><li><strong>Digital Get-to-know:&nbsp;</strong>In a 20-minute exchange with our recruiter, we look at mutual expectations together.</li><li><strong>First interview:</strong> You will then get to know our Vice President Product Management Felix together with our Product Lead and delve deeper into technical topics and the role (digital)</li><li><strong>Second interview</strong> together with our CTO Dirk Eisenberg (digital or on site)</li></ul><br></div><br><br><br><h5 class="detail-block-title">Contact details</h5><br><div class="detail-block-description"><br>                            If you have any questions, please contact our recruiter<br><br>Alexandra Ferschke&nbsp;<br>E-Mail:&nbsp;<a href="mailto:jobs@stp.one">jobs@stp.one</a><br></div><br><br><br><h5 class="detail-block-title">About us</h5><br><div class="detail-block-description"><br><span><strong><span>One Team - IT feels Right here!&nbsp;</span></strong><span><br>And this is why we are proud to deliver solutions for a well-functioning legal system as the foundation of our society and economy.<br>Around 400 colleagues in different locations <strong>collaborate</strong> and make sure that we deliver on our promises! On top of technology, we develop and sell solutions which enable legal professionals to perform their mission-critical work efficiently. This builds <strong>trust</strong> and <strong>relationships</strong> for life with customers. The ambition to do things right fosters <strong>integrity</strong> and critical dialogue. Therefore, we <strong>empower</strong> our people to speak up, to&nbsp;<strong>innovate, to ensure customer centricity&nbsp;</strong>and growth.<br>We are keeping our promises to deliver <strong>excellent</strong> digital solutions and ensure&nbsp;<strong>adaptability</strong> to changing environments and needs.<br><br><strong><span>Your Impact Matters</span></strong></span><span><br></span><span>Join us in our journey to become the market leader across Europe. Be yourself, thrive in a supportive environment, and take pride in being a key player in our success story. Discover the difference you can make in an organization that values you as an individual and as an essential part of our thriving community.<br><br><strong><span>What our People can Expect&nbsp;</span></strong></span><span><br></span><span>At stp.one, we’ve created a workplace that values your individuality and your contribution. We foster diversity and we know that everyone has different preferences and needs. Therefore, we ensure that our people have choices to maintain the best work-life-fit. Enjoy the perks of working from anywhere or from an innovative workspace, workcation experiences, and continuous learning.<br><br><strong><span>Join stp.one&nbsp;</span></strong></span><span><br></span><span>Our focus goes beyond innovative software solutions, we believe in the power of our people to shape the future of legal tech and the digital economy. We amplify each other and forge trust sharing knowledge, offering encouragement, celebrate our team effort and cherishing our differences: stp.one is where your unique journey meets professional growth.</span></span><br></div><br><br></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/stp-one-senior-product-manager-m-f-d">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/stp-one-senior-product-manager-m-f-d</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Stadium: Product Owner</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> India
</p>

<p>We are looking for a <strong>Product Owner</strong> who is eager to learn, take ownership, and help shape how our teams build products that make a real difference.</p><p>At <strong>Stadium</strong>, we’re building products that bring delight and connection to organizations worldwide. From thoughtful gifting to brand-building experiences, our platform combines creativity, data, and technology to make every interaction meaningful.</p><p>In this role, you will work closely with a Senior Product Owner to translate business goals and user insights into clear, well-defined product features. You will collaborate with teams across Engineering, Design, Operations, Customer Success, and Marketing to design scalable, impactful solutions.</p><p>This role is ideal for someone with experience in a startup or product-led environment who wants to grow in a high-ownership, fast-moving, and collaborative setting.</p><h3>Your Role</h3><p>You will be responsible for:</p><ul><li> Collaborating with Product and Design teams to define product vision, priorities, and goals for specific modules or initiatives. </li><li> Maintaining and refining the product backlog with clear, actionable, and business-aligned user stories. </li><li> Supporting discovery, sprint planning, and delivery activities to ensure consistent execution. </li><li> Partnering with Operations, Customer Success, Engineering, Marketing, and Design teams to understand workflows, challenges, and SOPs. </li><li> Identifying inefficiencies and opportunities for automation or product improvements. </li><li> Translating cross-functional insights into structured requirements and user stories. </li><li> Working with engineers and designers to clarify requirements and ensure successful implementation. </li><li> Supporting Project Managers in aligning priorities, dependencies, and timelines. </li><li> Using analytics and feedback to measure product success and propose iterative enhancements. </li><li> Gradually taking ownership of smaller product areas with mentorship and guidance. </li><li> Staying curious about user needs, team workflows, and emerging product trends. </li></ul> <h3>What You'll Bring to the Table</h3><p><strong>Primary Requirements:</strong></p><ul><li>3+ years of experience as a Product Owner, Product Manager, or in a similar role within a startup or product-led tech environment. </li><li> Curious, analytical mindset with a strong desire to learn from senior product leaders while taking initiative. </li><li> Strong problem-solving and prioritization skills. </li><li> Excellent communication and stakeholder collaboration abilities. </li><li> Ability to understand both customer experience and internal operational workflows. </li><li> Familiarity with Agile methodologies (Scrum and/or Kanban). </li><li> Hands-on experience with tools such as <strong>JIRA, Confluence, Figma, or analytics dashboards</strong>.</li></ul> <ul><li>Competitive salary based on skill set.</li><li>Fully remote role - work with talented teammates across the globe. </li><li>Flexible working hours and autonomy over your schedule. </li><li>5-day work week for better work-life balance.</li><li>Team retreats and offsites to connect and recharge. </li><li>Meal vouchers and employee benefits(health insurance) support. </li><li>Internal learning tracks to grow into other areas of development. </li><li>Plenty of company swag and additional perks.</li></ul>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/stadium-product-owner">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/stadium-product-owner</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Bounteous: Sr Product Manager</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> United States
</p>

<div class="content"><div class="section-wrapper page-full-width"><div class="section page-centered"><div>Bounteous is a premier end-to-end digital transformation consultancy dedicated to partnering with ambitious brands to create digital solutions for today’s complex challenges and tomorrow’s opportunities. With uncompromising standards for technical and domain expertise, we deliver innovative and strategic solutions in Strategy, Analytics, Digital Engineering, Cloud, Data &amp; AI, Experience Design, and Marketing.</div><div><br></div><div>Our Co-Innovation methodology is a unique engagement model designed to align interests and accelerate value creation. Our clients worldwide benefit from the skills and expertise of over 4,000+ expert team members across the Americas, APAC, and EMEA. By partnering with leading technology providers, we craft transformative digital experiences that enhance customer engagement and drive business success.</div><div><br></div><div>We are seeking a <b>Senior Product Manager, MarTech</b> to lead strategy, roadmap, and delivery for customer experience and marketing technology solutions built on the Adobe Experience Platform ecosystem, including Adobe Journey Optimizer (AJO), Real-Time CDP, and Customer Journey Analytics (CJA).</div><div>This role sits at the intersection of business strategy, customer experience, data, and technology. You will partner closely with marketing, analytics, engineering, and design teams to translate business goals into scalable, data-driven customer journeys and products. &nbsp;The best candidate will have a bias for action and bring a positive energy to the team.&nbsp;</div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Information Security Responsibilities</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>Promote and enforce awareness of key information security practices, including acceptable use of information assets, malware protection, and password security protocols</li><li>Identify, assess, and report security risks, focusing on how these risks impact the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of information assets</li><li>Understand and evaluate how data is stored, processed, or transmitted, ensuring compliance with data privacy and protection standards (GDPR, CCPA, etc.)</li><li>Ensure data protection measures are integrated throughout the information lifecycle to safeguard sensitive information</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Role and Responsibilities:</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li><br></li><li><b>Product Execution + Delivery (60%)</b></li><li>Collaborates with internal Bounteous teams to lead Discovery workshops; can demonstrate structured/effective methods for discovery and able to synthesize and quantify customer feedback</li><li>Excels at writing requirements, user stories, acceptance criteria, and all supporting documentation</li><li>Comfortable leading internal and external meetings, regularly leads refinement discussions, and is sought out as the product expert, owning feature requirements.</li><li>Track, organize and document project strategy and requirements gathering sessions, and driving projects forward</li><li>Mastering managing scope and emergent requirements with internal teams and client stakeholders</li><li>Able to identify and make decisions between impactful and urgent problems to solve with minimal or no guidance.</li><li>Understands technical and design trade-offs, and can work with your team to find creative solutions that strike the right balance between speed and quality. </li><div><br></div><div><b>Customer Insight (~15%)</b></div><li>Active advocate for the user, both internally and with the client.</li><li>Manages projects to iterate on delivery and quickly realize value for client’s users.</li><li>When assessing a product opportunity, you know how to formulate the right business questions that should be asked, and then how to track down data that can inform a decision. </li><li>You can connect project-level outcomes to key metrics that drive your product area, and that are meaningful outcomes for the business.</li><div><br></div><div><b>Product Strategy (~10%)</b></div><li>Effectively take into account the client’s business strategy when making roadmap decisions, and can effectively communicate those strategic ties to the delivery team members.</li><li>Make a meaningful impact to the strategy through day-to-day product execution and through your contributions to the roadmap.</li><div><br></div><div><b>Influencing People (~15%)</b></div><li>Develops meaningful relationships with key individuals internally and externally, regardless of level, to achieve business objectives.</li><li>Able to build buy-in and support for your projects from senior managers both within and outside the product organization.</li><li>Able to motivate your team to push through challenges, and do whatever it takes to get your project out the door.</li><li>Coordinates implementation activities across a broad range of functions and departments</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Preferred Qualifications:</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>BS/BA in relevant program, or equivalent work experience</li><li>5+ years of product experience in gathering requirements</li><li>Familiarity with multiple functional suites and software packages for requirements (JIRA, Azure Devops, etc.)</li><li>Subject matter expert with Adobe Experience Platform including, AJO, CDP and CJA </li><li>Deep knowledge and experience with multiple SDLCs such as Agile, Scrum and traditional waterfall</li><li>Worked on multiple teams and projects simultaneously</li><li>Strong written and verbal communication skills</li><li>Digital agency experience is a plus.</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div>$60 - $90 an hour</div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div>We invite you to stay connected with us by subscribing to our monthly job openings alert <a class="postings-link" href="https://www.bounteous.com/careers/#contact-us-footer">here</a>.</div><div><br></div><div>Bounteous is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. Bounteous does not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, age, physical or mental disability, national origin, veteran status, or any other status protected under federal, state, or local law.&nbsp;Bounteous is willing to sponsor eligible candidates for employment visas.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div><b>#BI-Remote</b></div><div><b>#LI-Remote</b></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div class="text-small italic text-gray-700">We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.</div></div></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/bounteous-sr-product-manager">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/bounteous-sr-product-manager</a></p>

      <title>Hitachi Digital Services: Lead Full Stack Developer (UI/UX)</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote,India
</p>

<div class="ewa-rteLine"><strong>Our Company</strong></div><br><div class="ewa-rteLine"><br><div class="ewa-rteLine">&nbsp;</div><br><div class="ewa-rteLine">We’re Hitachi Digital, a company at the forefront of digital transformation and the fastest growing division of Hitachi Group. We’re crucial to the company’s strategy and ambition to become a premier global player in the massive and fast-moving digital transformation market.</div><br><div class="ewa-rteLine">&nbsp;</div><br><div class="ewa-rteLine">Our group companies, including GlobalLogic, Hitachi Digital Services, Hitachi Vantara and more, offer comprehensive services that span the entire digital lifecycle, from initial idea to full-scale operation and the infrastructure to run it on. Hitachi Digital represents One Hitachi, integrating domain knowledge and digital capabilities, and harnessing the power of the entire portfolio of services, technologies, and partnerships, to accelerate synergy creation and make real-world impact for our customers and society as a whole.</div><br><div class="ewa-rteLine">&nbsp;</div><br><div class="ewa-rteLine">Imagine the sheer breadth of talent it takes to unleash a digital future. We don’t expect you to ‘fit’ every requirement – your life experience, character, perspective, and passion for achieving great things in the world are equally as important to us.</div><br><div class="ewa-rteLine">&nbsp;</div><br></div><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p><strong>The Team</strong></p><br><p>As a Full Stack Developer, you will design and develop end-to-end web applications, ensuring seamless integration between front-end and back-end systems. You will focus on intuitive UI/UX, robust APIs, and data visualization using Looker BI, while leveraging best practices for scalability, security, and performance.</p><br><p><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p><br><p><strong>The Role</strong></p><br><p>Application Development</p><br><p>Design and implement responsive, user-friendly interfaces using React.js and modern UI frameworks.<br>Develop and maintain RESTful APIs and backend services using Python and Node.js.<br>Integrate Looker BI dashboards and embed analytics into applications for actionable insights.<br>Ensure cross-browser compatibility, accessibility, and mobile responsiveness.</p><br><p>Architecture &amp; Integration</p><br><p>Collaborate with architects to align solutions with enterprise standards and cloud-native patterns.<br>Integrate applications with databases, authentication systems, and third-party APIs.<br>Optimize application performance and scalability across distributed environments.</p><br><p>Quality &amp; Governance</p><br><p>Implement secure coding practices, data protection, and compliance controls.<br>Conduct code reviews, unit testing, and maintain CI/CD pipelines for continuous delivery.<br>Document architecture decisions, workflows, and best practices.</p><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p><strong>What you’ll bring</strong></p><br><p>Bachelor’s or master’s in computer science, Software Engineering, or related field.<br>5+ years of experience in full-stack development.<br>Strong proficiency in React.js, JavaScript/TypeScript, and modern UI frameworks.<br>Hands-on experience with Python and Node.js for backend development.<br>Experience with Looker BI or similar BI tools for data visualization.<br>Familiarity with SQL/NoSQL databases and API integration.<br>Understanding of UI/UX principles, responsive design, and accessibility standards.</p><br><p>Preferred Qualifications</p><br><p>Experience with cloud platforms (GCP preferred; AWS/Azure a plus).<br>Knowledge of containerization (Docker, Kubernetes) and microservices architecture.<br>Exposure to CI/CD tools (GitHub Actions, Jenkins) and DevOps practices.<br>Familiarity with data analytics, ETL pipelines, and data modeling.</p><br><p>Key Competencies</p><br><p>Strong problem-solving and debugging skills.<br>Ability to translate business requirements into intuitive user experiences.<br>Collaborative mindset with excellent communication skills.<br>Passion for clean, maintainable code and modern development practices.</p><br><p>Success Metrics</p><br><p>Delivery of high-quality, responsive applications meeting UI/UX standards.<br>Integration of Looker BI dashboards for actionable insights.<br>Reduction in application latency and improved scalability.<br>Positive user feedback on usability and performance.</p><br><p>What You’ll Work With</p><br><p>Front-End: React.js, TypeScript, CSS-in-JS frameworks.<br>Back-End: Python (Flask/Django), Node.js (Express), RESTful APIs.<br>Data &amp; BI: Looker BI, SQL/NoSQL databases.<br>Cloud &amp; DevOps: GCP (preferred), Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines.</p><br><div class="ewa-rteLine"><br><div class="ewa-rteLine">&nbsp;</div><br><div class="ewa-rteLine"><strong>About us</strong></div><br><div class="ewa-rteLine">&nbsp;</div><br><div class="ewa-rteLine"><br><div class="ewa-rteLine">We’re a global, 1000-stong, diverse team of professional experts, promoting and delivering Social Innovation through our One Hitachi initiative (OT x IT x Product) and working on projects that have a real-world impact. We’re curious, passionate and empowered, blending our legacy of 110 years of innovation with our shaping our future. Here you’re not just another employee; you’re part of a tradition of excellence and a community working towards creating a digital future.</div><br><div class="ewa-rteLine">&nbsp;</div><br><div class="ewa-rteLine">#LI-AP1</div><br></div><br></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/hitachi-digital-services-lead-full-stack-developer-ui-ux">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/hitachi-digital-services-lead-full-stack-developer-ui-ux</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Kayzen: Senior Product Manager (m/f/d)</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Berlin,London, Bengaluru, Remote
</p>

<div class="job__description body"><div><p><strong>Senior Product Manager (m/f/d)</strong></p><br><p><strong>Berlin, London, Bengaluru, Remote</strong></p><br><p><strong>________________________</strong></p><br><p>Hello  I am <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/puneetnline/">Puneet</a>, Co- founder and CPO at Kayzen, and I am now looking for a <strong>Senior Product Manager</strong> who will be part of our Product team.&nbsp; </p><br><p><strong>But wait, you have not heard of Kayzen before? &nbsp;</strong></p><br><p>Kayzen is a mobile demand-side platform (DSP) dedicated to democratizing programmatic advertising. We enable leading apps, agencies, media buyers, and brands to run programmatic customer acquisition, retargeting, and brand performance campaigns through its self-serve and managed service options.&nbsp;Built on the three core pillars of performance, transparency, and control, Kayzen powers the world’s best mobile marketing teams with bespoke solutions that fuel business growth and deliver a competitive advantage.&nbsp;With an unprecedented scale of 160B+ daily ad requests from 1.6B+ unique users worldwide, we serve up to 1B+ ads per day in 180 countries. Kayzen is accessible through our APIs and user interface.</p><br><p><strong>The team</strong></p><br><p>You’ll work with a globally distributed, cross-functional team including Customer Success, Engineering, Data Science, Design and Product. We’re a motivated group aligned to push the boundaries of mobile ad-tech and build products that matter to customers.&nbsp;We would like you to be part of our journey as Senior Product Manager (m/f/d)!</p><br><p><strong>The role</strong></p><br><p>As a Senior Product Manager, you will report directly to our CPO/Co-Founder. This is a high-visibility role: you will define product vision and roadmap for features that you own, lead end-to-end delivery, and ensure advanced capabilities are surfaced as intuitive workflows that drive measurable customer and business outcomes.</p><br><p><strong>Key Qualifications</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Hungry for success. Doesn’t look for excuses. Have a mindset of “Getting things done”</li><br><li>Prior Product Management experience (3+ years)&nbsp; in mobile programmatic space</li><br><li>Outstanding analytical and problem solving skills</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>Responsibilities&nbsp;</strong></p><br><ul><br><li><strong>Define product vision &amp; roadmap.</strong> Own the roadmap for your product area, prioritize initiatives that deliver clear value and align with company strategy.</li><br><li><strong>Cross-functional collaboration.</strong> Work closely with engineering, design, data and customer success to translate customer needs into technically feasible, well-scoped features and to accelerate execution quality and pace.</li><br><li><strong>Data, metrics &amp; experimentation.</strong> Define success metrics (adoption, engagement, business impact), run experiments and use analytics to validate hypothesis and guide iteration.</li><br><li><strong>Hands-on problem solving. </strong>Dive into technical and business problems as needed; own tradeoffs and make disciplined prioritization decisions</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>What do we offer?</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Reporting directly to Co-founder &amp; CPO</li><br><li>Direct access to top management and an extremely “visible” role</li><br><li>Exceptional career growth and learning opportunity</li><br><li>A unique opportunity to be part of an experienced team of industry experts and entrepreneurs who bring massive change to the Adtech market</li><br><li>A fun, driven, and multinational team located across Germany, India, UK, Argentina, Ukraine, Turkey, Spain&nbsp; and many more countries</li><br><li>A flexible work-from-home arrangement</li><br><li>A 500-dollar home-office setup budget</li><br><li>A 1000-dollar annual learning and development budget</li><br></ul></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/kayzen-senior-product-manager-m-f-d">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/kayzen-senior-product-manager-m-f-d</a></p>
</description>
