    <item>
      <title>Playlab: Senior Product Manager</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote
</p>

<h2><strong>About Playlab</strong></h2><p>Playlab is a tech non-profit dedicated to helping educators and students become critical consumers and creators of AI.</p><p>We believe that an open-source, community-driven approach is key to harnessing the potential of AI in education. We equip communities with AI tools and hands-on professional development that empowers educators &amp; students to build custom AI apps for their unique context. Over 60,000 educators have published apps on Playlab – and the impact is growing every day.</p><p>At Playlab, we believe that AI is a new design material - one that should be shaped by many to bring their ideas about learning to life. If you're passionate about building creative, equitable futures for students and teachers, we hope you'll join us.</p><p></p><h2><strong>The Role</strong></h2><p>Playlab is hiring its first dedicated Product Manager. This is a hands-on, high-ownership role for someone who wants to shape how educators and students build with AI—not from a distance, but in the details.</p><p>You'll work to implement Playlab’s strategic pillars including:</p><ul><li><p><strong>Expand what's possible:</strong> Add new capabilities (e.g., components, agents) that expands Playlab beyond chatbots, so that users can build more software that meets their needs.</p></li><li><p><strong>Deepen the context:</strong> Make Playlab the tool that best understands and adapts to user context, building on and expanding beyond our current work on curriculum knowledge graphs.</p></li><li><p><strong>Set the safety standard:</strong> Establish Playlab as the benchmark for responsible AI in education, shifting the burden of safety from users to the platform.</p></li></ul><p>Playlab has a near-term strategy defined. What we need is someone who can translate that strategy into shipped product, while sharpening the strategy based on what you learn along the way. You'll work directly with our CTO, engineering team, ML team, designers, and partnerships team. You'll hear directly from educators through our deep partner relationships. And you'll make product decisions that affect how educators and learners across the globe experience AI in education.</p><p>This role requires comfort with ambiguity. Playlab is an early-stage product with significant scope, a growing team, and limited existing product process. You'll need to build that process as you go—not wait for someone to hand it to you. If you need a lot of structure to do your best work, this isn't the right fit. If you thrive when you can shape the environment around you, read on.</p><p></p><h2><strong>What You'll Do</strong></h2><p><strong>Drive Product Execution</strong></p><ul><li><p>Own the product roadmap: prioritize ruthlessly, write clear specs, and work with design, engineering, and learning teams to ship</p></li><li><p>De-risk builds by breaking work into meaningful increments that let us learn as we go</p></li><li><p>Make tradeoffs when scope, timeline, and resources collide and communicate those tradeoffs clearly</p></li></ul><p><strong>Go Deep on the Details</strong></p><ul><li><p>Write detailed requirements that align design, engineering, and go-to-market teams</p></li><li><p>Understand the technical constraints and possibilities, and work side-by-side with engineering</p></li><li><p>Engage directly with users, and gather user feedback, usage data, and partner insights to inform decisions</p></li></ul><p><strong>Build Product Process</strong></p><ul><li><p>Establish rituals, artifacts, and communication patterns that help a growing team stay aligned</p></li><li><p>Create clarity about how product decisions get made, without slowing the team down</p></li><li><p>Document what's working so others can build on it</p></li></ul><p><strong>Collaborate Across Teams</strong></p><ul><li><p>Work with Learning and Partnerships to translate field feedback into clear priorities and simpler designs</p></li><li><p>Coordinate with design to ensure what we build is usable, not just functional</p></li></ul><p><strong>Refine Strategy as You Learn</strong></p><ul><li><p>Pressure-test strategic assumptions against what you see in the product and hear from users</p></li><li><p>Surface when priorities should shift, and make the case with evidence</p></li><li><p>Help leadership make better decisions by bringing clarity to ambiguous situations</p></li></ul><p></p><h2><strong>You Might Be a Fit If You...</strong></h2><ul><li><p>Have 7+ years of product management experience, including at least one early-stage or high-growth environment where you had to build process, not just follow it</p></li><li><p>Have led product development for AI-powered or technically complex products—you can work fluently with ML and engineering teams</p></li><li><p>Get energy from the details: you'd rather write a clear spec than a strategy deck</p></li><li><p>Ship fast without cutting corners: you know how to de-risk builds and make incremental progress</p></li><li><p>Thrive in ambiguity and can make good decisions with incomplete information</p></li><li><p>Communicate crisply: you can explain complex tradeoffs to technical and non-technical audiences</p></li><li><p>Care about education, equity, or mission-driven work; this isn't just a job, it's a chance to shape how AI shows up in schools</p></li></ul><p></p><h2><strong>Bonus Points For...</strong></h2><ul><li><p>Experience in edtech or deep familiarity with how products land in K-12 or higher ed environments</p></li><li><p>Background working on platforms or tools where users build things (not just consume content)</p></li><li><p>Experience with responsible AI, content moderation, or trust &amp; safety product work</p></li><li><p>Deep familiarity with the AI/LLM product landscape</p></li></ul><p></p><h2><strong>Why Join Us?</strong></h2><p><strong>Build the Product Function:</strong> You'll be Playlab's first PM and will get the chance to shape how product management works here.</p><p><strong>Meaningful Scope:</strong> You'll own strategic pillars that directly affect whether educators can build AI tools that transform their classrooms.</p><p><strong>Mission-Aligned Team:</strong> Join a small, passionate group committed to equity, creativity, and joyful learning.</p><p><strong>Direct User Connection:</strong> Playlab's deep partnerships mean you'll hear directly from educators</p><p><strong>Flexible Work:</strong> Remote-first environment with autonomy and a strong culture of collaboration. Occasional travel for partner meetings and team gatherings.</p><p><strong>Competitive Pay &amp; Benefits:</strong> Includes salary, healthcare, retirement, generous time off, and opportunities for professional growth.</p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/playlab-senior-product-manager">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/playlab-senior-product-manager</a></p>
</description>

      <title>Raspberry AI: Senior Product Engineer</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> United States
</p>

<p><strong>About the Company</strong> Raspberry AI is a leading provider of AI design software for fashion brands and retailers. Our software empowers brands to understand consumer demand and create unique designs in minutes. Using advanced AI analytics and generative AI, we help fashion brands revolutionize their design and merchandising processes.</p><p>We are a Series A startup backed by top-tier venture capital firms including Andreessen Horowitz (a16z), Khosla Ventures, and Greycroft.</p><p><strong>Role</strong> We are seeking a talented and motivated Full Stack Software Engineer to join our growing team. You will play a critical part in developing and enhancing core components of our AI-powered design platform.</p><p><strong>What You'll Do</strong></p><ul><li><p>Design, develop, and maintain a frontend generative AI web app (React/NextJS/Typescript) and related backend services (FastAPI/Python)</p></li><li><p>Develop and maintain RESTful APIs for seamless integration with frontend applications</p></li><li><p>Collaborate closely with machine learning engineers to translate prototypes into production-ready systems</p></li><li><p>Participate in all phases of the software development lifecycle, including design, implementation, testing, and deployment</p></li></ul><p><strong>Qualifications</strong></p><ul><li><p>Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field</p></li><li><p>6+ years of industry experience</p></li><li><p>Strong programming skills in Python, experience with cloud platforms like GCP or AWS (e.g., serverless functions, containerization), and familiarity with data analysis tools like BigQuery</p></li><li><p>Experience building web applications and user interfaces for AI products</p></li><li><p>Experience with machine learning libraries (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch, Huggingface) is a plus</p></li><li><p>Proven experience building and deploying AI-native applications, with hands-on expertise in LLMs, prompt engineering, and generative AI workflows</p></li><li><p>Excellent communication and collaboration skills</p></li></ul><p><strong>Benefits</strong></p><ul><li><p>Competitive salary and equity options</p></li><li><p>Comprehensive benefits package including health, dental, and vision insurance</p></li><li><p>Opportunity to work on cutting-edge AI technology with a high-impact team</p></li><li><p>Fully remote with a supportive company culture</p></li><li><p>Be part of a rapidly growing company with significant growth potential</p></li></ul>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/raspberry-ai-senior-product-engineer">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/raspberry-ai-senior-product-engineer</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Appspace: VP, Customer Support</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> United States Remote
</p>

<div class="job__description body"><div><p><strong>About Appspace:</strong></p><br><p><span>At Appspace, we’re passionate about creating better work experiences for people everywhere, and we’re looking for people that feel the same way. Our global office locations and flexible work culture help you work wherever and however you’re at your best. Plus, we take the time to help you enjoy your work, build lasting connections, and grow your role. Join the Appspace team and be a part of a culture that’s helping people everywhere love where they work.</span></p></div><div><p><strong>Your Role as a VP, Customer Support:&nbsp;</strong></p><br><p>Are you a visionary support leader passionate about turning customer service into a competitive differentiator? Appspace is seeking a dynamic and highly experienced VP, Customer Support to lead our worldwide team. This pivotal role reports directly to the Customer Success Leader and is responsible for scaling our global support operations and driving a superior Customer Experience (CX) that fuels retention and growth.&nbsp;</p><br><p>We are looking for a leader who is both deeply technical and strategically focused on people and customer relationships. You will mature our existing modern support practices (including Intelligent Swarming), significantly reduce ticket deflection through optimized self-service, and cultivate a high-performance, positive team culture globally.&nbsp;</p><br><p><strong>A Day in the Life of an VP, Customer Support:&nbsp;</strong></p><br><p>1. Customer Experience &amp; Relationship Building&nbsp;</p><br><ul><br><li>Own and elevate the end-to-end customer support experience, using data to inform continuous service improvements and strengthen customer loyalty.&nbsp;</li><br><li>Champion a culture of proactive, empathetic, and relationship-focused support, ensuring all global interactions reflect Appspace's commitment to partnership.</li><br><li>Act as a key stakeholder in the Customer Success organization, ensuring seamless handoffs and collaboration with Sales, Engineering, and Product teams.&nbsp;</li><br></ul><br><p>2. Operational Excellence &amp; Modern Practices</p><br><ul><br><li>Drive the operationalization and maturity of our Intelligent Swarming model, ensuring fast, effective, and unified global problem resolution across multiple product lines (post-M&amp;A integration).&nbsp;</li><br><li>Leverage TSIA and other leading industry best practices to define, measure, and optimize support KPIs, including Time-to-Resolution, Deflection Rate, and Customer Effort Score (CES).&nbsp;</li><br><li>Lead strategic initiatives to significantly reduce ticket deflection by optimizing self-service channels, knowledge management, and community engagement.&nbsp;</li><br></ul><br><p>3. Team Leadership &amp; Global Integration</p><br><ul><br><li>Provide inspiring and decisive leadership for a globally distributed team of support professionals.&nbsp;</li><br><li>Successfully navigate and lead the blending of support teams and processes following mergers and acquisitions, creating a single, cohesive, and high-performing global unit.&nbsp;</li><br><li>Foster a Positive Team Influence, promoting continuous learning, career development, and a highly engaged work environment that attracts and retains top talent.</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>What You’ll Need:&nbsp;</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Minimum 5-7 years of experience leading large-scale, global (multi-region) technical support organizations within a B2B SaaS environment.&nbsp;</li><br><li>Proven track record of successfully blending teams, products, and processes through M&amp;A activity.&nbsp;</li><br><li>Demonstrable experience implementing and maturing modern support models (e.g., Intelligent Swarming, TSIA methodology).&nbsp;</li><br><li>Deep expertise with required support tools and architecture:</li><br><ul><br><li>Expert user/administrator of CRM/Ticketing systems: Salesforce Service Cloud, ZenDesk, and/or ServiceNow.&nbsp;</li><br><li>Workflow &amp; Tracking: JIRA or similar development tracking system.&nbsp;</li><br><li>Support Analytics/Insights: SupportLogic or similar AI/ML-driven support analysis tool.&nbsp;</li><br><li>Technical Acumen: Strong working knowledge of General Cloud Architecture (Google/AWS/Azure) and Infrastructure principles</li><br></ul><br></ul><br><p><strong>The Perks of Working for Appspace:</strong></p><br><p><span>For all our US based team members, we offer a variety of benefits from competitive salaries, medical, dental and vision coverage, disability coverage, employer paid life insurance, mental health resources, 401(k) plan and a fully paid parental leave program.</span></p><br><p><span>Additional perks include:</span></p><br><ul><br><li><span>Generous PTO</span></li><br><li><span>Flexible work schedules</span></li><br><li><span>Remote work opportunities</span></li><br><li><span>Paid company holidays</span></li><br><li><span>Appspace Quiet Fridays (No non-essential internal meetings scheduled)</span></li><br><li><span>A casual dress work environment&nbsp;</span></li><br></ul></div><div><p><strong>Disclaimer:</strong></p><br><p><em>Appspace is committed to equitable compensation practices and complies with all applicable local, state, and federal regulations. For jurisdictions that require pay scale disclosure, a general compensation range may be provided during the initial stages of the interview process. Final compensation will be based on multiple factors including experience, skills, certifications, and overall fit for the role.</em></p><br><p><em>If you are located in a jurisdiction with specific pay transparency requirements, we will be happy to discuss the relevant range during your application process.</em></p></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/appspace-vp-customer-support">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/appspace-vp-customer-support</a></p>
</description>

<div class=""><br><p><span><span>Bridgeway</span><span>&nbsp;is seeking a Product Owner to</span><span>&nbsp;oversee the&nbsp;</span><span>development of products from start to completion to ensure they meet our customer needs.&nbsp;</span><span>The Product Owner will&nbsp;</span><span>be responsible for</span><span>&nbsp;</span><span>determining</span><span>&nbsp;the overall vision of products,&nbsp;</span><span>guiding the&nbsp;</span><span>Technical</span><span> team on user story requirements, prioritizing feature work, and c</span><span>ustomers</span><span>.</span><span>&nbsp;</span></span></p><br><p><span><span>This is a remote position with occasional travel. </span></span><span><span> </span></span><span><span> </span></span><span>&nbsp;</span></p><br><p><span>&nbsp;</span></p><br><p><strong><span><span>Responsibilities:</span></span></strong><span><span> </span></span><span>&nbsp;</span></p><br><ul><br><li><span><span>Collaborates user enablement.&nbsp;</span></span></li><br><li>Turns data insights into products with actionable outcomes to the customer. <span>&nbsp;</span></li><br><li>Works in an Agile environment and assigned products, balancing the requirements of stakeholders.&nbsp;</li><br><li>Leads the product functional design process based on an intimate knowledge of the users and technology. Follow competitors and the industry.</li><br><li>Partners with Technical Writers to produce and maintain product documentation including release notes, user guides and customer market</span></span></li><br><li><span>Proven </span><span>track record</span><span>&nbsp;of delivering data driven solutions with a customer-first mindset</span><span> </span></li><br><li><span>Established background in launching software or services in partnership with engineering teams and high degree of </span><span>proficiency</span><span>&nbsp;in prototyping, iterative development, understanding of Agile principles</span><span> </span></li><br><li><span>Experience successfully driving end-to-end delivery of data and intelligence solutions, including a wide variety of mechanisms, </span><span>e.g.</span><span>&nbsp;dashboards, APIs, real time alerts, etc.</span><span> </span></li><br><li><span>Familiarity with </span><span>S</span><span>crum     <item>
      <title>Intellum: Senior Product Manager</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote, United States
</p>

<div class="job__description body"><div><p><strong>About us</strong>&nbsp;</p><br><p>Intellum is the leader in corporate education technology and powers the largest, most successful customer, partner, and employee learning programs in the world. Large brands and fast-moving companies like Google, Meta, Amazon, Walmart, Xero, Atlassian, Mailchimp, Airbnb, Stripe, and TikTok rely on Intellum to engage and educate the audiences they touch.&nbsp;</p><br><p>We have always been a “remote first” company and are proud to have team members located all over the world. We value Curiosity, Creativity, Perseverance, and Kindness and strive to demonstrate these core values every day. Our culture is very important to us. We invest in our people in fun and exciting ways, including personal development budgets and an annual all-company retreat that is focused less on work and more on human connections. We are in growth mode, and our “smart growth” approach ensures that we will continue to scale our company effectively.&nbsp;</p><br><p>&nbsp;</p></div><div><p>Senior Product Managers at Intellum lead major product areas, working closely with customers, client-facing teams, engineering, quality, and design. They bring business and user research into decision-making to deliver solutions that drive client value and align with our product strategy, while strengthening overall product execution by recommending process improvements, sharing best practices and collaborating with other product team members.&nbsp;</p><br><p>In this role, you'll research user needs, competitors, and market opportunities to prioritize initiatives with the highest client impact. Once prioritized, you'll guide solutioning, prepare initiatives for development, and collaborate with your pod to ensure successful delivery.</p><br><p>Intellum Senior Product Managers have a passion for building great products and a deep commitment to understanding our clients—spending time with them in discovery, learning their challenges, and ensuring our solutions truly meet their needs.</p><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><h3>Responsibilities</h3><br><ul><br><li>Contribute to Intellum’s product strategy by developing a deep understanding of customer needs, our product, and the competitive landscape.</li><br><li>Maintain and communicate a prioritized product roadmap aligned with platform strategy, customer needs, and internal input.</li><br><li>Deliver roadmap initiatives that drive adoption, product/market fit, and increased customer value and revenue growth.</li><br><li>Conduct rigorous research and analysis, both qualitative and quantitative, to inform product decisions.</li><br><li>Collaborate with Design and Engineering to shape user journeys, wireframes, and solutions that balance user value, technical feasibility, and business goals.</li><br><li>Partner with Product Marketing on positioning, market research, and competitive analysis to strengthen product strategy.</li><br><li>Oversee release readiness, including phased launches, client change management, and feedback loops to drive successful feature launches and adoption.&nbsp;</li><br><li>Strengthen overall product execution by recommending process improvements, sharing best practices and collaborating with other product team members.</li><br></ul><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><h3>Skills &amp; Qualifications</h3><br><ul><br><li>5-7+ years of SaaS product management experience with a history of successful product delivery.</li><br><li>Proven ability to drive complex projects to completion while managing multiple priorities in parallel.</li><br><li>Experience delivering solutions in fast-moving, small-team settings and adapting in growing, changing environments.</li><br><li>Demonstrated success in distilling complex, ambiguous client input to identify root problems.</li><br><li>Experience driving product outcomes through disciplined research, structured analysis, and evidence-based decision-making.</li><br><li>Technical depth that earns trust and credibility with engineers and clients.</li><br><li>Recognized for strong client presence and effective communication across teams and mediums.</li><br><li>Experience building models to support analysis and decision-making around pricing, adoption, cost, etc.</li><br><li>Consistently delivers high-quality outcomes through strong organization and attention to detail.</li><br><li>Advanced proficiency in data analysis.</li><br><li>Proven success in delivering integrated solutions across multiple systems and complex technologies.</li><br><li>Proficiency with SQL, APIs, HTML/CSS, authentication standards (OAuth, SAML), and third-party integrations.</li><br></ul><br><h3><br>Education</h3><br><ul><br><li>Bachelor's degree in Engineering or related field preferred; or equivalent years of relevant experience.&nbsp;</li><br></ul></div><div><p><strong>BENEFITS</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Medical - 100% of employee premiums for selected individual plans</li><br><li>Dental - 100% of employee premiums covered</li><br><li>Vision - 100% of employee premiums covered</li><br><li>LinkedIn Learning</li><br><li>401(k) plus matching (US Based Only)</li><br><li>Unlimited PTO</li><br><li>Calm subscription</li><br><li>Annual Company Retreat</li><br></ul><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p>Intellum is an equal-opportunity employer. We're committed to building an inclusive team that celebrates diversity in people, perspectives, and backgrounds regardless of race, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, religion, disability, citizenship, veteran status, or any other protected status. We encourage you to apply for an open position and if you have questions about whether or not your job experience and skill set meet the requirements for a specific role, reach out to us directly at careers@intellum.com.&nbsp;</p><br><p><br>If you are an individual applying from CA, NY, CO, CT, MD, NV, or RI, please reach out to careers@intellum.com to inquire about specific pay ranges.</p><br><p>&nbsp;</p></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/intellum-senior-product-manager">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/intellum-senior-product-manager</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Prolific: Senior Product Designer</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote, UK
</p>

<div class=""><br><h2>Senior Product Designer</h2><br><p><em>Team: Product, Research &amp; Design</em></p><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p><em>Prolific</em></p><br><p>Prolific is not just another player in the AI space – we are the architects of the human data infrastructure that's reshaping the landscape of AI development. In a world where foundational AI technologies are increasingly commoditized, it's the quality and diversity of human-generated data that truly differentiates products and models.</p><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p><em>The Role</em></p><br><p>As part of our operational evolution we are looking for our first ever Senior Product Manager to be fully dedicated to building for our Research customers. You will take a ‘founder mindset’ to our heritage business, leading strategy and execution for a broad-remit product team focused on academic and business research customers, many of them self-serving, but increasingly more of them institutional or enterprise users.</p><br><p><strong>Impact:</strong> You will be the Product person responsible for the product impact and outcomes of the team and future teams building in our Research Group. Online research is shifting rapidly with the advent of AI tools for good and bad (consider: AI-enabled online research fraud) and this has reshaped the playing field. ​​This role will inherit a platform which has been used and loved by researchers for over 12 years, with the opportunity to own, evolve and where necessary, start again, for our next chapter. You'll report directly into the VP Product of Prolific, and will work cross-functionally while accountable for a stream-aligned team.&nbsp;</p><br><p><strong>Responsibilities: </strong>You will be responsible for product managing a stream-aligned team of your own. This means you’ll be accountable for the outcomes and impact of that team. You’ll be advising and building with the General Manager for Research, as well as varied collaborators.&nbsp;</p><br><p><br><strong>Culture: </strong>Adding on to our Prolific Principles, we expect colleagues in the Product, Research, and Design Group to demonstrate reliability, grit, diplomacy, a bias for action, and a dogged focus on value – you'll be a champion of these behaviors yourself, and in the culture of your team. Accountability and autonomy are two sides of the same coin, and we expect you to demonstrate both.</p><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p><em>What you'll be doing</em></p><br><ul><br><li>You'll bring your varied Product career experience to bear to solve customer problems and create new opportunities for users to fall in love with Prolific.</li><br><li>You'll raise the bar of our product - and Product team - by making bets and building products that customers love and which drive commercial value for our business.</li><br><li>You will be an unblocker and simplifier of complexity: colleagues will bring you problems, and emerge optimistic, with solutions.</li><br><li>You'll partner productively with Product Design, User Research, Analytics, and Engineering to find ways to deliver products in a test-learn-iterate fashion.</li><br></ul><br><p><em>What you'll bring</em></p><br><ul><br><li>An extensive and varied track record working embedded in technology teams alongside engineers and designers.&nbsp;</li><br><li>Experience of optimising funnels in close collaboration with marketing and/or customer-facing disciplines, or of working within a growth team.</li><br><li>Competence or expertise in most or all of:<br><ul><br><li>The industry's prevailing Product/Engineering methodologies, hands-on experience of Agile frameworks, continuous discovery, continuous delivery, JTBD frameworks, thin or vertical slicing, self-organizing teams, advocacy of 'thinking in bets,' test-learn-iterate loops, etc.</li><br><li>Strong commercial acumen alongside data-informed decision-making.</li><br><li>A storyteller's flair, a model teamplayer, belief in 'strong opinions weakly held', personal accountability, and a relentless can-do attitude.</li><br></ul><br></li><br></ul><br><p><em>Even better if you have</em></p><br><ul><br><li>Scale-up or startup experience.</li><br><li>AI/ML training / AI/ML development experience.</li><br><li>A track record of giving back to your Design community.<br><br></li><br></ul><br><p><em>Why Prolific is a great place to work</em></p><br><p>We've built a unique platform that connects researchers and companies with a global pool of participants, enabling the collection of high-quality, ethically sourced human behavioral data and feedback. This data is the cornerstone of developing more accurate, nuanced, and aligned AI systems.</p><br><p>We believe that the next leap in AI capabilities won't come solely from scaling existing models, but from integrating diverse human perspectives and behaviors into AI development. By providing this crucial human data infrastructure, Prolific is positioning itself at the forefront of the next wave of AI innovation – one that reflects the breath and the best of humanity.</p><br><p>Working for us will place you at the forefront of AI innovation, providing access to our unique human data platform and opportunities for groundbreaking research. Join us to enjoy a competitive salary, benefits, and remote working within our impactful, mission-driven culture.</p><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p><em>Links to more information on Prolific</em></p><br><p><a href="https://www.notion.so/prolific/dbc97f2b3ff24f1bb6fa834a2c9c3283?v=4f874e88e46a4f54afd8bf62f1db19ed&amp;p=9f2c1de05dfa43338d48c20362bfead1&amp;pm=c">Benefits&nbsp;</a></p><br><p><a href="https://www.notion.so/prolific/dbc97f2b3ff24f1bb6fa834a2c9c3283?v=4f874e88e46a4f54afd8bf62f1db19ed">External Handbook</a>&nbsp;</p><br><p><a href="https://www.prolific.com/">Website&nbsp;</a></p><br><p><a href="https://www.youtube.com/@JoinProlific">Youtube</a>&nbsp;</p><br><p><em>Privacy Statement</em></p><br><p><strong>By submitting your application, you agree that Prolific may collect your personal data for recruiting and global organisation planning. Prolific's <a href="https://www.notion.so/prolific/Policy-Privacy-Notice-for-Candidates-f94a136a67544388b4888bc436451b57">Candidate Privacy Notice</a> explains what personal information Prolific may process, where Prolific may process your personal information, its purposes for processing your personal information, and the rights you can exercise over Prolific use of your personal information.</strong></p><br><p><span></span></p><br></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/prolific-senior-product-designer">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/prolific-senior-product-designer</a></p>
</description>

      <expires_at>Sat, 30 May 2026 20:34:40 +0000</expires_at>

    <item>
      <title>Appomni: Senior Customer Support Engineer</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Denver, CO or Remote
</p>

<div class="job__description body"><div><p><strong>About AppOmni</strong></p><br><p>AppOmni prevents SaaS data breaches by delivering end-to-end SaaS security. Our platform gives security teams clear visibility into posture, access, third-party connections, AI-related activity, and with built-in discovery to identify unsanctioned SaaS and Shadow AI tools. Backed by continuous monitoring and real-time threat detection, AppOmni helps enterprises identify and resolve risks early, keeping their SaaS applications secure. Recognized as a&nbsp;<a class="c-link" href="https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1sYC94rvhwD9ARzvgwwaxcs4upkp6acAZ">Frost Radar™ 2025 Leader</a>&nbsp;and&nbsp;<a class="c-link" href="https://www.greatplacetowork.com/certified-company/7078597">Great Place To Work</a>®, AppOmni continues to set the standard for innovation and customer value in SaaS security. The largest and fastest-growing global enterprises across industries trust AppOmni to secure their SaaS applications..</p><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p><strong>About the Role</strong></p><br><p>We are seeking a strategic, results-driven Senior Support Engineer to engage and enable AppOmni’s customers. In this role, you will troubleshoot complex technical issues quickly while serving as a key collaborator between the support, product, and field teams. As a senior member of the team, you are expected to operate with a high degree of independence, managing complex cases to resolution and synthesizing customer feedback to drive product improvements.</p><br><p><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p><br><p><strong>What You'll Do:</strong></p><br><p><strong>Technical Support &amp; Issue Resolution</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Provide L1/L2 triage of AppOmni's core product and flagship integrations.</li><br><li>Troubleshoot the majority of support tickets independently</li><br><li>Answer customer questions through the Zendesk support queue&nbsp;</li><br><li>Diagnose, troubleshoot, and solve problems both internally and externally</li><br><li>Effectively determine which customer issues warrant escalation</li><br><li>Take full ownership of cases to resolution by working across product, engineering, and Customer Success teams</li><br><li>Keep customers updated on the status of open tickets, including incremental updates and specific questions from engineering</li><br><li>Represent the voice of the customer internally and advocate for key issues</li><br><li>Continuously analyze and improve support processes to help build a world-class support organization</li><br><li>Identify trends that warrant the creation of customer-facing documentation, such as Knowledge Base articles</li><br></ul><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p><strong>What We're Looking For:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>4-5 years of experience in technical support or software development.</li><br><li>Knowledge of Zendesk preferred</li><br><li>Must-have knowledge of APIs and Postman</li><br><li>Familiarity with JIRA/Confluence is a plus</li><br><li>Experience with Google Cloud Logs, Sentry, and Chrome Dev tools a plus</li><br><li>Working knowledge of common SaaS solutions (e.g., Salesforce, M365, Zoom, Box, ServiceNow, Workday) is desired</li><br><li>Self-driven and self-motivated individual who thrives in a fast-moving environment</li><br><li>A self-starter capable of mastering complex concepts with minimal assistance</li><br><li>Deep curiosity and a willingness to go "above and beyond" to tackle significant problems</li><br><li>High standards for detail, process, and quality</li><br><li>Excellent prioritization skills are necessary</li><br><li>Startup experience is a plus</li><br></ul><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p><strong>Culture</strong></p><br><p>Our talented team is collaborative and supportive as we move quickly to research and develop new ideas, deliver new features to our customers, and iterate on ideas and innovations. We accomplish this by focusing on our five core values: Trust, Transparency, Quality, Customer Focus, and Delivery. Our team is determined to make a difference to positively impact our way of life by securing the technology that is changing the world.</p><br><p>AppOmni is proud to be Certified by Great Place to WorkⓇ, as we seek to build a culture where all employees feel appreciated and supported, especially with clear and honest leadership, employee recognition, and an environment that fosters innovation and collaboration.</p><br><p>We believe diversity fuels innovation and drives growth by bringing a wealth of different perspectives and skills. We’re committed to fostering an inclusive environment where every employee feels valued, heard, and empowered to reach their full potential. Join us in building a workplace where we can all thrive.</p><br><p>https://appomni.com/careers/</p><br><p><strong><br>Compensation &amp; Benefits</strong></p><br><p>AppOmni is committed to supporting our employees' financial, professional, and personal well-being. To do this, we take a holistic view of compensation, one that values not just the immediate financial package but also the long-term growth of both our employees and our company. We're committed to pay equity and transparency and encourage all candidates to discuss their salary expectations with us early in the application process.</p><br><p>Our total rewards package includes the following:</p><br><ul><br><li>Base Salary: The annual base salary compensation range in the U.S. for this role is: $114,000 - $155,000 USD. Final offer amounts are determined by factors such as the<br>final candidate’s skills, qualifications, and experience, as well as business considerations and peer compensation.&nbsp;</li><br><li>Stock Options: Our vision is to not just grow as a company but to grow together.&nbsp; By offering stock options, we are inviting you to be an integral part of our journey forward.</li><br><li>Benefits: Home office stipend, Generous paid time off, paid company holidays, paid floating holidays, paid parental leave, paid sick time and paid family leave for applicable states, health insurance - medical, dental, and vision with HSA option, LifeWorks Employee Assistance Program, company-provided life insurance, AD&amp;D, STD/LTD and additional supplemental life insurance options, 401(k) and Roth retirement saving accounts, and a monthly wellness benefit reimbursement. All benefits are subject to eligibility requirements and plan details.&nbsp;</li><br></ul><br><p><em>AppOmni is an equal-opportunity employer. Applicants will not be discriminated against because of race, color, creed, national origin, ancestry, citizenship status, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, religion, disability, pregnancy, marital status, veteran status, medical condition, genetic information, or any other characteristic protected by law. AppOmni is also committed to providing reasonable accommodations to qualified individuals with disabilities and disabled veterans in our job application procedures. If you need assistance or an accommodation due to a disability, you may contact us at employeesuccess@appomni.com.</em></p></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/appomni-senior-customer-support-engineer">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/appomni-senior-customer-support-engineer</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Workana: Senior Product Manager</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Argentina
</p>

<p>At Workana, we’re transforming the future of work by connecting top remote talent from Latin America with global opportunities. As the largest freelancing platform in the region with over a decade of experience, we empower thousands of professionals and businesses to thrive in a remote-first world.</p><p></p><p>We are currently seeking a Senior Product Owner to join our team and drive the execution of key product initiatives. This hands-on role will focus on ensuring the timely delivery of high-quality products, collaborating closely with cross-functional teams and stakeholders to align on goals, and driving continuous improvement. You will play a key role in the product development process, prioritizing tasks, managing the product backlog, and ensuring that each release delivers real value.</p><h3>About the role</h3><p>As a Senior Product Owner at Workana, you will be at the forefront of product delivery, working directly with engineering, design, and other cross-functional teams to bring our product vision to life. Your primary focus will be on executing the product roadmap, ensuring that products are developed and launched on time, while maintaining a strong alignment with business priorities and customer needs.</p><p>This role is all about hands-on execution—you will actively manage the day-to-day product development process, continuously optimize workflows, and ensure smooth communication between teams. Your ability to prioritize, manage stakeholders, and navigate the complexities of product delivery will be essential to the success of the role.</p><h3></h3><h3>What you’ll do</h3><p>Product End-to-End</p><ul><li>Oversee product definition and delivery: Be directly involved in the definition, execution and timely delivery of product features, ensuring alignment with business objectives and customer expectations.</li><li>Manage product backlog: Prioritize tasks, define user stories, and work closely with the engineering team to ensure a smooth development and delivery processes.</li><li>Collaborate with cross-functional teams: Work closely with engineering, design, data, and other stakeholders to ensure a seamless product delivery from start to finish.</li><li>Optimize delivery processes: Continuously improve product workflows to enhance team efficiency, product quality, and speed to market.</li></ul><p>Stakeholder Management</p><ul><li>Coordinate with stakeholders: Act as the main point of contact between the product team and internal stakeholders, ensuring alignment on goals, priorities, and expectations.</li><li>Build strong relationships: Foster strong, trusting relationships with both internal and external stakeholders to support seamless collaboration.</li><li>Foster collaboration: Create a transparent, communicative environment that encourages teamwork and drives collective success.</li></ul><ul><li>Ensure customer satisfaction: Gather feedback from stakeholders and customers, ensuring the product meets their needs and expectations, and make necessary adjustments based on their input.</li></ul> <p></p><ul><li>Hands-on product execution: At least 5 years of experience in product management or a similar role, with a proven ability to drive product delivery from concept to launch.</li><li>Experience managing stakeholders: Strong interpersonal skills, with the ability to manage relationships across teams and departments.</li><li>Excellent communication skills: Ability to effectively communicate with both technical and non-technical teams to ensure alignment.</li><li>Prioritization &amp; decision-making: Strong ability to make data-driven decisions and prioritize features in a fast-paced environment.</li><li>Analytical and agile mindset: Ability to use data and metrics to make informed decisions, optimize product outcomes, and drive continuous improvement. Eager to make things happen and solve problems in smart ways.<br><br></li></ul><p>Nice to Have</p><ul><li>Experience with Marketplace platforms: Experience working with marketplace products or platforms, particularly in the tech industry, is a plus.</li></ul><ul><li>Startup experience: Experience working in a startup environment, where flexibility and agility are key, is highly valued.</li></ul> <ul><li>Make a Difference: Your work will directly impact the lives of thousands of freelancers across Latin America, empowering them to achieve autonomy, professional growth, and better opportunities.</li><li>High-Impact Role: Lead high-impact product initiatives at the largest freelancing platform in Latin America, where your contributions directly drive our growth and success.</li><li>Growth Opportunities: Workana’s dynamic startup environment offers limitless opportunities for career advancement as we scale.</li></ul><ul><li>People-First Culture: At Workana, we value our people. We are a remote-first company that fosters collaboration, creativity, and professional growth in an environment where your ideas matter.</li></ul>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/workana-senior-product-manager">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/workana-senior-product-manager</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>The Flex: Senior Product Engineer</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Paris
</p>

<p>Join the team redefining the future of global living.</p><p>At <strong>The Flex</strong>, we believe renting a home should feel instant, intelligent, and effortless — as seamless as booking a ride.<br>Our ambition is bold: enabling anyone to live anywhere, anytime, without friction.</p><p>Powered by <a href="http://Base360.ai"><strong>Base360.ai</strong></a>, our proprietary automation engine, we’re building the operating system for modern renting — connecting property data, orchestrating operations, and enabling seamless stays across continents.</p><p>If you love building products <strong>end-to-end</strong>, obsess over user experience, and enjoy owning real systems used in the real world, this role is for you.</p><h3> What You’ll Build</h3><p>As a <strong>Senior Product Engineer</strong>, you’ll sit at the intersection of <strong>product, engineering, and operations</strong>.</p><p>You’ll own features from idea to production — shaping the product, designing the system, writing the code, and shipping improvements that directly impact guests, operators, and partners.</p><p>This is a role for engineers who think in <strong>products, not tickets</strong>, and who care deeply about usability, performance, and outcomes.</p><h3>️ Your Mission</h3><p><strong>Own Product Features End-to-End</strong><br>Design, build, and evolve core product experiences across web applications and APIs.</p><p><strong>Build for Users</strong><br>Translate real operational and user problems into simple, intuitive product solutions.</p><p><strong>Ship Fast, Learn Faster</strong><br>Release frequently, gather feedback, and iterate relentlessly.</p><p><strong>Design Scalable Systems</strong><br>Build clean, maintainable architectures that scale as the platform grows.</p><p><strong>Automate the Experience</strong><br>Use automation and intelligent workflows to remove friction from both guest and operator journeys.</p><p><strong>Collaborate Closely</strong><br>Work hand-in-hand with product, design, data, and operations to turn ideas into impact.</p><h3> You’re a Great Fit If You Have</h3><ul><li><p>Strong experience building <strong>user-facing products</strong> as a senior engineer</p></li><li><p>Comfort working across <strong>frontend, backend, and APIs</strong></p></li><li><p>Experience with <strong>modern web stacks</strong> (React, Node.js, cloud-native platforms)</p></li><li><p>A strong product mindset — you care <em>why</em> something is built, not just <em>how</em></p></li><li><p>A history of shipping features that users actually love</p></li><li><p>High standards for quality, performance, and UX</p></li><li><p>A bias toward execution and ownership</p></li></ul><h3> Why You’ll Love Working Here</h3><p><strong>Direct User Impact</strong><br>Your work will shape how thousands of people live and move around the world.</p><p><strong>High Ownership</strong><br>You’ll own meaningful parts of the product with real autonomy.</p><p><strong>Fast-Moving Team</strong><br>Short feedback loops, constant learning, and zero bureaucracy.</p><p><strong>Performance-Based Rewards</strong><br>Competitive compensation with upside for high performers.</p><p><strong>Remote-First</strong><br>Work from anywhere — outcomes matter more than hours.</p><h3> This Role Is Not for You If</h3><ul><li><p>You want to work only on backend or isolated components</p></li><li><p>You prefer tickets over ownership</p></li><li><p>You’re not interested in user experience or product outcomes</p></li><li><p>“Good enough” is good enough</p></li></ul><p><strong>#LI-Remote</strong></p><p></p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/the-flex-senior-product-engineer">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/the-flex-senior-product-engineer</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Happyco: Senior Product Designer</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Canada
</p>

<div class="content"><div class="section-wrapper page-full-width"><div class="section page-centered"><div><b>HappyCo is a company where people can grow their careers and work with like minded people, with no egos or politics. HappyCo is values driven and offers a flexible, supportive culture. Join HappyCo and <a class="postings-link" href="https://happy.co/media/make-work-happy">Make Work Happy</a>!</b>&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div>As a <b>Senior Product Designer</b>, you will own and deliver high‑impact web experiences that help customers make better decisions and operate more effectively. You will work end‑to‑end—from problem framing and discovery through to delivery and iteration — operating as part of a product triad alongside a Product Manager and Engineering Lead.</div><div><br></div><div>Within this triad, you will work closely together to define the team’s roadmap, priorities, and trade‑offs, ensuring alignment with company goals, product strategy, and long‑term vision. You will be expected to represent design through the quality of your thinking and execution, influence outcomes through your work, and contribute meaningfully to shaping how complex, AI‑enabled web products deliver customer and business value.</div><div><br></div><div>This role is designed for experienced individual contributors who operate with a high degree of autonomy, judgment, and accountability. It suits designers who demonstrate strong product judgment, broad ownership, and comfort working independently, regardless of title or formal authority.</div><div><br></div><div><b>We are hiring designers across multiple problem spaces. Final team placement will be based on business needs and strengths demonstrated during the interview process.</b></div><div><br></div><div>___________________________________</div><div><br></div><div><b><span>Problem Spaces You May Work In</span></b></div><div><br></div><div>Depending on product priorities and your strengths, you may work in one or more of the following areas:</div><div><br></div><div><b>Procurement &amp; Sourcing</b></div><div>Designing workflows for vendor discovery, pricing comparison, purchasing, approvals, and supplier performance across large multifamily portfolios.</div><div><br></div><div><b>Asset &amp; Portfolio Performance</b></div><div>Designing dashboards, analytics, and scenario-modeling tools that help operators understand property performance, identify risks and opportunities, and improve returns.</div><div><br></div><div>These products are information-dense, highly interconnected, and used by multiple roles across an organization. Increasingly, they also incorporate AI-powered interfaces that allow users to proactively query their data, surface insights, and receive recommendations through agentic, conversational, and voice-enabled interactions. Designing clarity, trust, and usability into these systems, across both traditional interfaces and AI-assisted experiences, is core to the role.</div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>What You’ll Do | Design Ownership &amp; Impact</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>Own a defined product area end‑to‑end, from problem framing and discovery through to delivery, measurement, and iteration.</li><li>Work backwards from real customer problems, developing a deep understanding of user workflows, constraints, and decision‑making contexts.</li><li>Identify and prioritize high‑leverage problems, articulating why they matter for customers, the business, and long‑term product quality.</li><li>Translate complex, ambiguous problem spaces into clear hypotheses, design principles, and scalable solutions.</li><li>Design, test, and ship high‑quality web experiences, including flows, information architecture, interaction models, and polished UI.</li><li>Apply strong systems thinking across workflows, roles, permissions, and data models to ensure solutions scale and remain coherent.</li><li>Make deliberate trade‑offs between usability, speed, quality, and technical constraints, and clearly communicate those decisions.</li><li>Call out when technically impressive or elegant solutions are misaligned with customer value, usability, or business outcomes.</li><li>Measure the impact of your work using qualitative and quantitative signals, validate outcomes with customers where possible, and iterate based on what you learn.</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>What You’ll Do | Customer Obsession &amp; Insight</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>Run timely, pragmatic research including interviews, usability testing, and lightweight validation loops as part of everyday product work.</li><li>Bring real customer context – quotes, workflows, edge cases, and observed behaviours – into product and design discussions.</li><li>Synthesize customer insights into clear patterns and themes, not just isolated findings.</li><li>Act as an evidence‑backed voice for the customer in cross‑functional conversations.</li><li>Create lightweight, repeatable ways for teams to stay close to customers, even when direct access is limited.</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>What You’ll Do | AI &amp; Emerging Interaction Design</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>Design AI‑assisted experiences that help users proactively explore data, surface insights, and make better decisions.</li><li>Shape agentic workflows, conversational interfaces, and voice‑enabled interactions where they meaningfully improve outcomes.</li><li>Translate complex AI capabilities into understandable, controllable, and trustworthy user experiences.</li><li>Define appropriate guardrails, affordances, and fallbacks so AI‑powered features remain usable and reliable.</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>What You’ll Do | Collaboration &amp; Craft</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>Partner closely with Product Managers and Engineering Leads to shape problem definitions, scope work, and sequence delivery.</li><li>Collaborate with Engineers to ensure designs are feasible, performant, and thoughtfully implemented.</li><li>Work with Design Leadership to align on quality, product experience principles, and design standards.</li><li>Adhere to, uphold, and actively champion HappyCo’s design system to ensure consistency, quality, and scalability across products. Use the system by default, and work with Design Leadership to evolve components, patterns, or guidance when genuine user needs are not met – treating system gaps as exceptions to be addressed, not reasons to bypass it.</li><li>Participate actively in critiques, maintaining a high bar for craft, clarity, accessibility, and usability.</li><li>Contribute to documentation, shared patterns, and ways of working that improve team effectiveness.</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>What You Bring | Required</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>Strong product judgment and a track record of delivering consistently high‑quality design solutions in complex product environments.</li><li>Typically 5–8 years of experience designing and shipping web‑based SaaS, B2B, or enterprise products with real users at scale.</li><li>A portfolio demonstrating end‑to‑end ownership, including problem framing, exploration, execution, and measurable impact.</li><li>Good judgment around when to go deep on research vs when fast validation is sufficient, balancing rigor with pace, and familiarity with using research platforms (e.g. Great Question or similar) to manage recruitment, insights, and follow-up.</li><li>Proven ability to work autonomously on ambiguous problems, identify what matters most, and move work forward without excessive direction.</li><li>Experience designing data‑dense, information‑rich interfaces such as dashboards, tables, filters, comparison views, or reporting tools.</li><li>Strong systems thinking, with the ability to reason across workflows, roles, permissions, and interconnected product surfaces.</li><li>Comfort making trade‑offs between quality, speed, and technical constraints, and clearly articulating those decisions.</li><li>Fluency with modern design tools and workflows (Figma, prototyping, design systems, documentation).</li><li>Clear written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to present work and rationale to cross‑functional partners.</li><li>Willingness to collaborate across time zones, including working later in the afternoon or early evening to partner effectively with Australia‑based colleagues.</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>What You Bring | Strongly Valued</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>Experience designing and shipping AI‑assisted or AI‑augmented product experiences, not just exploratory concepts.</li><li>Familiarity with agentic workflows, conversational UX, and emerging patterns for AI‑driven interfaces.</li><li>Experience with voice interaction design, multimodal inputs, or non‑traditional UI patterns.</li><li>Experience working closely with data, analytics, or platform teams on products where accuracy, trust, and explainability matter.</li><li>Background in complex domains such as marketplaces, procurement, operations tooling, analytics platforms, or financial systems.</li><li>Demonstrated progression in scope, ownership, and impact across previous roles.</li><li>Comfort with design engineering techniques, including working close to code, understanding front‑end architectures, or prototyping with code where it improves speed, fidelity, or collaboration.</li><li>Hands‑on use of AI‑driven design tools (e.g. ChatGPT, Claude Code, Cursor, Lovable, Figma Make, or similar) to accelerate thinking, prototyping, or workflow efficiency.</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Why Join HappyCo?</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li><b>Make an Impact:</b> Your work will reach millions of residents and thousands of property teams.</li><li><b>Culture of Craft:</b> We care deeply about design quality, user impact, and creative exploration.</li><li><b>High Autonomy, High Support:</b> You’ll be trusted to lead and supported to grow, with mentorship when you want it.</li><li><b>Flexibility &amp; Work-Life Balance:</b> We offer hybrid and remote-friendly policies with flexible hours.</li><li><b>Growth &amp; Learning:</b> Access to training, mentorship, and opportunities to grow your skills.</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><b>About HappyCo</b></div><div><span>Founded in 2011, HappyCo (</span><a class="postings-link" href="http://www.happy.co/">happy.co</a><span>) builds mobile and cloud solutions to enable real-time property data. Our flagship product suite 'Happy Property’ has more than 5 million units on its platform.</span></div><div><br></div><div><span>We’re everyday people with a shared purpose — improving the lives of others. Our team is made up of thinkers, talkers, planners, makers, builders and everything in between. Together, we’re turning our passions into happier communities!&nbsp; </span></div><div><br></div><div><span>When customers use our software, their communities get stronger. Our tools empower everyone in multifamily property management to improve their operations and maximize returns, which means they’re building better experiences for their residents. Learn more about our </span><a class="postings-link" href="https://happyco-inc.wistia.com/medias/1va4woy4m3">Product Vision</a>&nbsp;<span>here!</span></div><div><br></div><div><b>Our HappyCo Culture &amp; Values</b></div><div><span>HappyCo strives to build better communities. So naturally, we are dedicated to making our own community an enjoyable place that lets us do our best work. We’re devoted to building an inclusive, supportive culture that empowers each HappyCo’er to succeed and grow. To learn more about our culture, check out our</span><a class="postings-link" href="https://www.glassdoor.com.au/Overview/Working-at-HappyCo-EI_IE1533158.11,18.htm"> Glassdoor</a><span> page and our </span><a class="postings-link" href="https://happy.co/company/careers">careers page!</a><span>&nbsp;</span></div><div><br></div><div><span>HappyCo’s culture is driven by our core values of Make Happiness, Better Together, Get Good Sh*t Done, Customer Obsessed and Kaizen - sounds great, right, but what does this mean for you?&nbsp;</span></div><div><br></div><div><i>We believe in supporting people to do their best work and thrive, and building a diverse, equitable, and inclusive company is core to our mission. Our goal is to ensure that HappyCo upholds an inclusive environment where all people feel that they are equally respected and valued, whether they are applying for an open position or working at the company. We welcome applicants of any educational background, gender identity and expression, sexual orientation, religion, ethnicity, age, citizenship, socioeconomic status, disability, and veteran status. HappyCo is also committed to providing reasonable accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities and disabled veterans in our job application procedures.</i></div><div><br></div><div><i>A note to Recruitment Agencies: Please don’t reach out to us about our roles -- we’ve got it covered. We don’t accept unsolicited agency resumes and HappyCo is not responsible for any fees related to unsolicited resumes</i></div></div></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/happyco-senior-product-designer">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/happyco-senior-product-designer</a></p>
</description>
      <pubDate>Thu, 30 Apr 2026 20:34:06 +0000</pubDate>
      <expires_at>Sat, 30 May 2026 20:34:06 +0000</expires_at>
      <guid>https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/happyco-senior-product-designer</guid>
      <link>https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/happyco-senior-product-designer</link>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Jimdo: Senior Product Marketing Manager</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Germany
</p>

<h2><strong>About Jimdo<br></strong></h2><p>Join us to help unleash the power of the self-employed and help them thrive!&nbsp;</p><p>Jimdo was founded by three school friends in 2007 in a farmhouse in Northern Germany. Fast forward today, we are a growing, profitable, remote-first company with 220+ people from over 50 nationalities, working across more than 15 countries. We value trust, ownership, and execution over hierarchy and process. We use data, automation, and AI pragmatically and responsibly  to build products our customers can trust, and to continuously improve how we work as a company.</p><p>Jimdo exists to help self-employed people and microbusinesses succeed whether they’re just starting out or ready to grow to the next level. We build intuitive, AI-powered products that help our customers create an online presence, attract customers, and run their business with confidence, without needing technical expertise.</p><p>At the heart of Jimdo is a strong belief in personalized, data-driven guidance. Our platform combines design, business tools, and an AI-powered core that turns real customer data into clear insights and next steps helping our customers focus on what moves their business forward.</p><p></p><h2><strong>Role Overview :</strong></h2><p>We are looking for a Senior Product Marketing Manager to own how our products go to market and gain traction—from positioning to messaging to adoption. If you thrive on translating product vision into clear, actionable narratives and strategies that drive growth, this role is your opportunity to lead, shape, and scale impact across our teams and customers.</p><p>As Senior Product Marketing Manager, you'll be the go-to expert for positioning and go-to-market (GTM) strategy. This isn't a "support function"—you'll drive clarity and alignment across Product, Marketing, Growth, and Customer Experience. You’ll be instrumental in transforming Jimdo from a website builder into a true growth partner for solopreneurs, with messaging that resonates and drives adoption.</p><p></p><h2><strong>Your impact:</strong></h2><ul><li><p>Own the product positioning, segmentation, and messaging for Jimdo’s product suite, ensuring clarity, consistency, and alignment across all touchpoints.</p></li><li><p>Define and maintain value propositions grounded in customer Jobs-to-be-Done and real outcomes, not internal assumptions.</p></li><li><p>Create, maintain, and socialize messaging frameworks used across website, lifecycle, acquisition, and internal enablement.</p></li><li><p>Lead go-to-market (GTM) strategy for new products, major features, pricing, and packaging changes.</p></li><li><p>Define target segments, rollout plans, success metrics, and GTM readiness requirements to ensure adoption, not just awareness.</p></li><li><p>Translate customer research, market trends, and competitive analysis into clear, differentiated positioning and GTM decisions.</p></li><li><p>Build alignment across Product, Growth, Lifecycle, Brand, and Creative teams to ensure narrative clarity and internal confidence.</p></li><li><p>Deliver enablement assets like launch briefs, narrative decks, explainer content, and FAQs that empower internal teams to execute effectively.</p></li><li><p>Guide messaging implementation across lifecycle, website, and in-product comms—ensuring execution aligns with strategic intent.</p></li><li><p>Monitor messaging performance and adoption metrics, then rapidly iterate based on results and feedback.</p></li><li><p>Maintain boundary discipline—focusing on direction, clarity, and strategic input, not tactical campaign execution.</p></li></ul><p></p><h2><strong>What you bring:</strong></h2><ul><li><p>7+ years of experience in Product Marketing, Product Strategy, or similar roles in SaaS, digital products, or product-led growth (PLG) environments.</p></li><li><p>Proven track record owning and executing end-to-end GTM strategies, with measurable success in product adoption and market traction.</p></li><li><p>Deep experience in defining and implementing product positioning, customer segmentation, and messaging frameworks.</p></li><li><p>Strong knowledge of customer research methodologies, including JTBD, and the ability to translate insights into actionable strategies.</p></li><li><p>Proficiency in competitive analysis and crafting compelling differentiation narratives.</p></li><li><p>High competency in cross-functional collaboration and stakeholder management—especially with Product, Growth, and CX teams.</p></li><li><p>Skilled in creating internal enablement content that drives clarity and alignment.</p></li><li><p>Familiarity with SaaS metrics, marketing tools, and analytics platforms.</p></li><li><p>Experience working with solopreneurs, microbusinesses, or B2C audiences is a plus.<br></p></li></ul><h2><strong>What we offer:<br></strong></h2><p><strong>Inspiring Mission:</strong> At our core, we are driven by a meaningful mission - to&nbsp; empower solopreneurs and small businesses to succeed and&nbsp; to contribute to the sustainability and vibrancy of the communities they serve.</p><p><strong>Flexibility and Trust:</strong> Our work environment thrives on flexibility and trust. We offer fully remote work set-up&nbsp; with opportunities for in-person collaboration. You can manage your working hours flexibly because we prioritize the results you deliver over the number of hours you put in.&nbsp;</p><p><strong>An International Diverse Team:</strong> Our team is a mosaic of over 248 individuals hailing from 50+ different countries and working across 15+ diverse locations. We take pride in our openness and inclusivity, with an Employee-led DEI Council and active ERGs that ensure everyone's voices are heard.</p><p><strong>Continuous&nbsp; Growth and Career Development:</strong> We invest in your growth with company-wide access to LinkedIn Learning and curated learning paths. From day one, you have the chance to contribute your ideas and create a meaningful impact. Our flat hierarchies and swift decision-making processes provide an open platform for your career progression.</p><p></p><p><strong>Competitive Benefits Package:&nbsp;</strong></p><ul><li><p>Annual compensation reviews to ensure you're rewarded fairly.</p></li><li><p>A remote office set-up bonus to enhance your workspace.</p></li><li><p>A unique workation policy that allows you to work from different locations.</p></li><li><p>An employee assistance program, offering resources and counseling.</p></li><li><p>Plus, a perk that keeps giving: up to three free Jimdo websites for your personal or professional projects that you get to keep forever.</p></li></ul><p></p><p><em>Jimdo is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. This means that we don’t discriminate based on race or ethnic origin, color, the language(s) you speak, where you (or your parents) are from, or whether or not you consider yourself to have a disability. Neither will your age, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, religion, beliefs, or political opinions play a part in your application with us. Our diverse team values and celebrates the uniqueness of each individual. We embrace differences and believe that they enrich our organization, making us stronger and more innovative. Join us, and let's continue to create a workplace where everyone can thrive, regardless of background or identity.</em></p><p><em><br>By sending your application, you declare that you read and understand the </em><a href="https://www.jimdo.com/info/privacy-applicants/?_ncr=true"><em>Jimdo Applicant Privacy Policy</em></a></p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/jimdo-senior-product-marketing-manager">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/jimdo-senior-product-marketing-manager</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Holywater: Full-Stack Developer</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Kyiv, Ukraine
</p>

<div></div><p></p><p><a href="https://holywater.tech/"><strong>HOLYWATER</strong></a> — це технологічна компанія, яка створює розважальні продукти на перетині людської творчості та штучного інтелекту. Вони є прикладами ШІ-нативних платформ, що переосмислюють способи сторітелінгу та дають змогу будь-кому стати творцем. Екосистема продуктів HOLYWATER включає:</p><p></p><p>→ <a href="https://apps.apple.com/us/app/my-drama-watch-shorts-movies/id6498713494"><strong>My Drama</strong></a> — стримінгову платформу вертикальних серіалів, №1 серед європейських та американських компаній у ніші<br></p><p>→ <a href="https://apps.apple.com/us/app/my-passion-romance-books/id1568149521"><strong>My Passion</strong></a> — цифрову бібліотеку книг №1 у понад 10 країнах світу<br></p><p>→ <a href="https://apps.apple.com/ua/app/my-muse-audiobooks-stories/id6738098034"><strong>My Muse</strong></a> — платформу ШІ-генерованих серіалів, що відкриває нову еру сторітелінгу</p><p></p><p>___________________________________________________________________________________</p><p></p><p></p><h2><strong>HOLYWATER сьогодні — це:</strong></h2><ul><li><p>понад 60 млн завантажень застосунків</p></li><li><p>стратегічне партнерство з FOX Entertainment</p></li><li><p>х3,5 рази — щорічне зростання компанії за 2024-2025 роки</p></li><li><p>30+ міжнародних нагород, зокрема Muse Creative, W3, Telly, Runway AI Film Festival, Lovie</p></li><li><p>понад 100 млн годин переглянутого та прочитаного користувачами контенту</p></li><li><p>провідні позиції у своїх нішах на ринках США та Європи</p></li></ul><p></p><p>___________________________________________________________________________________</p><p></p><p>Ми створюємо нові формати, історії та будуємо світ, де єдине обмеження — людська уява. І зараз шукаємо<strong> Full-Stack Developer </strong>хто готовий/-а долучитися й творити його разом із нами.</p><p></p><h2><strong>Твоя місія:</strong></h2><p></p><ul><li><p>Тісно співпрацювати з продуктовою командою, дизайнерами та QA на всіх етапах розробки</p></li><li><p>Брати участь у проєктуванні та обговоренні функціоналу з урахуванням продуктових і бізнес-вимог</p></li><li><p>Розробляти нові продуктові фічі та підтримувати й покращувати існуючий функціонал</p></li><li><p>Реалізовувати та підтримувати A/B-тести, брати участь в їх аналізі та оптимізації</p></li><li><p>Оптимізувати продуктивність веб-застосунку (швидкість завантаження, Core Web Vitals, UX)</p></li><li><p>Забезпечувати високу якість коду, дотримуватись технічних стандартів і best practices</p></li></ul><p></p><p>___________________________________________________________________________________</p><p></p><h2><strong>Для цього знадобляться такі навички та досвід:</strong></h2><p></p><ul><li><p>Досвід роботи з веб-воронками;</p></li><li><p>Робота з усім стеком: від фронтенду (Next.js включно з SSR, React) до бекенду (Node.js) від 2-ох років</p></li><li><p>Знання TypeScript </p></li><li><p>Проактивність - вміння самостійно знаходити можливості та пропонувати рішення</p></li><li><p>Продуктове мислення та орієнтація на бізнес-результат<br></p></li></ul><h2><strong>Nice to have:</strong><br></h2><ul><li><p>Практичний досвід використання Firebase (Firestore, Authentication)</p></li><li><p>Робота з serverless-рішеннями на базі GCP Functions або AWS Lambda</p></li><li><p>Залученість у проєкти зі стрімінговим або мультимедійним контентом</p></li><li><p>Комерційний досвід побудови та підтримки CI/CD-пайплайнів<br>_________________________________________________________________________________</p></li></ul><p></p><h2><strong>Що отримаєш від нас:</strong></h2><p></p><ul><li><p><strong>Швидке професійне зростання.</strong> Ми будуємо середовище, де розвиток — норма: лекції, бібліотеки, хакатони, школи. Компенсуємо профільне навчання й вивчення будь-якої мови, зокрема української.<br></p></li><li><p><strong>Формат роботи на твій вибір.</strong> Можеш працювати вдома, в офісі на київському Подолі чи у Львові (генератори, укриття, обіди, снеки — all inclusive), або ж за кордоном — маємо кілька офісів і там.<br></p></li><li><p><strong>Техніку та сервіси.</strong> Все, що треба для роботи.<br></p></li><li><p><strong>Відпочинок.</strong> 20 днів відпустки + на офіційні свята та безлімітні лікарняні.<br></p></li><li><p><strong>Турботу про тіло та ментальне здоров'я.</strong> Компенсуємо спорт, медстрахування в Україні (після випробувального), послуги корпоративного лікаря і підтримку ментального здоров’я.</p></li></ul><p></p><p>___________________________________________________________________________________</p><p></p><h2><strong>Чому з нами класно?</strong></h2><p></p><ul><li><p><strong>Реальний вплив.</strong> Усі твої рішення прямо впливають на глобальні продукти.<br></p></li><li><p><strong>Жива культура.</strong> У нас немає рамок — є команда, яка довіряє, навчається одна в одної, не боїться питати і ставити під сумнів.<br></p></li><li><p><strong>Автономність.</strong> Ми довіряємо рішенням команди: мінімум мікроменеджменту, максимум простору для ініціативи й впливу.<br></p></li><li><p><strong>Сильні люди поруч.</strong> Ми — частина екосистеми Genesis, тож буде з ким нетворкати, радитися й зростати.<br></p><p>Можливо, це — твій шанс стати нашим наступним big name?</p></li></ul><p></p><p>___________________________________________________________________________________</p><p></p><h2><strong>Хочеш більше про HOLYWATER? Чекни це:</strong><br></h2><p>Про My Drama та AI-контент у <a href="https://techcrunch.com/2024/09/04/short-series-app-my-drama-launching-ai-companions/">TechCrunch<br></a>Інтерв'ю со-CEO <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/bogdannesvit/">Богдана Несвіта</a> для <a href="https://therecursive.com/90m-arr-ukrainian-startup-strategies-for-growth-holywater-lessons/">The Recursive<br></a>Як ми створюємо короткі вертикальні серіали — на <a href="https://vctr.media/ua/golovnyj-gachok-vertykalnyh-serialiv-yak-holywater-stvoryuye-sczenariyi-shho-zmushuyut-chekaty-na-novi-epizody-266682/">Vector Media<br></a>«Ми — альтернатива Netflix, HBO і навіть Hollywood», – Богдан Несвіт у <a href="https://scroll.media/2025/04/15/holywater-interview/">Scroll<br></a>Про АІ-стримінг My Muse — на <a href="http://Dev.ua">Dev.ua</a><a href="https://dev.ua/news/ukrainska-media-tech-kompaniia-holywater-zapuskaie-platformu-shi-kontentu-yak-my-muse-mozhe-dopomohty-kreatoram-1742483543"><br></a>Наші <a href="https://www.instagram.com/holywater.tech/">Instagram</a> та <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/holywater/?viewAsMember=true">LinkedIn</a> — щоб бути в курсі всього, що в нас відбувається<br><br>Хочеш творити історію разом з нами у HOLYWATER?</p><p>Відгукнися на вакансію!</p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/holywater-full-stack-developer">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/holywater-full-stack-developer</a></p>
</description>
