      <title>Visualis: Senior Full Stack Developer</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Egypt
</p>

<p><strong>Job Description</strong></p><p>We are looking for a highly skilled Full Stack Developer with expertise of high-performance and scalable websites using Next.js, React, along with experience in SQL, NoSQL databases and CMS frameworks. In this role, you will be responsible for implementing and maintaining high-performance web applications and you will collaborate closely with cross-functional teams to deliver innovative, responsive, and SEO-friendly web applications that align with business goals. This role requires deep technical expertise, leadership skills, and a passion for modern web development.</p><p><strong>Key Responsibilities:</strong></p><ul><li><p>Design, develop, and maintain web applications using Next.js and React.</p></li><li><p>Manage MongoDB and NoSQL database design, ensuring scalability and efficiency.</p></li><li><p>Implement and optimize deployment workflows using deployment platforms like Vercel and Netlify.</p></li><li><p>Define and enforce Git best practices by establishing branching strategies, code review guidelines, and CI/CD workflows to ensure a scalable and efficient development process (e.g., Github, GitLab)</p></li><li><p>Optimize applications for performance, security, and scalability.</p></li><li><p>Debug, troubleshoot, and resolve application issues effectively.</p></li><li><p>Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code following industry best practices.</p></li><li><p>Collaborate with designers and product managers to define and refine features.</p></li><li><p>Stay updated on emerging technologies and best practices in Full Stack Development.</p></li></ul><p><strong>Required Skills and Qualifications:</strong></p><ul><li><p>Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.</p></li><li><p>5+ years of experience as a Full Stack Developer or in a similar role.</p></li><li><p>Expertise in Next.js and React for front-end development.</p></li><li><p>Proficiency in TypeScript for scalable application development.</p></li><li><p>Strong proficiency in JavaScript, HTML5, and CSS3.</p></li><li><p>Hands-on experience with SQL, NoSQL databases (e.g., PostgreSQL, MongoDB).</p></li><li><p>Hands-on experience with CMS frameworks (e.g., Contenful, Strapi).</p></li><li><p>Proficiency in deployment platforms and environment management (e.g., Vercel, Netlify)</p></li><li><p>Experience using git repository for version control, CI/CD, and team collaboration (e.g., Github, GitLab).</p></li><li><p>Solid understanding of RESTful APIs and GraphQL and their integration.</p></li><li><p>Familiarity with Agile development methodologies and Scrum/Kanban workflows.</p></li><li><p>Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with attention to detail.</p></li><li><p>Excellent communication and teamwork skills.</p></li></ul><p><strong>Preferred Skills :</strong></p><ul><li><p>Experience with serverless architecture and cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, Azure).</p></li><li><p>Familiarity with testing frameworks (e.g., Jest, Cypress) and test-driven development (TDD).</p></li><li><p>Understanding of SEO best practices in web development.</p></li><li><p>Experience with containerization technologies (e.g., Docker, Kubernetes).</p></li></ul>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/visualis-senior-full-stack-developer">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/visualis-senior-full-stack-developer</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Stakefish: DevOps Engineer</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> London, England, United Kingdom
</p>

<p>As our DevOps Engineer, you will be helping us build and maintain blockchain networks and protocols. You will work on improving our current infrastructure including security, automation, and monitoring among other things. You will also have the chance to dive deep into new blockchain protocols, run testnets, build secure and scalable infra and maintain it.</p><p></p><h3>What will you do?</h3><ul> <li>Build secure and reliable infrastructure to monitor, detect and mitigate performance and security issues</li> <li>System administration activities for Linux servers, which includes routine, proactive daily management of the health, stability, and availability of system infrastructure</li> <li>Create and maintain system procedural and technical documentation</li> <li>Stay up to date and build on peer-to-peer networking security best practices</li> <li>Create, maintain and communicate threat models + risk assessments for all systems we operate</li> </ul><p></p><h3>What excites us about you?</h3><ul> <li>You have experience as DevOps/SRE/Infrastructure engineer</li> <li>You have the ability to program in one or more languages like Python, GoLang, Bash or Javascript</li> <li>You have experience managing server infrastructures with high availability requirements</li> <li>You had designed secure networks, systems, and application architectures</li> <li>You had set up and maintained software in both data centers and cloud environments</li> <li>You have a deep understanding of sockets, full networking stack, and Linux security</li> <li>You possess the knowledge of building automation and CI/CD processes and tools</li> <li>You are experienced with Docker, Kubernetes, and other cloud deployment technologies</li> <li>You have flexibility, teamwork, and you are comfortable with ambiguity, able to take charge and get things done despite the unknowns</li> </ul><p></p><h3>What will be great to have?</h3><ul> <li>You have an understanding of the blockchain space and blockchain technology</li> <li>You possess knowledge of cryptography and security best practices</li> <li>You have contributions to open source communities</li> </ul><p>If those describe you, this is the right opportunity for you!</p><p></p><h3>Why are we awesome you ask?</h3><h3></h3><p>We are truly at the forefront of the crypto ecosystem as maintainers of the infrastructure layer of blockchain networks! We practice the crypto team mentality by assembling a truly global and diverse team.</p><p></p><p>We collectively represent more than 12 different countries and are united in a single mission: building out the future of decentralization. Crypto is here to stay, having introduced novel ideas such as DeFi, NFTs and DAOs. At the core of all this are teams like us working relentlessly to build the necessary tools and applications that help run and secure blockchains.</p><p></p><h3>Here are some other reasons you should join us:</h3><h3></h3><p></p><ul> <li>We have employees from over 10 countries across the globe, and you will be able to meet interesting people from different backgrounds and cultures. Distributed and remote work is baked into our culture.</li> <li>We are one of the top staking service providers with over $3B of assets staked across our validators. We actively explore and develop new products related to staking. You will work on high-impact engineering projects building exciting new products in a startup environment.</li> <li>We have a capable and passionate team. You will find teammates who are power DeFi users, intense NFT collectors, Bitcoin &amp; Ethereum knowledge nerds, etc. You can learn and debate everything on crypto with our teammates.</li> <li>We are not backed by VC funding, and we are already profitable. Our financial independence means that we can make decisions independent of VCs, and we prioritize our ideals of decentralization, user sovereignty, and user privacy over simply making a profit. It also means that, unlike most other startups, stakefish can provide you with a stable low-risk employment opportunity without fundraising concerns.</li> </ul> 

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/stakefish-devops-engineer">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/stakefish-devops-engineer</a></p>
</description>

      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Philippines
</p>

<p><strong>Job Title:</strong> Full Stack Developer<br><strong>Job Type:</strong> Full-Time (Remote)<br><strong>Compensation:</strong> Up to AUD 1,500/month (based on experience and qualifications)<br><strong>Work Schedule:</strong> Full-time<br><strong>Experience:</strong> 2-5+ years</p><p></p><h3><strong>Who We Are</strong></h3><p>At Remotely, we connect exceptional offshore professionals in the Philippines with global businesses looking to scale efficiently. We’re committed to building meaningful work opportunities that empower skilled talent to deliver real impact – anytime, anywhere.</p><p></p><h3><strong>Role Overview</strong></h3><p>The Full Stack Developer will be responsible for designing, building, and maintaining both front end and back end components of web applications. This role requires strong technical expertise, problem solving skills, and the ability to collaborate with cross functional teams. You will help create high performance, scalable, and user friendly digital solutions that support the client’s business goals.</p><p></p><h3><strong>Key Responsibilities</strong></h3><ul><li>Develop and maintain front end and back end systems using modern frameworks and technologies</li><li>Build responsive and user friendly interfaces that follow best design and UX practices</li><li>Develop server side logic, APIs, and integration points</li><li>Collaborate with designers, developers, and product teams to refine system requirements</li><li>Optimize applications for speed, scalability, and performance</li><li>Implement security and data protection best practices</li><li>Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve technical issues</li><li>Participate in code reviews and contribute to development standards</li><li>Document code, processes, and technical specifications</li></ul> <h3><strong>Qualifications &amp; Skills:</strong></h3><ul><li>2 to 5+ years of experience as a full stack developer or software engineer</li><li>Strong proficiency in front end technologies such as JavaScript, HTML, CSS, and frameworks like React or Vue</li><li>Experience in back end development using Node.js, Python, PHP, Ruby on Rails, or similar technologies</li><li>Proficiency in working with databases such as MySQL, PostgreSQL, or MongoDB</li><li>Experience with REST APIs, integrations, and version control using Git</li><li>Understanding of cloud services, DevOps practices, or containerization is a plus</li><li>Strong analytical and problem solving skills</li><li>Excellent communication and collaboration abilities</li><li>Ability to manage multiple development tasks and deliver within deadlines</li></ul><p></p><h3><strong>Work Arrangement &amp; Expectations:</strong></h3><ul><li>Remote position requiring a stable and reliable internet connection</li><li>Full-time schedule aligned with the client’s preferred time zone</li><li>Regular communication with project stakeholders and development teams</li><li>Timely delivery of development tasks, updates, and documentation</li><li>Commitment to writing clean, secure, and maintainable code</li><li>Willingness to adapt to feedback, evolving project requirements, and new technologies</li></ul> 

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/remotely-full-stack-developer">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/remotely-full-stack-developer</a></p>
</description>

      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Athens, Attica, Greece
</p>

<p>Are you a DevOps expert ready to make an impact? We're seeking a talented <strong>DevOps Engineer</strong> with skills in Kubernetes, Docker, and Jenkins! Join us in Athens, Heraklion, Rethymnon, or remotely to design, implement, and maintain CI/CD pipelines, automate infrastructure provisioning, and ensure the scalability and reliability of enterprise systems for a pivotal e-Government project.</p><p></p><p><strong>What You'll Do:</strong></p><ul> <li>Design, implement, and maintain CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins or other similar tools;</li> <li>Deploy, manage, and monitor applications in Kubernetes clusters;</li> <li>Create and manage Docker images, containers, and registries;</li> <li>Automate infrastructure provisioning, configuration management, and application deployments;</li> <li>Collaborate with development teams to ensure seamless integration and delivery of code;</li> <li>Implement and manage monitoring, logging, and alerting systems to ensure system reliability and performance;</li> <li>Troubleshoot and resolve issues related to infrastructure, applications, and DevOps processes;</li> <li>Continuously evaluate and implement new tools and technologies to improve efficiency and performance;</li> <li>Ensure security best practices are followed in DevOps processes and infrastructure.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Must-Have Qualifications:</strong></p><ul> <li>University degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Software or Electrical Engineering, or other related field;</li> <li>Proven experience as a DevOps Engineer or similar role;</li> <li>Strong proficiency with Kubernetes, including deployment, scaling, and management of applications;</li> <li>Extensive experience with Docker and Yaml, including building and managing containers;</li> <li>Hands-on experience with Jenkins or other CI/CD tools;</li> <li>Experience with monitoring and logging tools like Prometheus, Grafana, ELK stack, Rancher, etc;</li> <li>Familiarity with version control systems, particularly Gitlab and Azure DevOps;</li> <li>Excellent problem-solving skills and a proactive attitude;</li> <li>Strong communication skills and ability to work collaboratively in a team environment;</li> <li>Fluency in oral and written English.</li> </ul><p></p><p><strong>Nice-to-Have Qualifications:</strong></p><ul> <li>Experience with other container orchestration tools;</li> <li>Experience with Azure DevOps;</li> <li>Knowledge of scripting languages such as Python, Bash, Powershell, terraform or similar;</li> <li>Understanding of network protocols and security;</li> <li>Experience with agile methodologies and practices;</li> <li>Experience with WSO2 Micro Integrator, WSO2 API Manager or Harbor.</li> </ul><p></p> <p>We believe in rewarding talent and dedication. Here's what you can expect as part of our team:</p><ul> <li>Competitive full-time salary;</li> <li>Private Health Coverage on the Company’s group program;</li> <li>Flexible Working Hours;</li> <li>Top-of-the-Line Tools;</li> <li>Professional Development: Benefit from language courses, specialized training, and continuous learning opportunities;</li> <li>Career Growth: Work with some of the most innovative and exciting specialists in the industry;</li> <li>Dynamic Work Environment: Thrive in a setting that offers challenging goals, autonomy, and mentoring, fostering both personal and company growth.</li> </ul><p>If you want an exciting challenge, work with some of the coolest technologies, and enjoy your time doing it, then join us! Submit your detailed CV in English, quoting reference: (<strong>DOE/09/25</strong>).</p><p>You may also consider all our other open vacancies by visiting the career section of our website (<a href="https://www.eurodyn.com/">www.eurodyn.com</a>) and follow us on Twitter (@EURODYN_Careers) and LinkedIn.</p><p><strong>EUROPEAN DYNAMICS (ED)</strong>&nbsp;(<a href="https://www.eurodyn.com/">www.eurodyn.com</a>) is a leading European Software, Information, and Communication Technologies company, operating internationally (Athens, Brussels, Luxembourg, Copenhagen, Berlin, Stockholm, London, Nicosia, Valetta, Vienna, Den Haag, Hong Kong, etc.) The company employs over 1100 engineers, IT experts, and consultants (around 3% PhD, 41% MSc, and 54% BSc). We design and develop software applications using integrated, state-of-the-art technology. Our current IT projects have a value exceeding 300 million EURO. EUROPEAN DYNAMICS is a renowned supplier of IT services to European Union Institutions, international organizations, European Agencies, and national government Administrations in 40 countries and 4 continents.</p><p>As part of our dedication to the diversity of our workforce, we are committed to Equal Employment Opportunity without regard for race, colour, national origin, ethnicity, gender, disability, sexual orientation, gender identity, or religion.</p><p><img height="auto" src="https://workablehr.s3.amazonaws.com/uploads/photos/5048/5361bd97c043a50a08911fd7def45566.png" width="400px"></p><p><strong>EUROPEAN DYNAMICS (ED)</strong>&nbsp;adheres to the General Data Protection Regulation principles by applying its Privacy Policy as published at&nbsp;<a href="http://www.eurodyn.com/privacy">www.eurodyn.com/privacy</a>. By submitting an application to this position and by sharing your personal data with ED, you acknowledge and accept its Policy and authorize ED to process your personal data for the purposes of the company's recruitment opportunities, in line with the Policy.</p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/european-dynamics-devops-engineer">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/european-dynamics-devops-engineer</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Booksy: Customer Support Advisor</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Poland
</p>

<p>Kariera w Booksy oznacza bycie częścią globalnego zespołu, który koncentruje się na pomaganiu ludziom na całym świecie czuć się świetnie każdego dnia. Od wspierania przedsiębiorców w budowaniu udanych biznesów, po pomoc ich klientom w organizowaniu chwil dla siebie – naszą misją jest pomaganie ludziom w rozwijaniu się i fantastycznym samopoczuciu.</p><p></p><p>Praca w dynamicznie zmieniającym się środowisku scale-up, gdzie panuje pewien chaos, a zasoby są ograniczone, nie jest dla każdego. &nbsp;Jeśli lubisz jasne ścieżki kariery i gotowe rozwiązania, to pewnie nie będziemy idealnym miejscem dla Ciebie. Ale jeśli cenisz sobie kreatywność, elastyczność i możliwość realnego wpływu – pokochasz pracę w Booksy!</p><p></p><p>W związku z rosnącą skalą i złożonością naszego biznesu, poszukujemy osoby na stanowisko <strong>Customer Support Advisor</strong>. Wynagrodzenie podstawowe (Umowa o Pracę): 5400 zł brutto/mies. oraz premia (średnia miesięczna premia wypłacana w roku 2025 na stanowisku CS Advisor wynosiła 1800 zł brutto).</p><p></p><h3><strong>Twoje zadania:</strong></h3><ul><li>Rozwiązujesz sprawy klientów, podczas kontaktów przychodzących, poprzez telefon, e-mail, czat, social media</li><li>Wykonujesz kontakty wychodzące do klientów w celu udzielenia informacji lub uzyskania informacji potrzebnych do rozwiązania sprawy</li><li>Obsługujesz klientów, w sposób zapewniający rozwiązanie jak największej liczby spraw przy pierwszym kontakcie</li><li>Udzielasz klientom informacji o sposobie działania oraz funkcjonalności Booksy Biz oraz Booksy dla Klientów</li><li>Udzielasz klientom informacji na temat subskrypcji, faktur i płatności</li><li>Proponujesz rozwiązania dostosowane do potrzeb klientów, w zakresie możliwym do dostarczenia przez Booksy</li></ul><p></p> <h3><strong>Aplikuj, jeśli:</strong></h3><ul> <li>Masz <strong>minimum 2-letnie doświadczenie</strong> w obsłudze klienta / contact center w ruchu przychodzącym</li> <li>Masz doświadczenie w branży technologicznej (mile widziane)</li> <li>Znasz język polski na poziomie C2 lub natywnym</li> <li>Znasz język angielski na poziomie B1 (mile widziane)</li> <li>Lubisz rozmawiać z klientami</li> <li>Posługujesz się lekkim piórem i poprawną polszczyzną</li> <li>Znasz i umiesz stosować techniki komunikacji i perswazji</li> <li>Masz zdolność analizy i rozwiązywania problemów</li> <li>Szybko się uczysz i adaptujesz się do nowych sytuacji</li> <li>Koncentrujesz się na osiągnięciu celów</li> <li>Lubisz pracować w zespole</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Co oferujemy:</strong></h3><ul><li>Z dumą działamy na całym świecie, a każdy nasz rynek funkcjonuje w modelu <strong>remote-first</strong> (zdalnym jako podstawowym). W zależności od rynku, do którego dołączasz, możesz mieć dostęp do biura lub pracować w pełni zdalnie – obie opcje są w porządku. Jedyne, o co prosimy, to abyś mieszkał(a) w kraju lub regionie, w którym to stanowisko jest ogłoszone.</li><li>Prywatna opieka medyczna Allianz (dofinansowana przez firmę – różne pakiety do wyboru)</li><li>Karta Multisport (dobrowolna, niedofinansowana – różne opcje do wyboru)</li><li>Dodatkowe ubezpieczenie na życie Uniqa (dobrowolne, niedofinansowane)</li><li>Pethelp – wsparcie w opiece nad zwierzętami (dobrowolne, niedofinansowane)</li><li>Konsultacje online z psychologiem Booksy (w pełni finansowane przez firmę)</li><li>Platformę do nauki języka angielskiego</li><li>Platformę Worksmile</li></ul><p></p><p>_____</p><p></p><p><strong>Jak AI pomaga nam znajdować wspaniałych ludzi</strong></p><p>Pomyśl o naszym narzędziu AI jako o naprawdę inteligentnym asystencie dla naszego zespołu rekrutacyjnego. Jaka jest jego rola? Pomóc nam działać szybciej, zachować spójność i upewnić się, że żaden wspaniały kandydat nie zostanie przeoczony. Każda aplikacja przechodzi tę samą weryfikację AI, aby pomóc nam dostrzec umiejętności pasujące do roli – ale bez obaw, <strong>AI nigdy nie podejmuje decyzji. Robią to prawdziwi ludzie.</strong> Nasi rekruterzy i menedżerowie ds. zatrudnienia zajmują się każdą ostateczną decyzją. Regularnie sprawdzamy też sposób wykorzystania narzędzia, aby zapewnić uczciwość, etykę i zgodność z przepisami o ochronie danych. Chcesz wiedzieć, jak to działa? Zawsze możesz zapytać, jak AI zostało wykorzystane w Twojej aplikacji – nie wpłynie to w żaden sposób na Twoje szanse.&nbsp;</p><p>Jeśli masz pytania, po prostu napisz do nas – chętnie wyjaśnimy więcej.</p><p></p><p><strong>Nasze zaangażowanie w różnorodność i integrację:</strong></p><p>Pracujemy w niezwykle kreatywnej i różnorodnej branży, dlatego zależy nam na tworzeniu środowiska, w którym każdy czuje się mile widziany. Doceniamy unikalne doświadczenia i perspektywy, dlatego zapewniamy równe szanse wszystkim kandydatom.</p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/booksy-customer-support-advisor">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/booksy-customer-support-advisor</a></p>
</description>

      <title>Infatica.io: Product Manager</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Spain
</p>

<h3>About the Role</h3><p>Infatica.io is looking for an experienced and highly autonomous <strong>Product Manager</strong> to lead early-stage product development. You will own products end-to-end—from idea validation and MVP launch to iteration and scaling—primarily in <strong>B2C</strong>, with optional exposure to <strong>B2B</strong> solutions. This role suits a hands-on product leader who thrives in fast-paced, distributed environments and uses data and AI to drive decisions.</p><p></p><h3>Responsibilities</h3><ul><li>Own the full product lifecycle: discovery, MVP definition, launch, and iteration </li><li> Build, test, and iterate MVPs rapidly based on data and user feedback </li><li> Manage and prioritize multiple products simultaneously </li><li> Define product vision, strategy, and success metrics </li><li> Collaborate with remote and outsourced development teams </li><li> Set up and analyze product analytics, funnels, cohorts, and experiments </li><li> Make data-driven decisions balancing business and user needs </li><li> Work cross-functionally with engineering, design, and stakeholders </li><li> Actively use AI tools to improve product discovery, delivery, analytics, and productivity</li></ul> <ul><li>Strong experience with early-stage products, primarily <strong>B2C</strong> </li><li>High level of ownership and independence </li><li>Experience managing remote and outsourced teams </li><li>Proven ability to run MVPs, experiments, and hypothesis-driven development </li><li>Strong product analytics expertise (metrics, A/B testing, tracking setup) </li><li>Experience working with technical products; software development background or strong technical understanding </li><li>Mandatory hands-on experience using AI tools </li><li>Excellent communication and prioritization skills</li></ul><p><strong>Nice to Have</strong></p><ul><li> Experience launching products from zero to product-market fit </li><li> Startup or fast-paced environment experience </li><li> Knowledge of Russian is an advantage</li></ul> <ul><li>Opportunity to own and shape products from the earliest stages </li><li> High autonomy and direct impact on product and business outcomes </li><li>Flexible working hours and remote friendly</li><li> Work in a fully distributed, international team </li><li> Exposure to both B2C and B2B product challenges </li><li> A culture that values experimentation, data-driven decision-making, and AI-powered innovation</li></ul>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/infatica-io-product-manager">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/infatica-io-product-manager</a></p>
</description>

      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country>🇦🇱 Albania, 🇧🇦 Bosnia and Herzegovina, 🇨🇿 Czechia, 🇬🇷 Greece, 🇭🇷 Croatia, 🇭🇺 Hungary, 🇱🇹 Lithuania, 🇱🇻 Latvia, 🇲🇰 North Macedonia, 🇲🇹 Malta, 🇵🇱 Poland, 🇵🇹 Portugal, 🇷🇴 Romania, 🇷🇸 Serbia, 🇸🇮 Slovenia, 🇸🇰 Slovakia, 🇹🇷 Türkiye, and 🇺🇦 Ukraine</country>
      <state>Zürich</state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/2807/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Zuerich
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://en.comparis.ch/">https://en.comparis.ch/</a>
</p>

<div class="page_richTextContent__Bei8q rich-text-content detail-block-description">
<p><strong>What you will do</strong><br><br>We are looking for a talented Full Stack Developer to join our Marketplaces department. You will be part of the cross-functional “homefinder” development team that maintains one of Switzerland’s largest real estate platforms. In this role, you will design, develop, and test new features used daily by thousands of users. Our responsive web applications are based on Next.js, while the backend is written in .NET, running both on-premise and in the Azure cloud as App Services and on Kubernetes with data stored mainly in SQL server and Azure cosmos DB, indexed in Elasticsearch. Besides delivering new features, you will also help migrate our applications from our legacy tech stack to our modern Kubernetes environment.&nbsp;</p>
<p><strong>What we expect from you&nbsp;&nbsp;</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>Design, develop, and deploy cloud-native frontend and backend applications using .NET Core/ASP.NET and Next.js.</li>
<li>Collaborate with product managers, designers, and other developers to understand requirements and translate them into technical solutions.</li>
<li>Build and maintain RESTful APIs and microservices.</li>
<li>Enhance the search experience of our users by leveraging your Elasticsearch experience</li>
<li>Be hands-on with Docker and Kubernetes.</li>
<li>Implement responsive and user-friendly UI components with React&nbsp;using&nbsp;Typescript.</li>
<li>Optimize&nbsp;application performance, security, and scalability.</li>
<li>Monitor, troubleshoot, and resolve production issues.</li>
<li>You are familiar with agile development methodologies like&nbsp;Scrum&nbsp;and&nbsp;you have worked in cross-functional teams.</li>
<li>Fluency in English&nbsp;</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>Required Skills and Qualifications</strong></p>
<div class="page_richTextContent__Bei8q rich-text-content detail-block-description">
<ul>
<li>Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field (or equivalent practical experience).</li>
<li>3+ years of professional experience in development.</li>
<li>Strongproficiencyin C#, .NET Core.</li>
<li>Solid experience with React.js, JavaScript/TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3.</li>
<li>Hands-on experience withcloud services (preferablyAzure).</li>
<li>Experience with REST APIs, microservices, and distributed architectures.</li>
<li>Knowledge of relational and non-relational databases (SQL Server, Cosmos DB)</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>&nbsp;Nice to have</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>Experience with vector databases</li>
<li>Knowledge of sorting and ranking algorithmsin Elasticsearch</li>
<li>Understanding ofevent-driven architecture</li>
<li>Familiarity building high-performance data ingestion pipelines</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>In return, here is what you can expect from us</strong><br><br>At Comparis, we believe that empowered employees deliver the best results. We cultivate a culture of transparency, mutual respect and trust. Firm believers in lifelong learning, we are always trying out new things and continuously developing – both as individuals and as a team. We also offer flat hierarchies, considerable autonomy and creative freedom, as well as a skilled and motivated team that will advise and support you in your work and make it easy for you to push your own boundaries. Finally, we offer flexible working hours to work from wherever you are and live.</p>
<p><strong>Have we triggered your interest?</strong></p>
<p>Then&nbsp;don't&nbsp;hesitate&nbsp;and apply&nbsp;for our position today. If you have any questions, Daphne, our People Management Lead, will be happy to help. We look forward to receiving your application!&nbsp;&nbsp;<strong><br>&nbsp;<br>Note: If you are currently residing abroad and are interested in a fully remote setup, please note that the employment would be arranged through our Employer of Record partner, remote.com, and therefore follow the labor laws and employment conditions of your country of residence.&nbsp;</strong><br><strong>We also only consider direct applicants with a maximum time-zone difference of +/- 2 hours from Switzerland (GMT+2).</strong></p>
</div>
</div>
<div>

</div>

</div>

    <item>
      <title>Sezzle: Product Design Intern</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Colombia, Remote
</p>

<div class="job__description body"><div><p><strong>About Sezzle:</strong></p><br><p>With a mission to financially empower the next generation, Sezzle is revolutionizing the shopping experience beyond payments, blending cutting-edge tech with seamless, interest-free installment plans that make shopping smarter and more accessible. We’re not just transforming payments; we’re redefining how people discover, interact with, and purchase the things they love while driving real impact on merchant sales through increased conversions and higher order values. As we continue to shape the future of fintech and retail, we’re building an innovative, dynamic team passionate about creating more than just a transaction but a truly unique shopping journey. If you’re excited about pushing boundaries in tech and delivering a game-changing experience for consumers and merchants alike, come join us at Sezzle and help create the future of shopping!</p><br><p><strong>About the Role:</strong></p><br><p>We are seeking a talented and motivated <strong>Product Design Intern</strong> who is best in class with a high IQ plus a high EQ and. This role presents an exciting opportunity to thrive in a dynamic, fast-paced environment within a rapidly growing team, with abundant prospects for career advancement. Also someone&nbsp;who’s excited to learn, experiment, and help shape the future of Sezzle’s web and mobile experiences. If you love crafting intuitive interfaces, have an eye for motion and micro-interactions, and are curious about where AI meets design, you’ll fit right in. You’ll work closely with product managers, engineers, and designers to ship thoughtful, user-centric work that makes people’s lives easier.</p><br><p><strong>What You'll Do:</strong></p><br><ul class="ak-ul"><br><li>Partner with product managers and engineers to design user-friendly features across Sezzle’s platforms</li><br><li>Create wireframes, visual designs, prototypes, and interaction flows that balance clarity, aesthetics, and usability</li><br><li>Contribute to our design system by building and documenting reusable components in Figma</li><br><li>Ensure consistency of design &amp; UI patterns, language, and branding elements across all product components</li><br><li>Participate in user research and testing to inform and refine your work</li><br><li>Present design work and rationale to design team and stakeholders while gathering feedback to iterate and polish your solutions</li><br><li>Explore illustration, motion design, and micro-interactions to elevate the experience</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>What We Look For:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Pursuing or recently completed a degree in Human-Computer Interaction, Interaction Design, Graphic Design, or a related field</li><br><li>Some hands-on experience in UI/UX or product design for digital products (through internships, coursework, freelance, or personal projects)</li><br><li>Strong communication skills in English</li><br><li>Proficiency in Figma for interface design and prototyping</li><br><li>Familiarity with modern product design trends and basic design principles<br><br><ul><br><li><strong>Experience:</strong> Some prior exposure to designing for web or mobile (internships, freelance, coursework, or personal projects count)</li><br><li><strong>Craft &amp; Tools: </strong>Strong Figma skills for interface design and prototyping; curiosity about testing and validating with users</li><br><li><strong>User Focus:</strong> Passion for building accessible, inclusive experiences</li><br><li><strong>Design Systems: </strong>Understanding of scalable UI systems, from color and typography tokens to components</li><br><li><strong>Component Management:</strong> Experience creating and updating UI components in Figma</li><br><li><strong>Adaptability: </strong>Comfortable juggling multiple projects and deadline while maintaining quality</li><br><li><strong>Collaboration:</strong> Clear communicator and team player who’s open to feedback</li><br><li>Technical Bonus: Familiarity with HTML/CSS/React is a plus, not a requirement</li><br></ul><br></li><br><li><strong>Portfolio Requirements:</strong><br><ul><br><li>Please include a link to an online portfolio or PDF that showcases:<br><ul><br><li>3-4 of your best digital design projects</li><br><li>Clear explanation of problem and project requirements</li><br><li>Your design process</li><br></ul><br></li><br></ul><br></li><br></ul><br><p><strong>Preferred Qualifications:&nbsp;</strong></p><br><ul class="ak-ul"><br><li>Experience with animation or motion tools (After Effects, Lottie, Rive)</li><br><li>Interest in designing interactive components and motion-enhanced micro-interactions</li><br><li>Curiosity about how AI can support and accelerate the design process</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>About You:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li><strong>You have relentlessly high standards</strong> - many people may think your standards are unreasonably high. You are continually raising the bar and driving those around you to deliver great results. You make sure that defects do not get sent down the line and that problems are fixed so they stay fixed.</li><br><li><strong>You’re not bound by convention</strong> - your success—and much of the fun—lies in developing new ways to do things</li><br><li><strong>You need action</strong> - speed matters in business. Many decisions and actions are reversible and do not need extensive study. We value calculated risk-taking.</li><br><li><strong>You earn trust</strong> - you listen attentively, speak candidly, and treat others respectfully.</li><br><li><strong>You have backbone; disagree, then commit </strong>- you can respectfully challenge decisions when you disagree, even when doing so is uncomfortable or exhausting. You have conviction and are tenacious. You do not compromise for the sake of social cohesion. Once a decision is determined, you commit wholly.</li><br><li><strong>You deliver results </strong>- you focus on the key inputs and deliver them with the right quality and in a timely fashion. Despite setbacks, you rise to the occasion and never settle.</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>What Makes Working at Sezzle Awesome:</strong></p><br><p>At Sezzle, we are more than just brilliant engineers, passionate data enthusiasts, out-of-the-box thinkers, and determined innovators. We believe in surrounding ourselves with only the best and the brightest individuals. Our culture is not defined by a certain set of perks designed to give the illusion of the traditional startup culture, but rather, it is the visible example living in every employee that we hire.&nbsp;</p><br><p><strong>Compensation</strong>: The salary for the Product Marketing Operations Intern is 700 USD monthly gross.&nbsp;</p><br><p>#Li-remote #Full-time</p></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/sezzle-product-design-intern">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/sezzle-product-design-intern</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Oben Technology: DevOps</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Bucharest Romania
</p>

<p><strong>ABOUT COMPANY</strong></p> <p>Oben stands ready to provide the IT Strategy and Consulting support for Global Leaders to help them steer their Organizations through Change. We leverage our functional and technology expertise, insights and industry know-how to help Enterprises reach their goals.</p> <p><strong>ROLE INSIGHTS</strong></p> <p>You are passionate about digital products and have a strong ability to solve technical and architectural IT problems.</p> <p>If you are interested in discussing such an opportunity within our company, do not hesitate to use the <strong>Apply for Position </strong>button. </p> <p><strong>ROLE DETAILS</strong></p> <p><strong>Job Title:</strong> DevOps (Job ref.7XX54783)</p> <p><strong>Job Type:</strong> Full-time, remote</p> <p><strong>Effort Schedule:</strong>&nbsp;4 Hours/Day</p> <p><strong>Project Communication &amp; Documents:</strong> English</p> <p><strong>Job Summary:</strong> </p> <p>As DevOps, you apply, promote and develop best practices on the provisioning aspects of environments in the public cloud and the CI/CD chain on behalf of projects.</p> <p>Your solid technical know-how, your understanding of the project context and your analytical and conceptual skills will guarantee the relevance of your commitments. You work on innovative products with a strong team behind you. </p> <p><strong>Responsibilities:</strong></p> <p>During the product definition phase</p> <ul><li>Provide the guidelines and expertise necessary when developing the DevOps process adapted to each project;</li><li>Provide expertise and coach project teams on the DevOps chain to ensure optimized implementation time and product quality;</li><li>Participate in the development of a containerization strategy allowing the construction of scalable solutions;</li><li>Participate in the dissemination of a homogeneous DevOps culture within the different products.</li></ul> <p>During continuous deployment cycles</p> <ul><li>Ensure the proper functioning of the continuous integration chain tools as well as development-related tools such as qualimetry, code and binary repositories;</li><li>Ensure the proper functioning of continuous deployment tools;</li><li>Ensure compliance with the principles of immutable architecture;</li><li>Provide end-to-end support on the DevOps toolchain;</li><li>Promote the adoption of containerized deployment in a front/back/micro-services architecture;</li><li>Help set up application monitoring and alerting;</li><li>Help resolve DevOps process or tool issues;</li><li>Ensure transversality and communication around DevOps best practices;</li><li>Help with resolving application malfunctions (route cause, etc.) and sizing applications/infrastructure.</li></ul> <p><strong><strong>Requirements:</strong></strong></p> <ul><li>Technical expertise on source code versioning, integration, deployment and automation tools;</li><li>Experience in designing and implementing end-to-end DevOps processes from business to Ops;</li><li>Mastery of IT best practices in a RUN and operating context;</li><li>Coding and scripting abilities: have significant experience in back-end development (Java);</li><li>Mastery of a wide variety of Open Source technologies and tools (<strong>Gitlab</strong>, Gitlab CI, Anthos, Artifactory, Sonar, <strong>Docker</strong>, <strong>Kubernetes</strong>, Ansible, <strong>Terraform</strong>);</li><li>Significant experience in <strong>Linux / Unix</strong> administration;</li><li>In-depth knowledge of cloud solutions (<strong>GCP</strong>);</li><li>Knowledge of monitoring/alerting tools (<strong>Dynatrace</strong>).</li><li>Skills in problem solving, taking initiative and handling pressure;</li><li>Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.</li></ul>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/oben-technology-devops">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/oben-technology-devops</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Wing Assistant: Full-Stack Developer</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Baguio City, Philippines
</p>

<div class="content"><div class="section-wrapper page-full-width"><div class="section page-centered"><div><b>About the Role</b></div><div>We are looking for a <b>Full-Stack Developer</b> who can build scalable, high-performance web applications. You will work across the entire stack—frontend, backend, databases, APIs, and deployment—while collaborating closely with product, design, and QA teams.</div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Responsibilities</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>Develop and maintain <b>end-to-end web applications</b> (frontend + backend).</li><li>Build responsive, user-friendly <b>UI components</b> using modern JavaScript frameworks.</li><li>Design and develop secure, scalable <b>REST or GraphQL APIs</b>.</li><li>Work with relational and NoSQL databases (e.g., <b>MongoDB, PostgreSQL, MySQL</b>).</li><li>Integrate third-party services and APIs.</li><li>Implement CI/CD pipelines and manage deployments.</li><li>Optimize applications for <b>speed, performance, and scalability</b>.</li><li>Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality features.</li><li>Write clean, maintainable, well-documented code.</li><li>Participate in code reviews and provide reliable estimations.</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Requirements</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>Strong proficiency in <b>JavaScript/TypeScript</b>.</li><li>Solid experience with <b>frontend frameworks</b>: React, Next.js, Vue, or Angular.</li><li>Experience with <b>backend frameworks</b>: Node.js (Express, NestJS), Django, or similar.</li><li>Good understanding of <b>databases</b>: MongoDB, PostgreSQL, MySQL.</li><li>Working knowledge of <b>API design</b>, authentication, and authorization (JWT, OAuth).</li><li>Experience with <b>cloud platforms</b> (AWS / GCP / Azure) and server management.</li><li>Familiarity with <b>Docker</b>, Git, microservices, and REST principles.</li><li>Understanding of <b>HTML, CSS, Tailwind, Bootstrap</b>.</li><li>Experience with unit/integration testing (Jest, Mocha, Cypress).</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Nice to Have</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>Experience with <b>DevOps</b> (CI/CD, pipelines, GitHub Actions).</li><li>Knowledge of <b>message queues</b> (RabbitMQ, Kafka).</li><li>Experience with <b>SSR/SSG frameworks</b> like Next.js.</li><li>Understanding of system architecture and scalability.</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Qualifications</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent experience.</li><li>2–6+ years of full-stack development experience.</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Benefits</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>Competitive salary and performance-based bonuses.</li><li>Flexible working hours / remote-first culture.</li><li>Opportunity to work on impactful products.</li><li>Growth-focused environment with mentorship and learning support.</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div>$0 - $0 a year</div><small> </small></div><div class="section page-centered"><div>We are an equal opportunity employer and welcome all qualified applicants. We are committed to creating a diverse and inclusive workplace. If you are passionate about technology and eager to contribute to exciting projects, we encourage you to apply.</div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div class="text-small italic text-gray-700">We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.</div></div></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/wing-assistant-full-stack-developer">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/wing-assistant-full-stack-developer</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Global Hr Solutions & Employment Tools For Distributed Teams: Group Product Manager</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote-UK&amp;I
</p>

<div class="job__description body"><div><h2><strong>About Remote</strong></h2><br><div><span>Remote is solving modern organizations’ biggest challenge – navigating global employment compliantly with ease. We make it possible for businesses of all sizes to recruit, pay, and manage international teams. With our core values at heart and future focused work culture, our team works tirelessly on ambitious problems, asynchronously, around the world. You can find Remoters working from 6 different continents (Antarctica left to go!) and all of our positions are fully remote.<br><br>We encourage every member of the Remote team to bring their talents, experiences and culture to the table to help us build the best-in-class HR platform.</span></div><br><div>&nbsp;</div><br><div><span>If you are energetic, curious, motivated and ambitious, be part of our world. Apply now and define the future of work!</span></div></div><div><h1>The position</h1><br><p>This is an exciting time to join Remote and make a personal difference in the global employment space as a&nbsp;<strong>Group Product Manager</strong>, joining our <strong>Product Fintech</strong> team. You'll have a massive impact on our organization, and will help create opportunities for millions of people around the world.</p><br><p>As a Group Product Manager for Fintech &amp; Strategic Extensions area, you will play a pivotal role in leading and overseeing the strategic direction and development of our payment products and services.</p><br><p>You’ll be the driving force behind the vision, roadmap, and delivery of our payment solutions—shaping how thousands of customers experience Remote. This role is both strategic and hands-on: you’ll roll up your sleeves, build alongside the team, and turn bold ideas into real impact. You’ll partner closely with engineering, design, marketing, and support to bring innovative, intuitive, and delightful payment experiences to life.</p><br><h2>Requirements</h2><br><ul><br><li>Extensive and demonstrated product management experience, including leading teams and delivering successful product launches.</li><br><li>Deep expertise in the payments space—industry trends, technologies, regulatory considerations, and the competitive landscape.</li><br><li>Strong leadership and people-management skills: you drive meaningful outcomes by enabling and elevating others.</li><br><li>Exceptionally hands-on: you're comfortable rolling up your sleeves, digging deep into complex problems, and owning the details when needed—not just directing others.</li><br><li>Strategic thinker who can connect market trends, business needs, and customer insights into clear product direction.</li><br><li>Customer-obsessed mindset, with a track record of delivering intuitive, high-quality user experiences.</li><br><li>Data-fluent, able to interpret metrics and use them to guide prioritization and decision-making.</li><br><li>Adaptable and resilient in a fast-paced, constantly evolving environment.</li><br><li>Excellent written communication and collaboration skills that enable fast alignment and decision-making across teams.</li><br><li>Fluent in English, both written and spoken.</li><br><li>Remote work experience is a plus, but not required.</li><br></ul><br><h2>Key responsibilities</h2><br><ul><br><li>Product Strategy: Developing and executing a cohesive product strategy for your product area, aligned with the company's overall vision, goals, and market demands.</li><br><li>Team Leadership: Managing and mentoring a team of product managers to achieve team goals, while fostering a collaborative and innovative work environment across all of Product.</li><br><li>Tactical engagement: Diving into details, questioning assumptions, and providing hands-on guidance with the team when critical decisions or clarity are needed.</li><br><li>Cross-functional &amp; Inter-departmental Collaboration: Collaborating with other product areas, business leaders, engineering, design, marketing, sales, legal, finance, operations and more to prioritize, design and build the best product experiences and outcomes for our customers.</li><br><li>Product(s) Performance: Monitoring product performance and KPIs (Key Performance Indicators) for your product area to identify areas of innovation and improvement.</li><br><li>Product Evangelism: Actively promoting and advocating for your product area both internally and externally, including presenting to stakeholders, customers, and industry events.</li><br></ul><br><h2><strong>Practicals</strong></h2><br><ul><br><li><strong>You'll report to:</strong> Director of Product</li><br><li><strong>Direct reports: </strong>Product Managers</li><br><li><strong>Location</strong>: We are prioritizing applications from UTC +/- 4</li><br><li><strong>Start date:</strong> As soon as possible</li><br></ul><br><h2><strong>Application process</strong></h2><br><ol><br><li>Profile review (reviewed async)</li><br><li>Interview with recruiter</li><br><li>Interview with Director of Product</li><br><li>Async exercise</li><br><li>Team Interview with Group Product Manager, Engineer Manager, and Design Manager</li><br><li>Bar raiser Interview</li><br><li>Interview with VP of Product</li><br><li><a href="https://www.notion.so/Veremark-Remote-96e108c037b8423cbd4c3f07a1f9b38b">Prior employment verification check</a>&nbsp;</li><br></ol><br><p>#LI-DNP</p></div><div class="job__pay-ranges"><div class="pay-range"><div class="description"><div class="body"><span><p>Remote's <a href="https://www.notion.so/remotecom/people-Total-Rewards-1945bce8d3924ece9421ba8630f57b0c">Total Rewards philosophy</a> is to ensure fair, unbiased compensation and fair <span class="link-annotation-unknown-block-id-1691622878">equity</span><span class="discussion-level-1 discussion-id-f2a82bc4-09e4-4a71-ad93-755b1d26a690 notion-enable-hover"> pay </span>along with competitive benefits in all locations in which we operate. We do not agree to or encourage cheap-labor practices and therefore we ensure to pay above in-location rates. We hope to inspire other companies to support global talent-hiring and bring local wealth to developing countries.</p><br><p>At first glance our salary bands seem quite wide - here is some context. At Remote we have international operations and a globally distributed workforce.&nbsp; We use geo ranges to consider geographic pay differentials as part of our global compensation strategy to remain competitive in various markets while we hiring globally.<br><br>Our salary ranges are determined by role, level and location, and our job titles may span more than one career level. The actual base pay for the successful candidate in this role is dependent upon many factors such as location, transferable or job-related skills, work experience, relevant training, business needs, and market demands. The base salary range may be subject to change.<br><br><em>At Remote, we foster internal mobility as a key element of our culture of employee growth and development, supported by a compensation philosophy that guarantees pay equity and fairness. Therefore, all compensation changes associated with an internal move will be reviewed by the Total Rewards &amp; People Enablement team on a case by case basis.</em></p></span></div></div><p class="body body--medium">The annual salary range for this full-time position is</p><p class="body">$65,900 - $185,250 USD</p></div></div><div><h2><strong>Benefits</strong></h2><br><div class="p-rich_text_section"><br><div class="p-rich_text_section"><span>Our full benefits &amp; perks are explained in our handbook at&nbsp;<a class="c-link" href="http://remote.com/r/benefits">remote.com/r/benefits</a>. As a global company, each country works differently, but some benefits/perks are for all Remoters:</span></div><br><ul class="p-rich_text_list p-rich_text_list__bullet"><br><li><span>work from anywhere</span></li><br><li><span>flexible paid time off</span></li><br><li><span>flexible working hours (we are&nbsp;<a class="c-link" href="https://remote.com/async">async</a>)</span></li><br><li><span>16 weeks paid parental leave</span></li><br><li><span>mental health support services</span></li><br><li><span>stock options</span></li><br><li><span>learning budget</span></li><br><li><span>home office budget &amp; IT equipment</span></li><br><li><span>budget for local in-person social events or co-working spaces</span></li><br></ul><br></div><br><h2><strong>How you’ll plan your day (and life)</strong></h2><br><p><span>We work async at Remote which means you can plan your schedule around your life (and not around meetings). Read more at <a href="https://remote.com/async">remote.com/async</a>.</span></p><br><p><span>You will be empowered to take ownership and be proactive. When in doubt you will default to action instead of waiting. Your <strong>life-work balance</strong> is important and you will be encouraged to put yourself and your family first, and fit work around your needs.</span></p><br><p><span>If that sounds like something you want, apply now!</span></p><br><h2><strong>How to apply</strong></h2><br><ol><br><li><span>Please fill out the form below and upload your CV with a PDF format.</span></li><br><li><span><strong>We kindly ask you to submit your application and CV in English, as this is the standardised language we use here at Remote.</strong></span></li><br><li><span>If you don’t have an up to date CV but you are still interested in talking to us, please feel free to add a copy of your LinkedIn profile instead.</span></li><br></ol><br><p><span>Not only do we encourage folks from all ethnic groups, genders, sexuality, age, abilities, disability status and any other under-represented group to apply, but we prioritize a sense of belonging. We have 4 ERGs (Women, Disability, Queer, Minorities in Tech) who meet regularly with the People team. During your interviews and beyond, we ask &amp; encourage anybody who needs an accommodation to request one from their recruiter.<br></span></p><br><p><span>We will ask you to voluntarily tell us your pronouns at interview stage, and you will have the option to answer our anonymous demographic questionnaire when you apply below. As an equal employment opportunity employer it’s important to us that our workforce reflects people of all backgrounds, identities, and experiences and this data will help us to stay accountable. We thank you for providing this data, if you chose to.</span></p><br><p><span>At Remote, we embrace AI as a valuable tool while prioritizing human creativity and authenticity.&nbsp;We look forward to meeting candidates who balance innovation with genuine expertise and experience.&nbsp;To learn more about Remote's AI guidelines check see&nbsp;<a href="https://www.notion.so/remotecom/Guidelines-on-using-AI-when-applying-for-a-job-at-Remote-11ccb4dadab4805f80a7c73b6567bd8f">here</a>.&nbsp;</span><br><br><span><em>Please note we accept applications on an ongoing basis.&nbsp;</em></span></p></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/global-hr-solutions-employment-tools-for-distributed-teams-group-product-manager">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/global-hr-solutions-employment-tools-for-distributed-teams-group-product-manager</a></p>
</description>
      <pubDate>Wed, 29 Apr 2026 23:04:15 +0000</pubDate>
      <expires_at>Fri, 29 May 2026 23:04:15 +0000</expires_at>
      <guid>https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/global-hr-solutions-employment-tools-for-distributed-teams-group-product-manager</guid>
      <link>https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/global-hr-solutions-employment-tools-for-distributed-teams-group-product-manager</link>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Particle41: DevOps Engineer</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> India - Remote
</p>

<div class="job__description body"><div><p><strong>DevOps Engineer</strong></p><br><p>As a DevOps Engineer at Particle41, you will play a crucial role in enhancing our software development and IT operations processes. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in both software development and IT operations, with a focus on automating and streamlining processes to achieve efficient and reliable software delivery for our customers. You will work closely with the development and operations teams of our customers to build, deploy, and maintain critical systems, ensuring the reliability and scalability of the customers' infrastructure.</p><br><p><strong>In This Role, You Will:</strong></p><br><p>Collaboration and Communication:</p><br><ul><br><li>Work closely with software developers, system administrators, and other stakeholders to understand the requirements and objectives of projects.</li><br><li>Collaborate on the design, implementation, and maintenance of continuous integration and delivery pipelines.</li><br><li>Create and maintain comprehensive documentation for systems, processes, and configurations.</li><br></ul><br><p>Automation and Tooling:</p><br><ul><br><li>Design, implement, and manage automation processes for software build, deployment, and configuration.</li><br><li>Evaluate, select, and implement tools and technologies to enhance the efficiency of the development and deployment processes.</li><br></ul><br><p>Infrastructure Management:</p><br><ul><br><li>Manage and maintain cloud-based infrastructure (AWS, Azure, GCP, and other cloud providers) to ensure scalability, reliability, and security.</li><br><li>Implement infrastructure as code (IaC) using tools such as Terraform, Pulumi, and others.</li><br><li>Establish and maintain CI/CD pipelines to automate the software delivery process, including build, test, and deployment phases.</li><br></ul><br><p>Monitoring and Performance:</p><br><ul><br><li>Develop and implement monitoring solutions to ensure the health and performance of systems and applications.</li><br><li>Proactively identify and address issues related to system performance, reliability, and scalability.</li><br></ul><br><p>Security and Compliance:</p><br><ul><br><li>Implement and maintain security best practices in infrastructure and application deployment. This would include vulnerability assessments, code scanning and access controls.</li><br><li>Ensure compliance with regulatory requirements and company security policies.&nbsp;</li><br></ul><br><p>Troubleshooting and Support:</p><br><ul><br><li>Provide support for development and operations teams, addressing issues related to build failures, deployment problems, and system outages.</li><br><li>Participate in on-call rotation to respond to and resolve critical incidents.&nbsp;</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>Skills and Experience We Value:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field, or equivalent work experience.</li><br><li>Proven experience as a DevOps Engineer or similar role.</li><br><li>Strong proficiency in scripting languages such as Python, Bash, or Ruby.</li><br><li>Experience with configuration management tools such as Ansible, Puppet, or Chef.</li><br><li>In-depth knowledge of containerization technologies, such as Docker and Kubernetes.</li><br><li>Hands-on experience with version control systems, preferably Git.</li><br><li>Solid understanding of continuous integration and continuous deployment (CI/CD) concepts and tools.</li><br><li>Strong problem-solving and troubleshooting skills.</li><br><li>Excellent communication and collaboration abilities.</li><br><li>Certified (Current or Expired) in at least one of the following: AWS Solutions Architect Associate, AWS Developer Associate, AWS SysOps Administrator Associate, AWS Solutions Architect Professional, AWS DevOps Engineer Professional, Azure Administrator Associate, Azure Security Engineer Associate, Azure Network Engineer Associate, Azure Developer Associate, Azure Solutions Architect Expert, Azure DevOps Engineer Expert, GCP Cloud Engineer Associate, GCP Cloud Architect Professional, GCP Cloud Developer Professional, GCP Cloud DevOps Engineer Professional, GCP Cloud Security Engineer Professional, GCP Cloud Network Engineer Professional, Certified Kubernetes Application Developer, Certified Kubernetes Administrator, Certified Kubernetes Security Specialist</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>About Particle41</strong><strong><br></strong>Our core values of <strong>Empowering, Leadership, Innovation, Teamwork,</strong> and<strong> Excellence </strong>drive everything we do to achieve the ultimate outcomes for our clients. Empowering Leadership for Innovation in Teamwork with Excellence ( ELITE )</p><br><ul><br><li><strong>E - Empowering: Enabling individuals to reach their full potential.</strong></li><br><li><strong>L - Leadership: Taking initiative and guiding each other toward success.</strong></li><br><li><strong>I - Innovation: Embracing creativity and new ideas to stay ahead.</strong></li><br><li><strong>T - Teamwork: Collaborating with empathy to achieve common goals.</strong></li><br><li><strong>E - Excellence: Striving for the highest quality in everything we do.</strong></li><br></ul><br><p>We seek team members who embody these values and are committed to contributing to our mission. Particle41 welcomes individuals from all backgrounds who are committed to our mission and values. We provide equal employment opportunities to all employees and applicants, ensuring that hiring and employment decisions are based on merit and qualifications without discrimination based on race, color, religion, caste, age, sex, national origin, disability status, genetics, protected veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state, local, or international laws. This policy applies to all aspects of employment and hiring.&nbsp;</p><br><p>We appreciate your interest and encourage applicants from these regions to apply. If you need any assistance during the application or interview process, please feel free to reach out to us at careers@Particle41.com</p></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/particle41-devops-engineer">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/particle41-devops-engineer</a></p>

    <item>
      <title>Rocketreach: Senior Product Manager, Growth</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote USA
</p>

<div class=""><br><div class="content-intro"><h2><span>Why RocketReach</span></h2><br><p><span>Over <strong>26&nbsp;Million users</strong> around the world use </span><a href="https://rocketreach.co/"><span>RocketReach.co</span></a><span>. Some of the largest companies in the world - Apple, Google, Amazon, Adobe, Morgan Stanley, trust RocketReach to power their sales, recruitment, and marketing teams. We are scaling our <strong>26&nbsp;Million users</strong> and our dataset of <strong>700&nbsp;million professionals</strong> across <strong>60&nbsp;million companies.</strong></span></p><br><p><span>RocketReach is rare and unique; a startup that is in high-growth mode, already highly profitable, with a small team where you can make a gigantic impact. Started in 2016, the company was bootstrapped by its founders, focused on building a great product. Our Mission is to Connect</span><span> In a few short years, we’ve grown organically to become one the largest business info-services platforms and the de-facto productivity solution for sales and recruitment teams at companies of all sizes, worldwide.</span></p><br><p><span>Our success lies in our culture, which is very much driven by our</span><strong> core values:</strong></p><br><p><strong> Down to Earth ~</strong><span> Low-Ego: we are a uniquely humble group that values being low-ego more than anything, and we have a strict no asshole policy.</span></p><br><p><strong> One Rocket, One Crew</strong><span>~ Collaborative: A team that can support each other, give and receive productive feedback, as well as coach and be coached is at the heart of our collaborative environment.</span></p><br><p><strong>&nbsp;Fueled by Data ~ </strong><span>Data-driven Decisions: Our decisioning is based on data, it is the currency on which we drive the business forward. Data is the Northstar of our product and our organization internally.</span></p><br><p><strong>Houston we have a Solution~ </strong><span>Solution-oriented: We are expert problem-solvers. Finding the right solution and the best possible way to get there together, is what our team strives for.</span></p></div><br><h3>The Role</h3><br><p>RocketReach is entering an exciting phase of rapid expansion, and we’re looking for a <strong>Senior Product Manager, Growth</strong> to own and accelerate the engines that drive our ARR. This role is responsible for shaping and executing the strategy across growth, SEO, activation, conversion funnels, payment flows, and self-serve monetization.</p><br><p>You will lead a cross-functional pod of engineers, analysts, and designers to set the roadmap, form and validate hypotheses, and deliver high-impact product improvements grounded in data. You’ll dive deep into quantitative metrics as well as qualitative user feedback, experiment aggressively, and ensure we continually optimize for user acquisition, engagement, and revenue.</p><br><p>This is an ideal role for a product leader with a strong technical background and experience scaling freemium or usage-based products. You should be fluent in growth loops, SEO strategy, conversion rate optimization, experimentation frameworks, and the mechanics of how to turn a discovery product into a revenue engine.</p><br><h3>What You’ll Own</h3><br><ul><br><li>Growth strategy and roadmap across activation, retention, monetization, and SEO</li><br><li>Full-funnel optimization from first touch → onboarding → conversion → paid expansion</li><br><li>Payment flow, pricing tests, checkout, and frictionless upgrade experiences</li><br><li>Hypothesis-driven A/B experimentation and analytics instrumentation</li><br><li>Organic acquisition strategy including technical SEO, structured data, and content surfaces</li><br><li>Identifying and shaping high-leverage product opportunities to increase ARR</li><br><li>Competitive analysis across growth models, pricing, onboarding, and SEO</li><br></ul><br><h3>What You’ll Do</h3><br><ul><br><li>Collaborate with engineering, design, data, and marketing to ship high-impact experiments</li><br><li>Build and maintain a fast-moving growth roadmap tied to measurable revenue outcomes</li><br><li>Analyze funnel performance, build cohort dashboards, and uncover drop-off points</li><br><li>Rapidly test ideas through MVPs, prototypes, and iterative development</li><br><li>Partner with marketing and SEO specialists to scale organic traffic and improve rankings</li><br><li>Improve self-serve user journeys and drive expansion within teams and enterprises</li><br><li>Continuously benchmark against competitors to understand best-in-class growth tactics</li><br></ul><br><h3>What We’re Looking For</h3><br><ul><br><li>5+ years in Product Management with deep ownership of growth or monetization</li><br><li>Strong technical foundation (software engineering background preferred)</li><br><li>Experience with freemium or viral growth models, SEO-driven acquisition, or self-serve SaaS</li><br><li>Ability to form hypotheses from data, run experiments, and interpret results</li><br><li>Fluency in analytics tools, funnels, cohort analysis, and SEO fundamentals</li><br><li>Proven track record of driving measurable ARR or funnel improvements</li><br><li>Excellent communication skills and comfort collaborating with cross-functional teams</li><br></ul><br><h3>Who You Are</h3><br><ul><br><li>You are a humble leader and a team player</li><br><li>You care about working with talented, low-ego, overall good people</li><br><li>You are curious, product-driven, and have strong communication skills</li><br><li>You like autonomy and function well in environments with high ambiguity and minimal oversight</li><br><li>You are not afraid to ask questions and you feel confident in your ability to own projects</li><br></ul><br><h3>We Are Looking For People Who</h3><br><ul><br><li>Extremely data driven, and can do much of the data analysis yourself</li><br><li>You have seasoned experience as a Product Manager, ideally with a B2B SaaS and customer facing product. Freemium models are a big plus.</li><br><li>Ability to bring clarity and focus to a dynamic environment of tight-knit engineers.</li><br><li>Exceptional skills in cross-team collaboration, communication, and aligning and influencing teams.</li><br><li>Experience developing a long-term product strategy, while operationally executing on day-to-day product development&nbsp;</li><br><li>Driving hard decisions while still being an expert listener.</li><br><li>Drive the product roadmap and balance the long-term strategy while being a key decision maker on prioritizing short-term product goals&nbsp;</li><br><li>Identify and improve key funnels and metrics, you will own end-to-end processes, making product-driven decisions and execution as well as report ongoing insights and results to the company</li><br><li>Will shape and set the foundation for our Product management and design teams, in a fast-paced, and team growth environment</li><br></ul><br><div class="content-conclusion"><h3><strong>Why Join Us?</strong></h3><br><ul><br><li><strong>Product and Engineering Driven:</strong><span> We strongly believe the quality of our Product will set us apart from the competition.&nbsp; We have a Product-led culture, with our Founders as our first engineers.&nbsp; Low tech debt has allowed us to scale the business with an extremely high caliber team.</span></li><br><li><strong>Profitable not "Profitable":</strong><span> We're actually profitable. Unlike many other companies our size and age, we’re not burning through millions to generate $1000s in income.&nbsp; We are actually comfortably profitable, and actively investing that profit in order to continue to scale the business.</span></li><br><li><strong>Data not egos:</strong><span> Product at RocketReach is driven by agility and experimentation.&nbsp; Our decisioning is based on data, it is the currency on which we drive the business forward.</span></li><br><li><strong>Close knit, distributed:</strong><span> RocketReach has a small, but hyper productive team. We're spread around the globe, yet constantly in touch.&nbsp; Each role we hire has an immediate, outsized impact on the business.</span></li><br><li><strong>Strong Leadership:&nbsp;</strong>We have a genuine investment in our people and care that you are happy at work!</li><br></ul><br><h3><strong>Benefits &amp; Perks</strong></h3><br><ul><br><li><span>Competitive Salary&nbsp;</span></li><br><li>401(k) matching</li><br><li><span>Medical, Dental, and Vision Insurance</span></li><br><li><span>Strong Leadership - we care that you are happy at work!</span></li><br><li><span>Investment in culture and resources for a distributed team&nbsp;</span></li><br><li><span>Incredible amount of autonomy</span></li><br></ul><br><p><strong>RocketReach is an equal opportunity employer. Qualified applicants will be considered regardless of race, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, religion, disability, or protected veteran status.</strong></p></div><br></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/rocketreach-senior-product-manager-growth">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/rocketreach-senior-product-manager-growth</a></p>
</description>
