    <item>
      <title>Veeva Systems: Senior Product Manager</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> California - Pleasanton
</p>

<div class="content"><div class="section-wrapper page-full-width"><div class="section page-centered"><div>Veeva Systems is a mission-driven organization and pioneer in industry cloud, helping life sciences companies bring therapies to patients faster. As one of the fastest-growing SaaS companies in history, we surpassed $2B in revenue in our last fiscal year with extensive growth potential ahead.</div><div><br></div><div>At the heart of Veeva are our values: Do the Right Thing, Customer Success, Employee Success, and Speed. We're not just any public company – we made history in 2021 by becoming a&nbsp;<a href="https://medium.com/@peter.gassner/public-benefit-corporation-pbc-486e1e9508a6">public benefit corporation</a>&nbsp;(PBC), legally bound to balancing the interests of customers, employees, society, and investors.</div><div><br></div><div>As a&nbsp;<a href="https://medium.com/@peter.gassner/work-anywhere-is-about-trusting-and-empowering-employees-ef1beba56590">Work Anywhere</a>&nbsp;company, we support your flexibility to work from home or in the office, so you can thrive in your ideal environment.</div><div><br></div><div>Join us in&nbsp;<a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TaPSP8cCSKY&amp;ab_channel=Forbes">transforming the life sciences industry</a>, committed to making a positive impact on its customers, employees, and communities.</div><div><br></div><div><b>The Role</b></div><div><br></div><div><span>Veeva is looking for an experienced Product Manager to build, launch, and grow capabilities for our Clinical Database (CDB) application for Clinical Trials.</span></div><div><span>&nbsp;</span></div><div><span>We’re looking for a passionate self-starter that takes initiative with a natural ability to execute, adapt, and learn quickly when faced with ambiguity. You will work closely with a team of industry and technology A-players, who together are bringing the next generation of Veeva products to market.</span></div><div><span>&nbsp;</span></div><div><span>If you have a passion for creating world-class products and enjoy solving complex problems with simple, elegant solutions, you may be a good fit for this position.</span></div><div><br></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>What You’ll Do</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>Own and design product features from start to finish, including user stories, functional &amp; non-functional requirements, feature specifications, quality control checks</li><li>Interview Customers and Industry Experts to understand the business needs and pursue problems with curiosity and tenacity.</li><li>Manage the prioritization of features within your product area</li><li>Author high-quality design specifications within an agile methodology based upon industry and downstream systems/customer requirements</li><li>Support release and sprint planning to ensure product enhancements support the needs of internal and external customers at the right time and in the right sequence</li><li>Collaborate closely with Development, QA, DevOps, and Product Management to ensure products are built and delivered with quality</li><li>Acquire deep subject matter expertise in Clinical Trial Data</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Requirements</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>5+ years of Product Management or relevant work experience</li><li>Passion for understanding complex business challenges and translating them into elegant solutions</li><li>Strong written and verbal communication skills and attention to detail</li><li>Ability to work independently in a fast-paced environment and comfortable with ambiguity</li><li>Bachelor’s degree</li><li>Qualified candidates must be legally authorized to work in the USA</li><li>Experience with data modeling</li><li>Experience in JIRA, Confluence</li><li>Demonstrated expertise in design, product development, and strategic planning</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Nice to Have</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>Undergraduate or graduate degree in computer science or engineering</li><li>Experience in the clinical trials industry</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Perks &amp; Benefits</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>Medical, dental, vision, and basic life insurance</li><li>Flexible PTO and company paid holidays</li><li>Retirement programs</li><li>1% charitable giving program</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Compensation</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>Base pay: $120,000 - $200,000</li><li>The salary range listed here has been provided to comply with local regulations and represents a potential base salary range for this role. Please note that actual salaries may vary within the range above or below, depending on experience and location. We look at compensation for each individual and base our offer on your unique qualifications, experience, and expected contributions. This position may also be eligible for other types of compensation in addition to base salary, such as variable bonus and/or stock bonus.</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><span>#LI-Remote</span></div><div><br></div><div>Veeva’s headquarters is located in the San Francisco Bay Area with offices in more than 15 countries around the world.</div><div><br></div><div>Veeva is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, religion, national origin or ancestry, age, disability, marital status, pregnancy, protected veteran status, protected genetic information, political affiliation, or any other characteristics protected by local laws, regulations, or ordinances. If you need assistance or accommodation due to a disability or special need when applying for a role or in our recruitment process, please contact us at&nbsp;<a href="mailto:talent_accommodations@veeva.com">talent_accommodations@veeva.com</a>.</div></div></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/veeva-systems-senior-product-manager">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/veeva-systems-senior-product-manager</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Clo Virtual Fashion: DevOps Engineer</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Seoul
</p>

<div class="content"><div class="section-wrapper page-full-width"><div class="section page-centered"><div>클로버추얼패션 (CLO Virtual Fashion)은 3D 의상 시뮬레이션 알고리즘을 기반으로, 컨셉부터 디자인, 제조, 마케팅, 피팅, 스타일링까지 의상과 관련된 모든 서비스를 제공합니다.</div><div><br></div><div>2009년 설립된 클로버추얼패션은 디지털 패션의 새로운 생태계를 만들어 가고 있습니다.</div><div>의상 디자인 소프트웨어 CLO, Marvelous Designer, Jinny 와 함께, CLO-SET, CONNECT와 같은 의상 콘텐츠에 특화된 플랫폼으로 의상의 모든 여정에 관여함으로써, 효율적이고 지속 가능한 워크플로우를 구축하고 있습니다. 뿐만 아니라, 당사 솔루션을 통해 실제 의상과 디지털 의상이 서로 태그되어 CLO 시스템 내에서 기능할 수 있게 합니다.</div><div><br></div><div>글로벌 디지털 패션 시장을 주도하고 있는 클로버추얼패션은 현재 아시아, 북미, 유럽, 남미 등 전 세계 12개국에 총 14개의 오피스를 두고 있으며, 세계 각국의 수많은 고객사를 바탕으로 점점 확장해나가고 있습니다.</div><div><br></div><div><b>Position Overview</b></div><div>본 포지션은 글로벌 서비스의 원활한 제공을 위해 팀 인프라를 고도화하고, 하이브리 Cloud + IDC 환경을 운영하며, GitOps와 Observability 등 최신 기술을 활용해 서비스 안정성과 품질을 지속적으로 향상시키는 역할을 수행합니다.</div><div>또한, 반복 업무에 대한 자동화를 통해 운영 효율성도 극대화 합니다.</div><div><br></div><div><b>Hiring Process</b></div><div>[서류 검토] → [1차 인터뷰]  → [2차 인터뷰(+Reference Check)]  → [처우 협의]  → [최종 합격]</div><div>*서류 제출 시 이력서 및 포트폴리오 제출이 필수이며, 제출하신 자료만으로 판단이 어려운 경우 추가 자료를 요청 드릴 수 있습니다.</div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Responsibilities</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>CLO-SET 서비스를 안정적으로 운영하기 위한 기존 Infra 고도화</li><li>기존 Infra 구조를 파악하고 빠르게 재구성할 수 있도록 개선</li><li>CLO-SET 서비스의 안정적인 개발 및 배포를 위한 CI/CD 파이프라인 구축</li><li>개발자와 협업하여 개발/운영/배포 환경을 개선하고 효율성 증대</li><li>Enterprise 고객 서비스에 대한 Infra DR 계획 수립 및 구성 관리</li><div><br></div></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Requirements</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>AWS, Azure, Github 등 클라우드 환경에서 CI/CD 파이프라인 자동화 경험</li><li>Kubernetes, Docker Container 기반 서비스 운영 경험</li><li>Terraform, Ansible 등의 Infrastructure as code 툴을 이용한 개발 경험&nbsp;</li><li>Datadog 등 모니터링 툴 활용 경험</li><li>현황 파악 및 문제 정의에 익숙하며, 해결 방법 탐색에 흥미를 느끼는 분</li><li>애자일하고 빠른 사이클의 업무 환경에 대한 이해</li><div><br></div></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Plus if you have</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>DevOps에 DR 계획을 포함해 구성한 경험 보유</li><li>글로벌 SaaS 기업 근무 경험</li><li>해외 오피스 직원 및 고객과 소통 가능한 영어 활용 능력</li><div><br></div></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div>[혜택 및 복지]</div><div><br></div><div>• 개인장비: 듀얼 모니터와 데스크탑/랩탑 혹은 MacBook/iMac (3년마다 업그레이드)</div><div>• 자기계발: 자기계발 및 체력단련 비용, 도서 구입비, 최신 툴, 동아리 지원금</div><div>• 식사, 간식: 중식 제공, 고급 커피 제공, 간식</div><div>• 연차, 휴가: 경조사 휴가, 건강검진 휴가, 법정 연차휴가, Year-end holiday (12/25~1/1)</div><div>• 근무 형태: 유연 근무제, AM 07 ~ 10 to PM 04 ~ 07</div><div>• 보험, 의료: 대형 병원 건강검진, 경조사비, 4대 보험</div><div>• 기타: 웰트리 복리후생(복지포인트, 명절 선물)</div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div>[Culture]</div><div><br></div><div>▶Flexible Work Schedule “우리 모두의 Working Time은 다 달라요.”</div><div>• 오전 7시 ~ 10시 내에 자유롭게 출근을 하는 문화를 갖고 있어요. 개인과 팀마다 업무에 집중할 수 있는 시간대는 다르므로, 자유롭게 출퇴근을 하고 있어요.</div><div>• 더불어, CLOver는 다양한 time zone에서 일을 하고 있어요. 만약 시차로 인해 밤에 미팅이 있다면, 다음 날은 늦게 출근을 하거나 일찍 퇴근을 하며 업무 시간을 자유롭게 조율해요.</div><div><br></div><div>▶Over Communication “항상 active하게 소통하고 공유해요.”</div><div>• 전세계 CLOver들과 Slack으로 업무를 공유하고 소통하고 있어요. 최대한 모든 Slack의 Channel은 공개적으로 운영하고 있기 때문에, 관심이 있거나 궁금한 Project가 논의되고 있는 Channel에 언제든지 참여할 수 있어요.</div><div>• 분기마다 모든 팀이 시도했던 업무와 성과, lesson learned을 공유하고 있어요. CLOver들은 전 세계에 있기때문에, 영상을 통해 공유를 하고 있어요. </div><div>• Non hierarchy를 지향해요. 직급/직위로 소통하는 것이 아닌 각자의 영어 이름으로 소통을 하고 있고, 누구나 아이디어와 의견을 자유롭게 제시할 수 있어요.</div><div><br></div><div>▶No Limitation “CLO에서는 무엇이든 가능해요”</div><div>• CLO에서는 여러가지 시도와 도전을 해보는 것을 무한 응원해요. 그동안 해보지 않았던 일들을 CLO에서는 마음껏 재미있게 시도해볼 수 있어요.</div><div><br></div><div>▶Refresh “누구에게나 재충전과 휴식은 필요해요.”</div><div>• 휴가를 내실 때에 별도의 승인 절차가 없어요. 사전에 팀원들과 일정을 공유 및 조율하신다면, 언제든지 자유롭게 휴가를 사용할 수 있어요.</div><div>• 잠시 복잡한 서울을 떠나, 제주도 오피스에서 한 달동안 근무를 하실 수 있어요. 일명 "제주 한 달 살기"에 나서실 때 가족끼리 머무시기에 부족함 없는 사택과 왕복 항공권 또한 지원해 드려요.</div><div>• 물론 제주도로 개인 휴가를 떠나실 때에도, 사택을 이용하실 수도 있어요.</div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div>[Benefits and Perks]</div><div><br></div><div>▶Keep growing “자기계발비와 업무에 필요한 리소스를 아낌없이 지원해드려요.”</div><div>CLO는 CLOver의 성장을 무한 응원해요. 직무 관련한 학습을 위한 자기계발비를 지원 드리고 있어요. 이 외에도, 업무에 필요한 tool도 최대한 아낌없이 지원해드리고 있어요.</div><div><br></div><div>▶Healthier Life “건강이 가장 중요해요.”</div><div>일도 중요하지만, 건강이 가장 중요해요. 매년 건강검진을 지원해드리고 있으며, 건강검진을 다녀오신 날에는 휴가(1day)를 드리고 있어요.</div><div><br></div><div>▶Meals &amp; Snack “밥은 항상 잘 챙겨 먹어야 해요.”</div><div>아침 샐러드바, 점심 식사 및 간식비를 지원해드리고 있어요. 물론, 불가피하게 야근을 하게 되셨을 경우 저녁 식대 역시 당연히 지원해드리고 있어요.</div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div>[클로버추얼패션 사내 활동 영상] </div><div>• <a href="https://youtu.be/r6Ob6tAAT9M">https://youtu.be/r6Ob6tAAT9M</a></div><div><br></div><div><span>[전세계 디자이너의 일하는 방식을 바꿔놓은 회사 - EO]</span></div><div>• <a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RG8LFEKg1D8">https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RG8LFEKg1D8</a></div><div><br></div><div><span>[클로버추얼패션 채용 홈페이지]</span></div><div>• <a href="https://www.clovirtualfashion-careers.com/">https://www.clovirtualfashion-careers.com/</a></div><div><br></div><div>클로버추얼패션에 대해 궁금하신 점은 이메일(career@clo3d.com)으로 문의 주세요.</div></div></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/clo-virtual-fashion-devops-engineer">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/clo-virtual-fashion-devops-engineer</a></p>
</description>

      <title>Anthill: Senior Full Stack Developer</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>

      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Sofia, 1000, Bulgaria
</p>

<p><span>Anthill’s trusted partner CCC Intelligent Solutions Inc. has picked Bulgaria as its first European location for building an R&amp;D center. CCC has been continuously pioneering solutions that power better decisions for insurers, automotive manufacturers, and collision repairers. Today this happens through an advanced cloud-based SaaS platform of digital and data services.</span></p><br><p><br></p><br><p><span>CCC Safekeep, an AI-driven insuretech division of CCC, is seeking a <span>Python Full</span> <span>Stack Developer</span><span>&nbsp;</span>to securely design, build, and scale the integration interfaces and services in the cloud. You’ll work with engineers, data teams, and product managers on the design and implementation details to achieve high quality software.</span><br></p><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p><span>Responsibilities:</span></p><br><ul><br><li>Design, build, and maintain web applications leveraging cutting-edge frontend design methodologies and UX patterns to create low-latency, secure, and reusable software&nbsp;<br></li><br><li>Develop features and improvements in a secure, well-tested, and performant way.&nbsp;</li><br><li>Review, analyze, and implement technical solutions to meet business requirements and drive resolution of issues/bugs.</li><br><li>Provide leadership within engineering team on solution design, technical implementation, and planning.<br><br></li><br></ul><br><p><span>Requirements:</span></p><br><ul><br><li>5+ years of experience in Python or Node.js</li><br><li>Professional experience in TypeScript/JavaScript&nbsp;</li><br><li>Experience in building Web Application and/or Mobile&nbsp;</li><br><li>Programming experience building APIs and contributing to the architecture and design</li><br><li>Experience with task estimation, prioritization and escalation in alignment with engineering processes to effectively plan and deliver</li><br></ul><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p><span>Nice to have&nbsp;</span></p><br><ul><br><li>Experience working with MongoDB or other NoSQL database</li><br><li>Familiarity with AWS services such as AWS Lambda, AWS API Gateway<br></li><br><li>Experience with software design approaches and UX patterns</li><br></ul><br><p><br></p><br><p><span>What we offer:</span></p><br><ul><br><li><span>Remote Work Options</span></li><br><li><span>Comprehensive Health Insurance</span></li><br><li><span>Flexible Benefits Program</span></li><br><li><span>Sport and Entertainment Perks</span></li><br><li><span>Support for Seminars, Conferences, Trainings, and Certifications</span></li><br><li><span>Childbirth Allowance</span></li><br><li><span>Employee Assistance Program (EAP)</span></li><br><li><span>Vacation and Travel Allowance</span></li><br></ul><br><p><br><br></p><br><p><span><span>Ready to level up?&nbsp;</span>Join Anthill and help scale teams that redefine innovation!</span></p><br><p><br></p><br><p><span>Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further steps in the recruitment process. We thank all applicants for their interest. Good luck!</span></p><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p><br></p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/anthill-senior-full-stack-developer">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/anthill-senior-full-stack-developer</a></p>

    <item>
      <title>Kraken: Product Director</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> London
</p>

<div class="content"><div class="section-wrapper page-full-width"><div class="section page-centered"><div><span>Help us use technology to make a big green dent in the universe!</span></div><div><br></div><div><a class="postings-link" href="https://kraken.tech/">Kraken</a><span>&nbsp;powers some of the most innovative global developments in energy.</span></div><div><br></div><div><span>We’re a technology company focused on creating a smart, sustainable energy system. From optimising renewable generation, creating a more intelligent grid and enabling utilities to provide excellent customer experiences, our operating system for energy is transforming the industry around the world in a way that benefits everyone.</span></div><div><br></div><div><span>It’s a really exciting time in energy. Help us make a real impact on shaping a better, more sustainable future.</span></div><div><br></div><div><span>Kraken is the operating system for utilities of the future. Built in-house at Octopus Energy, we took them to become the biggest supplier in the UK, and now we power energy companies and utilities around the globe - in 10 countries and counting, licensing software to giants like Origin Energy in Australia and Tokyo Gas in Japan. We’re on a mission to accelerate the renewable transition, and bring affordable green energy to the world.</span></div><div><span>We’ve reinvented energy products with smart, data driven tariffs to balance customer demand with renewable generation, and Kraken’s platform controls more than half of the grid-scale batteries in the UK. We’re driving the uptake of low carbon technologies like solar panels and heat pumps via our software for engineers in the field. Our platform allows our energy specialists to be the most productive in the industry. We’re looking to improve this even more by developing a suite of AI tools making us pioneers in using ML and AI to make our agents' lives even easier and customers happier. We do it by hiring clever, curious, and self-driven people, enabling them with modern tools and infrastructure and giving them lots of autonomy.</span></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div>About the role</div><div><br></div><div>As Director of Product Management – AI Customer Service Agents, you will drive the vision, strategy, and execution of Kraken’s AI-powered customer service agent products, including AI-augmented human agents, as well as autonomous chatbot and voice agents. You’ll guide a team to develop intelligent agents that deliver seamless, human-like customer interactions while balancing accuracy, efficiency, and trust. This is a high-impact role requiring deep expertise in AI-driven products, customer service automation, and large-scale enterprise deployments. You will collaborate with engineering and client delivery teams to build and scale industry-leading AI customer service agent solutions.</div><div><br></div><div><br></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>What You'll Do</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>Play a leadership role in developing the product vision for Kraken’s AI-powered customer service agents, aligning it with the company’s broader strategy.</li><li>Develop a deep understanding of our enterprise clients’ pain points to shape product requirements.</li><li>Conduct market research and competitive analysis of AI customer service agents enterprise solutions to inform product and commercial strategy.</li><li>Develop and execute the product roadmap, ensuring AI service agents continuously improve customer satisfaction, efficiency, and scalability while addressing our clients’ core needs.</li><li>Work closely with engineering to build, test, and refine products.</li><li>Ensure AI customer service agents are adaptive and intelligent, leveraging LLMs, reinforcement learning, RAG techniques, and expert feedback.</li><li>Monitor and measure performance, using data-driven insights to refine AI responses, minimize hallucinations, reduce handling times, and enhance overall client satisfaction.</li><li>Balance automation with human oversight, ensuring AI agents escalate complex issues appropriately.&nbsp;</li><li>Drive a best-in-class user experience, ensuring AI interactions are seamless, empathetic, and context-aware.</li><li>Partner with client delivery and the Kraken experience teams to identify pain points, optimize workflows, and improve resolution rates for our clients.</li><li>Stay ahead of AI advancements, integrating cutting-edge research and responsible AI practices into product development.</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>What you'll need </h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>7+ years of product management experience in enterprise software with a focus on customer service automation solutions.</li><li>A big plus: experience in scaling AI driven customer service solutions, including chatbot and voice agents.&nbsp;</li><li>Deep understanding of LLMs, speech-to-speech technologies, RAG and AI-driven automation, including how to adapt AI models for customer support applications.</li><li>Proven experience leading cross-functional teams, including engineering and data science.</li><li>Strong analytical skills, with the ability to define and track key success metrics.</li><li>Excellent communication and stakeholder management, balancing technical and business needs.</li><li>Experience in scaling AI solutions, particularly in high-volume customer service environments.</li><li>Passion for customer experience, with a strong focus on usability, efficiency, and empathy.</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div>If this sounds like you then we'd love to hear from you.</div><div><br></div><div><i>Are you ready for a career with us? We want to ensure you have all the tools and environment you need to unleash your potential.&nbsp;Need any specific accommodations?&nbsp;Whether you require specific accommodations or have a unique preference, let us know, and we'll do what we can to customise your interview process for comfort and maximum magic!</i></div><div><br></div><div><i>Studies have shown that some groups of people, like women, are less likely to apply to a role unless they meet 100% of the job requirements. Whoever you are, if you like one of our jobs, we encourage you to apply as you might just be the candidate we hire. Across Octopus, we're looking for genuinely decent people who are honest and empathetic. Our people are our strongest asset and the unique skills and perspectives people bring to the team are the driving force of our success. As an equal opportunity employer, we do not discriminate on the basis of any protected attribute. Our commitment is to provide equal opportunities, an inclusive work environment, and fairness for everyone.</i></div></div></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/kraken-product-director">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/kraken-product-director</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Hrtx: Full Stack Developer</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Makati Metro Manila Philippines
</p>

<ul><li>This is a Senior Developer role with excellent growth potential</li><li>Enjoy our flexibility and hybrid working solutions</li><li>Work with a team of enthusiastic and technology driven professionals</li></ul> <p><strong>Full Stack Developer</strong></p> <p>We are an agile, high performing development team who is responsible for the software delivery and support of a business-critical platform, an application that enables and streamlines the entire The Companys placement process in one system from submission creation, quote and declination management and proposal preparation to policy invoicing and placement renewals. </p> <p>The platform provides an interactive service between The Company and our partners, allowing market competition to deliver outstanding client outcomes. We foster an environment where diversity of thought, a growth mindset and passion to deliver business values is celebrated and recognised.<br></p> <p><strong>What the day will look like</strong></p> <p>You will be responsible for creating software solutions on the platform, as well as on our suite of supporting applications.</p> <ul><li>Analysing, designing, developing and testing software solutions either in one major language or in a range of programs across multiple platforms.</li><li>Collaborating with technical business analysts, technical lead, business colleagues, and other stakeholders in an Agile environment to produce solutions that meet business needs</li><li>Participating in scrum activities such as iteration planning, daily stand-up, retrospectives to continuously improve development process and delivery</li><li>Delivering and deploying new features, defect fixes and system enhancements</li><li>Developing and maintaining technical documentation</li><li>Ensuring that applications are developed within agreed budgets and time frames and achieving necessary design and systems security standards.</li><li>Facilitate knowledge sharing and providing technical mentoring and guidance to other members of the development team.</li></ul> <p><strong>How this opportunity is different</strong></p> <p>We embrace a hybrid working culture where most colleagues work flexibly in the office, at home and from other remote locations.</p> <p>We believe we can drive greater growth for our business and our colleagues by fostering a more inclusive and flexible culture, improving access to talent and enhancing colleague wellbeing.</p> <p><strong>Skills and experience that will lead to success</strong></p> <ul><li>Minimum 4 years of experience in a similar role</li><li>Proficient in Programming Languages such as Java, Java SpringBoot, Groovy, Typescript, Javascript, Angular</li><li>Experience in Software testing (Unit, System, Integration, Functional, and Performance)</li><li>Hands on experience with Application Development Tools such as Intellij, Gradle</li><li>Experience in working in Linux/Unix shell environment and tooling</li><li>Experience in using version control tools such as GIT</li><li>Knowledge in SDLC Methodologies such as Agile and experience in working in an Agile Environment</li><li>Knowledge of Oracle, SQL Server Databases</li><li>Expert in implementation of API Integrations / web services SOAP, REST</li><li>Dev Ops Teamcity / Octopus or similar</li><li>Good fundamental knowledge on Core Design Patterns, such as observable, layered</li><li>Ability to analyse business requirements, and convert business needs into user stories and technical tasks, and lead business stakeholders towards functional design decisions</li><li>A strong team player who thrives as part of a high performing team, is approachable and strong collaborator across cross-functional teams</li><li>Ability to adapt to changes, eager to learn and being open minded</li><li>Effectively communicate with clarity and confidence to both technical audience and business users</li><li>Takes ownership and commits to delivering high quality outcomes</li></ul> <p></p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/hrtx-full-stack-developer">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/hrtx-full-stack-developer</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Hypervolt: Customer Support Executive</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> London, United Kingdom
</p>

<div class="ATS_htmlPreview"><h1><strong><span>About Hypervolt Limited</span></strong></h1><p><span>Hypervolt is at the forefront of the electric vehicle charging revolution, dedicated to providing innovative and reliable EV charging solutions. We launched in 2021 with the bold ambition to transform the EV charging space through a relentless focus on the customer experience, great software, and beautifully designed British hardware.&nbsp;</span></p><p><span>In a short timeframe, we became&nbsp;</span><strong><a href="https://www.trustpilot.com/review/hypervolt.co.uk"></a></strong><span><strong><a href="https://www.trustpilot.com/review/hypervolt.co.uk">Trustpilot's highest rated EV charging manufacturer in the industry</a></strong>. We are proud to have been named the third fastest growing company in the UK, as part of the&nbsp;</span><strong><a href="https://www.deloitte.co.uk/fast50/winners/2023/"></a></strong><span><strong><a href="https://www.deloitte.co.uk/fast50/winners/2023/">Deloitte Fast 50</a>,</strong> and 6th fastest growing company in EMEA, as part of the&nbsp;</span><strong><a href="https://www.deloitte.com/uk/en/services/deloitte-private/about/emea-tech-fast500-winners.html"></a></strong><span><strong><a href="https://www.deloitte.com/uk/en/services/deloitte-private/about/emea-tech-fast500-winners.html">Deloitte Fast 500</a>.</strong></span><br><br><span>Additionally, Hypervolt was voted DrivingElectric’s Home EV Charger of the Year 2023 &amp; 2024, a testament to our focus on innovation and democratizing EV ownership.</span></p><div><br></div><div><br></div><div>Our Mission</div><h3><span>To be the backbone of the electricity grid developing technologies that will empower the transition to a world of green energy and electric transportation, and leave behind a sustainable energy infrastructure for future generations.&nbsp;</span></h3><h3><span>Our Vision</span></h3><h3><span>To become&nbsp;</span><span>the world’s leading energy infrastructure company</span><span>&nbsp; through a combination of pioneering technology (Ultra Grid), Exceptional Product Design and Exceptional Customer Service, creating a complete paradigm shift in transportation &amp; energy consumption globally.&nbsp;</span></h3><h3><span>Our Values</span></h3><ul><li><span><strong>Be Persistent:</strong>&nbsp;</span><span>Solving problems, no matter the size, is crucial to our mission. Success rarely comes from the first attempt, but often from persistent effort and perseverance.<strong><br></strong></span></li><li><span><strong>Be Accountable:</strong> In our fast-paced, collaborative environment, treat the company as your own. Take responsibility for improvements and mistakes alike, and communicate openly to ensure collective success.<br></span></li><li><span><strong>Customer-Centric:</strong> Always treat people as they want to be treated and remember that customers are the ultimate decision-makers.<br></span></li><li><span><strong>Dare to Dream:</strong> Technological advancements start as bold dreams believed in by persistent pioneers. Believe in your vision to bring it to life.<br></span></li><li><span><strong>Stay Hungry, Stay Foolish:</strong> Our ambition and humility drive continuous success. Learn from the market and dedicate yourself to achieving our goals.</span></li><li><span><strong>True Greatness is Blind:</strong> Great ideas and execution can come from anyone, anywhere, at any time.</span></li></ul><div><span><br></span></div><div><br></div><h2>Key Responsibilities</h2><div><span><strong>Customer Support:</strong><strong>&nbsp;</strong>Deliver exceptional customer service via phone, email, and live chat, addressing inquiries and resolving any potential issues related to Hypervolt products. Ensure each interaction upholds our high standards of customer satisfaction. <strong><br></strong></span></div><p><span><strong>Technical Troubleshooting:</strong> Conduct remote troubleshooting for technical issues, encompassing hardware, software, and connectivity problems with EV charging stations. Apply your technical skills to quickly identify and rectify issues. Efficiently diagnose and resolve Level 1 and Level 2 technical issues, ensuring timely and effective solutions. Escalate more complex cases to higher-level support when necessary, ensuring follow-through to resolution.<br></span></p><p><span><strong>Documentation:</strong> Keep detailed and accurate records of all customer interactions, technical issues, and resolutions in our support database. Ensure documentation is comprehensive and up-to-date for future reference.<br></span></p><p><span><strong>Product Knowledge:&nbsp;</strong>Stay current with Hypervolt’s products, services, and industry trends. Continuously update your knowledge to provide customers with accurate information and insightful recommendations.</span></p><p><span><strong>Collaboration:</strong> Collaborate closely with engineering and product teams to report and resolve recurring issues. Actively contribute to continuous improvement efforts by providing insights and feedback from customer interactions.</span></p><p><span><strong>Customer Education:</strong> Educate customers on the proper use and maintenance of Hypervolt products. Provide clear instructions and resources to help customers prevent future technical issues and enhance their overall user experience.</span></p><div><br></div><h3>Requirements</h3><ul><li><p><strong>Experience:</strong> Minimum of 1 year of experience in a customer support role, preferably within the EV charging or a related industry. Proven track record of diagnosing and resolving technical issues efficiently. Strong customer service skills with the ability to handle challenging situations calmly and professionally, maintaining a positive and helpful attitude under pressure.</p></li><li><p><strong>Communication:</strong> Excellent verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to explain technical concepts to non-technical users. Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a remote team environment, with a willingness to support team members and share knowledge.</p></li><li><p><strong>Problem-Solving:</strong> Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities with meticulous attention to detail. Ability to think critically and develop innovative solutions to complex issues. Flexibility to adapt to changing priorities and handle multiple tasks simultaneously, thriving in a fast-paced and dynamic work environment.</p></li></ul><div><br></div><h3>Benefits</h3><ul><li><strong>Hybrid Work:</strong> Enjoy the flexibility of working from home while supporting customers globally.</li><li><strong>Professional Growth:</strong> Opportunities for career advancement and professional development within a fast-growing company.&nbsp;</li><li><strong>Inclusive Environment:</strong> Join a diverse and inclusive team that values collaboration and innovation.&nbsp;</li><li><strong>Competitive Compensation:</strong> Attractive salary and benefits package, including performance bonuses.</li></ul></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/hypervolt-customer-support-executive">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/hypervolt-customer-support-executive</a></p>
</description>

      <title>Unitq: Product Manager</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> San Francisco, CA
</p>

<div class="content"><div class="section-wrapper page-full-width"><div class="section page-centered"><div><b>About unitQ</b></div><div>unitQ is a game-changing AI SaaS platform that empowers companies to build the world’s best products by leveraging real-time customer feedback to improve product quality and drive growth. unitQ’s leading AI technology aggregates customer feedback - in every language translated from public and private channels like surveys, reviews, support calls, product usage data, and more - to tell companies precisely what user friction, if fixed, will have the greatest impact. AI insights from unitQ drive higher conversion rates, better customer satisfaction, and more efficient use of engineering resources.</div><div><br></div><div>Our co-founders Christian Wiklund and Niklas Lindstrom have worked together for over a decade and successfully exited SKOUT, one of the first social networking dating apps with over 50 million installations globally. unitQ serves category-leading companies like Spotify, Bumble, Zendesk, PayPal, Uber, and more and is backed by leading investors including Accel, Gradient Ventures, and Zendesk Ventures. We are a group of smart, passionate leaders shaping the future of AI and are building a high-performing team.</div><div><br></div><div><b>About the Opportunity</b></div><div><span>We’re looking for a Product Manager to lead initiatives at the intersection of data analytics and AI. In this role, you’ll help define and drive roadmap priorities for systems that process, classify, and visualize large-scale user feedback using technologies like LLMs, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), and agentic </span><a class="postings-link" href="http://frameworks.You"><span>frameworks.You</span></a><span>’ll collaborate closely with engineers, designers, and go-to-market partners to ship impactful features that help companies extract value from unstructured data and improve product quality at </span><a class="postings-link" href="http://scale.This"><span>scale.This</span></a><span> is a high-impact role for someone who thrives in technical, fast-moving environments and enjoys blending data, product intuition, and user empathy.</span></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Role Responsibilities:</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>Drive the roadmap and execution for AI-powered feedback analytics as a key member of the product team</li><li>Collaborate with engineering and design to deliver insights that are tailored to the needs of different customer personas — from product managers to executives — and integrated into their workflows</li><li>Define and track key product metrics — including insight clarity, relevance for customer roles, engagement with dashboards, and overall impact on decision-making</li><li>Work cross-functionally to deliver customer value from ingestion to visualization and storytelling</li><li>Engage directly with customers — including product and support leaders at top tech companies — to gather feedback, present insights, and shape solutions</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>About you: </h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>4+ years of product management experience, ideally in B2B SaaS or AI/data-focused products</li><li>Familiarity with user engagement or behavioral analytics</li><li>Hands-on experience working with ML/AI technologies, including LLMs, RAG systems, or agentic frameworks</li><li>Working knowledge of SQL and comfort exploring data to inform decisions</li><li>Strong presentation and storytelling skills — able to clearly communicate insights to both technical teams and customer executives</li><li>Proven ability to lead cross-functional work and prioritize under ambiguity</li><li>A customer-first mindset with experience in high-touch, customer-facing roles</li><li>Experience conducting competitive analysis and market research to inform product direction and differentiation</li><div><br></div><div><b>Nice to have: </b></div><li>Shipped features that analyze unstructured data (e.g., user reviews, tickets, call transcripts)</li><li>Experience building dashboards or working with data visualization tools (e.g., Looker, Retool, Tableau)</li><li>Background in customer success, product operations, or support tooling</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Benefits: </h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>Stock Options</li><li>Flexible Vacation Policy</li><li>Medical coverage through BlueShield and Kaiser</li><li>Dental and Vision coverage through Beam</li><li>401(k) Plan</li><li>Life Insurance</li><li>FSA and Dependent Care FSA Plans</li><li>$50/month internet/cell phone/equipment reimbursement</li><li>Generous leave policies</li><li>Equinox Gym Memberships - No Equinox near you? We offer a monthly stipend instead!</li><li>Snacks and dog friendly office environment</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div>At unitQ, we believe that a diverse and inclusive team is key to building a great product. We celebrate the different cultures, perspectives, and experiences reflected across our team and will continue to build a diverse team as we grow.</div></div></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/unitq-product-manager">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/unitq-product-manager</a></p>
</description>

      <title>B12: Senior Product Designer (Remote)</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Spain, Mexico, Portugal, India
</p>

<div class="job__description body"><div><h3><strong>The role</strong></h3><br><p>We are an early-stage startup that is hiring an experienced Senior Product Designer to support our growing Product team. We are looking to bring on an individual who wants to positively impact the customer experience through the design of our products. From designing brand new product experiences to collaborating with engineers during implementation, you will be the go-to person for complex design challenges at B12.&nbsp;</p><br><h3><strong>As a Senior Product Designer, you will:</strong></h3><br><ul><br><li>Tackle complex and/or cross-team design challenges by:</li><br><ul><br><li>Thinking systematically about all elements of the customer experience.</li><br><li>Independently designing completely new product experiences.</li><br><li>Contributing to our design system.</li><br></ul><br><li>Support engineers as new designs are implemented.</li><br><ul><br><li>Providing guidance and consultation, creating additional wireframes as needed.&nbsp;</li><br><li>QAing and product reviewing your new designs as they are rolled out.</li><br></ul><br><li>Collaborate closely with Product Leadership to define the overall direction of the product.</li><br><li>Identify user needs and desires through qualitative research and quantitative insights.</li><br><li>Create user flows, wireframes, visual designs, and clickable prototypes.</li><br><li>Identify and experiment with new design tools for the team to use.</li><br></ul><br><h3><strong>You’d be a good fit if:</strong></h3><br><ul><br><li>You have 5-8 years of experience in product design.</li><br><li>You have experience as an independent contributor owning all aspects of the design process from inception to implementation.</li><br><li>You have worked effectively with cross-functional teams, including Product Management, Engineering, Marketing, Customer Success, and Sales.</li><br><li>You are attentive to detail and apply a data-driven approach to understanding what's required for great user experiences.</li><br><li>You are confident working with Figma.</li><br><li>You have experience or interest in using AI design tools.</li><br><li>You have excellent written and verbal communication skills.</li><br><li>You have a BA/BS/BFA or equivalent industry experience.</li><br><li>You have experience in web design.</li><br><li>You have experience working and collaborating with diverse teams in a high-growth environment.</li><br></ul><br><h3><strong>Don’t fear</strong></h3><br><ul><br><li>We’re somewhat flexible on the number of years of experience for this role. We highly favor talent, depth of experience, and interest.</li><br><li>Some candidates may see this list and feel discouraged because they don’t match all the items. Please apply anyway: there’s a good chance you’re more wonderful than you think you are.</li><br><li>B12 is a safe place for human beings. We particularly encourage you to apply if you identify as a woman, are a person of color or other underrepresented minority, or are a member of the LGBTQIA community.</li><br></ul><br><h3><strong>How to apply</strong></h3><br><p>Please provide:</p><br><ul><br><li>A pointer to your CV, resume, LinkedIn profile, portfolio, and any other summary of your career so far.</li><br><li>Some informal text introducing yourself and what you are excited about.</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>About B12:</strong></p><br><p>Our mission is to empower people to do meaningful work. B12’s AI-powered website builder has been used by over a million businesses and allows users to create a professional website in seconds. Our platform also provides tools for scheduling, payments, and email marketing. We’re a fully remote company, founded in 2015, and supported by investors like Breyer Capital, General Catalyst, SV Angel, and Tola Capital. Visit <a href="https://www.b12.io">https://www.b12.io</a> to learn more.</p></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/b12-senior-product-designer-remote">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/b12-senior-product-designer-remote</a></p>
</description>

      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>

      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Ottawa, ON
</p>

<div class="content"><div class="section-wrapper page-full-width"><div class="section page-centered"><div><span>Perforce is a community of collaborative experts, problem solvers, and possibility seekers who believe work should be both challenging and fun. We are proud to inspire creativity, foster belonging, support collaboration, and encourage wellness. At Perforce, you’ll work with and learn from some of the best and brightest in business. Before you know it, you’ll be in the middle of a rewarding career at a company headed in one direction: upward.&nbsp;&nbsp;</span></div><div><span> &nbsp;</span></div><div><span>With a global footprint spanning more than 80 countries and including over 75% of the Fortune 100, Perforce Software, Inc. is trusted by the world’s leading brands to deliver solutions for the toughest challenges. The best run DevOps teams in the world choose Perforce. &nbsp;</span></div><div><br></div><div><b>Position Summary:</b><span>&nbsp;</span></div><div><br></div><div><span>Perforce is searching for a Product Manager to join the Puppet team. The role will be responsible for defining the roadmap through performing research and collecting data from a series of stakeholders (internal/external). The Product Manager will connect the business outcomes, customer outcomes, strategy and technical plans via a product roadmap. Using their expertise in devops and platform automation, they must be able to articulate the necessary context and requirements for leading key, strategic capabilities in public cloud and private infrastructure.&nbsp;</span></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Requirements:</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>5+ years of experience in a product management or similar position&nbsp;</li><li>Bachelor’s degree in computer science, engineering, or a related technical field.&nbsp;&nbsp;</li><li>Excellent written and verbal communication skills. Strong proficiency in English.&nbsp;&nbsp;</li><li>The ability to gather, analyze and confidently present relevant data.&nbsp;&nbsp;</li><li>Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to make data-driven decisions.&nbsp;</li><li>Deep comfort with technical systems.&nbsp;&nbsp;</li><li>The ability to work cross-functionally as a team member and influencer.&nbsp;&nbsp;</li><li>Proven track record of successfully managing products in cloud infrastructure/DevOps space or AI based products&nbsp;</li><li>In-depth knowledge of tools and technologies like Terraform, Puppet, Kubernetes, EKS/GKE, Git, and Pulumi.&nbsp;</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Responsibilities:</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define new product enhancements ensuringalignment with customer needs, business objectives and market opportunities&nbsp;</li><li>Conduct market research and competitor analysis and gather customer feedback to informproduct decisions and prioritize features.&nbsp;</li><li>Define and refine product requirements, user stories, and acceptance criteria, focusing on technical accuracy and feasibility.&nbsp;</li><li>Work closely with engineering teams to ensure alignment between product goals and technical implementation, guiding architecture and technology choices.&nbsp;</li><li>Drive the adoption of best practices in infrastructure automation, cloud infrastructure automation, and DevOps methodologies.&nbsp;</li><li>Monitor product performance, analyze key metrics, and iterate on features to continuously improve product value and user satisfaction.&nbsp;</li><li>Stay abreast of industry trends and competitive landscape to inform product strategy&nbsp;</li><li>May be required to support additional products/brands as needed.&nbsp;</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><b><span>Come work with us! Our team members are valued for their contributions, introduced to new opportunities, and rewarded well</span></b><span>. Perforce combines the experience and rewards of a start-up with the security of an established and privately held profitable company.</span></div><div><span>&nbsp;</span></div><div><span>If you are passionate about the technology that impacts our day-to-day lives and want to work with talented and dedicated people across the globe, apply today!</span></div><div><span>&nbsp;</span></div><div><b><a href="http://www.perforce.com/"><span>www.perforce.com</span></a></b></div><div><br></div><div><b>Please click here for: </b><b><a href="https://www.perforce.com/equal-opportunity-employer-statement">EOE &amp; Belonging Statements | Perforce Software</a></b></div><div><br></div></div></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/perforce-product-manager">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/perforce-product-manager</a></p>
</description>

      <title>Hrtx: DevOps Engineer</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> NCR Philippines
</p>

<h3>Job brief</h3> <p>We are looking for a <strong>DevOps Engineer</strong> to join an international team supporting large-scale digital engineering initiatives. The role focuses on developing, maintaining, and improving CI/CD pipelines and infrastructure to support modern software applications across web, cloud, and embedded platforms. You'll be working in a dynamic environment that applies <strong>Scaled Agile (SAFe)</strong> methodologies and drives digital transformation globally.</p> <h3>Responsibilities</h3> <p></p><ul><li>Develop, enhance, and maintain automated <strong>CI/CD pipelines</strong> to support reliable and efficient software delivery.</li><li><span>Manage build and release processes across multiple platforms including desktop, cloud, and mobile.</span></li><li><span></span><span>Collaborate with developers, QA engineers, and infrastructure teams to ensure seamless deployment and system integration.</span></li><li><span></span><span>Assist in the selection, integration, and use of DevOps tools (e.g., source control, test automation, deployment frameworks).</span></li><li><span></span><span>Support packaging, containerization, and versioning strategies for internal and external software releases.</span></li><li><span></span><span>Identify areas for improvement and drive automation efforts across development operations.</span></li><li><span></span><span>Participate in agile planning, sprint reviews, and backlog refinement to align DevOps goals with product delivery.</span></li></ul> <p><span><br></span></p> <p><span>Requirements</span></p><li>Bachelors degree in <strong>Computer Science</strong>, <strong>Engineering</strong>, or related field.</li><li>Minimum <strong>2 years of experience</strong><span> in a DevOps or similar systems engineering role.</span></li><li><span></span>Hands-on experience with tools such as <strong>Git</strong><span>, </span><strong>Jenkins</strong><span>, </span><strong>Docker</strong><span>, </span><strong>TFS/Azure DevOps</strong><span>, or </span><strong>Ansible</strong><span>.</span></li><li><span></span>Strong scripting knowledge using <strong>PowerShell</strong><span>, </span><strong>Python</strong><span>, </span><strong>Bash</strong><span>, or other relevant languages.</span></li><li><span></span>Familiarity with <strong>Windows and Linux</strong><span> environments and basic networking concepts.</span></li><li><span></span>Strong problem-solving skills and attention to operational excellence.</li><li>Effective communicator across technical and non-technical stakeholders.</li> <p></p><h3><strong>Nice to Have:</strong></h3> <ul> <li> <p>Exposure to modern frameworks and technologies such as <strong>.NET Core</strong>, <strong>React</strong>, <strong>Angular</strong>, <strong>REST APIs</strong>, <strong>Xamarin</strong>, or <strong>TypeScript</strong>.</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience with <strong>container orchestration</strong> and <strong>infrastructure automation</strong> tools.</p> </li> <li> <p>Familiarity with using <strong>AI-assisted coding tools</strong> like GitHub Copilot.</p> </li> <li> <p>Background in Agile development environments, particularly <strong>Scrum</strong> or <strong>SAFe</strong>.</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience supporting <strong>multi-platform development teams</strong> or large-scale enterprise applications.</p></li></ul><h3><strong>Why Join Us?</strong></h3> <ul> <li> <p>Be part of a globally integrated team driving innovation in automation and software systems.</p> </li> <li> <p>Work in a supportive, inclusive, and innovation-driven culture.</p> </li> <li> <p>Access to professional development and training opportunities.</p> </li> <li> <p>Flexible work arrangements and a comprehensive wellness benefits package.</p></li></ul> <p><span><br></span></p>

      <title>Direct Sourcing Solutions: DevOps Engineer</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> 
</p>

<p><span><span>This role is only open for candidates that are legally allowed to work within the Philippines</span></span></p><br><p><span><br></span><br></p><br><p><span>As a pivotal member of the engineering team, you will design, build, and maintain scalable, secure, and highly automated AWS cloud infrastructure that supports our AI-powered content management and life sciences documentation platform. Your team will lead the development and optimization of CI/CD pipelines, implement Infrastructure as Code (IaC) practices, and collaborate closely with data scientists and software engineers to operationalize machine learning models and AI workloads. Your work will directly enable rapid, reliable software and AI model deployments, ensuring high availability, security, and compliance in a regulated environment. You will drive automation and infrastructure scalability to support company’s evolving AI and MLOps capabilities.</span></p><br><p><br><br></p><br><p><br><br></p><br><p><span>Responsibilities</span></p><br><ul><br><li>AWS Cloud Infrastructure: Architect, deploy, and manage secure, scalable cloud infrastructure using AWS services such as EC2, Lambda, S3, DynamoDB, CloudFormation, CDK, EKS, and ECS.</li><br><li>Infrastructure as Code: Develop and maintain IaC templates and scripts using AWS CloudFormation, AWS CDK, Terraform, or similar tools to automate provisioning and configuration, ensuring reproducibility and consistency across environments.</li><br><li>CI/CD Pipeline Development: Design, implement, and optimize automated CI/CD pipelines using GitLab CI/CD to enable continuous integration, testing, and deployment of both software and AI/ML models.</li><br><li>AI Platforms and MLOps: Collaborate with data scientists and ML engineers to deploy, monitor, and maintain machine learning models in production. Build and automate end-to-end ML pipelines, including model training, evaluation, versioning, and deployment using tools such as AWS SageMaker.</li><br><li>Monitoring and Observability: Implement comprehensive monitoring, logging, and alerting solutions using AWS CloudWatch and New Relic to ensure system health, performance, and security. Proactively detect and resolve issues impacting AI workloads and infrastructure.</li><br><li>Security and Compliance: Integrate security best practices into all stages of the infrastructure and deployment lifecycle. Manage secrets, enforce access controls, and embed compliance checks into CI/CD pipelines to meet regulatory requirements in the life sciences domain.</li><br><li>Automation and Optimization: Continuously identify manual processes and bottlenecks to automate using scripting languages (Python, Bash, PowerShell) and AI-driven automation tools, improving efficiency, reliability, and scalability.</li><br><li>Collaboration: Work cross-functionality with software engineers, data scientists, and product teams to align infrastructure and deployment strategies with business goals and AI innovation.</li><br></ul><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p><span>Requirements &amp; Qualifications:</span></p><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><ul><br><li>Strong expertise in AWS cloud services: EC2, Lambda, S3, DynamoDB, EKS, ECS, CloudFormation, CDK, IAM, CloudWatch.</li><br><li>Proficiency in Infrastructure as Code tools such as AWS CloudFormation, AWS CDK, Terraform.</li><br><li>Experience building and maintaining CI/CD pipelines with, GitLab CI/CD, AWS CodePipeline, or GitHub Actions.</li><br><li>Hands-on experience with AI/ML deployment and MLOps tools like MLflow, Kubeflow, AWS SageMaker.</li><br><li>Strong scripting skills in Python, Bash, PowerShell, or similar languages for automation.</li><br><li>Knowledge of monitoring and observability tools such as New Relic or AWS CloudWatch.</li><br><li>Solid understanding of networking, security best practices, and compliance requirements in cloud environments.</li><br><li>Excellent communication skills to collaborate effectively across technical and non-technical teams.</li><br><li>Strong problem-solving mindset with a passion for automation and continuous improvement.</li><br><li>Adaptability to fast-paced, evolving environments with a focus on innovation.</li><br><li>Team-oriented approach with a willingness to participate in on-call rotations for production support.</li><br></ul><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p><span>Nice To Have Certifications:</span></p><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><ul><br><li>AWS Certified DevOps Engineer – Professional</li><br><li>AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Associate or Professional</li><br><li>AWS Certified Machine Learning – Specialty</li><br><li>AWS Certified Security - Specialty</li><br></ul>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/direct-sourcing-solutions-devops-engineer">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/direct-sourcing-solutions-devops-engineer</a></p>
</description>

      <title>World Data Lab: DevOps Engineer (m/f/d)</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote
</p>

World Data Lab (WDL) Tech team is building next-generation data analytics platforms for private sector clients, while also delivering data-driven solutions for sustainable development goals (SDGs). Our engineering team consists of skilled frontend and backend developers, data engineer, and QA specialist, all collaborating across borders to build resilient, scalable, and innovative data products. We work at the intersection of cloud infrastructure, software engineering, and data science - creating products that empower organizations to make high-impact, data-informed decisions.<br>As our technical landscape grows in complexity and scale, we’re seeking someone who can take ownership of our DevOps function - driving improvements, increasing system reliability, and embedding observability across our infrastructure.We’re looking for a&nbsp;<strong>DevOps Engineer</strong> who will play a leading role in designing, maintaining, and improving our infrastructure. This is a hands-on position where you’ll be responsible for enabling fast, reliable software delivery and platform performance through automation, observability, and operational excellence.<br>You’ll work closely with software engineers, data engineers, and product team to ensure that our development processes are scalable, secure, and consistent. This role is ideal for someone who is eager to shape our DevOps practices, proactively identify areas for improvement, and lead infrastructure initiatives across multiple projects.<ul><li>Implement and maintain CI/CD pipelines;</li><li>Actively manage and monitor all Cloud (AWS) instances and services;</li><li>Build and manage the&nbsp;AWS&nbsp;server infrastructure (including using kubernetes);</li><li>Implement and maintain a monitoring/metrics/logging platform for all WDL projects;&nbsp;</li><li>Working on ways to automate and improve development and release processes;</li><li>Working with software engineers to ensure that development follows established processes and works as intended;</li><li>Planning projects and being involved in project management decisions.</li><li>Working with Data Engineers and Data Scientist on verifying and releasing data updates to our Data Products.</li></ul><ul><li>2+ years of professional experience as a DevOps Engineer<em>&nbsp;</em>;</li><li>Knowledge and experience in working with&nbsp;<strong>AWS</strong>, Github (actions),&nbsp;<strong>Kubernetes</strong>, and Relational DBS (<strong>PostgreSQL</strong>, ClickHouse)&nbsp;required;&nbsp;</li><li>Knowledge and experience in working with Java(Spring)&nbsp;and Python is&nbsp;an&nbsp;advantage;&nbsp;</li><li>Experience in working with&nbsp;Jira, Observability frameworks (ie Grafana) is considered an advantage;</li><li>Hands-on mentality;</li><li>Ability to work with a broad range of technical areas and leverage skill-sets within and across different teams;</li><li>Strong knowledge of agile development processes and current best practices;</li><li>Capacity to guide the development of complex projects that involve data scientists, product owners, and designers.&nbsp;Exposure to tools like&nbsp;<strong>Terraform/Terragrunt</strong>, <strong>CloudWatch</strong>, and <strong>Cloudflare</strong></li><li>Familiarity with <strong>Redis</strong>, <strong>Amazon SQS</strong>, and&nbsp;<strong>AWS Cognito</strong></li><li>A habit of writing clear <strong>technical documentation</strong></li></ul><ul><li>State-of-the-art equipment and tools that help you to perform at your best</li><li>The opportunity to have an impact in a fast-growing and well-established big data SaaS scale-up</li><li>Flexible working hours with high acceptance of home office</li><li>Be part of a team of highly motivated and like-minded individuals</li><li>Great individual development- and growth opportunities</li></ul><ul><li><strong>Initial Screening:&nbsp;</strong>A quick chat with our People &amp; Culture Manager to understand your background and expectations.</li><li><strong>1st Interview:</strong> Meet the hiring manager and showcase your real people skills.</li><li><strong>2nd Interview:</strong> Meet with the team and get to know our working culture personally.&nbsp;</li><li><strong>Final Steps:&nbsp;</strong>Receive feedback and, if successful, an offer!</li></ul>We keep it simple and aim to wrap up the process within 3 weeks.<br>&nbsp;&nbsp;<br>We encourage you to apply even if you only meet most of the requirements (but not 100% of the listed criteria) – we believe skills evolve over time. If you’re willing to learn and grow with us, we invite you to join our team

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/world-data-lab-devops-engineer-m-f-d">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/world-data-lab-devops-engineer-m-f-d</a></p>
</description>

of robust and scalable backend applications.</li><li>Design, implement and consume RESTful APIs for communication between frontend, backend and other services.</li><li>Gain experience in using Cassandra or Redis, depending on project requirements.</li><li>Get involved in projects using agile methodologies such as Scrum, participating in agile development practices.</li><li>Become familiar acquire new skills and technologies as project needs change.</li></ul><ul><li>At least 2 years experience in frontend framework (Vuejs, React, Angularjs or similar).</li><li>At least 2 years     <item>
      <title>Amiqus: Product Manager</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote - UK,Clockwise Edinburgh
</p>

<p>Amiqus is the UK’s most trusted compliance and onboarding platform, enabling simple, fast and secure access to products and services online. Whether moving home, changing jobs or looking for professional help, our software makes it easy for everyone involved.</p><br><p>We’re trusted by Governments, NHS, Banks and 600+ regulated organisations across sectors in the UK to help people get to work on the things that matter, faster.</p><br><p>Why should you join us?</p><ul><li><p>We’re one of the UK’s 50 fastest growing tech companies, ranked by Deloitte Fast50 and part of Tech Nation’s Future Fifty 2024 cohort.&nbsp;</p></li><li><p>We’re scaling sustainably, backed by external investment on a 10x plan tracking from £5m ARR, with expectations to exceed £50m ARR within four years.</p></li><li><p>Join a purpose driven, ambitious team of 75+ as we 10x our impact.</p></li></ul><ul><li><p>Salary £80,000 base plus share options</p></li><li><p>Vitality private health cover &amp; insurance benefits&nbsp;</p></li><li><p>34 days annual leave</p></li><li><p>Enhanced pension contribution&nbsp;</p></li><li><p>12 paid personal development days annually with dedicated budget</p></li><li><p>Hybrid working valuing outcomes over in-person hours</p></li><li><p>Enhanced family leave&nbsp;</p></li></ul><p>At Amiqus, Product Managers sit at the intersection of product potential and business needs, balancing short and long term efforts, and working across all disciplines to ensure the value and viability of everything we build. This role will see you leading a team of up to 10 people in a cross functional capacity, with responsibility for driving performance through new features, enhancements, and creative solutions.&nbsp;</p><p>You will be working on our data subject account product, implementing our plans for an innovative digital identity wallet and service marketplace. Prior experience in mobile products, digital identity, wallets or marketplaces would be beneficial.</p><p>We’re looking for someone who has significant experience in product lifecycle management and working in an agile environment; strong organisational, leadership and communication skills; and problem-solving skills with a creative approach.&nbsp;</p><p>We’re hoping whoever comes into this role can direct product development to ensure maximum return on investment (RoI.) They will be able to identify good ideas, translate ideas into strategy and features, and deliver features by following product development from start to finish.</p><br><ul><li><p>End to end ownership of the roadmap and product delivery for one or more core Amiqus products</p></li><li><p>Execute product strategies consistent with company vision and overall corporate strategy</p></li><li><p>Collaborate with senior management to create and maintain high level product roadmaps and prioritised backlogs, aligned for high RoI</p></li><li><p>Engage and inspire cross-functional product teams around the vision, roadmap and backlog</p></li><li><p>Incorporate feedback and input from users, partners, stakeholders and in-house teams and find ways to expand product market reach</p></li><li><p>Quality assure product releases, ensuring all releases are compliant, secure, and meet the needs of users</p></li><li><p>Define and track metrics for success, including commercial benefits</p></li><li><p>Work across stakeholders, users and partners to facilitate continuous improvements that support our clients to love our products</p></li><li><p>Prepare recommendations, based on data and analysis, to expand product base and to create additional value</p></li><li><p>Work cross-functionally to continuously improve the development process so that it is optimised for velocity, impact and quality</p></li></ul><ul><li><p>Extensive experience in a similar role with product management/ownership within a B2B, fast growing SaaS environment</p></li><li><p>Experience with products aligned to marketplace, mobile and/or wallet features&nbsp;</p></li><li><p>Strategic ownership; demonstrating excellent collaboration and communication skills with the ability to build buy-in from across a range of cross-functional teams to your product strategies/ the corporate strategy</p></li><li><p>Adaptability; demonstrating the ability to work within constraints and turn them into opportunities, adapting the approach if required and taking others with you</p></li><li><p>Commercial and financial ownership, demonstrating an understanding of the marketplace and alignment to business cases/ benefit realisation</p></li><li><p>Stakeholder Management; demonstrating an ability to effectively manage multiple stakeholders, including users and also internal stakeholders across all different levels and teams up to board level&nbsp;</p></li><li><p>People management skills would be highly desirable, perhaps previously managing a small to medium sized team</p></li><li><p>Experience in an agile environment, including coaching others in user-led approaches&nbsp;</p></li><li><p>Problem management; demonstrating an ability to anticipate problems and respond to them in a strategic way, taking into account the bigger picture</p></li><li><p>User focus; puts clients and users first to make sure our service is second to none</p></li><li><p>We’re looking for someone who has the ability and drive to come in, hit the ground running and make a positive impact to our product, &nbsp;team and wider company.</p></li></ul><strong><br></strong><p><strong>Who are you?</strong><br><br>We’re looking for someone specific to fullfil this role as it forms a crucial part of our Wallet team. Ideally, you are:</p><ul><li><p>Forward thinking, with an ability to see the bigger picture when it comes to innovative products</p></li><li><p>People focused, as this role will be indirectly managing 10 people, not as direct reports but from a team success point of view</p></li><li><p>Good at &nbsp;taking technical/complicated problems and making them make sense to non-product people</p></li><li><p>A team player and like to listen to everyone’s ideas with a good way of providing feedback&nbsp;</p></li><li><p>Particularly skilled in managing stakeholders, specifically those at exec level</p></li><li><p>A generally good person, with good intentions and motivated to do good work<br><br></p></li></ul><p>We think it’s important to have an open and transparent interview process so that you have a clear understanding of what to expect. The process might vary slightly depending on the role type or team you apply to join but it usually goes as follows:</p><ul><li><p>Internal review of applications</p></li><li><p>An initial chat about the role with a member of our People Experience team</p></li><li><p>A more structured interview with our Senior product manager and one other team member</p></li><li><p>An informal chat with some other team members about the opportunity OR a task based interview with clear direction given</p></li><li><p>Role offer</p></li><li><p>Onboarding welcome and process kick off with support across the team</p></li></ul><p>We think it’s important to have an open and transparent interview process so that you have a clear understanding of what to expect. The process might vary slightly depending on the role type or team you apply to join but it usually goes as follows:</p><ul><li><p>Internal review of applications</p></li><li><p>An initial chat about the role with a member of our People Experience team</p></li><li><p>A more structured interview with our Senior product manager and one other team member</p></li><li><p>An informal chat with some other team members about the opportunity OR a task based interview with clear direction given</p></li><li><p>Role offer</p></li><li><p>Onboarding welcome and process kick off with support across the team</p></li></ul>work@amiqus.co

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/amiqus-product-manager">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/amiqus-product-manager</a></p>
</description>

Our client is large global Consultancy who work with enterprise clients, solving their business and technology problems using cutting edge Solutions.</p> <p>Responsibilities:</p> <ul> <li>Engaging with relevant parties to gather requirements, communicate updates, and collaborate with leadership.</li><li>Deploying and maintaining robust, scalable services and applications for both public facing and internal use.</li><li>Managing and implementing continuous delivery practices across cloud platforms, with a focus on Azure environments.</li><li>Providing insights to project teams regarding platform performance and functionality.</li><li>Offering guidance to development teams on system usage and CI/CD pipeline configuration.</li><li>Enhancing and automating development and release workflows to improve efficiency.</li></ul> <p>Key skills and experience:</p> <ul> <li>Strong DevOps experience</li><li>Experience working for another IT Consulting organisation</li><li>Beneficial to have worked within the Government or Public Sector</li><li>Must be either SC cleared or eligible</li><li>Experience working within cloud environments, ideally Azure</li></ul> <p>If this role sounds of interest, then please apply with your updated CV.</p> </div></div>
