      <title>Altium: Senior Product Marketing Manager</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> United States
</p>

<div class="job__description body"><div><h4><strong></strong></h4><br><h4>&nbsp;</h4><br><h4>&nbsp;</h4><br><h4><strong>️ Why Altium?</strong></h4><br><p><span>Altium is transforming the way electronics are designed and built. From startups to world’s technology giants, </span><span>our digital platforms give more power to PCB designers, supply chain, and manufacturing, letting them collaborate as never before.</span></p><br><ul><br><li><span>Constant innovation has created a transformative technology, unique in its space</span></li><br><li><span>More than 30,000 companies and 100,000 electronics engineers worldwide use Altium</span></li><br><li><span>We are growing, debt-free, and financially strong, with the resources to become #1 in the EDA industry</span><span> </span></li><br></ul></div><div><h4><strong>About the role:&nbsp;</strong></h4><br><p>Play a key role in transforming the future of electronics development!&nbsp;Altium Limited, part of the Renesas Group, is a global leader in software and solutions for the electronics industry that is accelerating the pace of innovation. Altium is fundamentally shaping the digital transformation of electronics product development, empowering global organizations to connect people, tools, and processes across every stage of the lifecycle.&nbsp;</p><br><p>As we expand our impact across the entire electronics industry, we're looking for Senior Product Marketing Managers who can help us define and amplify our story while shaping the future of our products. This role is ideal for those who can both craft compelling narratives and influence product direction through market insights, understanding of customer pain and needs, and technical depth.</p><br><h4><strong>&nbsp;A day in the life of our</strong><strong> Senior Product Marketing Manager</strong><strong>:&nbsp;</strong></h4><br><p>As a<strong> </strong>Senior Product Marketing Manager, you’ll play a cross-functional role in defining and communicating the value of Altium’s portfolio.&nbsp; You’ll work across teams including Product and Sales to ensure that our products not only solve real customer problems but are positioned for maximum market impact.</p><br><h4><strong>Storytelling &amp; Narrative Development</strong></h4><br><ul><br><li>Craft compelling narratives that translate complex product capabilities into customer value—tailored to different personas, industries, and stages of digital maturity</li><br><li>Define and evolve core messaging, positioning, and go-to-market strategies for our solutions</li><br><li>Lead the creation of customer-facing content (presentations, videos, website copy, solution briefs, competitive battlecards, etc.) that supports awareness, adoption, and demand generation</li><br><li>Partner with Brand and Content teams to deliver high-impact campaigns and launches</li><br></ul><br><h4><strong>Product Influence &amp; Roadmap Alignment</strong></h4><br><ul><br><li>Act as the voice of the customer—bringing market insights, competitive intelligence, and buyer feedback into the product development process</li><br><li>Work closely with Product Management to influence priorities and roadmap decisions based on strategic market opportunities</li><br><li>Define use-case driven value propositions, tiered offerings, and product packaging strategies</li><br></ul><br><h4><strong>Cross-Functional Leadership</strong></h4><br><ul><br><li>Collaborate with Sales Enablement to develop materials that empower the field (playbooks, objection handling, solution sheets, etc.)</li><br><li>Support customer and partner engagements, including early access programs, advisory boards, and events</li><br><li>Represent product marketing in internal planning and executive discussions</li><br></ul><br><h4><strong>Who We’re Looking For:</strong></h4><br><ul><br><li><strong>7+ years</strong> in B2B product marketing, preferably in the electronics, semiconductors, or embedded systems industries</li><br><li>Proven experience&nbsp;<strong>driving product narratives</strong>, crafting differentiated positioning, and building content that connects technical depth with business value</li><br><li>Strong background in&nbsp;<strong>influencing product strategy</strong>, ideally with prior exposure to roadmap planning or product management</li><br><li>Excellent written and verbal communication skills—able to articulate complex ideas in a clear, confident, and persuasive way</li><br><li>Experience working in&nbsp;<strong>cloud-based platforms </strong>in the electronics space</li><br><li>Bachelor's degree in engineering, business, or a related technical field; advanced degrees or MBA are a plus</li><br></ul><br><p><em><span>The salary range for this role is $163,647.00 - $191,272.00.</span></em><em><span>&nbsp;Actual compensation packages within this range are based on a wide array of factors unique to each candidate and role requirements, including but not limited to skill set, years and depth of experience, certifications, and specific location.</span></em></p><br><p><strong>Our Benefits</strong></p><br><ul><br><li> Healthcare coverage&nbsp;</li><br><li> Prescription drug, vision, and dental plans</li><br><li> HSA and FSA accounts</li><br><li>️ Life and AD&amp;D insurance; disability coverage where applicable&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</li><br><li> Retirement 401(k) Plan Option with Altium match</li><br><li> Calm App and Employee Assistance Program&nbsp;</li><br><li> Paid holidays plus a “Choice Day” off per quarter&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</li><br><li>️ Paid time-off rising schedule upon key milestones</li><br><li> Sick time for Dr. appointments or family health needs</li><br><li> Family medical, maternity, paternity, and military leave</li><br><li> Flexible working arrangements available based on role and location</li><br><li> Home internet allowance</li><br><li> Free lunch, snacks and drinks every day in office</li><br><li><em> Free parking</em></li><br></ul><br><p>&nbsp;</p></div><div><h4><strong> What Matters to Us</strong></h4><br><ul><br><li><strong>Big-thinking </strong><em>in pursuit of purpose</em></li><br><li><strong>Diversity </strong><em>of thought</em></li><br><li><strong>Courage</strong><em> of conviction</em></li><br><li><strong>Transparency</strong><em> of intent</em></li><br><li><strong>Ingenuity</strong><em> of AND</em></li><br><li><strong>Agility</strong><em> in action</em></li><br><li><strong>Adaptability</strong><em> of approach</em></li><br><li><strong>Grit</strong><em> in pursuit of mission</em></li><br></ul><br><h4><strong> Also, we would like you to know</strong></h4><br><h4><span>We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender, gender identity or expression, or veteran status. We are proud to be an equal opportunity workplace.</span></h4><br><p><strong> Learn more about why a career at Altium is an opportunity like no other:</strong><strong> </strong><a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cAYCOLpPLPE"><span></span></a><a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cAYCOLpPLPE">https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cAYCOLpPLPE</a>&nbsp;</p><br><p><strong>️ Altium Benefits</strong><strong>: </strong><a href="https://careers.altium.com/#s-benefits"><span>https://careers.altium.com/#s-benefits</span></a><span>&nbsp;</span></p><br><p><strong> Are you already an Altium employee?&nbsp;</strong>Please apply directly through our <a href="https://www.greenhouse.com/">internal Greenhouse job board.</a> If you have questions, please contact HR.</p></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/altium-senior-product-marketing-manager-1">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/altium-senior-product-marketing-manager-1</a></p>

    <item>
      <title>Glean: Product Management Lead</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Palo Alto, CA
</p>

<div class="job__description body"><div><div class="section page-centered"><br><div><br><div><strong>About Glean</strong></div><br><div><br><p>We’re on a mission to make knowledge work faster and more humane. We believe that AI will fundamentally transform how people work. In the future, everyone will work in tandem with expert AI assistants who find knowledge, create and synthesize information, and execute work. These assistants will free people up to focus on the higher-level, creative aspects of their work.</p><br>We’re building a system of intelligence for every company in the world. On the surface, you can think of it as Google + ChatGPT for the enterprise. Under the hood, our platform is the connective tissue between AI and knowledge. It brings all of a company’s knowledge together, understands it at a deep level, provides industry-leading search relevance over it, and connects it to generative AI agents and applications.<br><br><p><a href="https://glean.com/">Glean</a> was founded by a seasoned team of former Google search and Facebook engineers who saw a need in the enterprise space for their technical depth and passion for AI. We’re a diverse team of curious and creative people who want to help each other get big things done—so we can help other teams do the same.&nbsp;</p><br>We're backed by some of the Valley's leading venture capitalists—including Sequoia, Kleiner Perkins, Lightspeed, and General Catalyst—and have assembled a world-class team with senior leadership experience at Google, Slack, Facebook, Dropbox, Rubrik, Uber, Intercom, Pinterest, Palantir, and others.</div><br><div>&nbsp;</div><br></div><br><div><strong>Role</strong></div><br><div><br><p>As a PM Lead, you’ll be responsible for product strategy and execution at Glean while managing and growing a team of product managers. You’ll deliver best-in-class products for finding, curating, sharing, discovering, and managing knowledge. We’ve only taken the first step towards our long-term vision of an intelligent work assistant, and we need great product leaders to take us the rest of the way.&nbsp;<br><br>We’re currently a very lean product team, so you’ll have an outsized role in shaping both the product roadmap and the product team itself. You’ll collaborate closely with our stellar Design, Engineering, Sales, Marketing, and Success partners to understand our customers and build category-defining tools. You’ll wear many hats and gain both breadth and depth of experience.</p><br><p><strong>What you will do and achieve:</strong></p><br></div><br></div><br><div class="section page-centered"><br><ul><br><li>Spending a lot of time with our customers to deeply understand their knowledge needs</li><br><li>Developing key parts of our product roadmap, marrying customers’ needs with our product vision</li><br><li>Empowering your team by giving context, setting direction, and building alignment</li><br><li>Driving customer-focused decisions, clear prioritization, and efficient execution</li><br><li>Coordinating cross-functionally with with leadership, go-to-market teams, and other key stakeholders across the company</li><br><li>Building processes that will scale as our team and company go through rapid growth</li><br></ul><br></div><br><div class="section page-centered"><br><h4>Who you are:</h4><br><ul><br><li>You have 10+ years of experience in product management at SaaS companies, primarily serving large enterprises with responsibilities spanning customer-facing surfaces and features as well as internal capabilities and services. Experience working on collaboration, productivity, or ML/ranking tools is a plus.</li><br><li>You have a strong technical background and excel at analytical thinking.</li><br><li>You are an excellent written and verbal communicator.</li><br><li>You have a proven track record of taking ownership, taking initiative, and delivering results.</li><br><li>You collaborate effectively with cross-functional partners.</li><br><li>You have a learning and growth mindset.</li><br><li>You are mission-first and understand that your success is measured by your product and team’s success.</li><br><li>You are an early adopter in building with or adopting AI for your own product craft and you are excited about helping customers accelerate their own AI adoption journey.</li><br></ul><br></div><br><div class="section page-centered"><br><p><strong>Benefits</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Competitive compensation</li><br><li>Medical, Vision and Dental coverage</li><br><li>Flexible work environment and time-off policy</li><br><li>401k</li><br><li>Company events</li><br><li>A home office improvement stipend when you first join</li><br><li>Annual education stipend</li><br><li>Wellness stipend</li><br><li>Healthy lunches and dinners provided daily</li><br></ul><br><p><span>For California based applicants:&nbsp;</span></p><br><p><span>The standard base salary range for this position is $210,000 - $240,000 annually. </span><em><span>Compensation offered will be determined by factors such as location, level, job-related knowledge, skills, and experience. Certain roles may be eligible for variable compensation, equity, and benefits.</span></em></p><br><div>We are a diverse bunch of people and we want to continue to attract and retain a diverse range of people into our organization. We're committed to an inclusive and diverse company. We do not discriminate based on gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, religion, civil or family status, age, disability, or race.</div><br></div></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/glean-product-management-lead">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/glean-product-management-lead</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Mytime: Product Manager</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> 5792 W Jefferson Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90016, USA
</p>

<div><div><p class="googlejobs-paragraph--empty"></p><h2 class="title">Company Description</h2></div><div class="wysiwyg"><p>MyTime is a fully integrated scheduling, payments, and automated marketing platform, specializing in large multi-location chains and franchises. Our mission critical software -- which includes in-store scheduling and online booking, client record management, email and SMS marketing, and a full point of sale for handling payments -- is used in every aspect of the customer journey. Our customers rely on their service businesses to remain competitive in the age of Amazon, and they need a next generation POS to help them achieve this growth. We aspire to be the AI-driven cloud based “operating system” of their business.</p><p>We also made it easy to plug our online booking, payments and messaging capabilities into the places customers are found today, including Google Search, Facebook, Instagram, and the merchants’ own websites and mobile apps. Upon adopting MyTime, our customers see average revenue growth of up to 30% through improved operational efficiency, greater customer retention, and access to new customer acquisition channels.</p><p>Our product is used at over 14,000 locations across the globe, ranging from single-location sole proprietors to multi-billion dollar Fortune 500 chains. As a completely cloud-based solution, MyTime is designed for quick and easy deployments. It’s lauded for its ease-of-use and short ramp-up time, having won numerous awards such as the Best Commerce Product of 2017 from the Local Search Association.</p><p>MyTime is backed by Upfront Ventures and Khosla Ventures and was founded by Ethan Anderson, a successful serial entrepreneur whose first startup, Redbeacon, won TechCrunch50 in 2009 and was acquired by The Home Depot.</p><p>Come help us realize our vision of becoming the world’s leading online scheduling and local commerce platform!</p></div><div><p class="googlejobs-paragraph--empty"></p><h2 class="title">Job Description</h2></div><div class="wysiwyg"><p>MyTime is, at its heart, a product-driven organization because it delivers the most critical functions that allow a business to run from scheduling appointments to customer engagement to handling in-store and online payment processing. You will need to take full ownership of the development of specific areas of the product from strategy to execution.</p><p>You will be responsible for gathering and documenting customer requirements and translating them into stories for our design and development teams. From there, you’ll be expected to guide UX/UI design, define test cases, establish acceptance criteria, and work with the engineering&nbsp;team to ensure timely, defect-free launches. Finally, you’ll work closely with your peers in Product Marketing, Sales, and Customer Success to ensure customers are aware of upcoming changes to the product so as to minimize disruption to their day-to-day operations.</p><p>• Collaborating closely with cross-functional teams to design and deliver new product capabilities that leverage Gen AI and LLM technologies to create transformative experiences.</p><p>• Defining detailed functional and technical requirements for new features and product enhancements.</p><p>• Building and managing multi-release roadmaps, ensuring alignment with strategic business goals and user needs.</p><p>• Partnering with UX/UI teams to create user-friendly, intuitive experiences that drive high engagement and measurable impact.</p><p>• Driving the end-to-end product lifecycle, from ideation to launch, and managing Epics &amp; Stories to ensure smooth execution.</p><p>• Working closely with customer success, training, and support teams to ensure they are equipped with the knowledge to drive adoption and provide exceptional customer experiences.</p><p>• Analyzing product performance and customer feedback to continuously refine and improve the product.</p><p>• Using data analytics to make informed decisions, measure the effectiveness of AI-powered features, and drive future product improvements.</p><p>• Find a path to get things done despite roadblocks to get your work into the hands of users quickly and iteratively.</p><p>• Enjoy working in a fast-paced, design-driven, product development cycle.</p><p>&nbsp;</p><p>This role will report into the VP of Product Management and will be fully remote.</p></div><div><p class="googlejobs-paragraph--empty"></p><h2 class="title">Qualifications</h2></div><div class="wysiwyg"><ul><li>5+ years of B2B software product development / product management experience with a track record of launching successful features and managing them over multiple releases; Startup and SaaS experience preferred.</li><li>Evidence of a highly process driven and detail oriented approach with the ability to organize and document requirements in an understandable and actionable way.</li><li>Proven ability to work with a fast-paced, agile-driven engineering team, based on mutual trust, credibility, and respect.</li><li>Self-motivator with outstanding verbal and written communication skills.</li><li>Bachelors in Computer Science or Management Information Systems&nbsp;preferred.</li></ul></div><div><p class="googlejobs-paragraph--empty"></p><h2 class="title">Additional Information</h2></div><div class="wysiwyg"><p>MyTime is a fully remote company. The teams meet virtually throughout the day to collaborate.&nbsp; We provide&nbsp;a competitive base salary, performance bonus, startup equity, and healthcare benefits.&nbsp; We offer a transparent and exciting startup culture that is singularly focused on empowering people to make an impact in their jobs. We’re growing fast and solving a big problem, providing our employees the opportunity to make the tremendous impact that leads to true professional fulfilment. If you're interested, we'd love to talk!</p></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/mytime-product-manager">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/mytime-product-manager</a></p>
</description>

<span><div>Java Full Stack Developer <br></div><div><br></div><div>Client Project<br></div><div><br></div><div>Remote<br></div><div><br></div><div>Permanent Hiring<br></div><div><br></div><div>5+<br></div><div><br></div><div>Java, Angular, AWSJava Full Stack: <br></div><div><br></div><div>We are looking for an SR Software Development Engineer JAVA who will:<br></div><div><br></div><div>Design, implement, test, and deploy microservices using Spring Boot, JPA, Hibernate, Kafka, Elasticsearch, Redis, Docker, Kubernetes, and OpenShift Container Platform<br></div><div>Create RESTful APIs according to documentation provided by Product Management and UX/UI designers<br></div><div>Integrate frontend and backend components using Angular, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS, and JSON data interchange formats<br></div><div>Work closely with Product Management, UX/UI designers, Quality Assurance engineers, and DevOps engineers to ensure timely delivery of high quality features<br></div><div>Participate in code reviews and sprint ceremonies (e.g., daily stand-ups, retrospectives, and sprint demos)<br></div><div>Actively contribute to team goals by providing regular feedback, sharing best practices, and helping fellow engineers to solve problems<br></div><div><br></div><div>Is this opportunity right for you? We are looking for candidates who:<br></div><div><br></div><div>Bachelor’s degree or equivalent combination of education and experience<br></div><div>At least 4 years of industry experience as a professional software engineer building enterprise-level products<br></div><div>Advanced English<br></div><div>Experience leading small teams of engineers<br></div><div>Strong knowledge of Java, Spring Boot, JPA, Hibernate, Kafka, Elasticsearch, Redis, Docker, Kubernetes, and OpenShift Container Platform<br></div><div>Excellent understanding of web technologies such as Angular, JavaScript, HTML5, and CSS<br></div><div>Familiarity with CI/CD tools and procedures such as Jenkins, GitLab, Bitbucket, and Artifactory<br></div><div>Working knowledge of cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud Platform<br></div><div>Strong problem solving and technical leadership skills<br></div><div>Excellent written and verbal communication skills<br></div><div>Ability to learn emerging technologies quickly<br></div></span><br>

    <item>
      <title>Affirm: Senior Product Manager, Digital Wallets & Agentic Commerce</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote US
</p>

<div class="job__description body"><div><p>Affirm is reinventing credit to make it more honest and friendly, giving consumers the flexibility to buy now and pay later without any hidden fees or compounding interest.</p></div><div><p>The Digital Wallets &amp; Agentic Commerce team is advancing this mission by partnering with industry leaders to build the BNPL infrastructure that will define commerce over the next decade. We’ll help customers discover, choose, and pay using Affirm inside Wallets such as Apple Pay and Google Pay as well as within future agentic experiences.&nbsp;</p><br><p>We’re hiring a Senior Product Manager to own high-impact product areas across our portfolio of Wallet, PSP, merchant, and agent integrations. This person will be a hands-on product leader who designs delightful experiences, partners with external platforms and merchants, and ships end-to-end. This is a role for someone who can move quickly from insight to experiment to measurable impact while thinking deeply about product design, engineering, and long-term platform strategy.</p><br><p>This is not just an optimization role; it’s a mix of 0→1 and 1→N work. You’ll ship novel experiences that demonstrate what next generation commerce can be and then scale the highest-impact ideas across partners and channels.</p><br><p><strong>What you’ll do</strong></p><br><ul><br><li><br><p>Translate Affirm’s mission into a clear product roadmap for a wallet/agentic product area</p><br></li><br><li><br><p>Ship experiments, many of which are in ambiguous areas (agentic checkout, BNPL in physical stores, etc.), and scale winners</p><br></li><br><li><br><p>Partner with Engineering, Analytics, Design, Risk, Legal, and merchant/platform partners</p><br></li><br><li><br><p>Define and own KPIs (GMV, approval rate, conversion, LTV, customer trust metrics)<br>&nbsp;</p><br></li><br></ul><br><p><strong>What we look for</strong></p><br><ul><br><li><br><p>4+ years PM experience shipping consumer/mobile/commerce products</p><br></li><br><li><br><p>Hands-on with payments, wallets (Apple/Google Pay), or merchant/platform integrations</p><br></li><br><li><br><p>0-&gt;1 Builder Mentality: You aren’t just an optimizer; you have a history of launching new products or features from scratch that fundamentally changed user behavior&nbsp;</p><br></li><br><li><br><p>Technical &amp; Design Fluency: You can speak the language of engineering (API constraints, latency) and have an incredibly high bar for UI/UX design. You know what "butter smooth" feels like and won't settle for clunky interactions</p><br></li><br><li><br><p>Commercially minded with a high-agency, bias-to-action mindset and comfort making hard tradeoffs in ambiguous environments</p><br></li><br><li><br><p>Strong quantitative and analytical orientation—comfortable using data to drive decisions, and translating complexity into clear narratives</p><br></li><br><li>Bachelor’s or Master’s in Computer Science, or other related fields; or equivalent practical experience.&nbsp;</li><br></ul><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p>Pay Grade - N<br>Equity Grade - 8<br><br>Employees new to Affirm typically come in at the start of the pay range. Affirm focuses on providing a simple and transparent pay structure which is based on a variety of factors, including location, experience and job-related skills.<br><br>Base pay is part of a total compensation package that may include equity rewards, monthly stipends for health, wellness and tech spending, and benefits (including 100% subsidized medical coverage, dental and vision for you and your dependents.)<br><br>USA base pay range (CA, WA, NY, NJ, CT) per year: $190,000 - $240,000<br>USA base pay range (all other U.S. states) per year: $169,000 - $219,000<br><br>#LI-Remote</p><br><div><br><div>&nbsp;</div><br></div></div><div><div><br><p>Affirm is proud to be a remote-first company! The majority of our roles are remote and you can work almost anywhere within the country of employment. Affirmers in proximal roles have the flexibility to work remotely, but will occasionally be required to work out of their assigned Affirm office. A limited number of roles remain office-based due to the nature of their job responsibilities.</p><br><p><span>We’re extremely proud to offer competitive benefits that are anchored to our core value of people come first. Some key highlights of our benefits package include:&nbsp;</span></p><br><ul><br><li><span>Health care coverage - Affirm covers all premiums for all levels of coverage for you and your dependents&nbsp;</span></li><br><li><span>Flexible Spending Wallets - generous stipends for spending on Technology, Food, various Lifestyle needs, and family forming expenses</span></li><br><li><span>Time off - competitive vacation and holiday schedules allowing you to take time off to rest and recharge</span></li><br><li><span>ESPP - An employee stock purchase plan enabling you to buy shares of Affirm at a discount</span></li><br></ul><br><p><span>We believe It’s On Us to provide an inclusive interview experience for all, including people with disabilities. We are happy to provide reasonable accommodations to candidates in need of individualized support during the hiring process.</span></p><br><p class="p1">[For U.S. positions that could be performed in Los Angeles or San Francisco] Pursuant to the San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance and Los Angeles Fair Chance Initiative for Hiring Ordinance, Affirm will consider for employment qualified applicants with arrest and conviction records.</p><br></div><br><div><br><p>By clicking "Submit Application," you acknowledge that you have read Affirm's&nbsp;<a href="https://www.affirm.com/global-candidate-privacy-notice">Global Candidate Privacy Notice</a>&nbsp;and hereby freely and unambiguously give informed consent to the collection, processing, use, and storage of your personal information as described therein.</p><br></div></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/affirm-senior-product-manager-digital-wallets-agentic-commerce">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/affirm-senior-product-manager-digital-wallets-agentic-commerce</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Us Ada: DevOps Intern</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote - Canada
</p>

<div class="job__description body"><div><h3><span><strong>About Us</strong></span></h3><br><p>Ada is an AI customer service company whose mission is to make customer service extraordinary for everyone. We're driven to raise a new standard of quality customer service at scale, enabling enterprise companies to deliver experiences that people love–instant, proactive, personalized, and effortless.</p><br><p>Ada is an AI transformation platform and partner—combining strategic expertise with powerful AI agent management technology to accelerate businesses’ AI maturity to keep them ahead of the curve. With Ada, 83% of customer conversations—and counting—are effortlessly resolved through automation, giving teams more time back, companies more resources to focus on growth, and customers more life to focus on what matters most to them.</p><br><p>Established in 2016, Ada is a Canadian company that has powered over 5.5 billion interactions for leading brands like Square, YETI, IPSY, and <a class="notion-link-token notion-focusable-token notion-enable-hover" href="http://monday.com/"><span class="link-annotation-unknown-block-id--985540710">Monday.com</span></a>, saving millions of hours of human effort. Backed with over $250M in funding from tier-one investors including Accel, Bessemer, FirstMark, Spark, and Version One Ventures, Ada is a pioneer in the management and application of AI in customer service.</p><br><p>At Ada, we see growth as a reflection of each individual owner’s personal growth. That’s why our values are rooted in driving progress and continuous improvement. If you’re ambitious and eager to grow, Ada could be the place for you.</p><br><p>Learn more at&nbsp;<a href="http://www.ada.cx">www.ada.cx</a>.</p></div><div><p>We are seeking a dynamic and talented Undergraduate DevOps Intern/Co-op to join our DevOps team! Our DevOps/SRE team works behind the scenes to maintain reliability, observability, and automation for our systems. This experience provides a unique opportunity for 2nd or 3rd or 4th-year undergraduates to apply their skills and learn from experienced professionals.&nbsp;</p><br><p>At Ada, our program runs for 4 months, with contract dates being <strong>May 6 to August 28, 2026.</strong><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p><br><p><strong>What You’ll Do:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Support the DevOps team in maintaining and improving Ada’s infrastructure</li><br><li>Debug incidents, triage issues, and help resolve system failures</li><br><li>Jump into small but meaningful projects involving AWS, Terraform, monitoring, CI/CD</li><br><li>Help build scripts, automations, and tooling to improve operational efficiency</li><br><li>Work with observability stacks (e.g. Datadog, CloudWatch) to build dashboards, alerts, and health checks</li><br><li>Collaborate with software engineers, security team, and platform engineers to deliver reliable services</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>About You:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Pursuing a degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related</li><br><li>Familiar with Linux fundamentals (shell, permissions, processes)</li><br><li>Basic understanding of networking (TCP/HTTP, ports, firewall rules)</li><br><li>Exposure to cloud (AWS preferred) and/or infrastructure-as-code (Terraform / CloudFormation)</li><br><li>Shows curiosity, grit, and a diagnostic mindset</li><br><li>Strong communication — you should be able to explain what you’re doing, why, and how to others</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>Nice-to-Have:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Experience with Terraform</li><br><li>Knowledge of monitoring / logging tools (Datadog, Prometheus, CloudWatch)</li><br><li>Familiarity with CI/CD (GitHub Actions, GitLab, CircleCI)</li><br><li>Basic scripting in Bash, Python, or similar</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>What You’ll Learn:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Real-world DevOps / infrastructure practices</li><br><li>How to diagnose production-level issues</li><br><li>Building and scaling cloud infrastructure</li><br><li>Observability and incident response</li><br><li>Working in a cross-functional team in a fast-paced environment</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>Perks:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Mentorship from experienced engineers</li><br><li>Hands-on impact on infrastructure used by production systems</li><br><li>Flexible hours / remote option</li><br></ul><br><p><span>#LI-NS</span></p></div><div><h3><span>Benefits &amp; Perks</span></h3><br><p>At Ada, you’ll not only build extraordinary products but also thrive in an environment designed for your success. We prioritize your well-being, growth, and work-life balance. Here’s what we offer:</p><br><h4><span><strong>Benefits</strong></span></h4><br><ul><br><li><strong> </strong><strong> </strong><strong>Unlimited Vacation: </strong>Recharge when you need to.</li><br><li><strong> </strong><strong> </strong><strong>Comprehensive Benefits: </strong>Extended health coverage, dental, vision, travel, and life insurance.</li><br><li><strong> </strong><strong> </strong><strong>Wellness Account: </strong>Empowering you to invest in your overall well-being and lifestyle.</li><br><li><strong> </strong><strong> </strong><strong>Employee &amp; Family Assistance Plan: </strong>Resources to support you and your loved ones.</li><br></ul><br><h4><span><strong>Perks</strong></span></h4><br><ul><br><li><strong> </strong><strong> </strong><strong>Flexible Work Schedule: </strong>Balance your work and personal life.</li><br><li><strong> </strong><strong> </strong><strong>Remote-First, In-Person Friendly: </strong>Options to work from home or at our local hub.</li><br><li><strong> </strong><strong> </strong><strong>Learning &amp; Development Budget:</strong> Invest in your long-term growth goals and skills.</li><br><li><strong> </strong><strong> </strong><strong>Work from Home Budget: </strong>Equipping you with the tools and support for a seamless remote work experience.</li><br><li><strong> </strong><strong> </strong><strong>Access to Cutting-Edge AI Tools: </strong>Work with the best AI tech stack in the industry.</li><br><li><strong> </strong><strong> </strong><strong>Hands-On with LLMs: </strong>Enhance your expertise in leveraging large language models.</li><br><li><strong> </strong><strong> </strong><strong>A Thriving Industry: </strong>Join the forefront of innovation in AI, shaping the future of technology.</li><br></ul><br><p>The above Benefits and Perks only apply to full-time, permanent employees.<br><br>As part of our recruitment process, we may use AI enabled tools to support certain aspects of hiring, such as interview note-taking. All hiring decisions are made by our team.</p><br><p>Thank you for your interest in joining us at Ada. Due to the high volume of applications, we will only contact candidates whose qualifications match closely to the requirements of the position. We appreciate the time you have invested in learning more about us.</p></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/us-ada-devops-intern">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/us-ada-devops-intern</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Consensys: Product Marketing Lead - MetaMask (Prediction Markets/Sports)</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> EMEA - Remote, UNITED STATES - Remote
</p>

<p>Consensys is the leading blockchain and web3 software company founded by Joe Lubin, CEO of Consensys and Co-Founder of Ethereum. Since 2014, Consensys has been at the forefront of innovation, pioneering technological developments within the web3 ecosystem.</p><br><p>Through our product suite, including the MetaMask platform, Infura, Linea, Diligence, and our NFT toolkit Phosphor, we have become the trusted collaborator for users, creators, and developers on their path to build and belong in the world they want to see.</p><br><p>Whether building a dapp, an NFT collection, a portfolio, or a better future, the instinct to build is universal. Consensys inspires and champions the builder instinct in everyone by making web3 universally easy to use and develop on.</p><br><p>Our mission is to unlock the collaborative power of communities by making the decentralized web universally easy to access, use, and build on.&nbsp;</p><br><p>You’ll get to work on the tools, infrastructure, and apps that scale these platforms to onboard one billion participants and 5 million developers. You’ll be constantly exposed to new concepts, ideas, and frameworks from your peers, and as you work on different projects — challenging you to stay at the top of your game. You’ll join a network of builders that reaches the edge of our ecosystem. Consensys alumni have moved on to become tech entrepreneurs, CEOs, and team leads at tech companies.&nbsp;</p><br><p><strong>About the Team</strong></p><br><p>We’re looking for a strategic, data informed, and user obsessed Product Marketing Lead to shape the growth and positioning of MetaMask’s Prediction Markets and Trading experiences: two core product areas powering the next phase of decentralized wagering and market speculation.</p><br><p>As a senior member of the team, you’ll define and execute GTM strategy, craft product narratives, and partner closely with Product Management, Business Development, Growth, Brand, and Analytics to ensure every launch is grounded in user insight, competitive differentiation, and measurable impact.</p><br><p>Your work will directly influence MetaMask’s business outcomes: increasing market participation, improving conversion and retention, and strengthening trust in MetaMask as the most seamless and secure place to interact with onchain prediction markets.</p><br><p><strong>What you''ll do:&nbsp;</strong></p><br><p>Strategy</p><br><ul><br><li>Define and execute end to end GTM strategy for Prediction Markets and Trading across global markets &gt; from opportunity sizing and positioning to launch and lifecycle optimization.</li><br><li>Partner with Product Leads to shape roadmap priorities grounded in user behavior, regulatory context, and competitive trends across sports betting, sports tech, and gambling.</li><br><li>Serve as a strategic thought partner to Product and Growth, ensuring user needs and market realities guide decision making.</li><br><li>Influence long term product strategy and monetization models through segmentation, market research, and competitive intelligence across both web3 and traditional betting ecosystems.</li><br></ul><br><p>GTM &amp; Product Growth</p><br><ul><br><li>Lead product and feature launches with narratives tailored to bettors, sports fans, market speculators, and emerging onchain users.</li><br><li>Drive lifecycle marketing initiatives that increase awareness, activation, and repeat usage across Prediction Markets and Trading funnels.</li><br><li>Collaborate with Growth and Analytics to identify friction points and opportunities within user journeys, and translate insights into programs that move key metrics (eg conversion, liquidity, market depth, volume).</li><br><li>Ensure strong testing, measurement, and iteration across all programs.</li><br></ul><br><p>Brand &amp; Community Integration</p><br><ul><br><li>Strengthen MetaMask’s reputation as a trusted, innovative, and user first brand in the onchain prediction markets space.</li><br><li>Lead or support education, community, and influencer (KOL) programs that build confidence among betting and prediction market audiences entering web3.</li><br><li>Ensure consistent storytelling across all surfaces, from lifecycle communications to content and brand campaigns.</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>Would be great if you brought this to the role:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>6+ years of experience in product marketing, ideally in prediction markets, sports betting, gambling or sports tech..</li><br><li>Proven success leading complex product launches and lifecycle program with measurable results.</li><br><li>Strong strategic thinking and ability to simplify complex products into clear narratives that resonate with betting or market oriented users.</li><br><li>Analytical, experiment minded, and comfortable using data to inform decisions.</li><br><li>Excellent cross functional communication, influence, and project leadership.</li><br><li>Genuine curiosity about or experience with web3, DeFi, or onchain user behavior — or enthusiasm to apply prediction market expertise to a crypto environment.</li><br></ul><br><p><span>Don't meet all the requirements? Don't sweat it. We’re passionate about building a diverse team of humans and as such, if you think you've got what it takes for our chaotic-but-fun, remote-friendly, start-up environment—apply anyway, detailing your relevant transferable skills in your cover letter. While we have a pretty good idea of what we need, we're ready for you to challenge our thinking on who needs to be in this role</span><span>.</span></p><br><p><span><span><span>It is a requirement of employment in this position that applicants will be required to submit to background checks including but not limited to employment, education and criminal record checks. Further details will be provided to applicants that successfully meet the criteria for the position as determined by the company in its sole discretion. By submitting an application for employment, you are acknowledging and consenting to this requirement.</span></span></span></p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/consensys-product-marketing-lead-metamask-prediction-markets-sports">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/consensys-product-marketing-lead-metamask-prediction-markets-sports</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Infinity: Founding Product & Engineering Lead - Radiance</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote
</p>

<h1><strong>Meet Radiance</strong></h1><p></p><h2><strong>The Source® of all your creative collateral.</strong></h2><p>Radiance is a digital design agency powered by <strong>The SOURCE®</strong>, a proprietary Creative OS that aligns every asset, message, and moment into one adaptive brand system.</p><p>We combine human-crafted design with intelligent systems to help modern brands operate with clarity, speed, and cohesion. Every engagement we deliver is not just creative output, but <strong>infrastructure</strong>: systems that scale as our clients grow.</p><p>At the center is <strong>The SOURCE®</strong>, a platform blending design, AI, and automation into a single evolving system for brand truth, execution, and growth.</p><p>We are backed by <strong>Infinity Constellation</strong>, the first AI holding company, and are building something category-defining at the intersection of brand, systems, and intelligence.</p><p></p><h2><strong>Why This Role Exists</strong></h2><p>Radiance is moving from <strong>services-first → platform-powered</strong>.</p><p>We are looking for a <strong>Founding Product &amp; Engineering Lead</strong> to help architect, build, and evolve The SOURCE® from a powerful internal system into a scalable platform that supports both our agency workflows and future SaaS expansion.</p><p>This is not a “ticket-taking” role.<br>This is a <strong>foundational builder role</strong> for someone who wants to shape the product, the architecture, and the technical philosophy from the ground up.</p><p>You’ll work directly with the founder to translate creative workflows, brand logic, and operational complexity into elegant systems that compound over time.</p><p></p><h2><strong>What You’ll Do</strong><br></h2><h3><strong>Platform &amp; Product Architecture</strong></h3><ul><li><p>Design and own the technical architecture of The SOURCE®<br></p></li><li><p>Translate creative, brand, and agency workflows into scalable systems<br></p></li><li><p>Build a platform that supports services today and SaaS tomorrow<br></p></li><li><p>Make pragmatic decisions about build vs buy vs automate<br></p></li></ul><h3><strong>Execution &amp; Systems</strong></h3><ul><li><p>Ship fast, iterate often, and prioritize leverage over perfection<br></p></li><li><p>Build internal tools that reduce scope creep and operational drag<br></p></li><li><p>Integrate AI, automation, and workflow tooling where it actually adds value<br></p></li><li><p>Establish technical standards, documentation, and patterns early<br></p></li></ul><h3><strong>Partnership &amp; Leadership</strong></h3><ul><li><p>Act as a thought partner to the founder on product vision and sequencing<br></p></li><li><p>Help define what Radiance <em>should</em> and <em>should not</em> build<br></p></li><li><p>Lay the groundwork for future engineering hires and contributors<br></p></li><li><p>Own outcomes, not just code<br></p></li></ul><h3><strong>What You Bring</strong></h3><ul><li><p>6–12+ years experience in engineering, product, or technical architecture roles<br></p></li><li><p>Experience building platforms or internal systems from zero to v1 (or beyond)<br></p></li><li><p>Strong product intuition: you think in systems, not features<br></p></li><li><p>Comfort working in ambiguity with evolving requirements<br></p></li><li><p>Ability to translate non-technical needs into technical solutions<br></p></li><li><p>Pragmatic, opinionated, and execution-focused<br></p></li><li><p>Experience with modern web stacks, APIs, automation, and AI tooling<br></p></li><li><p>Bias toward leverage, simplicity, and compounding value</p></li></ul><p></p><h2><strong>MUST-HAVE HARD SKILLS (Non-Negotiable)</strong><br></h2><h3><strong>1. Full-Stack Web Development (Production-Grade)</strong></h3><ul><li><p>Frontend: React / Next.js (or equivalent modern framework)<br></p></li><li><p>Backend: Node.js / Python (FastAPI preferred) or similar<br></p></li><li><p>REST + basic GraphQL understanding<br></p></li><li><p>Authentication, permissions, role-based access<br></p></li><li><p>Handling real users, real data, real edge cases<br></p></li></ul><h3><strong>2. Systems Thinking &amp; Data Modeling</strong></h3><ul><li><p>Designing relational and/or hybrid schemas (Postgres + JSON)<br></p></li><li><p>Modeling entities like:<br></p><ul><li><p>Brands<br></p></li><li><p>Assets<br></p></li><li><p>Campaigns<br></p></li><li><p>Messaging hierarchies<br></p></li><li><p>Versions / approvals / history<br></p></li></ul></li><li><p>Understanding how systems evolve without breaking<br></p></li></ul><h3><strong>3. Workflow Automation &amp; Tool Integration</strong></h3><ul><li><p>Integrate tools via APIs (Stripe, Jira, Webflow, CMSs, CRMs)<br></p></li><li><p>Use automation tools (Zapier, Make, n8n, Temporal, etc.)<br></p></li><li><p>Design async workflows (approvals, handoffs, notifications)<br></p></li><li><p>Build internal dashboards and admin tools<br></p></li></ul><h3><strong>4. AI / LLM Practical Implementation</strong></h3><ul><li><p>Prompt engineering for structured outputs<br></p></li><li><p>Embedding LLMs into workflows<br></p></li><li><p>Using vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, Supabase, etc.)<br></p></li><li><p>Designing guardrails for brand voice + consistency<br></p></li><li><p>Knowing when NOT to use AI<br></p></li></ul><h3><strong>5. Shipping Mentality</strong></h3><ul><li><p>Scope ruthlessly<br></p></li><li><p>Ship v1 fast<br></p></li><li><p>Iterate with live users (your team first)<br></p></li><li><p>Make tradeoffs without paralysis<br></p></li></ul><h3><strong>Bonus Points</strong></h3><ul><li><p>Experience building tools for agencies, creative teams, or knowledge workers<br></p></li><li><p>Exposure to AI workflows, LLMs, or automation systems<br></p></li><li><p>Experience scaling internal tools into external-facing products<br></p></li><li><p>Interest in brand, design, storytelling, or creative systems<br></p></li><li><p>Prior founding or early-employee experience<br></p></li></ul><h2><strong>Why Join Radiance</strong></h2><ul><li><p>Founding technical seat in a platform-led creative company<br></p></li><li><p>Direct influence on product, architecture, and company direction<br></p></li><li><p>Build something that blends brand, creativity, and intelligence<br></p></li><li><p>Move fast without corporate drag<br></p></li><li><p>Remote-first, async-friendly, outcomes-driven culture<br></p></li><li><p>Backed by Infinity Constellation with long-term ambition</p></li></ul><p></p><h3><strong>Radiance Is for You If:</strong></h3><ul><li><p>You want to build systems that compound<br></p></li><li><p>You enjoy shaping products from first principles<br></p></li><li><p>You care about how humans actually work, create, and decide<br></p></li><li><p>You like autonomy and responsibility more than structure<br></p></li><li><p>You want equity in what you build<br></p></li></ul><h2><strong>Radiance Is Not for You If:</strong></h2><ul><li><p>You want highly defined specs and long planning cycles<br></p></li><li><p>You prefer maintaining existing systems over creating new ones<br></p></li><li><p>You’re looking for a narrow engineering role<br></p></li></ul><p>You’re uncomfortable with ambiguity or iteration</p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/infinity-founding-product-engineering-lead-radiance">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/infinity-founding-product-engineering-lead-radiance</a></p>
</description>

      <title>Far Out Scout: Customer Support Representative (AVC - 05052602)</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Philippines
</p>

<h3>Client Overview</h3><p>The client is a Y-combinator backed AI platform revolutionizing the HVAC, Plumbing, and Electrical industries. Their innovative platform empowers technicians and representatives, enabling them to serve customers more efficiently and boost business revenue. With novel AI features deeply integrated with platforms like ServiceTitan, the client is at the forefront of transforming service delivery in these sectors.</p><p></p><h3>Job Overview</h3><p>As a Customer Agent, you will be at the forefront of delivering exceptional customer service. Your role will be to manage inbound calls, provide accurate and timely support, and resolve customer inquiries, ensuring a seamless customer experience. You will play a key part in maintaining high customer satisfaction and contributing to the overall success of the business.</p><p></p><p></p><p><strong>Responsibilities</strong></p><ul> <li>Manage inbound customer calls and provide prompt, accurate assistance.</li> <li>Use provided scripts to guide customers through troubleshooting or inquiries, ensuring efficient resolution of issues.</li> <li>Build positive relationships with customers through exceptional service and clear communication.</li> <li>Ensure response times within 10 seconds, maintaining a high level of professionalism and urgency.</li> <li>Document customer interactions accurately and maintain up-to-date records in relevant systems.</li> <li>Collaborate effectively with team members to meet individual and team performance goals.</li> </ul> <p></p><ul><li> <strong>Education:</strong> College educated preferably.</li><li> <strong>Experience:</strong> Minimum 3 years of customer service experience, preferably in a fast-paced or tech-driven environment.</li><li> <strong>Communication Skills:</strong> Strong verbal and written communication skills in English, with a professional and neutral accent.</li><li> <strong>Problem-Solving:</strong> Exceptional listening skills, empathy, and the ability to resolve customer issues calmly and effectively.</li><li> <strong>Work Ethic:</strong> Ability to handle multiple tasks simultaneously while maintaining a high standard of work.</li><li> <strong>Work Environment:</strong> Must have a quiet, noise-free workspace suitable for taking calls.</li></ul><h3>Additional Requirements</h3><ul><li>Availability to work on a rotating schedule, including shifts from 7:00 AM - 4:00 PM or 11:00 AM - 8:00 PM Eastern and occasional weekends.</li><li>Availability to start work ASAP (&gt;1 week)</li><li>Ability to remain positive and professional, even in challenging customer situations.</li></ul> <ul> <li> <strong>Work Remotely:</strong> Enjoy the flexibility of a fully remote role, allowing for a better work-life balance.</li> <li> <strong>5-Day Work Week:</strong> Benefit from two days off each week, ensuring ample rest and recovery.</li> <li> <strong>Competitive Salary:</strong> $900-$1500/month</li> <li> <strong>Professional Growth:</strong> Access opportunities for skill development and career advancement in a rapidly growing AI company.</li> <li> <strong>Collaborative Team Environment:</strong> Be part of a supportive, forward-thinking team where your ideas and contributions are valued.</li> </ul>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/far-out-scout-customer-support-representative-avc-05052602">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/far-out-scout-customer-support-representative-avc-05052602</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Ci&t: [27408] - Data Product Analyst</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Brazil
</p>

<div class="content"><div class="section-wrapper page-full-width"><div class="section page-centered"><div><span>We are <b>tech transformation </b>specialists, uniting human expertise with AI to create scalable tech solutions.</span></div><div><span>With over 8,000 CI&amp;Ters around the world, we’ve built partnerships with more than 1,000 clients during our 30 years of history. Artificial Intelligence is our reality.</span></div><div><br></div><div><b>What you'll be doing</b></div><div><span>Work with teams to understand their customer journeys and current state of data</span></div><div><span>Partner with the PM and product leadership to define the goals and KPIs they’ll want to achieve with the power of the new data platform</span></div><div><span>Map the new data requirements and events, inc the journey steps they belong to, their triggers, the outcome, etc.&nbsp;</span></div><div><span>Create data models that then derive the conclusions we will need in relation to the KPIs previously set</span></div><div><span>Conducting funnel and drop-off analysis to identify friction points in the customer journey and areas for optimisation</span></div><div><span>Advise on how to use data to optimise conversion rates, user engagement, and customer satisfaction across the platform in relation to the team you’re working with Translating data into clear, actionable insights that inform product roadmaps, design decisions, and feature prioritisation</span></div><div><span>Building dashboards, reports, and visualisations to communicate trends and results to both technical and non-technical stakeholdersAct as a thought partner to Product leadership, proactively identifying opportunities to improve customer experience and drive commercial outcomes.</span></div><div><span>Championing a data-informed culture, ensuring that every decision across Product is supported by evidence and measurable impact&nbsp;</span></div><div><br></div><div><b>We'd love to meet someone with:</b><span>&nbsp;</span></div><div><span>Strong quantitative skills with a background in maths, statistics or a STEM-related subject</span></div><div><span>Strong proficiency in SQL, Python (pandas, NumPy), DBT and data visualisation tools (e.g., Tableau, Power BI) to build scalable analytics solutions.</span></div><div><span>Experienced in data modelling</span></div><div><span>Experience designing and analysing experiments and A/B tests, with a solid grasp of statistical methodologies (e.g., regression, confidence intervals, hypothesis testing).</span></div><div><span>A passion for customer-centric problem solving, with curiosity to uncover friction points and opportunities for innovation.</span></div><div><span>Proven ability to define and monitor product success metrics, translating data into actionable insights that shape product strategy and roadmap decisions.</span></div><div><span>Familiarity with eCommerce platforms, experimentation tools (e.g., Optimizely), and user journey analytics (e.g. Adobe, Mixpanel, Amplitude, etc.).</span></div><div><span>Strong written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to present insights to senior leadership and drive strategic alignment.</span></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><span><b>Our benefits:</b></span></div><div><br></div><div><span>-Health and dental insurance</span></div><div><span>-Meal and food (Gympass) TotalPass;</span></div><div><span>-</span><span>Profit Sharing and Results Participation (PLR);</span></div><div><span>-Life insurance</span></div><div><span>-</span><span>Continuous learning platform (CI&amp;T University);</span></div><div><span>-Discount club</span></div><div><span>-Free online platform dedicated to physical, mental, and overall well-being</span></div><div><span>-Pregnancy and responsible parenting course</span></div><div><span>-Partnerships with online learning platforms</span></div><div><span>-Language learning platform</span></div><div><span>And many more!</span></div><div><br></div><div><span>More details about our benefits here: </span><a href="https://ciandt.com/br/pt-br/carreiras"><span>https://ciandt.com/br/pt-br/carreiras</span></a></div><div><br></div><div><span>At CI&amp;T, inclusion starts at the first contact. If you are a person with a disability, it is important</span><b> to present your assessment during the selection process. </b><i>See which data needs to be included in the report by <a href="https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/12BqYLIGeEyp9t0ZdF2b4bvnjFLza4E8fmbcowWeBlfk/edit?slide=id.g3a9cf52bf2b_0_0#slide=id.g3a9cf52bf2b_0_0">clicking here</a></i><a href="https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/12BqYLIGeEyp9t0ZdF2b4bvnjFLza4E8fmbcowWeBlfk/edit?slide=id.g3a9cf52bf2b_0_0#slide=id.g3a9cf52bf2b_0_0">.</a><span>This way, we can ensure the support and accommodations that you deserve. </span><b>If you do not yet have the assessment, don't worry: we can support you in obtaining it.</b></div><div><br></div><div><span>We have a dedicated Health and Well-being team, inclusion specialists, and affinity groups who will be with you at every stage.     <item>
      <title>Ping Identity: Senior Product and Solutions Marketing Manager, Platform</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> USA - Remote - Austin, TX
</p>

<div class="job__description body"><div><p><strong>About Ping Identity:&nbsp;</strong></p><br><p>At Ping Identity, we believe in making digital experiences both secure and seamless for all users, without compromise. We call this digital freedom. And it's not just something we provide our customers. It's something that inspires our company. People don't come here to join a culture that's built on digital freedom. They come to cultivate it.&nbsp;</p><br><p>Our intelligent, cloud identity platform lets people shop, work, bank, and interact wherever and however they want. Without friction. Without fear.&nbsp;</p><br><p>While protecting digital identities is at the core of our technology, protecting individual identities is at the core of our culture.&nbsp;<a href="https://www.pingidentity.com/en/company/championing-every-identity.html">We champion every identity.</a> One of our core values, Respect Individuality, reminds us to celebrate differences so you are empowered to bring your authentic self to work.&nbsp;</p><br><p>We're headquartered in Denver, Colorado and we have offices and employees around the globe. We serve the largest, most demanding enterprises worldwide, including more than half of the Fortune 100. At Ping Identity, we're changing the way people and businesses think about cybersecurity, digital experiences, and identity and access management.&nbsp;</p></div><div><p>The Ping Identity Platform underpins secure, seamless identity across customer, workforce, and partner ecosystems and delivers a comprehensive set of identity capabilities. As the <strong>Senior Product &amp; Solutions Marketing (PSM) Manager for Platform</strong>, you will own and evolve the unified story of the Ping Identity Platform. You’ll become an expert in our market, products, and capabilities, and translate those insights into a clear, differentiated architecture and narrative that drives how we present our platform to the market. You will steward Ping’s platform graphic, taxonomy, and capability mapping; ensure consistency across web and Sales assets; and support the broader PSM team with your platform-level perspective. You’ll influence platform roadmap, own messaging, orchestrate launches, and equip Sales to win globally. You will report to the Senior Director, Product &amp; Solutions Marketing.</p><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p><strong>You Will:</strong></p><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><ul><br><li><strong>Differentiate our platform narrative: </strong>Track platform architecture trends, competitive models, and other signals to ensure our platform story resonates with buyers and is differentiated.<br><br></li><br><li><strong>Collaborate on pricing: </strong>Work with our pricing and packaging product team to advise on how we package our solutions to the market, ensuring it’s done in a simple, convenient, and effective way. <br><br></li><br><li><strong>Map platform capabilities: </strong>Own and refine the architecture that connects our platform, capabilities, products, and solutions. <br><br></li><br><li><strong>Own the platform graphic: </strong>Own the platform graphic ensuring that it adheres to our capability taxonomy, messaging, market needs, and is visually stunning. <br><br></li><br><li><strong>Capability Expertise: </strong>Understand the functionality and own the messaging and assets around core capabilities that make up the Ping Identity Platform. Including keeping capability pages, datasheets, and other assets up to date.<br><br></li><br><li><strong>Platform and capabilities web content and messaging: </strong>From platform-centric overviews to deployment model breakdowns, you’ll own the messaging for our platform and how that platform messaging manifests on key web pages and external assets. <br><br></li><br><li><strong>Advocate our platform: </strong>Advocate our platform positioning both internally and externally when required to support field events, conferences, and other go-to-market activities<br><br></li><br><li><strong>Support the PSM team:</strong> Use your platform knowledge to support other PSMs with specialized focus areas to ensure their portrayal of the platform aligns with your vision. <br><br></li><br><li><strong>Measure, optimize, and tie to results: </strong>Plan and leverage platform-level KPIs so that you have a clear view on our platform positioning’s influence on pipeline, win rates, and other key metrics. Know the levers that drive success so you can assess and adjust them as needed.<br><br></li><br></ul><br><p><strong>Leverage external data: Gather market data, leverage our market insights and research team, and prioritize analyst data to ensure our platform positioning is always ahead of the curve.</strong></p><br><p><strong>You Have:</strong></p><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><ul><br><li>7–10+ years in B2B product/solutions marketing (enterprise SaaS) with experience driving complex platform, architecture, or multi-product narratives and cross-functional programs.<br><br></li><br><li>Proven ability to analyze markets, competitors, and architectures and convert insights into platform positioning, capability mapping, taxonomy recommendations, and GTM plans with measurable revenue impact.<br><br></li><br><li>Executive-ready communication and storytelling; comfortable engaging customers, partners, analysts, architects, and developer-adjacent audiences.<br><br></li><br><li>Strong content &amp; enablement portfolio (platform diagrams, plays, battlecards, demo flows, ROI/TCO tools) tied to win-rate and velocity improvements.<br><br></li><br><li>Bachelor’s degree in marketing, business, or a related field (or equivalent experience).<br><br></li><br><li>Ability and willingness to travel up to 25%.</li><br></ul><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p><strong>Bonus Points If You Have:</strong></p><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><ul><br><li>Broad identity background spanning CIAM, Workforce IAM, and B2B/partner ecosystems; experience shaping platform architecture narratives or developer ecosystems.<br><br></li><br><li>Familiarity with identity standards and ecosystems (OAuth2/OIDC, SAML, FIDO2/passkeys, SCIM, WebAuthn) and integrations (CDPs, martech, SIEM/SOAR, cloud platforms, marketplaces).<br><br></li><br><li>Hands-on experience developing taxonomies, product capability frameworks, packaging/editions, or migration programs across deployment models.<br><br></li><br><li>MBA or advanced degree (strategy/architecture/analytics focus) a plus—especially for market sizing, pricing/packaging, and platform GTM planning.</li><br></ul><br><p>Salary Range&nbsp;</p><br><p>$143,000 to $153,000</p><br><p>In accordance with Colorado’s Equal Pay for Equal Work Act (SB 19-085) the approximate compensation range for this role in Colorado is listed above. Final compensation for this role will be determined by various factors, such as knowledge, skills, and abilities.</p></div><div><p><strong>Life at Ping:</strong></p><br><p>We believe in and facilitate a flexible, collaborative work environment. We’re growing quickly, but remain true to the innovative, can-do startup values that got us here. Most importantly, we keep hiring talented, smart, fun, and genuinely nice people because that’s who we want to succeed with every day.&nbsp;</p><br><p><strong>Here are just a few of the things that make Ping special:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>A company culture that empowers you to do your best work.</li><br><li>Employee Resource Groups that create a sense of belonging for everyone.</li><br><li>Regular company and team bonding events.</li><br><li>Competitive benefits and perks.</li><br><li>Global volunteering and community initiatives</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>Our Benefits:&nbsp;</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Generous PTO &amp; Holiday Schedule&nbsp;</li><br><li>Parental Leave</li><br><li>Progressive Healthcare Options</li><br><li>Retirement Programs</li><br><li>Opportunity for Education Reimbursement&nbsp;</li><br><li>Commuter Offset (Specific locations)&nbsp;</li><br></ul><br><p>Ping is the collective sum of all our individual experiences, backgrounds and influences and we pride ourselves in growing and learning together. We are committed to building an inclusive and diverse environment where everyone’s individuality is respected and everyone has an Identity. In recruiting for new colleagues, we welcome the unique contributions you can bring and encourage you to be your best self.</p><br><p><em>We are an Equal Opportunity/Affirmative Action employer.&nbsp; All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex including sexual orientation and gender identity, national origin, disability, protected Veteran Status, or any other characteristic protected by applicable federal, state, or local law.</em></p></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/ping-identity-senior-product-and-solutions-marketing-manager-platform">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/ping-identity-senior-product-and-solutions-marketing-manager-platform</a></p>
</description>

      <title>Lemon.io: Senior Full-stack Developer</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country>🇦🇩 Andorra, 🇦🇱 Albania, 🇦🇷 Argentina, 🇦🇹 Austria, 🇦🇺 Australia, 🇧🇦 Bosnia and Herzegovina, 🇧🇪 Belgium, 🇧🇴 Bolivia (Plurinational State of), 🇧🇷 Brazil, 🇧🇿 Belize, 🇨🇦 Canada, 🇨🇭 Switzerland, 🇨🇱 Chile, 🇨🇴 Colombia, 🇨🇷 Costa Rica, 🇨🇾 Cyprus, 🇨🇿 Czechia, 🇩🇪 Germany, 🇩🇰 Denmark, 🇩🇴 Dominican Republic, 🇪🇨 Ecuador, 🇪🇪 Estonia, 🇪🇸 Spain, 🇫🇮 Finland, 🇫🇷 France, 🇬🇧 United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland, 🇬🇷 Greece, 🇬🇹 Guatemala, 🇭🇳 Honduras, 🇭🇷 Croatia, 🇭🇹 Haiti, 🇮🇩 Indonesia, 🇮🇪 Ireland, 🇮🇹 Italy, 🇯🇲 Jamaica, 🇯🇵 Japan, 🇰🇷 Korea (Republic of), 🇱🇹 Lithuania, 🇱🇺 Luxembourg, 🇱🇻 Latvia, 🇲🇦 Morocco, 🇲🇩 Moldova (Republic of), 🇲🇪 Montenegro, 🇲🇰 North Macedonia, 🇲🇹 Malta, 🇲🇽 Mexico, 🇳🇱 Netherlands, 🇳🇴 Norway, 🇳🇿 New Zealand, 🇵🇦 Panama, 🇵🇪 Peru, 🇵🇬 Papua New Guinea, 🇵🇭 Philippines, 🇵🇱 Poland, 🇵🇷 Puerto Rico, 🇵🇹 Portugal, 🇵🇾 Paraguay, 🇷🇴 Romania, 🇸🇪 Sweden, 🇸🇬 Singapore, 🇸🇮 Slovenia, 🇸🇰 Slovakia, 🇸🇻 El Salvador, 🇺🇦 Ukraine, 🇺🇸 United States of America, and 🇺🇾 Uruguay</country>
      <state>Delaware</state>
      <skills>AWS, Azure, GoLang, Node.js, Python, React, Engineer, Developer, Full Stack Dev, Full Time, English, GCP, and TypeScript</skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> New York, NY
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://lemon.io">https://lemon.io</a>
</p>

<p>Are you a talented Senior Developer looking for a remote job that lets you show your skills and get decent compensation? Look no further than <a href="https://lemon.io/for-developers/?utm_source=weworkremotely&amp;utm_medium=job_ad&amp;utm_campaign=supply_en_react_node/golang/python_apr_2026_job_ad">Lemon.io</a> — the marketplace that connects you with hand-picked startups in the US and Europe.</p>
<p><strong>What we offer:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>The rate depends on your seniority level, skills and experience. We've already paid out over $11M to our engineers.</li>
<li>No more hunting for clients or negotiating rates — let us handle the business side of things so you can focus on what you do best.</li>
<li>We'll manually find the best project for you according to your skills and preferences.</li>
<li>Choose a schedule that works best for you. It’s possible to communicate async or minimally overlap within team working hours.</li>
<li>We respect your seniority so you can expect no micromanagement or screen trackers.</li>
<li>Communicate directly with the clients. Most of them have technical backgrounds. Sounds good, yeah?</li>
<li>We will support you from the time you submit the application throughout all cooperation stages.</li>
<li>Most of our projects involve working in a fast-paced startup environment. We hope you like it as much as we do.</li>
<li>Through our community, we will connect you with the best developers from more than 71 countries.</li>
</ul>
<p>We have several open positions for Full-Stack React.js Developers - please see the details below. We also have some backend positions; the full list is included below as well.</p>
<h3><strong>Requirements for the Senior React &amp; Python Position:</strong></h3>
<ul>
<li>4+ years of software development experience</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>Commercial experience:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>React.js 3+ years and Python 3+ years <strong>OR</strong> React.js 2+ years and Python 5+ years <strong>OR</strong> React.js 5+ years and Python 2+ years</li>
<li>Experience with AWS, GCP, or Azure is required</li>
</ul>
<h3><strong>Requirements for the Senior Python Position:</strong></h3>
<ul>
<li>5+ years of software development experience</li>
<li>5+ years of commercial experience with Python</li>
<li>3+ years of commercial experience with Flask</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<h3><strong>Requirements for the Senior Golang &amp; React Position:</strong></h3>
<ul>
<li>4+ years of software development experience</li>
<li>React.js 3+ years and Golang 3+ years <strong>OR</strong> React.js 2+ years and Golang 5+ years <strong>OR</strong> React.js 5+ years and Golang 2+ years</li>
</ul>
<h3><strong>Requirements for the Senior Golang Position:</strong></h3>
<ul>
<li>5+ years of software development experience</li>
<li>5+ years of commercial experience with Golang</li>
</ul>
<h3><strong>Requirements for the Senior Node &amp; React Position:</strong></h3>
<ul>
<li>5+ years of software development experience</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>Commercial experience:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>React.js: 3+ years, Node.js: 5+ years, and Next.js: 2+ years <strong>OR</strong> React.js: 5+ years, Node.js: 3+ years, and Next.js: 2+ years</li>
<li>Expertise in TypeScript, Supabase and AWS is a must.</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>Other requirements:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>Strong technical skills: as a Senior Developer, you are expected to be able to create projects from scratch and have a deep understanding of application architecture.</li>
<li>Clear and effective communication in English — advanced ability to discuss business tasks, justify decisions, and communicate issues. Good self-presentation is also essential for upcoming client calls.</li>
<li>Strong self-organizational skills — ability to work full-time remotely with no supervision.</li>
<li>Reliability — we want to trust you and expect that you won’t let us and the client down.</li>
<li>Adaptability and Flexibility — the ability to onboard the project promptly after accepting it and start delivering results quickly.</li>
</ul>
<p>Sounds good for you? Apply now and join the <a href="https://lemon.io/for-developers/?utm_source=weworkremotely&amp;utm_medium=job_ad&amp;utm_campaign=supply_en_react_node/golang/python_apr_2026_job_ad">Lemon.io</a> community!</p>
<p><strong>NOT YOUR TECH STACK?</strong></p>
<p>We have multiple projects available for Senior Developers. If you have 4+ years of commercial software development experience and are proficient in any of the following areas: React &amp; Ruby, PHP &amp; Angular, PHP &amp; Vue, Vue &amp; Node.js, React &amp; .NET, Android &amp; iOS, Angular &amp; .NET, Angular &amp; Node.js, Vue &amp; .NET, Python &amp; Vue, MLOps, React &amp; Java, Data Science, Blockchain (Web3/Solidity/Solana), Symfony &amp; React, Symfony &amp; Vue, Symfony &amp; Angular, Symfony &amp; JavaScript &amp; Next.js &amp; TypeScript, Data Analysis, React &amp; PHP, Data Engineering, AI Engineering, Data Annotation, DevOps, Svelte &amp; Python, Svelte &amp; Node, Svelte &amp; TypeScript, Rust, Shopify &amp; JavaScript, Vue &amp; Nuxt, Python &amp; Node, Angular &amp; TypeScript, Ruby &amp; Ruby on Rails, React Native &amp; Ruby, React Native &amp; Python, PHP &amp; Laravel, .NET &amp; C#, Java &amp; Spring, Unreal Engine &amp; C++, Python &amp; LLM, Unity, Machine Learning Engineering — we’d be happy to connect and match you with a suitable project.</p>
<p><strong>If your experience matches our requirements, be ready for the next steps:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>VideoAsk — watch a short video about our startup, up to 10 minutes</li>
<li>Complete your profile on our website</li>
<li>Screening call</li>
<li>Technical interview</li>
<li>Feedback</li>
<li>Magic Box (we are looking for the best project for you).</li>
</ul>
<p>We do not provide visa assistance, and our cooperation model does not include the benefits typically offered with direct hire.</p>
<p>P.S. <strong>We work with developers from 71+ countries in different regions:</strong> Europe, LATAM, the U.S (if you are an owner of W-9 ben form), Canada, Asia (Japan, Singapore, South Korea, Philippines, Indonesia), Oceania (Australia, New Zealand, Papua New Guinea), and the the UK. However, we have some exceptions.</p>
<p><strong>At the moment, we don’t have a legal basis to accept applicants from the following countries:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>European: Hungary, Iceland, Liechtenstein, Kosovo, Belarus, Russia, and Serbia.</li>
<li>Latin America: Cuba and Nicaragua</li>
<li>Most Asian countries and Africa.</li>
</ul>
<p>We expand and shorten the list of exemptions regularly.</p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/lemon-io-senior-full-stack-developer-8">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/lemon-io-senior-full-stack-developer-8</a></p>
</description>
