    <item>
      <title>Route: Sr. Manager, Design</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote
</p>

<p><strong>&nbsp;We are </strong><a href="https://route.com/"><strong>Route</strong></a></p><br><p>Buying stuff online can get messy once you hit that "order" button. Managing dozens carrier tracking links, dealing with lost or damaged packages, and resolving issues with customer support can feel like a wild goose chase. That’s why we created the Route&nbsp; — to make the post-purchase experience for consumers like you, and the brands you love, as seamless as possible.&nbsp;</p><br><p>Route is on a mission to connect the world’s commerce. Through our network of millions of Route App users and thousands of merchants, we’re making it easier than ever for consumers to track, insure, and discover their favorite products in one place — which connects the world’s best direct-to-consumer brands to happy, repeat customers.</p><br><p>Since Route launched in 2018, we’ve been on a journey to build innovative products that empower our customers, all while fostering a people-first, values-driven company culture. We’re looking for talented people across the ecommerce space to join us on the next steps of this adventure.</p><br><p>Don’t just take our word for it! <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/route-app/mycompany/?viewAsMember=true">Discover what life at Route has to offer</a>.</p><br><p><strong>The team</strong></p><br><p>Design at Route sits at the center of Product, Engineering, and Brand. We’re a small but high-impact team responsible for shaping how thousands of brands and millions of consumers experience Route on a regular basis.</p><br><p>This role will lead Product Design (UX/UI) as the primary focus, while also stewarding Design Systems &amp; Operations, User Research &amp; Insights, and Brand &amp; Marketing Design in close partnership with cross-functional teams.&nbsp;</p><br><p>You’ll manage and mentor our current Designer while remaining deeply hands on yourself and setting the bar for craft, collaboration, and impact. We value Team Over Ego, pragmatic execution, and designers who thrive in ambiguity while helping others navigate it.</p><br><p><strong>The opportunity</strong></p><br><p>This is a chance to scale the design function at a pivotal moment for Route.</p><br><p>As the Sr. Manager of Design, you’ll shape not only how our product looks and feels, but how design operates from discovery and research, through delivery and iteration. You’ll influence roadmap decisions, establish durable systems, and ensure design is a trusted, integrated partner to Product and Engineering.</p><br><p>You’ll have real ownership, real influence, and the opportunity to build a design practice that balances speed with quality, autonomy with alignment, and vision with execution.</p><br><p><strong>What you’ll do</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Own and lead Product Design (UX/UI) across Route’s core experiences, from discovery through high-fidelity execution</li><br><li>Establish and evolve Design Systems &amp; Operations to ensure consistency, scalability, and velocity</li><br><li>Guide User Research &amp; Insights, ensuring design decisions are grounded in real user needs and data</li><br><li>Provide creative direction and oversight for Brand &amp; Marketing Design to maintain visual cohesion across external touchpoints</li><br><li>Act as a player-coach, contributing directly to design work while mentoring and growing our Staff Designer</li><br><li>Partner closely with Product and Engineering to streamline ways of working and improve cross-functional collaboration</li><br><li>Champion a culture of team over ego, clarity, and high design standards across the organization</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>What we’re looking for</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>10+ years of design experience with significant ownership over Product Design (UX/UI) in complex digital products</li><br><li>Strong systems thinker with experience building or evolving design systems and operational practices</li><br><li>Experience leveraging user research and insights to inform product strategy and design outcomes</li><br><li>Ability to oversee and align brand and marketing design without losing focus on product excellence</li><br><li>Proven experience as a player-coach—comfortable leading, mentoring, and executing hands-on design work</li><br><li>Deep collaboration skills with Product and Engineering, including influencing roadmap and prioritization decisions</li><br><li>A mindset rooted in humility, ownership, and team over ego, with a bias toward action and clarity</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>Equal opportunity for all</strong></p><br><p>Route is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We embrace diversity and equal opportunity in a serious way. We are committed to building a team that represents a variety of backgrounds, perspectives, and skills. The more inclusive we are, the better our work will be.</p><br><p><strong>Total Rewards</strong></p><br><p>We know our team works best when everyone feels happy, healthy, and supported. We offer to pay 95% - 100% of your health insurance premiums for you and your family, remote or hybrid work arrangements, unlimited PTO, 401k matching, formalized growth opportunities, learning &amp; development, DEI programs &amp; events, and so much more.</p><br><p><strong>Pay Transparency</strong></p><br><p><strong>Salary for this role:</strong>&nbsp;</p><br><p>National: $190,000 - $202,000<br>LA: $176,000 - $186,000<br>NYC: $184,000 - $195,000<br>SF: $206,000 - $218,000</p><br><p><em>The cash compensation above includes base salary, and is not reflective of potential commission for employees in eligible roles, or annual bonus targets under Route’s bonus plan for eligible roles. In addition to cash compensation, all Route employees are eligible to participate in Routes equity incentive plan to receive stock options per the terms of the agreement. Some roles may also be eligible for overtime pay. Individual compensation packages are based on a few different factors unique to each candidate, including their career level, skills, experience, specific geographic location qualifications and other job-related reasons.</em></p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/route-sr-manager-design">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/route-sr-manager-design</a></p>
</description>

      <title>Calibrate Group AI: Senior Technical Lead</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state>New York</state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Florida
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://Calibrategroup.ai">http://Calibrategroup.ai</a>
</p>

<p><strong>About the Role:</strong></p>
<p><br>We're hiring our founding technical hire — a Senior Technical Lead who will own the entire technical vision and execution. This is a co-builder role, not a cog-in-machine role.<br>This is an application-layer engineering role. You'll be building AI-powered tools that solve real business problems for real operators — not managing GPU clusters, optimizing inference pipelines, or scaling cloud infrastructure. If you get more excited connecting QuickBooks to an AI agent that saves a business owner 10 hours a week than you do tuning Kubernetes configs, keep reading.<br><br><strong>What You'll Own</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>AI-powered diagnostic and recommendation engine — our core client acquisition tool</li>
<li>Integrations with SMB platforms (Toast, Square, Mindbody, QuickBooks, HubSpot)</li>
<li>AI agent stack (Claude API, <a href="http://Make.com">Make.com</a>, Clay) for client implementations</li>
<li>Client-facing portal for ongoing optimization and reporting</li>
<li>Technical hiring as we scale toward $3M+ revenue</li>
</ul>
<p><br><strong>What We're Looking For</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>8+ years of engineering experience shipping real SaaS products</li>
<li>AI-native workflow: Cursor, Claude API, <a href="http://Make.com">Make.com</a> are daily tools, not experiments</li>
<li>Led a small team. You think in business outcomes, not just code</li>
<li>Former founding engineer or technical co-founder is a strong signal</li>
<li>Comfortable with ambiguity. You build the plane while flying it</li>
<li>Bonus: experience in consulting, agencies, or client-facing technical work</li>
</ul>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/calibrate-group-ai-senior-technical-lead">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/calibrate-group-ai-senior-technical-lead</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <media:content url="https://wwr-pro.s3.amazonaws.com/logos/0171/4898/logo.gif" type="image/png"/>
      <title>SuperPlane: Product Engineer</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state>Delaware</state>
      <skills>Back-End Dev, Front-End Dev, AI Agents, and Agentic AI</skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/4898/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> USA
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://superplane.com">https://superplane.com</a>
</p>

<p>We are hiring exceptional product engineers who can fully own projects and get them done.</p>
<p>This is a remote role. We currently work across GMT+2 to GMT-3 and welcome candidates in that range.</p>
<p>At SuperPlane, we are not splitting engineering into frontend and backend roles. Everyone is a well-rounded builder who can move across the stack, make strong product and technical calls, ask for help when needed, and deliver features end to end. You might spend one day tightening an API or workflow engine, and the next day polishing a React surface that users touch every day.</p>
<p>Strong backend and architecture judgment is a real advantage. So is product taste. So is the ability to use AI as a force multiplier without lowering the bar.</p>
<h2>What We Are Looking For</h2>
<ul>
<li>
<p>You are genuinely full-stack.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Your workflow is AI-driven and you know how to stay fast without getting sloppy.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>You are strong in Go, TypeScript, React, or comparable tools, and you can get productive fast in adjacent parts of the stack.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>You have solid systems judgment. APIs, data models, reliability, and trade-offs matter to you.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>You are comfortable with cloud-native tooling and modern software delivery.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>You want ownership, not a narrow lane.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>You want an early-stage company where the pace is high, the standards are high, and the upside is real.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<h2>How To Apply</h2>
<p>We care more about proof of work than polished applications, and we want to see how you show up in open source.</p>
<p>Before you apply, submit at least one pull request to superplanehq/superplane. It can be small and it does not need to be merged.</p>
<p>When you apply, send your GitHub username and a link to your pull request. We verify both, and applications missing either field will not move forward.</p>
<p>&nbsp;</p>
<h2>Why You'll Love Working at SuperPlane</h2>
<ul>
<li>
<p>See your work used and relied on by engineers across the globe.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Meaningful equity and real ownership.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Small team, fast feedback loops.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Remote role that lets you focus and create.</p>
</li>
</ul>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/superplane-product-engineer">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/superplane-product-engineer</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Vercel: Senior Product Security Engineer</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote - United States
</p>

<div class="job__description body"><div><h2>About Vercel:</h2><br><p><span>Vercel gives developers the tools and cloud infrastructure to build, scale, and secure a faster, more personalized web. As the team behind v0, Next.js, and AI SDK, Vercel helps customers like Ramp, Supreme, PayPal, and Under Armour build for the AI-native web.<br></span></p><br><p><span>Our mission is to enable the world to ship the best products. That starts with creating a place where everyone can do their best work. Whether you're building on our platform, supporting our customers, or shaping our story: You can just ship things.</span></p></div><div><h2>About the Role:</h2><br><p>We are looking for a Senior Product Security Engineer to join our security team to drive critical product security initiatives across Vercel’s products and platform. Your core focus will be on threat modeling, open-source software security, secure code review, SDLC tooling, and bug bounty program management. You will support both our internal product engineering teams and customer-facing security programs, ensuring that security is embedded throughout our development lifecycle and that our platform earns the trust of developers and end-users alike.</p><br><p>As a senior member of the team, you will lead cross-organizational security projects and champion a security-first culture within Vercel’s engineering organization. This is a high-impact role with broad scope – your work will not only secure Vercel’s core infrastructure and products (built with Next.js, Node.js, and serverless architecture), but also influence the security of the open-source ecosystems we contribute to.</p><br><p>If you’re based within a pre-determined commuting distance of one of our offices (SF, NY, London, or Berlin), the role includes in-office anchor days on Monday, Tuesday, and Friday. If you're located beyond that distance, the role is fully remote. For location-specific details, please connect with our recruiting team.</p><br><h2>What You Will Do:</h2><br><ul><br><li><strong>Threat Modeling &amp; Design Review:</strong>&nbsp;Partner with engineering and product teams to perform threat modeling for new and existing features. Identify potential risks early in the design phase and recommend security controls or design changes to mitigate threats. You will ensure security concerns are addressed from the inception of features through deployment.</li><br><li><strong>Secure Code Review:</strong> Conduct secure code reviews and security assessments on products and services built with Next.js, Node.js, and our serverless backend. You’ll uncover code-level vulnerabilities, provide actionable remediation guidance to developers, and establish best practices for secure coding across the engineering team.</li><br><li><strong>Open Source Security Management:</strong>&nbsp;Oversee Vercel’s open-source security efforts. This includes monitoring and coordinating fixes for vulnerabilities in third-party open-source packages we use (as a consumer) and ensuring the security of the open-source projects we maintain and publish (as a contributor/publisher, e.g. Next.js). You will work with maintainers and the community on responsible disclosure and patching of security issues in open-source code.</li><br><li><strong>SDLC Tooling &amp; Automation:</strong>&nbsp;Evaluate, select, and integrate security tools into our Software Development Life Cycle. You will drive the implementation of automated security checks – for example, using&nbsp;GitHub Advanced Security (GHAS)&nbsp;and other static analysis, dependency scanning, and secret detection tools – directly in our CI/CD pipelines and GitHub workflows. By embedding security tooling into developer workflows, you will help catch issues early and reduce manual effort.</li><br><li><strong>Bug Bounty Program Management:</strong>&nbsp;Own and expand Vercel’s bug bounty program. You will triage and validate incoming vulnerability reports from the security researcher community, ensure critical issues are promptly addressed, and coordinate cross-team efforts to remediate and learn from reported vulnerabilities. You’ll also work on making our bug bounty a world-class, researcher-friendly program, including refining policies, scope, and engagement to encourage high-quality submissions.</li><br><li><strong>Cross-Organizational Security Initiatives:</strong>&nbsp;Lead and contribute to security projects that span multiple teams and disciplines. For example, you might drive a company-wide upgrade to a more secure framework, implement a new authentication/authorization mechanism in collaboration with product teams, or roll out a security awareness program for engineers. You will act as a&nbsp;security champion&nbsp;across the org, aligning stakeholders from Engineering, DevOps, Product, and other groups to implement lasting security improvements.</li><br><li><strong>Customer-Facing Security Support:</strong> Work closely with customer success and product marketing on security-related initiatives that impact our users. This may involve contributing to security documentation and whitepapers, assisting with customer security questionnaires or audits by providing product security expertise, and communicating our security features and best practices to build customer trust in the platform.</li><br></ul><br><h2>About You:</h2><br><ul><br><li><strong>Experienced Security Engineer:</strong>&nbsp;You have&nbsp;<strong>5+ years</strong> of experience in an Product Security or Product Security role (or related field), with a track record of securing web products and services. You’re well-versed in the fundamentals of product security and have hands-on experience finding and fixing vulnerabilities.</li><br><li><strong>Web Tech Stack Proficiency:</strong>&nbsp;Strong familiarity with JavaScript/TypeScript and Node.js runtime security. Experience with modern web frameworks (ideally Next.js or React and Node-based frameworks) and understanding of their security considerations. You can read and review code in these technologies to spot security flaws.</li><br><li><strong>Threat Modeling &amp; SDLC Expertise:</strong> Demonstrated ability to perform threat modeling and architectural risk analysis for complex product. You understand how to integrate security into a fast-paced SDLC without slowing it down. Experience implementing or working with secure development lifecycle practices (secure design, code review, pentesting, etc.) is required.</li><br><li><strong>Security Tools &amp; Automation:</strong> Hands-on experience with product security tooling such as static product security testing (SAST), dynamic testing (DAST), dependency vulnerability scanners, and CI/CD pipeline security integration. Familiarity with GitHub Advanced Security or similar tools for code scanning and secret detection is a strong plus.</li><br><li><strong>Open Source and Supply Chain Security:</strong>&nbsp;Knowledge of open-source security best practices. You have experience dealing with open-source dependencies and package management security (e.g., handling vulnerability advisories, using tools like Dependabot or Snyk). Bonus if you have contributed to or maintained open-source projects, especially security-related ones.</li><br><li><strong>Bug Bounty &amp; Vulnerability Management:</strong>&nbsp;Exposure to running or participating in a bug bounty program or vulnerability disclosure process. You know how to assess externally reported issues, reproduce and validate vulnerabilities, and coordinate fixes. You stay up-to-date on the latest vulnerabilities (OWASP Top 10, emerging threats) and methods to mitigate them.</li><br><li><strong>Cloud &amp; Serverless Security Understanding:</strong> Solid understanding of cloud architecture and serverless environments from a security perspective. You are familiar with securing products on cloud platforms (e.g., securing serverless functions, protecting APIs, managing secrets and keys). Experience with related cloud security concepts or tools is a plus.</li><br><li><strong>Technical Leadership:</strong>&nbsp;Proven ability to drive security initiatives and influence engineering teams to adopt best practices. You can work cross-functionally to achieve security goals – for example, rolling out a new security tool or standard across many engineers. (While we emphasize technical skills, this senior role requires you to effectively communicate and lead within the organization to get things done.)</li><br></ul><br><h2>Bonus If You:</h2><br><ul><br><li>Have prior software development experience beyond security (e.g. as a frontend or backend engineer). Being able to empathize with developers and write or contribute code will help you integrate security seamlessly into development.</li><br><li>Hold relevant security certifications or recognitions (for example, OSCP, OSWE, CISSP, or notable bug bounty hall of fame entries). These demonstrate your depth of knowledge, though they are not required.</li><br><li>Experience with security&nbsp;policy-as-code&nbsp;or infrastructure as code security (for instance, using tools like Open Policy Agent, Terraform security checks, etc.). This shows you can bring security into the automation and infrastructure realm.</li><br><li>Have built or implemented security features in a product (such as authentication systems, encryption, secure CI/CD pipelines) or contributed to security community projects/tools.</li><br><li>Are an active participant in the security community (e.g., contributing to open source security projects, writing blog posts or research, attending or speaking at security conferences). A passion for continuous learning and sharing knowledge is always a plus on our team.</li><br></ul><br><h2>&nbsp;</h2><br><h2>Benefits:</h2><br><ul><br><li>Competitive compensation package, including equity.</li><br><li>Inclusive Healthcare Package.</li><br><li>Learn and Grow - we provide mentorship and send you to events that help you build your network and skills.</li><br><li>Flexible Time Off.</li><br><li>We will provide you the gear you need to do your role, and a WFH budget for you to outfit your space as needed.</li><br></ul><br><p><span>The San Francisco, CA base pay range for this role is $196,000.00 - $294,000.00. Actual salary will be based on job-related skills, experience, and location. Compensation outside of San Francisco may be adjusted based on employee location. The total compensation package may include benefits, equity-based compensation, and eligibility for a company bonus or variable pay program depending on the role. Your recruiter can share more details during the hiring process.&nbsp;</span></p><br><p>Vercel is committed to fostering and empowering an inclusive community within our organization. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, gender expression or identity, sexual orientation, national origin, citizenship, age, marital status, veteran status, disability status, or any other characteristic protected by law. Vercel encourages everyone to apply for our available positions, even if they don't necessarily check every box on the job description.</p><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><div></div></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/vercel-senior-product-security-engineer">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/vercel-senior-product-security-engineer</a></p>
</description>
      <pubDate>Sat, 18 Apr 2026 20:30:59 +0000</pubDate>
      <expires_at>Mon, 18 May 2026 20:30:59 +0000</expires_at>
      <guid>https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/vercel-senior-product-security-engineer</guid>

    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Rush Street Interactive: Senior Product Manager - Technology</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Estonia
</p>

<div class="job__description body"><div><p>Rush Street Interactive (NYSE: RSI) is a market leader in online casino and sports betting, currently operating real-money gaming with our brands: BetRivers.com, PlaySugarHouse.com, and RushBet.co. We’re building bridges between online, social and land-based gaming businesses to create amazing, integrated experiences that keep players in the game.</p></div><div><p>The Senior Product Manager - Technology defines how we connect product intent to technical execution across a modern, unified gaming platform. This role is a key force in shaping how RSI builds software - establishing patterns for translating product requirements into scalable, performant, and compliant technical solutions that power millions of player experiences across our brands. The Senior Product Manager - Technology defines the playbook for how product managers, architects, and engineers collaborate - influencing process, tooling, and standards across multiple product domains.&nbsp;</p><br><p><strong>What You'll Do:</strong></p><br><div class="_kqswh2mm _bfhku67f _18u01wug _2hwx1wug"><br><ul><br><li>Define the solution management function: Establish frameworks, tools, and standards for how we translate product roadmap into technical blueprints and requirements.</li><br><li>Shape solution design practices: Create the connective tissue between Product, CX, Architecture, and Engineering - ensuring consistency, scalability, and compliance across markets.</li><br><li>Drive major cross-functional initiatives: Lead technical product definition by example for multi-domain features like registration, identity, payments, promotions, and player engagement systems. Build strong technical requirements and create the methodology for doing so in other domains in the future.</li><br><li>Collaborate with architects: Align solutions with our unified architecture strategy, performance objectives, and regulatory requirements.</li><br><li>Enable product and engineering velocity: Build repeatable models for backlog refinement, dependency management, and system-level feasibility.</li><br><li>Mentor and multiply: Coach other PMs and engineers in systems thinking, technical requirement writing, and solution planning.</li><br><li>Measure and evolve: Define metrics to assess quality of solutions, predictability of delivery, and impact on business outcomes like activation and retention.</li><br></ul><br></div><br><p><strong>What You'll Bring:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>7+ years of experience in product, engineering, or solution architecture roles — ideally in high-scale, regulated environments (gaming, payments, fintech, or streaming).</li><br><li>Proven track record building and leading technical product practices — solution definition, system design, or architecture alignment at the organizational level.&nbsp;</li><br><li>Able to understand the organization, the business, the product and the architecture - and position yourself between them in a natural manner.</li><br><li>Deep understanding of modern software architectures — APIs, microservices, event-driven systems, CI/CD pipelines.&nbsp;</li><br><li>Can navigate from product narrative to sequence diagram without losing context.&nbsp;</li><br><li>Hands-on familiarity with data privacy, KYC, or compliance-driven workflows a strong plus.&nbsp;</li><br><li>Proactive communicator and collaborator — able to bring engineers, architects, and product stakeholders into alignment. Able to facilitate, present and write with clarity and in an engaging manner.&nbsp;</li><br><li>Strong business and product mindset.&nbsp;</li><br><li>Experience working in hybrid organizations (multiple markets, distributed teams). A builder’s mindset: you create clarity where there’s ambiguity and scalable process where there’s chaos.&nbsp;</li><br><li>Able to travel domestically and internationally for training or summit/team meetings. <span>#LI-REMOTE #LI-PROMOTE</span></li><br></ul></div><div><div class="p-rich_text_section"><span><strong>What Makes Us Great:</strong></span></div><br><ul class="p-rich_text_list p-rich_text_list__bullet p-rich_text_list--nested"><br><li>Comprehensive compensation</li><br><li>Work-life balance initiatives</li><br><li>Autonomy – we embrace personal freedom and responsibility</li><br><li>Creativity – we are open to new ideas of how we can be better</li><br><li>Growth – we want you to develop personally as well as professionally</li><br><li>Top-notch professionals who are passionate about what they do</li><br><li>People-oriented environment and supportive atmosphere</li><br></ul><br><p>As a rapidly growing company in an emerging industry, you’ll have a huge impact on our product and our company. We like proactive team members and strive to have a company of self-disciplined professionals who enjoy collaboration, having fun, and of course, achieving together what others believe to be improbable. We are dedicated to treating everyone with respect and to support your professional and personal growth.</p><br><p>Rush Street Interactive is an equal opportunity employer and committed to a diverse and inclusive workplace. All qualified applicants will be considered for employment without regard to race, national origin, ancestry, sex, sexual orientation, sexual identity and expression, marital status, family status, lifestyle, age, culture, religion, military and veteran status, citizenship, or disability.</p><br><p>Be at the forefront of this ground-breaking industry! Apply now!</p></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/rush-street-interactive-senior-product-manager-technology">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/rush-street-interactive-senior-product-manager-technology</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Consensys: Senior Product Manager - MetaMask (Engagement)</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> GLOBAL - Remote
</p>

<p>Consensys is the leading blockchain and web3 software company founded by Joe Lubin, CEO of Consensys and Co-Founder of Ethereum. Since 2014, Consensys has been at the forefront of innovation, pioneering technological developments within the web3 ecosystem.</p><br><p>Through our product suite, including the MetaMask platform, Infura, Linea, Diligence, and our NFT toolkit Phosphor, we have become the trusted collaborator for users, creators, and developers on their path to build and belong in the world they want to see.</p><br><p>Whether building a dapp, an NFT collection, a portfolio, or a better future, the instinct to build is universal. Consensys inspires and champions the builder instinct in everyone by making web3 universally easy to use and develop on.</p><br><p>Our mission is to unlock the collaborative power of communities by making the decentralized web universally easy to access, use, and build on.&nbsp;</p><br><p>You’ll get to work on the tools, infrastructure, and apps that scale these platforms to onboard one billion participants and 5 million developers. You’ll be constantly exposed to new concepts, ideas, and frameworks from your peers, and as you work on different projects — challenging you to stay at the top of your game. You’ll join a network of builders that reaches the edge of our ecosystem. Consensys alumni have moved on to become tech entrepreneurs, CEOs, and team leads at tech companies.&nbsp;</p><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p><strong>About </strong><strong>the Engagement Team</strong><span><br></span></p><br><p>Engagement is a critical part of how users experience the product over time. In this role, you’ll shape the systems that determine when, why, and how we communicate with users — and help transform engagement into a durable, scalable capability that supports growth without compromising trust.</p><br><p>We’re looking for a Senior Product Manager – Engagement to own and evolve the systems that help users stay informed, engaged, and coming back to the product over time.</p><br><p>This role sits at the intersection of product, growth, and lifecycle communication. You’ll be responsible for the tooling and experiences that power automated, timely, and relevant messages across the user journey — from onboarding and activation to ongoing engagement and re-engagement with the full suite of MetaMask products (swaps, perps trading, prediction markets, and more).</p><br><p>Your mission is to turn engagement tooling into a reliable, scalable capability that empowers teams across the company to launch high-quality campaigns, experiments, and product moments with speed, confidence, and clear impact.</p><br><p>This is a hands-on, senior individual contributor role with end-to-end ownership over a critical growth surface.</p><br><p><strong>What you’ll do</strong><span><br></span></p><br><ul><br><li>Own the product vision and roadmap for engagement tooling, including automated messaging, lifecycle communication, and self-serve infrastructure.</li><br><li>Define and improve how teams create, manage, target, test, and measure engagement across channels.</li><br><li>Partner closely with Design, Engineering, Data, and Marketing to build systems that are flexible, reliable, and easy to use.</li><br><li>Enable high-quality launches and experiments by making engagement tooling faster, safer, and more predictable.</li><br><li>Balance user trust and experience with business goals, ensuring messages are relevant, timely, and useful.</li><br><li>Establish clear success metrics (e.g. activation, retention, re-engagement, conversion) and use data to guide prioritization.</li><br><li>Identify gaps, friction, and scalability limits in existing tooling and drive meaningful improvements.</li><br><li>Communicate product strategy, tradeoffs, and progress clearly to stakeholders across product, marketing, and leadership.</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>Would be great if you brought this to the role</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>5+ years of product management experience, ideally in consumer, fintech, or platform-style products.</li><br><li>Proven ability to own and ship end-to-end product experiences with meaningful user and business impact.</li><br><li>Strong product judgment and user empathy, especially around notifications, messaging, and engagement surfaces.</li><br><li>Comfort working with data, experiments, and metrics to evaluate product effectiveness.</li><br><li>Mastery of systems thinking, able to connect complex components to create a robust platform.</li><br><li>Able to work in a matrixed, cross-functional environment with multiple stakeholders.</li><br><li>Excellent written and verbal communication skills.</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>Bonus points if you have</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Experience in growth marketing, lifecycle marketing, or marketing automation.</li><br><li>Familiarity with tools or systems for segmentation, targeting, experimentation, or campaign orchestration.</li><br><li>Experience building internal tools or platforms used by multiple teams.</li><br><li>Background in highly regulated or trust-sensitive product environments.</li><br><li>Curiosity about web3, financial products, or emerging consumer platforms.</li><br></ul><br><p><span>Don't meet all the requirements? Don't sweat it. We’re passionate about building a diverse team of humans and as such, if you think you've got what it takes for our chaotic-but-fun, remote-friendly, start-up environment—apply anyway, detailing your relevant transferable skills in your cover letter. While we have a pretty good idea of what we need, we're ready for you to challenge our thinking on who needs to be in this role</span><span>.</span></p><br><p><span><span>It is a requirement of employment in this position that applicants will be required to submit to background checks including but not limited to employment, education and criminal record checks. Further details will be provided to applicants that successfully meet the criteria for the position as determined by the company in its sole discretion. By submitting an application for employment, you are acknowledging and consenting to this requirement.</span><em><span> <br></span></em></span></p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/consensys-senior-product-manager-metamask-engagement">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/consensys-senior-product-manager-metamask-engagement</a></p>
</description>

      <media:content url="https://wwr-pro.s3.amazonaws.com/logos/0171/4864/logo.gif" type="image/png"/>
      <title>Toast: Senior Enterprise Process Engineer</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country>🇺🇸 United States of America</country>
      <state>California</state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description><img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/4864/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" />

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> United States
    <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://pos.toasttab.com/?srsltid=AfmBOoo8wW91HkpMsshu2DyL9RieQmtrYW9efWs9TGKeXL4NgPDGOv8k">https://pos.toasttab.com/?srsltid=AfmBOoo8wW91HkpMsshu2DyL9RieQmtrYW9efWs9TGKeXL4NgPDGOv8k</a>
</p>

<p>Toast creates technology to help restaurants and local businesses succeed in a digital world, helping business owners operate, increase sales, engage customers, and keep employees happy.</p>
<p>We are seeking a Senior Enterprise Process Engineer to drive the design and evolution of critical processes across the Enterprise line of business. As our Enterprise business continues to grow, scaling how work flows across teams, systems, and lifecycle stages is essential to delivering a consistent and high-quality customer experience.</p>
<p>This role will focus on analyzing, designing, and improving the operational processes that support the Enterprise customer lifecycle — from acquisition through onboarding, success, support, and renewal. Working closely with stakeholders across Sales, Marketing, Solutions, Onboarding, Customer Success, Care, Billing, Product, and Systems teams, you will identify operational friction, redesign workflows, and ensure scalable processes are implemented effectively.</p>
<p>The ideal candidate brings strong systems thinking, deep process improvement experience, and the ability to drive cross-functional change in a complex, fast-moving environment.</p>
<p><strong>A day in the life (Responsibilities)</strong></p>
<p><strong>Enterprise Process Engineering:&nbsp;</strong></p>
<ul>
<ul>
<li>Map, analyze, and redesign critical operational processes across the Enterprise customer lifecycle to improve scalability, efficiency, and customer outcomes.</li>
<li>Identify opportunities to streamline handoffs, eliminate manual work, and reduce operational friction across teams and systems.</li>
</ul>
</ul>
<p><strong>Cross-Functional Process Improvement Initiatives:</strong></p>
<ul>
<ul>
<li>Partner with leaders across Sales, Solutions, Customer Success, Care, Billing, Product, and Systems teams to drive process redesign efforts that improve how work flows across the Enterprise operating model.</li>
<li>Lead structured process improvement initiatives from problem identification through implementation.</li>
</ul>
</ul>
<p><strong>Systems &amp; Process Alignment:</strong></p>
<ul>
<ul>
<li>Collaborate with internal systems teams to ensure operational processes are properly reflected in supporting tools and platforms, including CRM and lifecycle management systems.</li>
<li>Translate operational requirements into clear system needs and partner with technical teams during implementation.</li>
</ul>
</ul>
<p><strong>Operational Analysis &amp; Root Cause Identification</strong></p>
<ul>
<ul>
<li>Analyze operational performance and identify root causes of inefficiencies, breakdowns, or customer friction.</li>
<li>Use structured methodologies such as process mapping, workflow analysis, and root cause analysis to develop solutions.</li>
</ul>
</ul>
<p><strong>Implementation &amp; Adoption:</strong></p>
<ul>
<ul>
<li>Ensure redesigned processes are effectively implemented and adopted across teams by partnering with stakeholders on rollout plans, documentation, and operational alignment.</li>
<li>Drive accountability and follow-through across cross-functional teams to ensure improvements deliver measurable impact.</li>
</ul>
</ul>
<p><strong>What you'll need to thrive (Requirements)</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>7+ years of experience in process engineering, operations, program management, or business transformation within a SaaS or technology environment</li>
<li>Proven experience designing and implementing cross-functional process improvements</li>
<li>Strong expertise in process mapping, workflow design, and operational analysis</li>
<li>Demonstrated ability to drive change across multiple teams without direct authority</li>
<li>Strong systems thinking and understanding of how tooling, process, and lifecycle operations intersect</li>
<li>Experience working with enterprise operational systems such as Salesforce, DocuSign, ServiceNow, or customer lifecycle tooling</li>
<li>Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills (written and verbal)</li>
<li>Ability to thrive in ambiguity and bring structure to complex operational challenges</li>
<li>Demonstrates curiosity for and comfort experimenting with emerging technologies and tools (including AI-driven productivity and workflow automation) that can improve operational efficiency</li>
<li>Lean Six Sigma Green Belt certified (or equivalent)</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>AI at Toast</strong></p>
<p>At Toast, one of our company values is that we're hungry to build and learn. We believe learning new AI tools empowers us to build for our customers faster, more independently, and with higher quality. We provide these tools across all disciplines, from Engineering and Product to Sales and Support, and are inspired by how our Toasters are already driving real value with them. The people who thrive here are those who embrace changes that let us build more for our customers; it’s a core part of our culture.</p>
<p><strong>Our Total Rewards Philosophy&nbsp;</strong><br>We strive to provide competitive compensation and benefits programs that help to attract, retain, and motivate the best and brightest people in our industry. Our total rewards package goes beyond great earnings potential and provides the means to a healthy lifestyle with the flexibility to meet Toasters’ changing needs. Learn more about our benefits at&nbsp;<a class="c-link" href="https://careers.toasttab.com/toast-benefits">https://careers.toasttab.com/toast-benefits</a>.</p>
<div class="content-pay-transparency">
<div class="pay-input">
<div class="description">
<p>The base salary range for this role is listed below. The starting salary will be determined based on skills, experience, and geographic location. In addition to base salary, our total rewards components include cash compensation (overtime, bonus/commissions if eligible), equity, and benefits. You can learn more about how we align pay with local labor markets in our&nbsp;<a class="in-cell-link" href="https://careers.toasttab.com/us-pay-zones">Geographic Pay Zone Philosophy</a>.</p>
</div>
<div class="title">Zone A</div>
<div class="pay-range">$142,000—$227,000 USD</div>
</div>
<div class="pay-input">
<div class="title">Zone B</div>
<div class="pay-range">$123,000—$197,000 USD</div>
</div>
<div class="pay-input">
<div class="title">Zone C</div>
<div class="pay-range">$111,000—$178,000 USD</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="content-conclusion">
<p><strong>How Toast Uses AI in its Hiring Process</strong></p>
<p>Throughout the hiring process, our goal is to get to know you. We use AI tools to support our recruiters and interviewers with tasks like note-taking, summarization, and documentation of interviews to ensure they can be fully focused on your conversation. All hiring decisions are made by people.</p>
<p><strong>Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion is Baked into our Recipe for Success</strong></p>
<p>At Toast, our employees are our secret ingredient—when they thrive, we thrive.&nbsp;The restaurant industry is one of the most diverse, and we embrace that diversity with authenticity, inclusivity, respect, and humility. By embedding these principles into our culture and design, we create equitable opportunities for all and raise the bar in delivering exceptional experiences.</p>
<p><strong>We Thrive Together</strong></p>
<p>We embrace a hybrid work model that fosters in-person collaboration while valuing individual needs. Our goal is to build a strong culture of connection as we work together to empower the restaurant community. To learn more about how we work globally and regionally, check out:&nbsp;<a class="c-link" href="https://careers.toasttab.com/locations-toast">https://careers.toasttab.com/locations-toast</a>.</p>
<p><strong>Apply today!</strong></p>
<p>Toast is committed to creating an accessible and inclusive hiring process. As part of this commitment, we strive to provide reasonable accommodations for persons with disabilities to enable them to access the hiring process. If you need an accommodation to access the job application or interview process, please contact&nbsp;<a href="mailto:candidateaccommodations@toasttab.com">candidateaccommodations@toasttab.com</a>.</p>
<p><em>------</em></p>
<p><em>For roles in the United States, it is unlawful in Massachusetts to require or administer a lie detector test as a condition of employment or continued employment. An employer who violates this law shall be subject to criminal penalties and civil liability.</em></p>
</div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/toast-senior-enterprise-process-engineer">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/toast-senior-enterprise-process-engineer</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Zscaler: Senior Manager, Creative Design and Media</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> USA - Update Location
</p>

<div class="job__description body"><div><p>About <strong>Zscaler</strong></p><br><p>Zscaler is a pioneer and global leader in zero trust security. The world’s largest businesses, critical infrastructure organizations, and government agencies rely on Zscaler to secure users, branches, applications, data &amp; devices, and to accelerate digital transformation initiatives. Distributed across more than 160 data centers globally, the Zscaler Zero Trust Exchange platform combined with advanced AI combats billions of cyber threats and policy violations every day and unlocks productivity gains for modern enterprises by reducing costs and complexity.</p><br><p>Here, <strong>impact in your role matters more than title</strong> and trust is built on results. We believe in transparency and value <strong>constructive, honest debate</strong>—we’re focused on getting to the best ideas, faster. We build high-performing teams that can make an impact quickly and with high quality. To do this, we are building a culture of execution centered on <strong>customer obsession,</strong> collaboration, ownership and accountability.&nbsp;</p><br><p>We champion an “AI Forward, People First” philosophy to help us accelerate and innovate, empowering our people to embrace their potential. If you’re driven by purpose, thrive on solving complex challenges and want to make a positive difference on a global scale, we invite you to bring your talents to Zscaler to help shape the future of cybersecurity.</p></div><div><p>We are actively seeking an accomplished Manager to lead our team of Content Writers and SEO/AEO specialists. In this role, you will play a critical role in how customers discover, experience, and engage with Zscaler across search engines and AI-powered platforms. You will lead our SEO and Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) strategy to increase organic visibility, drive qualified traffic, and continuously improve the digital experience across <a href="http://zscaler.com">zscaler.com</a>. You will also lead a global team of experts that contribute to our portfolio of public facing web properties. You will also closely collaborate with our head of global web, web engineering, and UX design teams to deliver world-class experiences for both end users and agents.&nbsp;</p><br><p><strong>What You’ll Do (Role Expectations)</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Lead Zscaler’s global SEO and AEO strategy, focusing on increasing organic traffic, keyword rankings, and visibility across AI-driven search landscapes.</li><br><li>Manage and develop a global team of SEO specialists and web content writers, shaping search-informed editorial strategies that align with customer needs and buyer journeys.</li><br><li>Own technical SEO and site performance initiatives, collaborating directly with web engineering teams to improve crawl efficiency, page speed, and overall site health.</li><br><li>Champion user experience improvements by identifying opportunities to enhance clarity, usability, and conversion across key public-facing web pages.</li><br><li>Establish SEO/AEO success metrics, track performance, and communicate measurable business impact to marketing leadership while advocating for best practices across the broader organization.</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>Who You Are (Success Profile)</strong></p><br><ul><br><li><strong>You thrive in ambiguity. </strong>You're comfortable building the path as you walk it. You thrive in a dynamic environment, seeing ambiguity not as a hindrance, but as the raw material to build something meaningful.</li><br><li><strong>You act like an owner. </strong>Your passion for the mission fuels your bias for action. You operate with integrity because you genuinely care about the outcome. True ownership involves leveraging dynamic range: the ability to navigate seamlessly between high-level strategy and hands-on execution.</li><br><li><strong>You are a problem-solver. </strong>You love running towards the challenges because you are laser-focused on finding the solution, knowing that solving the hard problems delivers the biggest impact.</li><br><li><strong>You are a high-trust collaborator. </strong>You are ambitious for the team, not just yourself. You embrace our challenge culture by giving and receiving ongoing feedback—knowing that candor delivered with clarity and respect is the truest form of teamwork and the fastest way to earn trust.</li><br><li><strong>You are a learner. </strong>You have a true growth mindset and are obsessed with your own development, actively seeking feedback to become a better partner and a stronger teammate. You love what you do and you do it with purpose.</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>What We’re Looking For (Minimum Qualifications)</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Extensive experience in SEO/AEO, UX, or digital growth roles, specifically within B2B SaaS or the enterprise technology sector.</li><br><li>Proven ability to lead and develop professional teams and execute complex SEO strategies at a global scale.</li><br><li>Strong understanding of technical SEO, site architecture, and performance optimization.</li><br><li>Demonstrated experience collaborating with engineering, UX design, and marketing teams to deliver digital projects.</li><br><li>A data-driven mindset with a focus on translating search metrics into measurable business impact.</li><br></ul><br><p>#LI-Remote</p><br><p>#LI-DS9</p></div><div class="job__pay-ranges"><div class="pay-range"><div class="description"><div class="body"><span><p>Zscaler’s salary ranges are benchmarked and are determined by role and level. The range displayed on each job posting reflects the minimum and maximum target for new hire salaries for the position across all US locations and could be higher or lower based on a multitude of factors, including job-related skills, experience, and relevant education or training.</p><br><p>The base salary range listed for this full-time position excludes commission/ bonus/ equity (if applicable) + benefits.</p></span></div></div><p class="body body--medium">Base Pay Range</p><p class="body">$133,000 - $190,000 USD</p></div></div><div><p>At Zscaler, we are committed to building a team that reflects the communities we serve and the customers we work with. We foster an inclusive environment that values all backgrounds and perspectives, emphasizing collaboration and belonging. Join us in our mission to make doing business seamless and secure.</p><br><p>Our Benefits program is one of the most important ways we support our employees. Zscaler proudly offers comprehensive and inclusive benefits to meet the diverse needs of our employees and their families throughout their life stages, including:</p><br><div class="has-nudge"><br><ul><br><li>Various health plans</li><br><li>Time off plans for vacation and sick time</li><br><li>Parental leave options</li><br><li>Retirement options</li><br><li>Education reimbursement</li><br><li>In-office perks, and more!</li><br></ul><br><p>Learn more about Zscaler’s Future of Work strategy, hybrid working model, and benefits <a href="https://www.zscaler.com/careers">here</a>.</p><br></div><br><p>By applying for this role, you adhere to applicable laws, regulations, and Zscaler policies, including those related to security and privacy standards and guidelines.</p><br><p class="p1">Zscaler is committed to providing equal employment opportunities to all individuals. We strive to create a workplace where employees are treated with respect and have the chance to succeed. All qualified applicants will be considered for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex (including pregnancy or related medical conditions), age, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, genetic information, disability status, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state, or local laws. <em>See more information by clicking on the </em><a href="https://www.eeoc.gov/sites/default/files/2023-06/22-088_EEOC_KnowYourRights6.12ScreenRdr.pdf"><em>Know Your Rights: Workplace Discrimination is Illegal </em></a><em>link.</em></p><br><p>Pay Transparency</p><br><p>Zscaler complies with all applicable federal, state, and local pay transparency rules.</p><br><p>Zscaler is committed to providing reasonable support (called accommodations or adjustments) in our recruiting processes for candidates who are differently abled, have long term conditions, mental health conditions or sincerely held religious beliefs, or who are neurodivergent or require pregnancy-related support.</p></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/zscaler-senior-manager-creative-design-and-media">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/zscaler-senior-manager-creative-design-and-media</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Housecall Pro: Senior Product Operations Manager I</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> United States
</p>

<div class=""><br><p><strong>Why Housecall Pro?</strong></p><br><p>Help us build solutions that build better lives. At Housecall Pro, we show up to work every day to make a difference for real people: the home service professionals that support America’s 100 million homes. We’re all about the Pro, and dedicate our days to helping them streamline operations, scale their businesses, and—ultimately—save time so they can be with their families and live well. We care deeply about our customers and foster a culture where our company, employees, and Pros grow and succeed together. Leadership is as focused on growing team members’ careers as they expect their teams to be on creating solutions for Pros.&nbsp; We also offer:</p><br><ul><br><li>A generous benefits program that supports the whole you with medical, dental, vision, life, disability, and 401(k)</li><br><li>Paid holidays and flexible, take-it-as-you-need-it paid time off&nbsp;</li><br><li>Equity in a rapidly growing startup backed by top-tier VCs</li><br><li>Monthly tech reimbursements</li><br><li>A culture built on innovation that values big ideas, no matter where they come from</li><br></ul><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p><strong>Role Overview</strong></p><br><p>As a Senior Product Operations Manager for Partnerships, you own the strategy for how Housecall Pro engages with our largest franchise and enterprise partners. You are responsible for deeply understanding partner business models, identifying product opportunities, and driving strategic alignment between partner needs and our product roadmap.</p><br><p>You serve as a trusted advisor to both partners and internal Product leadership—translating complex partner requirements into strategic product recommendations and conducting research that shapes where we invest. You work closely with Product, Engineering, and Business Development leaders to ensure we're building the right solutions for our most strategic accounts.</p><br><p>Our team is passionate, empathetic, hard working, and above all else focused on improving the lives of our service professionals (our Pros). Our success is their success.</p><br><p><strong>What you do each day:</strong></p><br><p><span>Own Partnerships Strategy</span></p><br><ul><br><li>Define and drive the strategic approach for engaging with franchise and enterprise partners</li><br><li>Build frameworks for evaluating partner requirements, assessing business impact, and prioritizing investments</li><br><li>Identify patterns across partners to surface strategic opportunities that inform product direction</li><br><li>Develop metrics to measure partnership health, product delivery effectiveness, and business impact</li><br></ul><br><p><span>Research &amp; Influence Product Direction</span></p><br><ul><br><li>Conduct market research on franchise, distributor, and supplier models to identify product opportunities</li><br><li>Perform competitive analysis to understand how partners evaluate solutions and where gaps exist</li><br><li>Synthesize partner feedback and market insights into strategic recommendations for Product leadership</li><br><li>Partner with Product Managers and Directors to translate research into roadmap priorities</li><br></ul><br><p><span>Lead Partner Engagement</span></p><br><ul><br><li>Serve as the senior technical point of contact for strategic partners, managing executive-level relationships</li><br><li>Lead discovery sessions to deeply understand partner business requirements, operational challenges, and growth objectives</li><br><li>Present to partner executives on product roadmaps, integration capabilities, and strategic solutions</li><br><li>Handle escalations and complex technical challenges, providing strategic guidance on solutions and timelines</li><br></ul><br><p><span>Drive Cross-Functional Execution</span></p><br><ul><br><li>Lead cross-functional teams across Engineering, Product, Legal, and Business Development to deliver partner solutions</li><br><li>Coordinate API integrations and technical implementations with Engineering teams</li><br><li>Manage complex, multi-stakeholder projects from requirements through delivery</li><br><li>Ensure seamless handoffs between Business Development, Implementation, and ongoing Account Management</li><br></ul><br><p><span>Scale the Function</span></p><br><ul><br><li>Build scalable processes, SOPs, and playbooks that enable the partnerships function to grow</li><br><li>Establish escalation workflows, communication protocols, and prioritization frameworks</li><br><li>Identify opportunities to improve operational efficiency through AI tooling and automation</li><br><li>Mentor team members and develop best practices that elevate partnerships capabilities</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>Qualifications:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>5+ years experience in technical account management, product operations, product management, or strategy consulting</li><br><li>1+ years experience leading and mentoring others</li><br><li>Bachelor's degree in related field or equivalent work experience</li><br><li>Experience working with enterprise software integrations and APIs</li><br><li>Strong understanding of SaaS business models and franchise/enterprise operations</li><br><li>Proven ability to conduct market research and translate findings into strategic recommendations</li><br><li>Ability to influence without authority and drive alignment across senior stakeholders</li><br><li>Experience managing complex, multi-stakeholder projects</li><br><li>Willingness to travel as needed to support partners (typically 15-20% annually)</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>What will help you succeed:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Experience in B2B SaaS or enterprise software environments, particularly with franchise or multi-location businesses</li><br><li>Strong communication skills with ability to present to executive audiences (internal and partner)Strong affinity for product strategy—you can connect partner needs to product opportunities</li><br><li>Excellent organizational and project management skills</li><br><li>Deep understanding of how Product organizations operate and make prioritization decisions</li><br><li>Analytical mindset with ability to synthesize qualitative and quantitative data into insights</li><br><li>Experience with product management tools (Jira Product Discovery, Confluence) and AI/automation platforms (Claude, ChatGPT, n8n, Zapier)</li><br><li>Comfort with ambiguity and ability to translate complex partner challenges into actionable problem statements</li><br><li>Customer empathy with ability to balance partner advocacy with business priorities</li><br></ul><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p><span>Founded in 2013, Housecall Pro helps home service professionals (Pros) streamline every aspect of their business. With easy-to-use tools for scheduling, dispatching, payments, and more, Housecall Pro enables Pros to save time, grow profitably, and provide best-in-class service.</span></p><br><p><span>Housecall Pro’s brand portfolio includes Business Coaching by Housecall Pro, a business coaching solution for home services businesses. Our brands are united by a singular mission to champion our Pros to success.</span></p><br><p>We support more than 40,000 businesses and have over 1,800 ambitious, mission-driven, genuinely fun-loving teammates across the globe. If you want to do work that impacts real people, supported by a team that will invest in you every step of the way, we’d love to hear from you</p><br><p><span>Housecall Pro celebrates diversity and we are committed to creating an inclusive environment.&nbsp; We are an equal opportunity employer and do not discriminate on the basis of gender, race, religion, national origin, ethnicity, disability, gender identity/expression, sexual orientation, veteran or military status, or any other category protected under the law. </span><strong>#LI-Remote</strong></p><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p><strong><em>Location Dependent Information</em></strong></p><br><p><em>This role is open to candidates and the expected salary range for this role is </em><em>$120,000-$149,000 + equity</em><em>. The specific salary for the successful candidate will be determined based on permissible, non-discriminatory factors such as skills, experience, and geographic location. This role is also eligible to participate in Housecall Pro’s equity plan and the following benefits: health care insurance (medical, dental, vision, disability), employee assistance program, 401(K), flexible time off, paid parental leave, tech reimbursement, and other company benefits. Housecall Pro is growing fast and we’re scaling our team to help enable and accelerate our growth.</em></p><br><p><a href="https://www.housecallpro.com/privacy/ca-job-candidates/">Privacy Notice for California Job Candidates - Housecall Pro</a></p><br></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/housecall-pro-senior-product-operations-manager-i">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/housecall-pro-senior-product-operations-manager-i</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Monograph: Content Marketer (Product)</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> US, Remote
</p>

<div class=""><br><div class="content-intro"><p><strong>Look around you today, every store, home, hospital, school, was made possible by the coordination of architects and a team of professionals. They are charged with the responsibility of creating our shelters and yet, they are left with nothing more than Excel to manage their work. We're here to change that.&nbsp;</strong></p><br><h2><strong>What is Monograph?<br></strong></h2><br><h4><strong><span><strong>Monograph is a firm performance management platform for architecture and engineering practices. Firms use Monograph to make quick and confident decisions about budgeting and resources to drive their practices forward.</strong> </span><br></strong></h4><br><h2><strong>Why Work at Monograph?</strong></h2><br><p><strong>People first:&nbsp;</strong>Core to the team, we believe in people first, curiosity, and empathy. You'll be a culture ambassador and deploy your genuine value for relationships to drive success and happiness.</p><br><p><strong>Build a company that will redefine architecture:&nbsp;</strong>Project management is just the beginning...we have big ambitions to help facilitate the entire design process from becoming the document source of truth to coordinating with consultants. You can shape the future of building design.</p><br><p><strong>Work with some of the best product people in the world:</strong>&nbsp;We’re an innovative team of highly productive individual contributors with a strong design background. You will be doing some of the best work of your life.</p><br><p>&nbsp;</p></div><br><h3>We're looking for a content creator who's passionate about bringing software products to life through standout visuals, demos, and videos.</h3><br><p>This is a hands-on, content-heavy role focused on creating product assets that grab attention, clearly communicate value, and cut through the noise in competitive markets. <br><br>You’ll have the freedom to develop and experiment with new formats and styles of product storytelling—from interactive demos to high-impact short-form videos—while working closely with the design and marketing teams to ensure every asset is polished, on-brand, and built to drive engagement. If you’ve worked on product-focused content before and want to deepen your craft, this role is a chance to build world-class product content that fuels campaigns across social, email, ads, and beyond.</p><br><h3>What You’ll Do</h3><br><ul><br><li>Produce pixel-perfect product demos, videos, and visuals that highlight key features and communicate product value instantly.</li><br><li>Experiment with new content formats and flows, figuring out which screens, data, and user scenarios resonate most.</li><br><li>Create content for multiple channels — including social media, email campaigns, paid ads, etc.</li><br><li>Collaborate with design to apply brand standards and leverage Figma files for product updates.</li><br><li>Edit and sequence videos so the most important value hits in the first few seconds.</li><br><li>Fill demos with realistic, customer-relevant data and polish every interaction (e.g., smooth mouse movements).</li><br><li>Build reusable templates and content patterns that scale with product releases.</li><br><li>Partner with the Growth Marketer to test, measure, and iterate on content performance.</li><br><li>Use customer data, sales demos, and case studies to refine product-focused visuals and demos.</li><br></ul><br><h3>What You Bring</h3><br><ul><br><li>3–5 years of experience in content creation, product storytelling or related roles.</li><br><li>A portfolio showcasing polished product-focused videos, demos, or visual assets.</li><br><li>Strong experience with video production and editing skills including sequencing and motion.</li><br><li>A knack for creating fresh and attention-grabbing formats that stand out.</li><br><li>A love for detail: smooth motion, perfect layouts, crisp UI representations.</li><br><li>Familiarity with modern design, video, and AI content tools (see below), with the ability to quickly learn new ones.</li><br><li>Comfort working in a fast-paced, iterative environment where testing and optimizing are part of the daily rhythm.</li><br></ul><br><h3>Tools You Will Use (Ideal Experience)</h3><br><ul><br><li><strong>Demo &amp; Video Production:</strong> Arcade (interactive demos), Screenstudio, Capcut, Descript, Premiere.</li><br><li><strong>Graphics &amp; Design:</strong> Figma, Canva, MidJourney, ChatGPT for visual ideation.</li><br><li><strong>Copywriting &amp; AI:</strong> ChatGPT, Claude, AirOps for AI-assisted writing.</li><br><li><strong>Data &amp; Organization:</strong> Google Sheets, Metabase (to analyze product usage), Notion</li><br></ul><br><h3><strong>How This Role Fits into the Team</strong></h3><br><p>This role is part of the marketing team and reports to our Growth Marketer. While the Growth Marketer sets campaign strategy and goals, you’ll own the creation of product-focused content (demos, videos, and visuals) that bring those campaigns to life. You’ll work closely with design and product teams to ensure every asset is visually polished, on-brand, and aligned with growth objectives.</p><br><h3><strong>Compensation<br></strong></h3><br><p>$70,000 - $80,000/year depending on experience in addition to our amazing benefits package and opportunities for growth.&nbsp;<br><br><em>We encourage individuals from underrepresented backgrounds, including women and minorities, to apply for this position. We believe in creating a diverse and inclusive workplace and welcome candidates who may not meet every listed requirement but are eager to contribute and grow within our team. Even if you don't meet every requirement, we still encourage you to apply.</em></p><br><div class="content-conclusion"><br><h2><strong>You'll Love Our Benefits</strong></h2><br><p> Innovative engineering and product culture</p><br><p> Early-stage well-funded company</p><br><p>️ Inclusion and diversity as a company priority</p><br><p><br><strong>And for US-based, full-time employees:&nbsp;</strong></p><br><p> 100% premium coverage on our healthcare plans for employees and their families</p><br><p> Dental &amp; vision coverage for employees and families&nbsp;</p><br><p> New laptop &amp; equipment</p><br><p>‍️ Wellness Stipend</p><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p>&nbsp;</p></div><br></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/monograph-content-marketer-product">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/monograph-content-marketer-product</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Wallarm: Senior DevOps Engineer - Node</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Belgrade, 00, Serbia
</p>

<div class="sc-1gch2qa-0 fhKCjg"><div><div class="sc-gfrfnr-2 deOrHQ"></div><div class="sc-18h7are-0 ebVyJP"><div class="sc-1tu9fip-2 ezRMeN"><div class="sc-1tu9fip-1 kdUgoN"><div class="sc-1tu9fip-3 iFQjUO"><div class="sc-ji5wy4-0 jIYAZB"><div><div><div><div><div class="sc-1uwf3m5-2 ipgOZn"><div class="sc-1v95195-0 jscoSJ"><div><div><h2 class="sc-1npqnwg-4 sc-1npqnwg-5 sc-1uwf3m5-0 bCpSTt custom-css-style-job-description">Job description</h2><div class="sc-1fwbcuw-0 kGSqaG"><div><p><strong>Short facts about us:</strong></p><ul><li><p>We are a global remote-first team of 150+ people on 4 continents and in 10+ countries.</p></li><li><p>We have been protecting our clients since 2016.</p></li><li><p>The company has recently closed its Series C round in the amount of $55 million.</p></li><li><p>More than 200 customers around the world, including Fortune 500, Nasdaq, and high-growth startups choose Wallarm to protect their API and web applications.</p></li><li><p>The company passed Y Combinator, the most prestigious incubator in Silicon Valley, from which Dropbox, Stripe, Docker, etc. came out.</p></li></ul><p><strong><br>Our product:</strong></p><p>Wallarm API security solutions provide proven performance to support innovative companies serving millions of users and billions of API requests per month. Hundreds of Security and DevOps teams globally use Wallarm daily to:</p><ol><li><p><strong>Discover</strong>. See every asset across your entire attack surface—from cloud environments to every API endpoint with auto-discovery capabilities.</p></li><li><p><strong>Protect</strong>. A single suite that goes beyond OWASP Top 10 for full coverage for API specific threats, account takeover, malicious bots, L7 DDoS, and more.</p></li><li><p><strong>Respond</strong>. Streamline incident response with complete visibility, smart triggers, and active threat verification.</p></li><li><p><strong>Test</strong>. Automate security testing of your APIs and web assets. Prioritize remediation for every asset, in every environment.</p></li></ol><p><strong><br>Technology stack:</strong></p><ul><li><p>Cloud: GCP, AWS, Azure</p></li><li><p>Containers and Orchestrators: Docker, Kubernetes</p></li><li><p>Scripting: Python, Golang</p></li><li><p>Monitoring: Prometheus, Grafana, EFK</p></li><li><p>OS: Linux</p></li><li><p>Automatizations tools: Terraform, Ansible, internal&nbsp;tooling</p></li></ul><p><strong><br>About this opportunity:</strong></p><p>We are actively seeking a skilled professional to join our dynamic team and play a pivotal role in the continued success of our core product, <strong>Wallarm Node.</strong> Wallarm Node is the heart of our platform, and its distribution is complex and wide-ranging. We currently support over 20 distribution channels, enabling our customers to deploy Wallarm seamlessly across diverse infrastructures. This expansive distribution model includes, but is not limited to:</p><ul><li><p><strong>Traditional Package Managers:</strong> Managing and releasing official Linux packages (e.g., .deb, .rpm) for various distributions.</p></li><li><p><strong>Containerization:</strong> Maintaining and optimizing our official Docker images for deployment agility.</p></li><li><p><strong>Orchestration:</strong> Developing and supporting deployments within Kubernetes environments, particularly focusing on robust Kubernetes Ingress integrations.</p></li><li><p><strong>Cloud Native Solutions:</strong> Expanding and streamlining deployments in other modern, cloud-native contexts.</p></li></ul><p>As a Senior DevOps Engineer working on Wallarm Node, you will be instrumental in maintaining, enhancing, and expanding this intricate distribution ecosystem. Your work will directly impact our ability to deliver cutting-edge security and performance to our global customer base.</p><p><strong><br>In this role you will:</strong></p><ul><li><p>Architect and continuously optimize the CI/CD process to maximize product delivery speed and reliability.</p></li><li><p>Embed deep collaboration with Dev and QA teams to uphold and improve product quality across the release spectrum.</p></li><li><p>Provide advanced technical support to customers to resolve product-related issues.</p></li><li><p>Drive infrastructure-as-code management using Terraform.</p></li><li><p>Develop high-performance automation scripts using Bash, Python, and GoLang.</p></li><li><p>Build custom applications, primarily in GoLang, to enhance CI/CD capabilities.</p></li></ul></div></div><h2 class="sc-1npqnwg-4 sc-1npqnwg-5 sc-1uwf3m5-0 sc-1uwf3m5-1 jconWg custom-css-style-job-requirements">Job requirements</h2><div class="sc-1fwbcuw-0 kGSqaG"><div><p><strong>In this role you’ll need:</strong></p><ul><li><p>Deep expertise in designing and managing high-volume CI/CD processes, with a strong preference for Gitlab-based systems.</p></li><li><p>Deep practical knowledge of cloud-native Kubernetes environments.</p></li><li><p>Strong command of major cloud platforms (GCP and AWS).</p></li><li><p>Demonstrated experience integrating advanced, AI-driven development practices into CI/CD workflows.</p></li><li><p>Proficiency in Bash and Python for scripting.</p></li><li><p>Solid experience in Linux infrastructure administration.</p></li></ul><p><strong><br>Will be a plus:</strong></p><ul><li><p>Experience with C lang and GoLang for systems development is a significant advantage.</p></li></ul><p><strong><br>What we offer:</strong></p><ul><li><p>Ability to work on a product that makes the Internet safer</p></li><li><p>Completely remote work and&nbsp;flexible working hours</p></li><li><p>Competitive salary and bonuses</p></li><li><p>Paid days off</p></li><li><p>Medical insurance</p></li><li><p>Working equipment</p></li><li><p>Professional development and career growth</p></li></ul></div></div></div></div><div class="sc-1uwf3m5-4 fKDjfR"><div class="sc-e5uvhz-0 kHqIkC"><div class="sc-e5uvhz-8 ekemGm"></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div></div><div><div><div class="sc-1f8x0pm-0 ibrjJt"><div><h3 class="sc-1npqnwg-4 sc-1npqnwg-5 sc-1f8x0pm-1 gVOpbB">All done!</h3><p class="sc-1npqnwg-9 sc-1npqnwg-10 bSQmQg">Your application has been successfully submitted!</p></div><div class="sc-1f8x0pm-2 dvyFlr"><a class="sc-s03za1-0 igwPrp custom-css-style-application-success-button" href="/">Other jobs</a></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/wallarm-senior-devops-engineer-node">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/wallarm-senior-devops-engineer-node</a></p>
</description>
