    <item>
      <title>Consensys: Staff Product Manager - MetaMask (Networks)</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> GLOBAL - Remote
</p>

<p>Consensys is the leading blockchain and web3 software company founded by Joe Lubin, CEO of Consensys and Co-Founder of Ethereum. Since 2014, Consensys has been at the forefront of innovation, pioneering technological developments within the web3 ecosystem.</p><br><p>Through our product suite, including the MetaMask platform, Infura, Linea, Diligence, and our NFT toolkit Phosphor, we have become the trusted collaborator for users, creators, and developers on their path to build and belong in the world they want to see.</p><br><p>Whether building a dapp, an NFT collection, a portfolio, or a better future, the instinct to build is universal. Consensys inspires and champions the builder instinct in everyone by making web3 universally easy to use and develop on.</p><br><p>Our mission is to unlock the collaborative power of communities by making the decentralized web universally easy to access, use, and build on.&nbsp;</p><br><p>You’ll get to work on the tools, infrastructure, and apps that scale these platforms to onboard one billion participants and 5 million developers. You’ll be constantly exposed to new concepts, ideas, and frameworks from your peers, and as you work on different projects — challenging you to stay at the top of your game. You’ll join a network of builders that reaches the edge of our ecosystem. Consensys alumni have moved on to become tech entrepreneurs, CEOs, and team leads at tech companies.&nbsp;</p><br><p><strong>About the Networks Team</strong></p><br><p>The Networks team is responsible for making blockchain connectivity inside MetaMask feel invisible, reliable, and trustworthy—no matter which chain a user is interacting with. This includes ownership of EVM and non-EVM network connectivity, network switching, chain discovery, RPC configuration, performance and reliability, safety, L2s, custom networks, and the speed at which MetaMask can safely support new networks.</p><br><p>As a Staff Product Manager, you will own the strategy and execution of MetaMask’s network layer—one of the most critical and complex parts of the wallet. You will shape how MetaMask scales across emerging EVM chains and key non-EVM ecosystems, ensuring network expansion aligns with MetaMask’s broader product and business strategy while maintaining best-in-class reliability and user trust.</p><br><p>This is a high-impact, cross-cutting role. The network experience underpins every MetaMask feature, from asset visibility to swaps, bridges, and dapp interactions. You will operate as a domain owner and strategic partner across Product, Engineering, Design, Security and Data.</p><br><p>The network layer is the foundation of MetaMask. Every transaction, asset view, and dapp interaction depends on it being fast, reliable, and secure. As Staff PM for Networks, you will directly shape MetaMask’s ability to scale across a multi-chain future—supporting emerging ecosystems while maintaining the trust of hundreds of millions of users. Your work will determine how confidently and seamlessly users can access Web3 at global scale.</p><br><p><strong>What you’ll do</strong><span><br></span></p><br><ul><br><li>Own the end-to-end network experience across MetaMask Extension and Mobile, including network switching, chain discovery, custom networks, RPC configuration, and L2 support.</li><br><li>Define and drive the long-term product strategy for network connectivity across EVM and non-EVM ecosystems, aligning network expansion with MetaMask’s overall product and business strategy.</li><br><li>Lead initiatives to make network connectivity invisible and reliable for users by improving performance, reducing errors, and minimizing user-facing network complexity.</li><br><li>Own the product approach to supporting emerging EVM chains and key non-EVM networks, including criteria, launch processes, and time-to-support improvements.</li><br><li>Collaborate with PMs across MetaMask to ensure the network layer enables seamless, predictable user flows across the wallet.</li><br><li>Set clear product goals, success metrics, and execution plans; prioritize initiatives that balance user experience, technical feasibility, ecosystem impact, and commercial opportunity.</li><br><li>Communicate product vision and decisions clearly across teams and stakeholders.</li><br><li>Act as a Staff-level multiplier, influencing product direction beyond your immediate team and raising the bar for product thinking in technically complex domains.</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>What we're looking for&nbsp;</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>8+ years of product management experience, ideally in consumer apps in crypto and/or fintech.</li><br><li>Demonstrated ability to operate at Staff scope: setting strategy, driving alignment across multiple teams, and owning outcomes beyond a single feature area.</li><br><li>Proven ability to ship high-impact consumer products end-to-end.</li><br><li>Deep user empathy paired with the ability to abstract away technical complexity into simple, trustworthy user experiences.</li><br><li>Excellent communicator who can influence senior stakeholders and clearly articulate tradeoffs, priorities, and decisions.</li><br><li>Thrives in ambiguity and is energized by building systems that must scale alongside rapidly evolving ecosystems.</li><br><li>Skilled in collaborating with designers and engineers to deliver beautiful, performant UX.</li><br><li>Experienced in using analytics and A/B testing to guide product iteration.</li><br><li>Strong enthusiasm and expertise in Web3, blockchains and emerging technologies in this space.</li><br></ul><br><p><span>Don't meet all the requirements? Don't sweat it. We’re passionate about building a diverse team of humans and as such, if you think you've got what it takes for our chaotic-but-fun, remote-friendly, start-up environment—apply anyway, detailing your relevant transferable skills in your cover letter. While we have a pretty good idea of what we need, we're ready for you to challenge our thinking on who needs to be in this role</span><span>.</span></p><br><p><span><span>It is a requirement of employment in this position that applicants will be required to submit to background checks including but not limited to employment, education and criminal record checks. Further details will be provided to applicants that successfully meet the criteria for the position as determined by the company in its sole discretion. By submitting an application for employment, you are acknowledging and consenting to this requirement.</span><em><span> <br></span></em></span></p>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/consensys-staff-product-manager-metamask-networks">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/consensys-staff-product-manager-metamask-networks</a></p>
</description>

      <expires_at>Fri, 15 May 2026 20:30:52 +0000</expires_at>
      <guid>https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/consensys-staff-product-manager-metamask-networks</guid>

    <item>
      <title>Veriff: Senior Software Engineer (Product Platform)</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Tallinn, Spain (Remote), São Paulo
</p>

<div class="p-rich_text_section"><br><div class="p-rich_text_section"><br><div class="p-rich_text_section"><br><p>At Veriff, we verify identities at scale, helping businesses connect with honest people online. Our software verifies over 10,000 government-issued documents from more than 190 countries, and this is growing fast! These are millions of verified identities a year and countless people working behind the scenes to help make the lives of millions—and eventually billions—of people safer online. We are a force for good, and we want to be the standard for trust online.</p><br><p>As a Senior Software Engineer, you will do more than write code—you will help architect scalable systems, mentor engineers, and drive business impact. We are looking for problem solvers like you to ensure this happens.<br><br>The Platform Area supports cross-domain business needs and processes through a common platform infrastructure. The development and evolution of the Veriff Platform are critical to our success. Our platform allows us to quickly adapt our technology to meet the rapidly evolving identity verification market needs and the strong appetite of our teams and customers to use innovative solutions to identify their customers and keep their communities safe. The Veriff platform is a technical area with lots of business and scalability challenges that are key to Veriff’s continuous success.</p><br></div><br><div class="p-rich_text_section"><br><p><strong>You’ll help us protect honest people online by:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Build &amp; Scale: Design high-performance, maintainable, and secure systems that handle millions of verifications.</li><br><li>Lead &amp; Mentor: Set the bar for technical excellence, sharing knowledge and guiding engineers.</li><br><li>Innovate &amp; Optimize: Improve automation, scalability, and reliability.</li><br><li>Own &amp; Deliver: Take responsibility for end-to-end development in collaboration with product and design.</li><br><li>Solve with a Holistic Mindset: Apply curiosity, adaptability, and multi-skill problem-solving to technical challenges.</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>You are the right future Veriffian for the job if you have:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Over 5 years of experience building large-scale applications</li><br><li>Long-term experience in NodeJS using TypeScript</li><br><li>Ownership experience of a specific component, feature, or system</li><br><li>A proven track record in developing, debugging, and shipping software products on large code bases</li><br><li>A Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, or a relevant technical field</li><br><li>The ability to inspire growth within teams by setting new standards</li><br></ul><br><p>If you're passionate about coding, problem-solving, and contributing to Veriff's mission, we want to hear from you! Be part of a team that values innovation, collaboration, and excellence.</p><br><p><strong>Elements of Our Tech Stack</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Backend: Node.js (TypeScript), Python, Golang</li><br><li>Frontend: React (TypeScript)</li><br><li>Mobile: Kotlin (Android), Swift (iOS), Dart (Flutter), TypeScript (React Native)</li><br><li>Infrastructure: AWS, Kubernetes, Terraform</li><br><li>Data &amp; ML: PostgreSQL, RabbitMQ, Python-based ML models</li><br></ul><br></div><br></div><br></div><br><div class="p-rich_text_section"><strong>Why Veriff?</strong></div><br><div class="p-rich_text_section">&nbsp;</div><br><div class="p-rich_text_section"><br><div class="p-rich_text_section">We are the preferred identity verification platform partner for the world’s most innovative growth-driven organizations helping conveniently verify and safeguard users anywhere in the world. We support the broadest number of identity documents from nearly every country and territory in the world - and this is continually increasing! With a diverse team in the United States, United Kingdom, Spain, and Estonia, as well as robust backing and funding from investors including Accel, Alkeon, IVP, Tiger Capital, and Y Combinator, we’re dedicated to helping businesses and individuals build a safer and more secure world. We strive to be the benchmark for trust online, and we take pride in being a positive force.&nbsp;</div><br><div class="p-rich_text_section">&nbsp;</div><br><div class="p-rich_text_section">When you join Team Veriff, we offer you the opportunity to have a real impact and advance your career, while looking after you along the way with a range of benefits designed with you in mind. Some of our favorites include...</div><br><ul class="p-rich_text_list p-rich_text_list__bullet"><br><li>Flexibility to work from home</li><br><li>Stock options that ensure your share in our success</li><br><li>Extra recharge days on top of your annual vacation</li><br><li>Comprehensive relocation support to Estonia or Spain</li><br><li>Extensive medical, dental, and vision insurance to ensure you’re feeling great physically and mentally</li><br><li>Learning and Development &amp; Health and Sports budget that you are free to tailor to your own needs</li><br><li>Four weeks of fully paid sabbatical leave after reaching your 5th work anniversary&nbsp;</li><br></ul><br><div class="p-rich_text_section"><em>We are an Equal Opportunities employer committed to a diverse and representative team. Different opinions, perspectives and personalities push us forward. We want to hear from people who are passionate about their work and align with our values. Regardless of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status or disability. We also know the confidence gap and imposter syndrome can get in the way of meeting spectacular candidates - so rest assured, whoever you are, we want to hear from you!</em><span class="c-message__edited_label">&nbsp;</span></div><br></div><br><div class="p-rich_text_section">&nbsp;</div><br><div class="p-rich_text_section">Please be informed that in the final stage of the recruitment process we may request you to go through identity verification. For more information, please see&nbsp;<a class="c-link" href="https://www.veriff.com/recruitment-privacy-policy">Recruitment Privacy Policy</a>.</div><br><div class="p-rich_text_section"><span><br>#LI-FS1#SPB1SPNTAL #LI-Remote</span></div><br><div class="p-rich_text_section">&nbsp;</div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/veriff-senior-software-engineer-product-platform">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/veriff-senior-software-engineer-product-platform</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Chainguard: Staff Product Marketing Manager - Containers</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> United States - Remote
</p>

<div class="job__description body"><div><p><strong>The role, in a nutshell:&nbsp;</strong></p><br><p>This role is for a Staff Product Marketing Manager who will lead ongoing launches and growth initiatives for Chainguard Containers. Chainguard is innovative at its core - the products we build are new and different - and articulating our value in a compelling and credible way is essential to our growth. This role requires strong communication and collaboration skills and experience deeply understanding cloud-native software infrastructure products.</p><br><p><strong>What you’ll do:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Manage ongoing launches of new capabilities, features, and integrations for Chainguard Containers and related tooling, ensuring successful cross-functional rollout across GTM teams and revenue growth.</li><br><li>Drive growth initiatives with content and cross-functional plans that leverage Chainguard’s innovative launches and new use cases for solving supply chain security challenges.</li><br><li>Develop and refine product positioning, messaging, presentations, and core content that articulate Chainguard’s unique value.</li><br><li>Create enablement content and serve as a subject matter expert for sales and sales engineering teams, ensuring the field has the necessary tools and knowledge to succeed.</li><br><li>Contribute to pricing and competitive analysis for Chainguard Containers.&nbsp;</li><br><li>Collaborate with demand generation and corporate marketing teams by helping to develop campaigns, creating necessary content, and presenting at events.</li><br><li>Collaborate with product management and engineering on product strategy.</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>What we're looking for:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>5-7 years of PMM experience in B2B technology, ideally with familiarity in open source software, enterprise security and/or engineering organizations, and technical products.</li><br><li>Ability to manage product launches and go-to-market strategies effectively.</li><br><li>Proven success in cross-functional, highly collaborative roles.</li><br><li>Ability to perform well in a dynamic, rapidly growing environment, balancing both strategic planning and hands-on execution.</li><br><li>Excellent communication skills, capable of conveying complex information in a clear and compelling manner.</li><br></ul></div><div><p><strong>About Us</strong></p><br><p>Chainguard is the secure foundation for software development and deployment. By providing guarded open source software, built from source and updated continuously, Chainguard helps organizations eliminate threats in their software supply chains.</p><br><p>Founded by the industry's leading experts on open source software, security and cloud native development, Chainguard has built the largest library of open source software that is secure by default.&nbsp;</p><br><p>Chainguard’s mission is to be the safe source for open source.</p><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p><strong>We live and breathe our company values:</strong></p><br><p><em>We are customer obsessed</em> - We focus on delivering solutions to our customers that create value and make their lives better.</p><br><p><em>We have a bias for intentional action</em> - We prioritize, plan, try things, and fail fast.</p><br><p><em>We don’t take ourselves too seriously (but we do serious work)</em> - We are solving an important problem which takes focus, but we also like to enjoy the journey.</p><br><p><em>We trust each other and assume good intentions</em> - We’re transparent with decisions to empower team members to make well informed decisions.</p><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p><strong>A few of the benefits we offer:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li><strong>Flexible &amp; Remote-First Culture: </strong>Work remotely with team meetup opportunities, bi-annual destination summits, and a monthly stipend for coworking spaces, phone and internet costs.&nbsp;</li><br><li><strong>Our Approach to Equity:&nbsp; </strong>Receive stock options upon hire and promotion. Plus, you can participate in secondary offerings and have 10 years to exercise your options (yes, you read that correctly: 10 years!).&nbsp;</li><br><li><strong>100%&nbsp; Covered Health Insurance: </strong>We cover 100% of your health, vision and dental insurance premiums for you and your dependents. Nothing comes out of your paycheck.&nbsp;</li><br><li><strong>∞ Flexible Time Off: </strong>Take the time you need – to do our best work, we need to recharge and reset.&nbsp;</li><br><li><strong>18 Weeks Paid Parental Leave: </strong>We offer 18 weeks for birthing parents and 12 weeks for non-birthing parents, with the option to use it all at once or throughout your child's first year.</li><br></ul><br><p>If your experience is close but doesn’t fulfill all requirements, please apply. We’re building the best team in technology and are focused on hiring “Chainguardians'' with unique backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences.</p><br><p>Chainguard is an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based upon race, religion, color, national origin, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth, reproductive health decisions, or related medical conditions), sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, status as a protected veteran, status as an individual with a disability, genetic information, political views or activity, or other applicable legally protected characteristics. We also consider qualified applicants with criminal histories, consistent with applicable federal, state and local law.</p><br><p>By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Chainguard will process your personal data in accordance with <a href="https://www.chainguard.dev/legal/privacy-notice">Chainguard’s Privacy Policy</a>.</p><br><p>©2025 Chainguard. All Rights Reserved.</p></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/chainguard-staff-product-marketing-manager-containers">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/chainguard-staff-product-marketing-manager-containers</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Advocate: Product Engineer, Tech Ops</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> San Francisco, CA / New York City
</p>

<div class="content"><div class="section-wrapper page-full-width"><div class="section page-centered"><div><span> About Advocate</span></div><div><br></div><div><b>Advocate </b><span>(</span><a class="postings-link" href="https://joinadvocate.com">joinadvocate.com</a><span>)</span><b> is transforming how Americans access government benefits. Our mission is to drive the time between need and relief down to zero.</b><span> We have demonstrated significant progress toward this goal by combining proprietary AI-powered technology with expert human care and compassion. This approach provides an unparalleled experience for our claimants and, crucially, supports our government partners by reducing administrative burdens and enabling more efficient eligibility determinations.</span></div><div><br></div><div><span>We’ve proven our cutting-edge AI technology works.</span><b> Now, we are focused on scaling the distribution of our offering and the operations that support it.</b><span> This is a unique challenge that requires a combination of high-tech precision and human-centered support.</span></div><div><br></div><div><span>Tech Ops at Advocate</span></div><div><br></div><div><span>At Advocate, the Tech Ops team is the connective tissue of the organization. We sit at the intersection of technology, marketing, and operations, ensuring these functions remain perfectly synchronized as we scale. We are not an IT support desk; we are front-line builders. We operate in the trenches alongside our internal users who work directly with our claimants. Our mandate is twofold:</span></div><div><br></div><div><b>1. Short-Term Agility:</b><span> We keep the lights on and the systems humming. When roadblocks appear in production, we are there to patch them and ensure our team can continue serving claimants without friction.</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span>2. Long-Term Scalability:</span></b><span> We don't just fix problems; we observe patterns. We recognize recurring operational challenges and build scalable technology solutions that eliminate those hurdles for good.</span></div><div><br></div><div><span>Tech Ops serves at the pleasure of those serving our claimants, empowering them to do their very best work every single day while contributing to our overall mission to drive time-to-relief down to zero.</span></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><span> The Opportunity</span></div><div><br></div><div><b>We are hiring for two Product Engineers to join our Tech Ops team.&nbsp;</b><span>If you join us, these are some of the projects you will likely own:</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span>  The End-to-End Journey Workbench.</span></b><span> This is one of our most ambitious initiatives. We are building a centralized internal workbench to visualize the entire claimant journey, from the first ad click to the final case closure. You will build the connectivity and insights to track every onboarding step, Social Security submission, case data update, medical event, and communication touchpoint. This platform will allow us to see exactly where pipelines fail, where they succeed, and what the actual human experience feels like across the entire lifecycle.</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span> Building the External Claimant Portal. </span></b><span>Today, claimants get updates by talking directly to our case managers. Internal and external user sentiment is overwhelming: we need a portal where users can pull real-time case status, push medical evidence directly from their providers, and receive critical updates. You could own this build from architectural design to user adoption.</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span> Engineering the Growth Engine. </span></b><span>We are scaling our marketing operations. This involves building data warehouse pipelines to trigger outbound communications via platforms like Iterable, integrating with PPC platforms (Google, Meta, Microsoft) for conversion tracking, and ensuring our attribution models are bulletproof. You will be the primary bridge between engineering and our growth team.</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span> AI-Driven Developer Velocity.</span></b><span> We want to turn "I see something" into "We did something" faster than ever. We are building a pipeline that takes change requests from Slack and uses LLMs with full repository context to automatically open a Pull Request for engineer review. We aim to automate the distance between operational feedback and production fixes.</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span> Front-Line Firefighting &amp; System Resilience.</span></b><span> TechOps is a high-availability environment. While we build for the future, we also protect the present. You will field ad hoc requests and production fires, ensuring our claimants never lose access to relief. You will be expected to master the balance between short-term viability and long-term stability: fixing the immediate issue while refactoring the system so it stays fixed for good.</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span> Next-Gen Platform Migration.</span></b><span> As our Platform Engineering team builds the infrastructure to support new government benefits, such as Veterans’ affairs, you will lead the migration and integration of our current tech stack onto this new architecture, ensuring zero downtime for our active operations.</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span> Operational Digitization &amp; Automation.</span></b><span> We still deal with the physical world. You will work on projects to digitize and automate physical mail processing, automate complex government forms, and establish deep observability across all our systems to create a single source of truth for our data.</span></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><span>‍ The Requirements</span></div><div><br></div><div><span>We operate as a high-leverage, specialized unit at Advocate. We are a small team of A-players who value excellence, high availability, and bias for action. We don’t just maintain systems; we are the force multipliers for the entire organization.</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span> Extreme Ownership.</span></b><span> We need proactive drivers who own projects from gut feeling to production success. You don’t ask "Are we there yet?" You build the map and drive the car. You take responsibility for the ongoing success of your work, including opex, user adoption, and long-term stability.</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span> User-Obsessed Iteration.</span></b><span> Great product engineers don't just read tickets; they build relationships with their users. You’ll talk to our users frequently, bounce ideas off them, and humble yourself to build what they actually need. You treat user feedback and system data as your primary north star.</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span> Observability over Guesswork.</span></b><span> You believe that if it isn't measured, it isn't finished. You bake deep observability into every system you build so that data, not just opinions, drives our roadmap. By making system health and user behavior visible, you ease the burden of decision-making and allow the team to move faster with higher confidence.</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span> Massive Imperfect Action.</span></b><span> You have a heavy bias toward shipping. You understand that the perfect tenth iteration is only possible after shipping versions one through nine. You’d rather ship a helpful MVP today and iterate tomorrow than spend a month in a back room building a masterpiece that no one asked for.</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span> Optimistic Problem Solvers.</span></b><span> TechOps is challenging. Between scaling systems, shipping complex features, and handling a stream of support requests, things get hard. We need people who won't get disheartened, people who will collaborate, iterate, and ship their way out of any corner.</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span> The "Camera On" Mindset.</span></b><span> This isn't a role for the lone wolf developer. You are part of a high-availability, highly collaborative team. You are comfortable being disrupted, you stay available to your peers, and you thrive in an environment where communication is constant and transparent.</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span> Technical Excellence in the Age of AI.</span></b><span> While AI helps us move faster, you provide the foundational CS principles and architectural oversight that tools can't. You focus on scalability, maintainability, and deep observability. You ensure the systems we build are well-architected, stable, and easy to support when they break.</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span> The Support-Build Balance.</span></b><span> You have the patience and professional maturity to balance new system build-outs with the reality of ongoing support. You take pride in maintaining a healthy codebase and refactoring systems to ensure they remain reliable as we grow.</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span> Trust and Feedback over Process.</span></b><span> We value autonomy over control. You are expected to give and receive direct, constructive feedback and be generous with praise when it’s earned. You don't wait for sign-offs or permission; you push forward based on intuition and data.</span></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><span>‍ Tech Stack</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span>- Full-stack (TypeScript):</span></b><span> TypeScript, React, Next.js, Nx, Node.js, GraphQL — building and maintaining full-stack apps in a monorepo.</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span>- Data:</span></b><span> PostgreSQL, TypeORM, Redis — schema design, migrations, caching, and query performance.</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span>- Infrastructure:</span></b><span> AWS, Terraform, Docker — running and evolving cloud infra and containerized services.</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span>- Integrations:</span></b><span> Salesforce, Zendesk — CRM and support tooling, APIs, and sync patterns.</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span>- Marketing:</span></b><span> Customer.io or Iterable, Webflow, paid ads (Google, Meta, Microsoft), conversion tracking — lifecycle messaging, marketing sites, paid campaigns, and attribution.</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span>- AI:</span></b><span> LLM integration in production — prompting, tool use, RAG/agents, evaluation and safety, and when to use AI vs other approaches.</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span>- Quality &amp; observability: </span></b><span>Sentry, PostHog, Playwright — errors, product analytics, and reliable browser automation and E2E tests.</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span>- Data/analytics:</span></b><span> Python, Databricks — pipelines, notebooks, and analytics workflows.</span></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><span> Benefits</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span>- Comprehensive Health &amp; Wellness:</span></b><span> Access a full suite of medical, dental, and vision plans for you and your family, including $0 premium options and FSA/HSA accounts to suit your needs.</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span>- Time to Recharge: </span></b><span>Balance work and life with 15 days of accrued PTO, 11 paid federal holidays, and dedicated sick leave for recovery and medical appointments.</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span>- Family-First Support:</span></b><span> We provide 8 weeks of paid parental leave for all parents, plus an additional 2-week flex time transition period to help you ease back into work.</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span>- Professional Growth:</span></b><span> Invest in your career with a $500 annual learning stipend plus 2 dedicated Growth Days each year to focus exclusively on your professional development.</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span>- Flexible Remote Culture: </span></b><span>Work from wherever you are most productive. We use Slack and Gather to stay connected across time zones and host in-person team offsites up to six times per year.</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span>- Compensation &amp; Ownership: </span></b><span>We offer market-competitive salaries with performance-based raises and equity grants, ensuring every employee shares in Advocate’s long-term success.</span></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><span>️ Interview Process</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span>1. Application.</span></b><span> Our Tech Ops team will review your application. We’re looking to see how your skills and experience align with our needs.</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span>2. Culture Interview. </span></b><span>45-minute video call with Kyle, Head of Tech Ops. Our goal is to explore your motivations to join our team, learn why you'd be a great fit, and answer questions about us.</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span>3. Technical Interview. </span></b><span>75-minute video call with Kyle and Min, Tech Ops Product Engineer. You’ll choose from a list of current problem statements at the company – </span><i>things you could very well be working on</i><span> – and lead us through user interviews, requirements gathering, solutioning tradeoffs, and architecture diagramming. We want to see how you think and experience what it’s like to work with you on hard problems.</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span>4. Company Interview. </span></b><span>30-minute video call with our CTO, Charley.</span></div><div><br></div><div><b><span>5. Offer.</span></b><span> We’re a match! We’ll make you an offer to join the Advocate team!</span></div><div><br></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div class="text-small italic text-gray-700">We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.</div></div></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/advocate-product-engineer-tech-ops">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/advocate-product-engineer-tech-ops</a></p>
</description>

      <expires_at>Thu, 14 May 2026 20:31:29 +0000</expires_at>

    <item>
      <title>3pillar: AWS Certified DevOps Engineer</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Canada
</p>

<div class="content"><div class="section-wrapper page-full-width"><div class="section page-centered"><div>We are looking for a highly skilled <b>Senior AWS DevOps Engineer</b> with strong expertise in cloud infrastructure, automation, and modern DevOps practices. The ideal candidate is technically strong, proactive, a great communicator, and brings positive energy to the team.</div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Responsibilities:</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>&nbsp;Recommend best practices for AWS cloud architectures and use of AWS resources</li><li> Provide leadership in managing AWS resources, and the deployment of AWS resources&nbsp; </li><li>&nbsp;Manage the Continuous Integration and Release deployment processes (i.e. Bitbucket, GitLab, Github, etc. &amp; Terraform scripts)&nbsp; &nbsp;</li><li>Manage Kubernetes clusters and related tooling&nbsp; &nbsp;</li><li>Establish and ensure that comprehensive AWS disaster recovery architecture is maintained and operations are in place that comply with required RPOs and RTOs during business continuity events·&nbsp; </li><li>Participate in IT/AWS/Azure strategic planning, project planning, and budget planning efforts</li><li>Establish and maintain strong partnerships with AWS vendors and service suppliers &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; </li><li>Assist with the update and maintenance of AWS assets to ensure all systems are secure and up to date·&nbsp; &nbsp;</li><li>Assist with the configuration, administration, and optimization of Enterprise IT monitoring tools to ensure proactive detection, alerting, and resolution of system issues. &nbsp; &nbsp; </li><li>Partner and guide cross-functional teams to ensure successful delivery of AWS related solutions</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Qualifications:</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>&nbsp;10+ years’ experience in AWS and Azure infrastructure and cloud management·&nbsp; &nbsp;</li><li> 5+ years’ experience with management of AWS and Azure resources·&nbsp; &nbsp; </li><li>&nbsp;5+ years’ experience in CI/CD Pipelines and Terraform·&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;</li><li> Experience with Docker and Kubernetes·&nbsp; &nbsp; </li><li>&nbsp;Experience with scripting languages (e.g. Python, PowerShell, Bash, etc.)·&nbsp; &nbsp; </li><li>&nbsp;Prior experience in a senior level role(s) in an IT organization·&nbsp; &nbsp; </li><li>&nbsp;Extensive knowledge of AWS cloud center operations, network engineering, enterprise applications, security, and production support·&nbsp; &nbsp; </li><li>&nbsp;Ability to see “big picture” across areas such as private and public hosted infrastructure and services, identity management, security, telecommunications, enterprise storage, big data opportunities, and end user experience·&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; Proficient in AWS cloud native resources·&nbsp; </li><li>&nbsp;Demonstrated critical thinking skills and ability to plan at a strategic, global level·&nbsp; &nbsp; </li><li>&nbsp;Strong leadership and technical skills·&nbsp; &nbsp; </li><li>&nbsp;Ability to communicate complex technical topics to a wide variety of audiences·&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; </li><li>&nbsp;Prior experience in the Life Sciences industry preferred</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>what is it like to work at 3Pillar:</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>At 3Pillar, we offer a world of opportunity:Imagine a flexible work environment – whether it's the office, your home, or a blend of both. </li><li>From interviews to onboarding, we embody a remote-first approach.&nbsp;</li><li>You will be part of a global team, learning from top talent around the world and across cultures, speaking English everyday.</li><li> Our global workforce enables our team to leverage global resources to accomplish our work in efficient and effective teams.&nbsp;We’re big on your well-being – as a company, we spend a whole trimester in our annual cycle focused on wellbeing. </li><li>Whether it is taking advantage of fitness offerings, mental health plans (country-dependent), or simply leveraging generous time off, we want all of our team members operating at their best.</li><li> Our professional services model enables us to accelerate career growth and development opportunities - across projects, offerings, and industries. </li><li>We are an equal opportunity employer. It goes without saying that we live by values like Intrinsic Dignity and Open Collaboration to create cutting-edge technology AND reinforce our commitment to diversity - globally and locally.&nbsp;</li><li>Join us and be a part of a global tech community!  &nbsp;Check out our <a class="postings-link" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/3pillar-global">Linkedin</a> site and <a class="postings-link" href="https://www.3pillarglobal.com/company-culture/">Careers</a> page to learn more about what it’s like to be part of our #oneteam!&nbsp;</li></ul></ul></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div class="text-small italic text-gray-700">We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.</div></div></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/3pillar-aws-certified-devops-engineer">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/3pillar-aws-certified-devops-engineer</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Hitachi Vantara Corporation: Lead Full Stack Developer (UI/UX)</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote,India
</p>

<div class="ewa-rteLine"><strong>Our Company</strong></div><br><div class="ewa-rteLine"><br><div class="ewa-rteLine">&nbsp;</div><br><div class="ewa-rteLine">We’re Hitachi Digital, a company at the forefront of digital transformation and the fastest growing division of Hitachi Group. We’re crucial to the company’s strategy and ambition to become a premier global player in the massive and fast-moving digital transformation market.</div><br><div class="ewa-rteLine">&nbsp;</div><br><div class="ewa-rteLine">Our group companies, including GlobalLogic, Hitachi Digital Services, Hitachi Vantara and more, offer comprehensive services that span the entire digital lifecycle, from initial idea to full-scale operation and the infrastructure to run it on. Hitachi Digital represents One Hitachi, integrating domain knowledge and digital capabilities, and harnessing the power of the entire portfolio of services, technologies, and partnerships, to accelerate synergy creation and make real-world impact for our customers and society as a whole.</div><br><div class="ewa-rteLine">&nbsp;</div><br><div class="ewa-rteLine">Imagine the sheer breadth of talent it takes to unleash a digital future. We don’t expect you to ‘fit’ every requirement – your life experience, character, perspective, and passion for achieving great things in the world are equally as important to us.</div><br><div class="ewa-rteLine">&nbsp;</div><br></div><br><p><strong>The Team</strong></p><br><p>As a Full Stack Developer, you will design and develop end-to-end web applications, ensuring seamless integration between front-end and back-end systems. You will focus on intuitive UI/UX, robust APIs, and data visualization using Looker BI, while leveraging best practices for scalability, security, and performance.</p><br><p><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p><br><p><strong>The Role</strong></p><br><p>Application Development</p><br><p>Design and implement responsive, user-friendly interfaces using React.js and modern UI frameworks.<br>Develop and maintain RESTful APIs and backend services using Python and Node.js.<br>Integrate Looker BI dashboards and embed analytics into applications for actionable insights.<br>Ensure cross-browser compatibility, accessibility, and mobile responsiveness.</p><br><p>Architecture &amp; Integration</p><br><p>Collaborate with architects to align solutions with enterprise standards and cloud-native patterns.<br>Integrate applications with databases, authentication systems, and third-party APIs.<br>Optimize application performance and scalability across distributed environments.</p><br><p>Quality &amp; Governance</p><br><p>Implement secure coding practices, data protection, and compliance controls.<br>Conduct code reviews, unit testing, and maintain CI/CD pipelines for continuous delivery.<br>Document architecture decisions, workflows, and best practices.</p><br><p>&nbsp;</p><br><p><strong>What you’ll bring</strong></p><br><p>Bachelor’s or Master’s in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field.<br>5+ years of experience in full-stack development.<br>Strong proficiency in React.js, JavaScript/TypeScript, and modern UI frameworks.<br>Hands-on experience with Python and Node.js for backend development.<br>Experience with Looker BI or similar BI tools for data visualization.<br>Familiarity with SQL/NoSQL databases and API integration.<br>Understanding of UI/UX principles, responsive design, and accessibility standards.</p><br><p>Preferred Qualifications</p><br><p>Experience with cloud platforms (GCP preferred; AWS/Azure a plus).<br>Knowledge of containerization (Docker, Kubernetes) and microservices architecture.<br>Exposure to CI/CD tools (GitHub Actions, Jenkins) and DevOps practices.<br>Familiarity with data analytics, ETL pipelines, and data modeling.</p><br><p>Key Competencies</p><br><p>Strong problem-solving and debugging skills.<br>Ability to translate business requirements into intuitive user experiences.<br>Collaborative mindset with excellent communication skills.<br>Passion for clean, maintainable code and modern development practices.</p><br><p>Success Metrics</p><br><p>Delivery of high-quality, responsive applications meeting UI/UX standards.<br>Integration of Looker BI dashboards for actionable insights.<br>Reduction in application latency and improved scalability.<br>Positive user feedback on usability and performance.</p><br><p>What You’ll Work With</p><br><p>Front-End: React.js, TypeScript, CSS-in-JS frameworks.<br>Back-End: Python (Flask/Django), Node.js (Express), RESTful APIs.<br>Data &amp; BI: Looker BI, SQL/NoSQL databases.<br>Cloud &amp; DevOps: GCP (preferred), Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines.</p><br><div class="ewa-rteLine"><br><div class="ewa-rteLine">&nbsp;</div><br><div class="ewa-rteLine"><strong>About us</strong></div><br><div class="ewa-rteLine">&nbsp;</div><br><div class="ewa-rteLine"><br><div class="ewa-rteLine">We’re a global, 1000-stong, diverse team of professional experts, promoting and delivering Social Innovation through our One Hitachi initiative (OT x IT x Product) and working on projects that have a real-world impact. We’re curious, passionate and empowered, blending our legacy of 110 years of innovation with our shaping our future. Here you’re not just another employee; you’re part of a tradition of excellence and a community working towards creating a digital future.</div><br><div class="ewa-rteLine">&nbsp;</div><br><div class="ewa-rteLine">#LI-AP1</div><br></div><br></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/hitachi-vantara-corporation-lead-full-stack-developer-ui-ux">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/hitachi-vantara-corporation-lead-full-stack-developer-ui-ux</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Nextiva: Director, Product Management (AI Agent Platform)</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> United States (Remote)
</p>

<div class=""><br><div class="content-intro"><h3>&nbsp;</h3><br><p class="x_elementtoproof"><strong><span><span>Redefine the future of customer experiences. One conversation at a time.</span><br></span></strong></p><br><p class="x_elementtoproof">At Nextiva, we’re reimagining how businesses connect, bringing together customer experience and team collaboration on a single, conversation centric platform. Powered by AI, driven by human innovation.</p><br><p class="x_elementtoproof">Our culture is forward thinking, customer obsessed and built on the belief that meaningful connections drive better business outcomes. Whether it’s through our signature Amazing Service®, the technology we create, or the experiences we cultivate, connection is at the core of who we are.</p><br><p class="x_elementtoproof">If you’re ready to collaborate with incredible people, make an impact, and help businesses everywhere deliver truly amazing experiences, this is where you belong.</p><br><p class="x_elementtoproof"><span><strong>Build Amazing. Deliver Amazing. Live Amazing. Be Amazing.</strong></span></p><br><div>&nbsp;</div><br><h3>&nbsp;</h3><br><p>&nbsp;</p></div><br><p>Nextiva is at the forefront of redefining customer engagement with AI-powered communication solutions. We are looking for a <strong>Director of Product Management, AI Agents Platform</strong>&nbsp;to lead the strategic vision, development, and go-to-market execution of our next-generation agentic platform — enabling intelligent, multi-channel AI agents that deliver seamless communication experiences for businesses.</p><br><p>This is a <strong>high-impact leadership role</strong> driving the evolution of Nextiva’s AI capabilities. You will oversee the product lifecycle for the AI Agent Platform, bridging innovation from our engineering teams with market needs across sales, marketing, and customer success.</p><br><p><strong>Key Responsibilities:</strong></p><br><h4>Strategic Leadership</h4><br><ul><br><li>Define and drive the product vision, strategy, and roadmap for Nextiva’s AI Agent Platform, focusing on scalable, modular agentic solutions.</li><br><li>Lead and mentor a team of product managers across the AI product portfolio.</li><br><li>Partner with executive leadership to align AI initiatives with company objectives and market differentiation goals.</li><br><li>Establish clear success metrics for adoption, engagement, and business impact of AI-driven products.</li><br></ul><br><h4>Product Development &amp; Market Expertise</h4><br><ul><br><li>Deeply understand the <strong>agentic AI ecosystem</strong>, including intelligent virtual assistants (IVAs), conversational AI, and multi-agent architectures.</li><br><li>Identify and prioritize use cases such as <strong>payment collection</strong>, <strong>FAQ support</strong>, and <strong>transactional agents</strong>&nbsp;across communication channels (voice, chat, SMS).</li><br><li>Collaborate closely with engineering and data science teams to design and deliver robust, high-performing AI agents.</li><br><li>Stay at the forefront of AI innovation — understanding emerging technologies, tools, and frameworks in the agentic and LLM space.</li><br></ul><br><h4>Cross-Functional Collaboration</h4><br><ul><br><li>Serve as the <strong>product liaison</strong>&nbsp;between the India-based development teams and the U.S. go-to-market organization.</li><br><li>Work directly with <strong>sales, marketing, and customer success</strong>&nbsp;to translate complex AI capabilities into clear value propositions.</li><br><li>Ensure internal teams are equipped to position, demo, and sell AI agent products effectively.</li><br><li>Drive collaboration on documentation, enablement, and customer education for AI product launches.</li><br></ul><br><h4>Customer &amp; Market Engagement</h4><br><ul><br><li>Engage directly with enterprise customers to understand evolving needs in AI automation and customer experience.</li><br><li>Act as a <strong>customer-facing evangelist</strong>&nbsp;for Nextiva’s AI capabilities — participating in client meetings, product demos, and industry events.</li><br><li>Build strategic relationships with external partners and platforms in the AI ecosystem.</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>Qualifications</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>10+ years of product management experience, with at least 4+ in a leadership capacity overseeing AI, SaaS, or communication platform products.</li><br><li>Strong understanding of <strong>agentic AI systems</strong>, LLM orchestration, and enterprise AI deployment.</li><br><li>Proven success leading cross-functional teams and scaling products in complex, global environments.</li><br><li>Experience working in customer-facing roles; able to articulate complex technology in simple, outcome-driven narratives.</li><br><li>Background in <strong>UCaaS, CCaaS</strong>, or communication-centric software products strongly preferred.</li><br><li>Excellent communication and leadership skills with the ability to bridge technical and business domains.</li><br><li>Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field; MBA or advanced degree preferred.</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>What You’ll Bring</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>A passion for AI-driven customer engagement and automation.</li><br><li>The ability to translate vision into strategy — and strategy into execution.</li><br><li>A growth mindset and a collaborative leadership style.</li><br><li>Comfort operating in a fast-paced, globally distributed organization.</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>Nextiva DNA</strong> (Core Competencies)</p><br><p>Nextiva’s most successful team members share common traits and behaviors:</p><br><ul><br><li><strong>Drives Results:</strong>&nbsp;Action-oriented with a passion for solving problems. They bring clarity and <strong>simplicity</strong> to ambiguous situations, challenge the status quo, and ask what can be done differently. They lead and drive change, celebrating success to build more success.</li><br><li><strong>Critical Thinker:</strong> Understands the "why" and identifies key drivers, learning from the past. They are fact-based and data-driven, <strong>forward-thinking</strong>, and see problems a few steps ahead. They provide options, recommendations, and actions, understanding risks and dependencies.</li><br><li><strong>Right Attitude:</strong> They are team-oriented, collaborative, competitive, and hate losing. They are resilient, able to bounce back from setbacks, zoom in and out, and get in the trenches to help solve important problems. They cultivate a culture of service, learning, support, and respect, <strong>caring</strong> for customers and teams.</li><br></ul><br><p><strong><span>Total Rewards</span></strong><span>&nbsp;</span></p><br><p><span>Our Total Rewards offerings are designed to allow Nexties to take care of themselves and their families so they can be their best, in and out of the office.</span><span>&nbsp;</span></p><br><p><span>Our compensation packages are tailored to each role and candidate's qualifications. We consider a wide range of factors, including skills, experience, training, and certifications, when determining compensation. We aim to offer competitive salaries or wages that reflect the value you bring to our team. Depending on the position, compensation may include base salary and/or hourly wages, incentives, or bonuses.</span><span>&nbsp;</span></p><br><p><span>The expected hiring range is $160,000-$300,000. A different level in the job hierarchy may apply to a specific candidate, resulting in a different hiring range.</span><span>&nbsp;</span></p><br><ul><br><li><strong><span>Health  - </span></strong><span>Multiple health plan options to suit your needs, including medical, dental, vision, and telemedicine coverage</span><span>&nbsp;</span></li><br><li><strong><span>Insurance  - </span></strong><span>Life, disability, and supplemental indemnity plans</span><span>&nbsp;</span></li><br><li><strong><span>Work-Life Balance </span></strong><strong><span>️</span></strong><strong><span> - </span></strong><span>Flexible Time Off (FTO) for salaried employees, PTO for hourly employees, Paid Sick Time (PST), paid parental bonding leave, and paid holidays</span><span>&nbsp;</span></li><br><li><strong><span>Financial Security </span></strong><strong><span></span></strong><strong><span> - </span></strong><span>401(k) with company match, Health Savings Accounts with company contributions, Dependent Care FSA</span><span>&nbsp;</span></li><br><li><strong><span>Wellness ‍ - </span></strong><span>Employee Assistance Program and comprehensive wellness initiatives</span><span>&nbsp;</span></li><br><li><strong><span>Growth  - </span></strong><span>Access to ongoing learning and development opportunities and career advancement</span><span>&nbsp;</span></li><br></ul><br><p><span>At Nextiva, we're committed to supporting our employees' health, well-being, and professional growth. Join us and build a rewarding career!</span><span>&nbsp;</span></p><br><p><span><em>Nextiva is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We prohibit discrimination and harassment of any type without regard to race, color, religion, age, sex, national origin, disability status, genetics, protected veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state or local laws. </em><em>Nextiva participates in the E-Verify Program where and as required by law. For additional information about E-Verify visit <a href="https://e-verify.uscis.gov/web/media/resourcesContents/E-Verify_Participation_Poster_ES.pdf">USCIS</a></em>.&nbsp;</span></p><br><p>#LI-MS1&nbsp; &nbsp;#LI-Remote</p><br><div class="content-conclusion"><p></p><br><p class="x_elementtoproof"><span>Founded in 2008, Nextiva has grown into a global leader trusted by over 100,000 businesses and 1M+ users worldwide. Headquartered in Scottsdale, Arizona, and with teams across the globe, we're the future of customer experience and team collaboration through our AI-powered, conversation-centric platform.</span></p><br><p class="x_elementtoproof">Want to see what life at Nextiva is all about? Connect with us on <a href="https://www.instagram.com/nextiva">Instagram</a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://www.instagram.com/nextivamexico">Instagram MX</a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://www.youtube.com/user/NextivaOfficial">YouTube</a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/nextiva">LinkedIn</a>, and the&nbsp;<a href="https://www.nextiva.com/blog/">Nextiva Blog</a>.</p><br><p></p></div><br></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/nextiva-director-product-management-ai-agent-platform">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/nextiva-director-product-management-ai-agent-platform</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Mdn: Firefox Product Marketing Lead - Desktop</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote US
</p>

<div class="job__description body"><div><div class="gmail_default"><br><div><br><p><strong>Why Mozilla?</strong></p><br><p><span>Mozilla Corporation is the non-profit-backed technology company that has shaped the internet for the better over the last 25 years. We make pioneering brands like Firefox, the privacy-minded web browser. Now, with more than 225 million people around the world using our products each month, we’re shaping the next 25 years of technology and helping to reclaim an internet built for people, not companies. Our work focuses on diverse areas including AI, social media, security and more. And we’re doing this while never losing our focus on our core mission – to make the internet better for people.&nbsp;</span></p><br><p><span>The Mozilla Corporation is wholly owned by the non-profit 501(c) Mozilla Foundation. This means we aren’t beholden to any shareholders — only to our mission. Along with thousands of volunteer contributors and collaborators all over the world, Mozillians design, build and distribute </span><strong>open-source</strong><span> software that enables people to enjoy the internet on their terms.&nbsp;</span></p><br><p><strong>About this team and role:</strong></p><br><p><span>Most people don’t think about their browser. Let’s change that.&nbsp;</span></p><br><p><span>Firefox is looking for an experienced product and growth marketer who can think creatively and drive results. You’ll focus on our browser products, working closely with product and marketing leadership to build and communicate a delightful, compelling alternative to big tech browsers.&nbsp;</span></p><br><p><span>Firefox is a uniquely compelling opportunity – a brand people know and love, poised for real growth in the AI era, with a marketing challenge that will stand out on any resume. You’ll work globally and out in the open, sharpening the Firefox value proposition, growth strategy and product experience together with the broader open source community.&nbsp;</span></p><br><p><strong>What you’ll do:&nbsp;</strong></p><br><ul><br><li><span>Deliver against Firefox desktop growth targets, working closely with product development, acquisition marketing, and integrated campaigns teams to implement an effective growth strategy and achieve daily active usage goals.</span><span><br></span></li><br><li><span>Author the audience and positioning strategies for desktop browser products and features, building a clear “who” and “why” which inform the user journey.</span></li><br><li><span>Bring exciting new functionality to market, owning the release marketing calendar and feature marketing prioritization across the Firefox desktop product teams.</span><span><br></span></li><br><li><span>Improve new user retention by building effective user journeys spanning product usage and lifecycle marketing comms.</span><span><br></span></li><br><li><span>Shape the product experience by contributing user insights, articulating customer needs, and partnering with product development and design on the felt product experience.</span></li><br><li><span>Guide the Firefox marketing strategy by connecting our campaigns and programs to the feature launches and product truths that most effectively drive growth</span></li><br></ul><br><p><strong>What you’ll bring:&nbsp;</strong></p><br><ul><br><li><span>8+ years of experience in product marketing, with consumer marketing experience preferable but not required</span><span><br></span></li><br><li><span>You’re a growth-focused marketer with experience using rapid experimentation and measurement to drive performance gains. You can diagnose the health of a marketing funnel, then pick the right focus areas to drive the most impact. </span><span><br></span></li><br><li><span>You’re a trusted collaborator on software teams, contributing to product roadmaps and synthesizing strategic business insights.&nbsp;</span></li><br><li><span>You’re an adept generalist who can serve as the connective tissue between brand, creative, product design, and product management teams, across geographies.</span></li><br><li><span>You can own the go-to-market lifecycle, taking a launch from brief to launch to clear next steps for the business.</span></li><br><li><span>You make rooms more creative by framing problems effectively, facilitating great conversations, and contributing bright ideas of your own.&nbsp;</span></li><br><li><span>You’re passionate about Mozilla’s mission to make the internet a healthier, more open place.</span></li><br></ul><br><p><strong>What you’ll get:</strong></p><br><ul><br><li><span>Generous performance-based bonus plans to all eligible employees - we share in our success as one team</span></li><br><li><span>Rich medical, dental, and vision coverage</span></li><br><li><span>Generous retirement contributions with 100% immediate vesting (regardless of whether you contribute)</span></li><br><li><span>Quarterly all-company wellness days where everyone takes a pause together</span></li><br><li><span>Country specific holidays plus a day off for your birthday</span></li><br><li><span>One-time home office stipend</span></li><br><li><span>Annual professional development budget</span></li><br><li><span>Quarterly well-being stipend</span></li><br><li><span>Considerable paid parental leave</span></li><br><li><span>Employee referral bonus program</span></li><br><li><span>Other benefits (life/AD&amp;D, disability, EAP, etc. - varies by country)</span></li><br></ul><br><p><strong>About Mozilla&nbsp;</strong></p><br><p>Mozilla exists to build the Internet as a public resource accessible to all because we believe that open and free is better than closed and controlled. When you work at Mozilla, you give yourself a chance to make a difference in the lives of Web users everywhere. And you give us a chance to make a difference in your life every single day. Join us to work on the Web as the platform and help create more opportunity and innovation for everyone online.</p><br><p><strong>Commitment to diversity, equity, inclusion, and belonging</strong></p><br><p>Mozilla understands that valuing diverse creative practices and forms of knowledge are crucial to and enrich the company’s core mission.&nbsp; We encourage applications from everyone, including members of all equity-seeking communities, such as (but certainly not limited to) women, racialized and Indigenous persons, persons with disabilities, persons of all sexual orientation<span>s, </span>gender identities, and expressions.</p><br><p>We will ensure that qualified individuals with disabilities are provided reasonable accommodations to participate in the job application or interview process, to perform essential job functions, and to receive other benefits and privileges of employment, as appropriate. Please contact us at <a class="external-link" href="mailto:hiringaccommodation@mozilla.com">hiringaccommodation@mozilla.com</a> to request accommodation.</p><br><p>We are an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate on the basis of race (including hairstyle and texture), religion (including religious grooming and dress practices), gender, gender identity, gender expression, color, national origin, pregnancy, ancestry, domestic partner status, disability, sexual orientation, age, genetic predisposition, medical condition, marital status, citizenship status, military or veteran status, or any other basis covered by applicable laws.&nbsp; Mozilla will not tolerate discrimination or harassment based on any of these characteristics or any other unlawful behavior, conduct, or purpose.</p><br><p>Group: C</p><br><p>#LI-REMOTE</p><br><p>Req ID: R3027</p><br></div><br></div></div><div class="job__pay-ranges"><div class="pay-range"><div class="description"><div class="body"><span><p><strong>Hiring Ranges:</strong></p></span></div></div><p class="body body--medium">US Tier 1 Locations</p><p class="body">$163,000 - $217,000 USD</p></div><div class="pay-range"><p class="body body--medium">US Tier 2 Locations</p><p class="body">$150,000 - $200,000 USD</p></div><div class="pay-range"><p class="body body--medium">US Tier 3 Locations</p><p class="body">$138,000 - $185,000 USD</p></div></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/mdn-firefox-product-marketing-lead-desktop">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/mdn-firefox-product-marketing-lead-desktop</a></p>
</description>

    <item>
      <title>Dropbox: CX Video Content Design Intern (Summer 2026)</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote - Canada: Select locations
</p>

<div class=""><br><h2>Role Description</h2><br><p><span class="author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qowz81zz86zctypz68zz88znaz83zrdwz73zcvz80z8z72z75z72zsh25z80zgz86zz72z">We’re looking for a Video Content Design Intern to support the creation and maintenance of customer-facing educational videos. In this role, you’ll work closely with content designers, multimedia partners, and cross-functional stakeholders to help update, organize, and publish video tutorials and learning content across Dropbox’s education platforms.</span></p><br><p><span class="author-d-1gg9uz65z1iz85zgdz68zmqkz84zo2qowz81zz86zctypz68zz88znaz83zrdwz73zcvz80z8z72z75z72zsh25z80zgz86zz72z">You’ll contribute to projects that keep our video library accurate, easy to navigate, and helpful at scale. This is a hands-on opportunity to learn how educational content is planned, produced, reviewed, and maintained for a global audience.     <item>
      <title>Yugabytedb: Senior Director, Product Management</title>
      <region>Anywhere in the World</region>
      <country></country>
      <state></state>
      <skills></skills>
      <category>Full-Stack Programming</category>
      <type>Full-Time</type>
      <description>

<p>
  <strong>Headquarters:</strong> United States
</p>

<div class="job__description body"><div><p>At <strong>Yugabyte</strong>, we are on a mission to become the default transactional database for enterprises building cloud-native applications. YugabyteDB is our PostgreSQL-compatible distributed database for cloud-native apps. Resilient, scalable, and flexible, it runs on any cloud and enables developers to become instantly productive using well-known APIs.We are looking for talented and driven people to join us on our ambitious mission and help us build a lasting and impactful company.The transactional database market is estimated to grow to $64B by 2025. YugabyteDB is cloud-native by design, has on-demand horizontal scalability, and supports geographical distribution of data using built-in replication. This means that we are well-positioned to meet market demand for geo-distributed, high-scale, high-performance workloads.<br><br><strong>Join the Database Revolution at Yugabyte.<br><br></strong>Modern applications need a cloud-native database that eliminates tradeoffs and silos. YugabyteDB retains the power and familiarity of PostgreSQL by pairing its trusted API with a precision-engineered, distributed, cloud-native architecture. Even better, it’s 100% open source. Many of the world's leading enterprises are migrating from legacy RDBMSs (like Oracle, SQL Server, and DB2) to YugabyteDB, to meet their mission-critical app demands.</p></div><div><p><strong>Senior Director of Product Management</strong></p><br><p>As a Senior Director of Product Management, you'll play a pivotal role in shaping the future of YugabyteDB’s Cloud offerings - Yugabyte Aeon.</p><br><p>You'll lead the roadmap, development, and enhancement of Aeon’s features, ensuring they meet the evolving needs of our customers and the broader market. Your work will directly impact the user experience, distribution, partnerships, and growth of YugabyteDB Aeon, reinforcing YugabyteDB leadership in the distributed database space.</p><br><p><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p><br><p><strong>What You'll Do</strong></p><br><ul><br><li><strong>Lead Cloud Product Development:</strong> Drive Cloud features, our commercial portfolio (pricing, plans, BYOC offering),&nbsp; deepening our Cloud ecosystem integration, expanding our distribution through CSP marketplaces</li><br><li><strong>Customer-Centric Innovation:</strong> Engage with customers to gather feedback, understand pain points, and identify opportunities for product improvement.</li><br><li><strong>Cross-Functional Collaboration:</strong> Work closely with engineering, marketing, sales, and support teams to align product strategies and ensure successful feature rollouts.</li><br><li><strong>Market Analysis:</strong> Stay abreast of industry trends, competitor offerings, and emerging technologies to inform product decisions.</li><br><li><strong>Data-Driven Decision Making: </strong>Utilize analytics and user feedback to prioritize features and enhancements that deliver maximum value.</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>What Will You Need to Have</strong></p><br><ul><br><li><strong>Data systems SaaS Experience: </strong>You’ve taken database, or similar infrastructure data systems, to market as a SaaS platform; have a deep understanding of the ins and outs of working with CSPs technical and commercial ecosystem</li><br><li><strong>Technical Expertise:</strong> Strong background in computer science or a related field, with a deep understanding of databases, storage systems, and distributed architectures.</li><br><li><strong>Product Management Experience: </strong>Proven track record in product management, with experience in both inbound (product development) and outbound (go-to-market) activities.</li><br><li><strong>Exceptional Communication Skills:</strong> Ability to articulate complex technical concepts to diverse audiences, including customers, engineers, and executives.<strong><br></strong></li><br><li><strong>Impactful Leadership: </strong>Demonstrated success in leading the development of substantial features or products that have significantly impacted customers and/or business outcomes.</li><br><li><strong>Customer Focus:</strong> A strong commitment to understanding and addressing customer needs, ensuring that product decisions are aligned with user requirements.</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p><br><p><strong>Extra Great If You Have</strong></p><br><ul><br><li>Experience with PostgreSQL/SQL databases&nbsp;</li><br><li>Previous experience working on products for developers and operators alike</li><br></ul><br><p>We feel strongly about equal pay for equal work, and transparency in compensation is one way to help achieve that. The cash compensation for this role is market competitive, with a range of <strong>$255,000–$300,000 USD OTE</strong>. As well as equity (when applicable), and benefits including health plans, retirement plans, and unlimited paid time off (PTO). The pay range for this position is a general guideline only and not a guarantee of compensation or salary. The actual pay will vary based on factors including experience, qualifications, and skill level.</p><br><p><em>Due to the Proclamation, “Restriction on Entry of Certain Nonimmigrant Workers”, which went into effect on September 21, 2025, at this time we are no longer able to sponsor new H-1B visa petitions filed after September 21, 2025 for new hires. We are still able to consider candidates who require H-1B extensions, changes of employer, or other types of work authorization.</em></p><br><p><em>#LI-Remote</em></p></div><div><div><span><strong>Equal Employment Opportunity Statement</strong>:</span></div><br><div><span>As an equal opportunity employer, Yugabyte is committed to a diverse workforce. Employment decisions regarding recruitment and selection will be made without discrimination based on race, color, religion, national origin, gender, age, sexual orientation, physical or mental disability, genetic information or characteristic, gender identity and expression, veteran status, or other non-job related characteristics or other prohibited grounds specified in applicable federal, state and local laws.&nbsp;</span></div><br><div>&nbsp;</div><br><div><span>To review Yugabyte's Privacy Policy please visit <a href="https://www.yugabyte.com/privacy-policy/#:~:text=Communicate%20with%20Customers%3A%20We%20use,up%20to%20date%20with%20what%27s">Yugabyte Privacy Notice</a>.</span></div></div></div>

<p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/yugabytedb-senior-director-product-management">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/yugabytedb-senior-director-product-management</a></p>
</description>
